msft.name: 微软
msft.oneLiner: 把 AI 装进 Windows、Office 与 Azure 云的软件巨头，OpenAI 最大投资方。
msft.oneLinerEn: The software giant embedding AI across Windows, Office and the Azure cloud — OpenAI's largest investor.
msft.tagline: 予力全球每一人、每一组织，成就不凡
msft.taglineEn: To empower every person and organization on the planet to achieve more
msft.subcategory: Azure 云 / 生产力软件
msft.business: 云计算(Azure)、生产力软件(Microsoft 365 + Copilot)、操作系统与游戏。Azure 是 OpenAI 模型的独家云底座。
msft.businessEn: Cloud computing (Azure), productivity software (Microsoft 365 + Copilot), operating systems and gaming. Azure is the exclusive cloud backbone for OpenAI's models.
msft.description: 微软是全球最重要的 AI 玩家之一,凭借三大王牌卡位这轮浪潮:一是对 OpenAI 累计数百亿美元的投资与独家云合作,把最前沿的模型能力接进自家产品;二是把生成式 AI(Copilot)全面装进 Windows、Office(Microsoft 365)、GitHub 与安全等亿级用户的软件里,让 AI 触达无数企业与个人;三是 Azure 云——既是 OpenAI 训练/推理的算力底座,也是企业调用各家大模型的主要平台。微软不追求自己造出最强模型,而是用「投资 + 平台 + 分发」把 AI 变成能大规模变现的生产力,是把 AI 商业化做得最扎实的科技巨头之一。
msft.descriptionEn: Microsoft is one of the world's most important AI players, positioned in this wave with three trump cards: first, tens of billions of dollars invested in OpenAI plus an exclusive cloud partnership, wiring the most frontier model capabilities into its own products; second, building generative AI (Copilot) throughout Windows, Office (Microsoft 365), GitHub and security — software used by billions — bringing AI to countless enterprises and individuals; and third, the Azure cloud, both the compute backbone for OpenAI's training/inference and a primary platform for enterprises to call many models. Microsoft doesn't aim to build the single strongest model but uses "investment + platform + distribution" to turn AI into productivity that monetizes at scale — one of the tech giants executing AI commercialization most solidly.
whyItMatters: 数百亿美元投资 OpenAI + Azure 独家云,绑定最深
Copilot 装进 Windows/Office/GitHub,触达亿级用户
Azure 既是 OpenAI 算力底座,也是企业调模型主平台
「投资+平台+分发」把 AI 大规模变现

googl.name: 谷歌母公司
googl.oneLiner: 搜索 + 安卓 + 云 + DeepMind，AI 研究与产品最全面的公司之一。
googl.oneLinerEn: Search + Android + Cloud + DeepMind — one of the most complete AI research-and-product companies.
googl.tagline: 整合全球信息，供大众使用
googl.taglineEn: To organize the world's information and make it universally accessible and useful
googl.business: 广告(搜索/YouTube)、谷歌云、安卓生态。旗下 DeepMind 产出 Gemini、AlphaFold、Waymo，自研 TPU 芯片。
googl.businessEn: Advertising (Search/YouTube), Google Cloud and the Android ecosystem. Its DeepMind unit produces Gemini, AlphaFold and Waymo, and Google designs its own TPU chips.
googl.description: 谷歌母公司 Alphabet 是 AI 布局最「全栈」的公司之一——从底层芯片、模型研究到面向数十亿用户的产品全都自己做。它自研 TPU 芯片(自己的 AI 算力,不完全依赖英伟达);旗下 DeepMind 是世界顶级 AI 研究机构,产出 Gemini 前沿大模型、拿下诺奖的 AlphaFold(蛋白质结构预测)、以及自动驾驶 Waymo;它还把 AI 装进搜索、YouTube、安卓、Workspace 与谷歌云。谷歌的挑战在于:AI 问答可能冲击其搜索广告的现金牛,因此它必须一边守住搜索、一边用 Gemini 反攻。凭借芯片-模型-数据-产品-分发的完整闭环,谷歌是唯一能在每一层都与对手抗衡的 AI 巨头。
googl.descriptionEn: Alphabet (Google's parent) is one of the most "full-stack" AI companies — building everything from underlying chips to model research to products for billions of users. It designs its own TPU chips (its own AI compute, not fully reliant on NVIDIA); its DeepMind unit is a top-tier AI research lab producing the frontier Gemini models, the Nobel-winning AlphaFold (protein-structure prediction) and the Waymo self-driving car; and it builds AI into Search, YouTube, Android, Workspace and Google Cloud. Google's challenge: AI answers could disrupt its search-advertising cash cow, so it must defend search while counterattacking with Gemini. With a complete loop of chips-models-data-products-distribution, Google is the only AI giant that can compete with rivals at every layer.
whyItMatters: AI 布局最全栈:自研 TPU + DeepMind + 全线产品
DeepMind 产出 Gemini、诺奖 AlphaFold、Waymo
AI 问答冲击搜索广告,须守搜索并用 Gemini 反攻
芯片-模型-数据-产品-分发完整闭环,每层都能抗衡

nvda.name: 英伟达
nvda.oneLiner: AI 算力的「卖铲人」，GPU 与 CUDA 生态的绝对龙头。
nvda.oneLinerEn: The "shovel seller" of AI compute — the undisputed leader in GPUs and the CUDA ecosystem.
nvda.tagline: 为 AI 时代提供加速计算
nvda.taglineEn: Accelerated computing for the age of AI
nvda.business: 数据中心 GPU(H100/Blackwell)、CUDA 软件栈、NVLink 互联、机器人(GR00T)与汽车平台。
nvda.businessEn: Data-center GPUs (H100/Blackwell), the CUDA software stack, NVLink interconnect, robotics (GR00T) and automotive platforms.
nvda.description: 英伟达是全球加速计算的领导者。其 GPU、CUDA 软件平台与高速网络/系统，已成为现代 AI 基础设施的根基——从训练前沿大模型到大规模推理部署，几乎所有 AI 算力都跑在英伟达之上。
nvda.descriptionEn: NVIDIA is the global leader in accelerated computing. Its GPUs, CUDA software platform and high-speed networking/systems have become the foundation of modern AI infrastructure — from training frontier models to large-scale inference, almost all AI compute runs on NVIDIA.
whyItMatters: 数据中心 AI 训练 GPU 市场份额超过 90%
CUDA 软件生态构筑十余年的深厚护城河
Blackwell 平台供不应求，订单排到明年
对整个 AI 产业链具有系统级影响力

products.name: Blackwell
products.description: 新一代 AI 训练 / 推理 GPU 平台。

products.name: DGX
products.description: 开箱即用的 AI 超级计算机。

products.name: CUDA
products.description: 并行计算平台与编程模型，生态护城河。

products.name: Spectrum-X
products.description: 面向 AI 的高性能以太网平台。

products.name: NVLink
products.description: GPU 之间的高速互联。

products.name: Omniverse
products.description: 工业数字孪生与仿真平台。

news.title: Blackwell 平台全面售罄
news.summary: 新一代 GPU 需求超预期，产能排满。

news.title: 英伟达与沙特达成 AI 算力合作
news.summary: 向中东大型 AI 数据中心供应算力。

news.title: 市值站上 5 万亿美元
news.summary: 成为全球市值最高的公司之一。

tsla.name: 特斯拉
tsla.oneLiner: 电动车 + 自动驾驶(FSD) + 人形机器人(Optimus)的具身智能公司。
tsla.oneLinerEn: An embodied-AI company spanning EVs, self-driving (FSD) and the Optimus humanoid robot.
tsla.tagline: 加速世界向可持续能源转变
tsla.taglineEn: To accelerate the world's transition to sustainable energy
tsla.business: 电动汽车、储能、FSD 自动驾驶与 Robotaxi、Optimus 人形机器人，自研 Dojo 训练芯片。
tsla.businessEn: Electric vehicles, energy storage, FSD self-driving and Robotaxi, the Optimus humanoid robot, and the in-house Dojo training chip.
tsla.description: 特斯拉表面是电动车公司,内核越来越是一家「具身智能(physical AI)」公司。它把汽车当作一个装着摄像头、会自己开的机器人:FSD(完全自动驾驶)用纯视觉 + 端到端神经网络,靠全球数百万辆车回传的真实驾驶数据训练,并落地为 Robotaxi(无人出租)。同一套「感知-决策-执行」的 AI 与工程能力,被复用到 Optimus 人形机器人上——马斯克认为 Optimus 长期可能是特斯拉最大的价值来源。为支撑这些,特斯拉自研 Dojo 训练芯片与超算、自建电池与储能。它是把「AI 装进能在物理世界行动的硬件」这条路走得最激进的公司之一,但 FSD/机器人的兑现节奏与安全争议也让它估值高度分化。
tsla.descriptionEn: Tesla looks like an EV company but is increasingly, at its core, an "embodied AI (physical AI)" company. It treats the car as a robot full of cameras that drives itself: FSD (Full Self-Driving) uses pure vision + end-to-end neural networks, trained on real driving data streamed back from millions of cars worldwide, deployed as Robotaxi. The same "perceive-decide-act" AI and engineering is reused for the Optimus humanoid robot — Musk believes Optimus could long-term be Tesla's largest source of value. To support this, Tesla builds its own Dojo training chip and supercomputer, and its own batteries and energy storage. It is one of the most aggressive companies pursuing "AI in hardware that acts in the physical world," though the pace of delivering FSD/robots and safety controversies keep its valuation highly polarized.
whyItMatters: 把汽车当会自己开的机器人,FSD 纯视觉端到端
数百万辆车回传真实驾驶数据训练,落地 Robotaxi
同套 AI 复用到 Optimus 人形,长期最大价值来源
自研 Dojo 芯片/超算,最激进的具身 AI 玩家之一

meta.name: Meta
meta.oneLiner: 社交帝国，开源大模型 Llama 的推手。
meta.oneLinerEn: A social-media empire and the driving force behind the open-source Llama models.
meta.tagline: 构建拉近人与人距离的技术
meta.taglineEn: Building technology that brings people closer together
meta.business: 社交广告(Facebook/Instagram/WhatsApp)、Reality Labs(VR/AR)。Llama 开源模型推动了整个开源 AI 生态。
meta.businessEn: Social advertising (Facebook/Instagram/WhatsApp) and Reality Labs (VR/AR). Its open-source Llama models have propelled the entire open-source AI ecosystem.
meta.description: Meta(前 Facebook)坐拥 Facebook、Instagram、WhatsApp 等触达数十亿人的社交帝国,广告是其现金牛。在 AI 上,它做了一件影响深远的事:把自研的强大大模型 Llama 开源(权重公开、免费商用),直接托起了整个开源 AI 生态——无数创业公司、研究者与企业在 Llama 之上开发,形成对抗 OpenAI/谷歌闭源阵营的另一极。Meta 的算盘是:AI 越普及、开源越繁荣,越利好它这种「靠 AI 提升广告与内容、而非靠卖模型赚钱」的平台。它同时投入巨资建 AI 超算与自研芯片,并把 AI 融入内容推荐、广告、智能眼镜(Ray-Ban)与元宇宙。2025 年更以巨资挖角(收购 Scale AI、组建「超级智能」实验室)强攻前沿。
meta.descriptionEn: Meta (formerly Facebook) owns a social empire — Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp — reaching billions, with advertising as its cash cow. In AI it did something far-reaching: open-sourcing its powerful in-house Llama models (open weights, free for commercial use), directly propping up the entire open-source AI ecosystem — countless startups, researchers and enterprises build on Llama, forming a counterweight to the closed camps of OpenAI/Google. Meta's logic: the more AI spreads and open source flourishes, the better for a platform that "uses AI to boost ads and content rather than selling models." It invests heavily in AI supercomputers and in-house chips, and weaves AI into content recommendation, advertising, smart glasses (Ray-Ban) and the metaverse. In 2025 it pushed the frontier aggressively with big talent moves (acquiring Scale AI, forming a "superintelligence" lab).
whyItMatters: 把强大的 Llama 开源,托起整个开源 AI 生态
对抗 OpenAI/谷歌闭源阵营的另一极
AI 融入推荐/广告/Ray-Ban 智能眼镜/元宇宙
2025 收购 Scale AI、组建「超级智能」实验室强攻前沿

amd.name: 超威半导体
amd.oneLiner: 英伟达在 GPU 与 CPU 上的主要挑战者。
amd.oneLinerEn: NVIDIA's main challenger in both GPUs and CPUs.
amd.business: 数据中心 GPU(Instinct MI300)、EPYC 服务器 CPU、消费级处理器与显卡。
amd.businessEn: Data-center GPUs (Instinct MI300 series), EPYC server CPUs, and consumer processors and graphics cards.
amd.description: AMD(超威半导体)在 CEO 苏姿丰(Lisa Su)带领下完成惊人逆袭,如今是英伟达在数据中心 GPU、以及英特尔在服务器 CPU 上共同的主要挑战者。CPU 方面,它的 EPYC 服务器处理器凭借性价比大幅抢占数据中心份额;GPU 方面,它的 Instinct MI300/MI350 系列是目前唯一能在大模型训练/推理上对英伟达构成实质竞争的产品,已被微软、Meta、亚马逊、OpenAI 等采用,以「更高显存、更低成本、开放软件(ROCm)」作为差异化,试图打破 CUDA 的垄断。虽然生态与软件仍落后英伟达,但作为唯一的第二供应商,AMD 承接了「客户不想只依赖英伟达」的巨大需求,是 AI 算力里最重要的挑战者。
amd.descriptionEn: Under CEO Lisa Su, AMD pulled off a remarkable turnaround and is now the main challenger to NVIDIA in data-center GPUs and to Intel in server CPUs. On CPUs, its EPYC server processors have taken large data-center share on cost-performance; on GPUs, its Instinct MI300/MI350 series is currently the only product posing real competition to NVIDIA in large-model training/inference, adopted by Microsoft, Meta, Amazon and OpenAI, differentiating on "more memory, lower cost, open software (ROCm)" to try to break CUDA's grip. Although its ecosystem and software still trail NVIDIA, as the only credible second source AMD absorbs the huge demand from "customers who don't want to rely on NVIDIA alone" — the most important challenger in AI compute.
whyItMatters: 苏姿丰带领逆袭,英伟达/英特尔共同的主要挑战者
EPYC 抢数据中心 CPU 份额,MI300/MI350 攻 GPU
唯一对英伟达构成实质竞争,已被微软/Meta/OpenAI 采用
开放软件 ROCm 试图打破 CUDA 垄断,承接第二供应需求

intc.name: 英特尔
intc.oneLiner: 老牌 CPU 龙头，正艰难追赶 AI 与先进制程。
intc.oneLinerEn: The incumbent CPU leader, fighting to catch up in AI and leading-edge process nodes.
intc.businessEn: x86 CPUs (Xeon/Core), AI accelerators (Gaudi), and its IDM 2.0 foundry business.
intc.description: 英特尔(Intel)曾是全球半导体的绝对霸主(「Intel Inside」),既设计又制造 CPU,定义了 PC 与数据中心几十年。但近年它陷入多重困境:在先进制程上被台积电反超、在数据中心 CPU 上被 AMD 蚕食、在 AI 加速这一最重要的新战场上更是几乎缺席(GPU/Gaudi 远落后英伟达)。它押注两条自救路线:一是「IDM 2.0」——把自己的晶圆厂对外开放做代工(晶圆代工业务 Intel Foundry),追赶台积电、争取美国「芯片制造回流」的政策与补贴;二是重整先进制程(如 18A)与 AI PC 芯片。作为美国先进芯片制造的战略资产,英特尔被寄予厚望,但转型艰难、持续亏损、管理层更迭,是「老巨头能否在 AI 时代翻身」的最大悬念之一。
intc.descriptionEn: Intel was once the undisputed king of semiconductors ("Intel Inside"), both designing and manufacturing CPUs and defining PCs and data centers for decades. But recently it has fallen into multiple binds: overtaken by TSMC on leading-edge process, eroded by AMD in data-center CPUs, and largely absent from AI acceleration — the most important new battlefield (its GPU/Gaudi far behind NVIDIA). It bets on two self-rescue paths: "IDM 2.0," opening its fabs to outside customers as a foundry (Intel Foundry) to catch TSMC and win U.S. "chip reshoring" policy and subsidies; and revamping leading-edge process (like 18A) and AI-PC chips. As a strategic asset of U.S. advanced chip manufacturing, Intel carries high hopes, but with a hard turnaround, ongoing losses and leadership churn, it is one of the biggest question marks of "can an old giant turn it around in the AI era."
whyItMatters: 曾是半导体绝对霸主,「Intel Inside」定义 PC 时代
先进制程被台积电反超、CPU 被 AMD 蚕食、AI 加速缺席
押注 IDM 2.0 开放代工,争美国「芯片回流」政策补贴
美国先进芯片制造战略资产,能否翻身最大悬念之一

avgo.name: 博通
avgo.oneLiner: 定制 AI 芯片(ASIC)与数据中心网络芯片的隐形冠军。
avgo.oneLinerEn: The hidden champion of custom AI chips (ASICs) and data-center networking silicon.
avgo.tagline: 连接一切的半导体与软件
avgo.taglineEn: Connecting everything with semiconductors and software
avgo.industry: AI 芯片 / 基础软件
avgo.subcategory: 定制 ASIC / 网络芯片
avgo.business: 为云厂商定制 AI ASIC、Tomahawk 交换芯片、光通信器件，以及 VMware 等基础软件。
avgo.businessEn: Custom AI ASICs for cloud providers, Tomahawk switching chips, optical components, and infrastructure software such as VMware.
avgo.description: 博通(Broadcom,CEO 陈福阳/Hock Tan)是 AI 硬件里「英伟达之外最大的赢家」之一,也是最典型的隐形冠军。当谷歌、Meta 等云厂想自研 AI 加速器时,往往找博通合作设计——谷歌的 TPU、Meta 的 MTIA 等定制芯片背后都有博通,使它成为「定制 AI ASIC」市场的头部。同时它几乎垄断了数据中心的高端网络交换芯片(Tomahawk/Jericho),这些芯片决定了 GPU 集群之间的数据怎么跑;它还做光通信器件。除芯片外,博通以 690 亿美元收购 VMware,把基础软件也纳入版图。凭借「定制 AI 芯片 + 网络 + 软件」的组合,以及擅长并购整合、高利润的经营风格,博通市值一度突破万亿美元,是 AI 算力网络里最核心的公司之一。
avgo.descriptionEn: Broadcom (CEO Hock Tan) is one of "the biggest winners in AI hardware after NVIDIA" and the quintessential hidden champion. When clouds like Google and Meta want to build their own AI accelerators, they often co-design with Broadcom — Google's TPU and Meta's MTIA custom chips have Broadcom behind them — making it the leader in the "custom AI ASIC" market. It also nearly monopolizes high-end data-center networking switch chips (Tomahawk/Jericho), which determine how data moves between GPU clusters, and it makes optical components. Beyond chips, Broadcom acquired VMware for $69 billion, adding infrastructure software to its portfolio. With its "custom AI silicon + networking + software" combination and an M&A-driven, high-margin operating style, Broadcom's market cap has topped a trillion dollars — one of the most central companies in AI compute networking.
whyItMatters: 谷歌 TPU/Meta MTIA 等定制 ASIC 背后都有博通
近乎垄断数据中心高端网络交换芯片(Tomahawk)
690 亿美元收购 VMware,芯片+网络+软件组合
英伟达之外最大的 AI 硬件赢家之一,市值破万亿

anet.name: Arista
anet.oneLiner: AI 数据中心高速以太网交换机的领导者。
anet.oneLinerEn: The leader in high-speed Ethernet switches for AI data centers.
anet.tagline: 为云与 AI 打造网络
anet.taglineEn: Networking for the cloud and AI era
anet.business: 高性能数据中心交换机与 EOS 网络操作系统，支撑大规模 GPU 集群互联。
anet.businessEn: High-performance data-center switches and the EOS network operating system that interconnect large-scale GPU clusters.
anet.description: Arista Networks 是数据中心高速交换机的领导者。训练大模型要把成千上万张 GPU 连成一个「超级计算机」,它们之间要以极高带宽、极低延迟、无丢包地交换海量数据——网络性能直接决定训练效率,这正是 Arista 的主场。它以高性能交换机 + 自研的 EOS 网络操作系统著称,软件可编程、稳定、可运维,深受微软、Meta 等超大规模云厂青睐(这些巨头既是大客户也曾是股东)。在「以太网 vs 英伟达 InfiniBand」谁来连 GPU 集群的路线之争中,Arista 是「用开放以太网做 AI 网络」的旗手。AI 数据中心建设狂潮让它的高端交换机需求与业绩高速增长。
anet.descriptionEn: Arista Networks is the leader in high-speed data-center switches. Training large models requires connecting thousands of GPUs into one "supercomputer," exchanging huge volumes of data between them at very high bandwidth, very low latency and zero packet loss — network performance directly determines training efficiency, exactly Arista's home turf. It is known for high-performance switches plus its own EOS network operating system — programmable, stable and operable — and is favored by hyperscalers like Microsoft and Meta (giants that are both major customers and former shareholders). In the route battle of "Ethernet vs NVIDIA InfiniBand" for connecting GPU clusters, Arista is the standard-bearer for "open Ethernet for AI networking." The AI-data-center building boom drives strong growth in its high-end switch demand and results.
whyItMatters: 数据中心高速交换机领导者,网络决定训练效率
高性能交换机 + 自研 EOS 网络操作系统
微软/Meta 等超大规模云厂青睐(客户兼曾为股东)
「开放以太网做 AI 网络」旗手,对抗 InfiniBand

tsm.name: 台积电
tsm.oneLiner: 全球先进芯片制造的绝对核心，英伟达/苹果都靠它代工。
tsm.oneLinerEn: The absolute core of advanced chip manufacturing — NVIDIA and Apple both rely on it as their foundry.
tsm.tagline: 以先进制程成就全球创新
tsm.taglineEn: The trusted foundry powering global innovation
tsm.business: 晶圆代工龙头，掌握最先进制程(3nm/2nm)与 CoWoS 先进封装——AI 芯片产能的真正瓶颈。
tsm.businessEn: The foundry leader, commanding the most advanced process nodes (3nm/2nm) and CoWoS advanced packaging — the true bottleneck for AI-chip capacity.
tsm.description: 台积电(TSMC)是全球先进芯片制造的绝对核心,几乎所有最尖端的 AI 芯片都在它的产线上诞生。英伟达的 GPU、苹果的 A/M 芯片、AMD、博通、谷歌 TPU……这些公司只做设计,真正把设计变成实物、还要良率高、性能强的,只有台积电能在最先进制程(3nm/2nm)上稳定做到。更关键的是,AI 芯片还需要 CoWoS 先进封装(把 GPU 裸晶与 HBM 显存拼在一起),而 CoWoS 产能长期是整个 AI 芯片供应的真正瓶颈——台积电扩多少产,市场就能有多少高端 AI 芯片。作为「无厂设计 + 专业代工」模式的开创者和绝对龙头,台积电是 AI 时代最不可替代的一环,也是地缘政治高度敏感的战略资产。
tsm.descriptionEn: TSMC is the absolute core of advanced chip manufacturing — nearly every cutting-edge AI chip is born on its lines. NVIDIA's GPUs, Apple's A/M chips, AMD, Broadcom, Google's TPU… these companies only design; only TSMC can reliably turn designs into real, high-yield, high-performance silicon on the most advanced nodes (3nm/2nm). Crucially, AI chips also need CoWoS advanced packaging (stitching a GPU die together with HBM memory), and CoWoS capacity has long been the true bottleneck of the entire AI-chip supply — however much TSMC expands is how many high-end AI chips the market can get. As the creator and undisputed leader of the "fabless design + dedicated foundry" model, TSMC is the most irreplaceable link of the AI era and a strategic asset of high geopolitical sensitivity.
whyItMatters: 几乎所有最尖端 AI 芯片都在台积电产线诞生
英伟达/苹果/AMD/博通/谷歌只设计,量产靠台积电
CoWoS 先进封装产能是 AI 芯片供应真正瓶颈
AI 时代最不可替代一环,地缘敏感战略资产

adbe.name: Adobe
adbe.oneLiner: 创意软件龙头，用 Firefly 把生成式 AI 装进设计工具。
adbe.oneLinerEn: The creative-software leader, embedding generative AI into design tools via Firefly.
adbe.tagline: 通过数字体验改变世界
adbe.taglineEn: Changing the world through digital experiences
adbe.business: Creative Cloud(PS/AI/Premiere)、文档(Acrobat)，Firefly 提供合规的生成式创作。
adbe.businessEn: Creative Cloud (Photoshop/Illustrator/Premiere), documents (Acrobat), and Firefly for commercially safe generative creation.
adbe.description: Adobe 是创意与设计软件的绝对龙头,Photoshop、Illustrator、Premiere、Acrobat 是全球设计师、创作者与办公人群的标准工具。生成式 AI 兴起,一度让市场担心「AI 生图会不会颠覆 Adobe」,但 Adobe 的应对是把 AI 变成自己的优势:它推出 Firefly 生成模型,并强调「商业安全」——只用有授权的数据训练,生成内容可放心商用,这对企业客户至关重要;同时把 AI 直接嵌进 Photoshop 等工具(如生成式填充),让专业工作流如虎添翼,而非被取代。凭借庞大的付费用户基础、专业工作流的护城河与「合规生成」的差异化,Adobe 试图把 AI 从威胁变成新的增长引擎,但也面临 Midjourney、Canva 等的持续挑战。
adbe.descriptionEn: Adobe is the undisputed leader in creative and design software; Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere and Acrobat are standard tools for designers, creators and office workers worldwide. When generative AI rose, the market briefly feared "AI image generation could disrupt Adobe," but Adobe's response was to turn AI into its own advantage: it launched the Firefly generative models and emphasizes "commercial safety" — trained only on licensed data so output is safe for commercial use, crucial for enterprise customers — while embedding AI directly into tools like Photoshop (e.g. Generative Fill) to supercharge professional workflows rather than replace them. With a huge paying user base, a professional-workflow moat and the differentiation of "commercially safe generation," Adobe aims to turn AI from a threat into a new growth engine, while facing ongoing challenges from Midjourney, Canva and others.
whyItMatters: 创意软件绝对龙头,PS/AI/Premiere 是行业标准
Firefly 强调「商业安全」,只用授权数据训练
AI 嵌进 Photoshop 等工具(生成式填充),增强而非取代
把 AI 从威胁变增长引擎,面临 MJ/Canva 挑战

crm.name: Salesforce
crm.oneLiner: 全球最大 CRM，用 Agentforce 押注企业级 AI 智能体。
crm.oneLinerEn: The world's largest CRM, betting on enterprise AI agents with Agentforce.
crm.tagline: 让企业与客户更紧密相连
crm.industry: 企业软件 / 企业智能体
crm.business: 客户关系管理(销售/服务/营销)云，Agentforce 为企业部署自主 AI 智能体。
crm.businessEn: Customer-relationship-management cloud (sales/service/marketing); Agentforce deploys autonomous AI agents for enterprises.
crm.description: Salesforce 是全球最大的客户关系管理(CRM)软件公司,几乎定义了「云端 SaaS」这一模式——企业用它管理销售、客服、营销与客户数据。掌握着大量企业的核心业务数据,是它做 AI 的最大底气。它把生成式 AI 押注在 Agentforce 上:不只是聊天助手,而是能自主处理业务的 AI 智能体——自动回客户、跟进销售线索、处理服务工单等,并按「实际解决的对话/任务」收费(结果计费)。Salesforce 的逻辑是:AI 智能体接到它掌握的企业数据与工作流上,才能真正把活办完,而这正是它的护城河。它是「企业级 AI 智能体」商业化最激进的巨头之一,与微软、ServiceNow 等在企业 AI 上正面竞争。
crm.descriptionEn: Salesforce is the world's largest customer-relationship-management (CRM) software company and essentially defined the "cloud SaaS" model — enterprises use it to manage sales, service, marketing and customer data. Commanding the core business data of many enterprises is its biggest advantage in AI. It bets its generative-AI push on Agentforce: not just a chat assistant but AI agents that autonomously handle business — auto-replying to customers, following up on sales leads, resolving service tickets — billed by "conversations/tasks actually resolved" (outcome-based pricing). Salesforce's logic: AI agents only truly get work done when connected to the enterprise data and workflows it controls, which is its moat. It is one of the most aggressive giants commercializing "enterprise AI agents," competing head-on with Microsoft, ServiceNow and others.
whyItMatters: 全球最大 CRM,几乎定义云端 SaaS 模式
掌握大量企业核心业务数据,做 AI 的最大底气
Agentforce 自主办业务、按结果计费
企业级 AI 智能体商业化最激进巨头之一

now.name: ServiceNow
now.oneLiner: 企业工作流自动化平台，AI 重塑 IT/HR 流程。
now.oneLinerEn: An enterprise workflow-automation platform reshaping IT/HR processes with AI.
now.taglineEn: Making the world work better for everyone
now.industry: 企业软件 / 企业智能体
now.business: 数字工作流平台(IT/客服/HR)，Now Assist 把生成式 AI 嵌入企业流程。
now.businessEn: A digital workflow platform (IT/service/HR); Now Assist embeds generative AI into enterprise processes.
now.description: ServiceNow 是企业「数字工作流」平台的龙头。大公司里每天有海量跨部门的流程要走——报修 IT、提交请假、走审批、处理客服工单、入职流程等,ServiceNow 把这些流程搬到一个统一平台上自动流转,是很多大企业的「流程操作系统」。它做 AI 的优势在于:平台上跑着企业真实的流程与数据,AI 一接进来就能干实事。它的 Now Assist 把生成式 AI 嵌进各类工作流(自动生成工单摘要、自动解决常见请求、辅助客服与开发),并推进能自主完成多步任务的智能体。凭借黏性极高的平台、清晰的 ROI(降本增效)与 AI 化的顺势升级,ServiceNow 是企业软件里增长最稳、最被看好的 AI 落地平台之一。
now.descriptionEn: ServiceNow is the leader in enterprise "digital workflow" platforms. Large companies run vast cross-department processes daily — IT repair requests, leave submissions, approvals, service tickets, onboarding — and ServiceNow moves these onto one unified platform to flow automatically, serving as many big enterprises' "process operating system." Its AI advantage: real enterprise processes and data run on the platform, so AI can do real work once plugged in. Its Now Assist embeds generative AI into workflows (auto-generating ticket summaries, auto-resolving common requests, assisting service and development) and advances agents that autonomously complete multi-step tasks. With a highly sticky platform, clear ROI (cost savings and efficiency) and a natural AI upgrade, ServiceNow is one of the most stably growing, most-favored AI-deployment platforms in enterprise software.
whyItMatters: 企业「数字工作流」平台龙头,大企业的流程操作系统
平台上跑真实流程与数据,AI 一接进来就能干实事
Now Assist 嵌入工作流,推进自主完成多步任务的智能体
黏性高、ROI 清晰,最被看好的 AI 落地平台之一

pltr.name: Palantir
pltr.oneLiner: 把 AI 落到政府与大企业实战决策的数据平台。
pltr.oneLinerEn: A data platform bringing AI into real-world decisions for governments and large enterprises.
pltr.taglineEn: Software for the most consequential decisions
pltr.industry: 企业软件 / 政府 AI
pltr.business: Gotham(政府)、Foundry(企业)与 AIP(AI 平台)，把大模型接入真实业务数据做决策。
pltr.businessEn: Gotham (government), Foundry (enterprise) and AIP (AI platform), wiring large models into real operational data for decisions.
pltr.description: Palantir 由 Peter Thiel 等于 2003 年创立,专做「把 AI/数据落到真实、高风险的实战决策」。它的软件把一个组织散落各处的数据(情报、作战、生产、供应链、财务等)整合成一个可信、可追溯的「决策操作系统」:Gotham 服务政府与军方(情报分析、作战指挥),Foundry 服务大企业(把复杂运营数据变成可行动的洞察)。生成式 AI 兴起后,它推出 AIP(AI 平台)——把大模型安全地接到企业/政府的真实数据与操作上,让 AI 不只是聊天,而是能在有权限、可审计的前提下真正参与决策与执行。凭借在国防/政府的深厚壁垒、以及 AIP 带来的企业侧爆发式增长,Palantir 成为 AI 落地最受追捧、股价涨幅最猛的公司之一,但也因高估值备受争议。
pltr.descriptionEn: Palantir was founded in 2003 by Peter Thiel and others to "bring AI/data into real, high-stakes operational decisions." Its software integrates an organization's scattered data (intelligence, operations, production, supply chain, finance) into a trusted, auditable "decision operating system": Gotham serves governments and militaries (intelligence analysis, command), Foundry serves large enterprises (turning complex operational data into actionable insight). With generative AI, it launched AIP (its AI Platform) — securely wiring large models into the real data and operations of enterprises/governments so AI doesn't just chat but genuinely participates in decisions and execution under permissions and auditability. With deep barriers in defense/government and explosive enterprise growth from AIP, Palantir became one of the most sought-after, sharpest-rising AI-deployment stocks — though also controversial for its high valuation.
whyItMatters: 把 AI/数据落到真实、高风险的实战决策
Gotham 服务政府军方,Foundry 服务大企业
AIP 把大模型安全接到真实数据与操作上
国防/政府深厚壁垒 + 企业侧爆发,AI 落地最受追捧之一

mrvl.name: Marvell
mrvl.oneLiner: 定制 AI 芯片与数据中心互联的重要玩家。
mrvl.oneLinerEn: A key player in custom AI silicon and data-center interconnect.
mrvl.tagline: 为数据基础设施提供核心芯片
mrvl.subcategory: 定制 ASIC / 光 DSP / 互联
mrvl.business: 定制 ASIC、光 DSP、DPU 与数据中心连接芯片。
mrvl.businessEn: Custom ASICs, optical DSPs, DPUs and data-center connectivity chips.
mrvl.description: Marvell(迈威尔)是数据基础设施芯片的重要玩家,与博通并列「定制 AI 芯片(ASIC)」两强。云厂商为省成本、摆脱对英伟达的依赖,纷纷自研 AI 加速器,而 Marvell 正是帮它们把芯片设计、流片落地的核心伙伴之一(参与亚马逊 Trainium、微软 Maia 等定制项目)。除定制 ASIC 外,它还做光 DSP(高速光模块的「大脑」)、DPU、以太网交换与数据中心互联芯片。AI 数据中心对算力与带宽的暴增需求,让 Marvell 的定制与光互联业务成为增长主引擎。
mrvl.descriptionEn: Marvell is a major data-infrastructure chip company and, alongside Broadcom, one of the two leaders in custom AI silicon (ASICs). As cloud providers build their own AI accelerators to cut costs and reduce reliance on NVIDIA, Marvell is one of the key partners that turns those designs into taped-out chips (involved in custom programs such as Amazon Trainium and Microsoft Maia). Beyond custom ASICs, it makes optical DSPs (the "brains" of high-speed optical modules), DPUs, Ethernet switching and data-center interconnect chips. The surging compute and bandwidth demands of AI data centers have made its custom and optical-interconnect businesses its main growth engine.
whyItMatters: 与博通并列定制 AI 芯片(ASIC)两强
参与亚马逊 Trainium、微软 Maia 等云厂自研加速器
光 DSP 是高速光模块的核心「大脑」
AI 数据中心带宽暴增的直接受益者

wdc.name: 西部数据
wdc.oneLiner: 海量数据存储(硬盘/闪存)的主要供应商。
wdc.business: 企业级硬盘(HDD)与闪存(NAND)，为 AI 数据中心提供海量存储。

vrt.name: Vertiv
vrt.oneLiner: 数据中心供电与液冷的核心供应商，AI 散热龙头。
vrt.oneLinerEn: A core supplier of data-center power and liquid cooling — the AI thermal leader.
vrt.tagline: 为关键数字基础设施保驾护航
vrt.business: 数据中心电源、配电与热管理(含液冷)，直接受益于 AI 算力的功耗与发热激增。
vrt.businessEn: Data-center power, distribution and thermal management (including liquid cooling), a direct beneficiary of surging AI power draw and heat.
vrt.description: Vertiv(维谛,原艾默生网络能源)是数据中心供电与散热的核心供应商。AI 服务器的功耗与发热远超传统机架——一个 GPU 机柜的功率可达过去的十几倍,风冷已经不够,必须上液冷,而 Vertiv 恰好在电源、配电、不间断电源(UPS)与热管理(含直接液冷)上都有完整方案,是「AI 算力越热、它越受益」的直接标的。随着超大规模云厂大建 AI 数据中心,Vertiv 订单与业绩高速增长,股价成为 AI 基建行情的代表之一。
vrt.descriptionEn: Vertiv (formerly Emerson Network Power) is a core supplier of data-center power and cooling. AI servers draw far more power and generate far more heat than traditional racks — a GPU cabinet can consume many times the power of the past, and air cooling is no longer enough, requiring liquid cooling — and Vertiv offers complete solutions across power, distribution, UPS and thermal management (including direct liquid cooling), making it a direct "the hotter AI compute gets, the more it benefits" play. As hyperscalers build out AI data centers, Vertiv's orders and earnings have grown fast, and its stock has become a bellwether of the AI-infrastructure trade.
whyItMatters: AI 机柜功率暴增,风冷不够、必上液冷
电源+配电+UPS+液冷完整方案
「AI 越热越受益」的直接标的
超大规模建数据中心,订单高速增长

etn.name: 伊顿
etn.oneLiner: 电力管理巨头，给数据中心供配电。
etn.oneLinerEn: A power-management giant supplying power and distribution to data centers.
etn.taglineEn: Making power management smarter and more reliable
etn.business: 电气设备与电力管理(供配电、不间断电源、电网设备)，是 AI 数据中心扩张的卖水人。
etn.businessEn: Electrical equipment and power management (distribution, UPS, grid gear) — a picks-and-shovels supplier to AI data-center expansion.
etn.description: 伊顿(Eaton)是全球电力管理巨头,业务横跨数据中心、电网、工业、建筑与航空。AI 数据中心不只缺算力,更缺「电」——从园区变电、配电、母线、断路器到不间断电源(UPS),每一环都要电气设备,而这正是伊顿的主场。它是 AI 用电激增最典型的「卖水人」:不管哪家云厂、用谁的芯片,只要建数据中心、扩电网,就得买伊顿的供配电设备。数据中心相关订单成为伊顿增长的核心引擎,电网现代化则提供第二条长期主线。
etn.descriptionEn: Eaton is a global power-management giant spanning data centers, grids, industry, buildings and aerospace. AI data centers lack not only compute but power — from campus substations, distribution, busways and breakers to uninterruptible power supplies (UPS), every link needs electrical equipment, which is Eaton's home turf. It is a quintessential "picks-and-shovels" beneficiary of surging AI power demand: whichever cloud provider and whoever's chips, building a data center or expanding the grid means buying Eaton's power and distribution gear. Data-center-related orders have become Eaton's core growth engine, with grid modernization as a second long-term driver.
whyItMatters: AI 数据中心「缺电」,供配电每一环都要它
从变电/配电/母线到 UPS 全套电气设备
「卖水人」:不挑云厂、不挑芯片都受益
数据中心订单 + 电网现代化双主线

nee.name: 新纪元能源
nee.oneLiner: 美国最大公用事业 + 全球最大风光发电商。
nee.oneLinerEn: The largest U.S. utility and the world's largest wind/solar generator.
nee.subcategory: 受监管电力 / 风光储
nee.business: 受监管公用事业(佛州电力)与可再生能源(风/光/储)，为 AI 数据中心的用电激增供能。
nee.businessEn: Regulated utility (Florida power) plus renewables (wind/solar/storage), supplying the surge in AI data-center electricity demand.
nee.description: NextEra Energy(新纪元能源)是美国最大的公用事业公司,由两块组成:受监管的佛罗里达电力(FPL,稳定现金流)与全球最大的风光储开发商 NextEra Energy Resources。AI 数据中心带来数十年未见的用电增长,而新增电力里可再生能源 + 储能因为「建得快、成本低」成为满足这波需求的主力之一,NextEra 手握庞大的风、光、储项目储备,是「AI 用电激增」在发电端最大的受益者之一。它还在把核电、天然气纳入组合,给超大规模客户提供多元化的长期供电。
nee.descriptionEn: NextEra Energy is the largest U.S. utility, made up of two parts: the regulated Florida Power & Light (FPL, stable cash flow) and NextEra Energy Resources, the world's largest developer of wind, solar and storage. AI data centers are driving electricity growth not seen in decades, and among new supply, renewables plus storage — being fast to build and low cost — are a main way to meet this demand. With a vast pipeline of wind, solar and storage projects, NextEra is one of the biggest generation-side beneficiaries of the AI power surge. It is also adding nuclear and natural gas to its mix to offer hyperscale customers diversified long-term supply.
whyItMatters: 美国最大公用事业 + 全球最大风光储开发商
可再生+储能建得快、成本低,满足 AI 用电
庞大风光储项目储备,发电端最大受益者之一
叠加核电/天然气,为超大规模客户多元供电

cohr.name: 高意
cohr.oneLiner: 光通信器件与光模块的关键供应商。
cohr.oneLinerEn: A key supplier of optical-communications components and modules.
cohr.subcategory: 光模块 / 激光 / 材料
cohr.business: 光模块、激光与光电子器件，为 AI 数据中心高速光互联提供核心元件。
cohr.businessEn: Optical modules, lasers and photonic components, supplying core parts for high-speed optical interconnect in AI data centers.
cohr.description: Coherent(高意)由 II-VI 于 2022 年收购激光公司 Coherent 后合并而成,是光通信与激光领域的巨头。它横跨「材料—芯片—器件—模块」全链条:自产铟磷/砷化镓等化合物半导体衬底与激光芯片(EML),再做成 800G/1.6T 数据中心光收发模块,是 AI 算力网络高速光互联的核心供应商之一;同时在工业激光、碳化硅(SiC)等领域也有布局。英伟达对其战略投资,英伟达、思科等是其大客户。AI 数据中心对光模块的暴增需求是其增长主线。
cohr.descriptionEn: Coherent was formed when II-VI acquired the laser company Coherent in 2022 and merged the two, creating a giant in optical communications and lasers. It spans the full chain from materials to chips to components to modules: it makes its own compound-semiconductor substrates (indium phosphide/gallium arsenide) and EML laser chips, then builds them into 800G/1.6T data-center optical transceivers — one of the core suppliers for high-speed optical interconnect in AI compute networks — while also active in industrial lasers and silicon carbide (SiC). NVIDIA has invested strategically, and NVIDIA and Cisco are among its major customers. Soaring AI-data-center demand for optical modules is its main growth driver.
whyItMatters: 材料—芯片—器件—模块全链条,自产 EML 激光芯片
800G/1.6T 光模块核心供应商,AI 光互联关键一环
英伟达战略投资,英伟达/思科为大客户
同时布局工业激光与碳化硅(SiC)

baba.name: 阿里巴巴
baba.oneLiner: 中国电商与云龙头，通义千问(Qwen)开源模型推手。
baba.oneLinerEn: China's e-commerce and cloud leader, and the force behind the open-source Qwen models.
baba.tagline: 让天下没有难做的生意
baba.taglineEn: To make it easy to do business anywhere
baba.role: AI 算力云 · 开源模型
baba.business: 电商(淘宝/天猫)、阿里云与通义大模型(Qwen 系列，开源生态领先)。
baba.businessEn: E-commerce (Taobao/Tmall), Alibaba Cloud, and the Tongyi Qwen model family — a leader in the open-source ecosystem.
baba.description: 阿里巴巴是中国 AI 竞赛里最像「微软/谷歌」的全栈玩家。它有三张牌:一是阿里云——中国最大的云计算平台,是国内 AI 训练与推理最重要的算力底座之一;二是通义千问(Qwen)大模型,阿里坚定走开源路线,Qwen 系列在全球开源模型里长期名列前茅、衍生模型数量极多,被认为是「中国的 Llama」,极大提升了阿里在开发者与全球开源生态中的影响力;三是庞大的电商与业务场景(淘宝/天猫、钉钉、高德等),让 AI 有海量真实落地场景。阿里把 AI 战略明确为「云 + 模型」双轮,并大手笔投入 AI 基础设施建设。凭借「算力 + 开源模型 + 场景」的完整闭环,阿里是中国最有实力的 AI 巨头之一。
baba.descriptionEn: Alibaba is the most "Microsoft/Google-like" full-stack player in China's AI race, with three cards. First, Alibaba Cloud — China's largest cloud platform and one of the most important compute backbones for domestic AI training and inference. Second, the Tongyi Qwen models: Alibaba firmly pursues open source, and the Qwen series has long ranked among the world's top open models with an enormous number of derivatives, considered "China's Llama," greatly boosting Alibaba's influence among developers and in the global open-source ecosystem. Third, vast e-commerce and business scenarios (Taobao/Tmall, DingTalk, AMAP), giving AI abundant real-world deployment. Alibaba has framed its AI strategy as a "cloud + models" flywheel and is investing heavily in AI infrastructure. With a complete loop of "compute + open models + scenarios," Alibaba is one of China's most capable AI giants.
whyItMatters: 阿里云是中国最大云,国内 AI 算力最重要底座之一
Qwen 坚持开源,长期名列全球开源榜前列,「中国的 Llama」
庞大电商/钉钉/高德场景,AI 海量真实落地
「云+模型」双轮 + 大手笔 AI 基建,中国最有实力 AI 巨头之一

bidu.name: 百度
bidu.oneLiner: 中国搜索龙头，文心一言 + 萝卜快跑自动驾驶。
bidu.oneLinerEn: China's search leader, home to the ERNIE model and the Apollo Go robotaxi.
bidu.tagline: 用科技让复杂的世界更简单
bidu.taglineEn: Making the complicated world simpler through technology
bidu.industry: AI / 互联网 / 自动驾驶
bidu.role: 模型 · 应用 · 智驾
bidu.business: 搜索与广告、智能云、文心(ERNIE)大模型，Apollo Go 萝卜快跑是中国领先的 Robotaxi。
bidu.businessEn: Search and advertising, its AI Cloud, the ERNIE large-model family, and Apollo Go — China's leading robotaxi service.
bidu.description: 百度是中国最早、也最全力押注 AI 的科技公司之一。它以搜索与广告为现金牛,但很早就把 AI 定为战略主线:自研文心(ERNIE)大模型,是中国最早对标 GPT 推出对话式大模型的公司之一,并把生成式 AI 接入搜索、智能云与企业应用;它的百度智能云是国内主要的 AI 云之一。另一条更硬核的路线是自动驾驶:Apollo 平台深耕十余年,旗下「萝卜快跑(Apollo Go)」是中国乃至全球运营规模领先的 Robotaxi,在武汉等城市大规模无人商业化运营。百度的挑战在于:搜索广告受 AI 问答冲击、云与模型竞争激烈,但它在「大模型 + Robotaxi」上的长期投入,让它成为中国 AI 里技术积累最深的老牌巨头之一。
bidu.descriptionEn: Baidu is one of the earliest and most committed AI bets among Chinese tech companies. Search and advertising are its cash cow, but it long ago made AI its strategic core: it built the ERNIE large models — among the first in China to launch a GPT-like conversational model — and wired generative AI into search, its AI cloud and enterprise applications; Baidu AI Cloud is a leading domestic AI cloud. Its harder-core bet is autonomous driving: the Apollo platform, developed for over a decade, powers Apollo Go ("Luobo Kuaipao"), a robotaxi service among the largest by operating scale in China and globally, running driverless commercially at scale in cities like Wuhan. Baidu's challenge: search ads face disruption from AI answers and cloud/model competition is fierce, but its long-term investment in "large models + robotaxi" makes it one of China's most technically deep incumbents in AI.
whyItMatters: 中国最早全力押注 AI 的科技公司之一
文心 ERNIE 是中国最早对标 GPT 的对话大模型之一
萝卜快跑(Apollo Go)运营规模领先的 Robotaxi,武汉大规模无人化
「大模型 + Robotaxi」长期投入,技术积累最深的老牌巨头之一

amzn.name: 亚马逊
amzn.oneLiner: 云计算(AWS)龙头 + 电商，自研芯片与 Zoox 无人车。
amzn.oneLinerEn: The cloud-computing (AWS) leader and e-commerce giant, with in-house chips and the Zoox robotaxi.
amzn.tagline: 以 AWS 为底座，把 AI 装进云、电商与设备
amzn.taglineEn: Powering AI across cloud, commerce and devices on the AWS backbone
amzn.industry: 云计算 / 电商 / AI 基础设施
amzn.business: AWS 云、电商与广告，自研 Trainium/Inferentia 芯片，Zoox Robotaxi，重金投资 Anthropic。
amzn.businessEn: The AWS cloud, e-commerce and advertising, in-house Trainium/Inferentia chips, the Zoox robotaxi, and a major investment in Anthropic.
amzn.description: 亚马逊由 Jeff Bezos 于 1994 年创立，从网上书店成长为横跨电商、云计算、广告、设备与流媒体的巨头，现任 CEO 为 Andy Jassy。旗下 AWS 是全球最大的云计算平台，也是这轮 AI 浪潮里最关键的算力供给方之一。亚马逊在 AI 上走「全栈自主」路线：自研训练芯片 Trainium(现已到 Trainium3)与推理芯片 Inferentia，压低训练成本；托管模型平台 Amazon Bedrock 汇聚各家大模型，自家 Nova 基础模型与企业助手 Amazon Q 补齐产品线；Alexa+ 用生成式 AI 重做语音助手。战略上，亚马逊累计向 Anthropic 投资约 80 亿美元、成为其主要云与训练伙伴，Anthropic 则承诺未来十年在 AWS 上投入超 1000 亿美元、使用最高 5GW 的 Trainium 算力。双方合建的 Project Rainier(印第安纳州，约 11 亿美元起步、近 50 万颗 Trainium2 芯片)是全球最大的 AI 训练集群之一，已于 2025 年 10 月上线支撑 Claude 训练。此外，亚马逊还拥有 Zoox 自动驾驶(已在拉斯维加斯等地商业化)。
amzn.descriptionEn: Founded by Jeff Bezos in 1994, Amazon grew from an online bookstore into a giant spanning e-commerce, cloud, advertising, devices and streaming, now led by CEO Andy Jassy. Its AWS unit is the world's largest cloud platform and one of the most critical suppliers of compute in this AI wave. Amazon pursues a "full-stack, in-house" AI strategy: it designs its own Trainium training chips (now at Trainium3) and Inferentia inference chips to drive down training costs; its managed Amazon Bedrock platform aggregates many models, while its own Nova foundation models and the Amazon Q enterprise assistant round out the product line; and Alexa+ rebuilds its voice assistant with generative AI. Strategically, Amazon has invested roughly $8 billion in Anthropic and become its primary cloud and training partner, while Anthropic has committed to spend over $100 billion on AWS over the next decade and use up to 5 GW of Trainium capacity. Their jointly built Project Rainier (in Indiana, starting around $11 billion, with nearly 500,000 Trainium2 chips) is one of the world's largest AI training clusters, coming online in October 2025 to train Claude. Amazon also owns the Zoox robotaxi, already operating commercially in Las Vegas and elsewhere.
whyItMatters: AWS 是全球最大云，AI 算力与企业分发的关键底座
自研 Trainium/Inferentia 芯片，压低训练/推理成本、减少对英伟达依赖
约 80 亿美元押注 Anthropic + Project Rainier 近 50 万卡集群，深度绑定 Claude
Bedrock + Nova + Amazon Q 全栈补齐模型与企业智能体

pony.name: 小马智行
pony.oneLiner: 中国头部 Robotaxi 公司，2024 年赴美上市。
pony.business: L4 级自动驾驶与 Robotaxi 运营，覆盖北上广深等核心城市。

wrd.name: 文远知行
wrd.oneLiner: 中国自动驾驶公司，覆盖 Robotaxi/小巴/清扫车。
wrd.business: L4 通用自动驾驶平台，多车型量产落地。

rxrx.name: Recursion
rxrx.oneLiner: 用 AI + 自动化实验室加速新药发现的 TechBio 公司。
rxrx.business: 把湿实验室与机器学习结合，大规模生成生物数据训练药物发现模型，与英伟达合作。

cgnx.name: 康耐视
cgnx.business: 机器视觉系统与传感器，用于工厂质检、定位、读码。

arm.name: Arm
arm.oneLiner: 全球移动与低功耗芯片架构的事实标准。
arm.oneLinerEn: The de facto standard architecture for mobile and low-power chips worldwide.
arm.business: 授权 CPU/GPU 架构(IP)，几乎所有手机与越来越多数据中心芯片基于 Arm 架构。数据中心里，英伟达 Grace、AWS Graviton/Trainium、Ampere 等都采用 Arm 架构。
arm.businessEn: Licenses CPU/GPU architectures (IP): nearly every smartphone and a growing share of data-center chips are Arm-based. In the data center, NVIDIA Grace, AWS Graviton/Trainium and Ampere all build on Arm.
arm.description: Arm 是芯片世界里最独特的公司之一:它自己几乎不造芯片,而是设计 CPU 的「架构(指令集与内核 IP)」,再授权给全世界的芯片公司使用并收取授权费与权利金。凭借低功耗的先天优势,Arm 架构几乎垄断了所有智能手机,如今又借着「省电就是省钱」的逻辑大举进入数据中心——英伟达的 Grace CPU、亚马逊的 Graviton/Trainium、谷歌与微软的自研芯片等,越来越多的 AI/云芯片都基于 Arm 架构。它由软银控股,2023 年重新上市。AI 让算力需求暴增、也让能效变得至关重要,而每一颗基于 Arm 的 AI/云芯片,Arm 都能「躺着收钱」,这使它成为几乎中立地受益于整个 AI 芯片浪潮的独特标的。
arm.descriptionEn: Arm is one of the most unusual companies in chips: it barely makes chips itself, instead designing CPU "architectures" (instruction sets and core IP) and licensing them to chip companies worldwide for license fees and royalties. Thanks to its innate low-power advantage, the Arm architecture nearly monopolizes smartphones, and now — on the logic that "saving power saves money" — it is pushing hard into data centers: NVIDIA's Grace CPU, Amazon's Graviton/Trainium, Google's and Microsoft's in-house chips, and a growing share of AI/cloud chips are Arm-based. Majority-owned by SoftBank, it relisted in 2023. As AI drives compute demand up and makes energy efficiency critical, Arm collects royalties on every Arm-based AI/cloud chip, making it a uniquely near-neutral beneficiary of the entire AI-chip wave.
whyItMatters: 不造芯片,授权 CPU 架构收授权费+权利金
几乎垄断手机,又大举进入数据中心
英伟达 Grace、AWS Graviton/Trainium 等都基于 Arm
几乎中立地受益于整个 AI 芯片浪潮
arm.role: 芯片架构 / IP 授权

pstg.name: Pure Storage
pstg.oneLiner: 全闪存企业存储领先者。
pstg.oneLinerEn: A leader in all-flash enterprise storage.
pstg.tagline: 以更聪明的存储驱动创新
pstg.taglineEn: Smarter storage for the data era
pstg.business: 全闪存阵列与数据存储平台，面向 AI 训练的高吞吐存储。
pstg.businessEn: All-flash arrays and a data-storage platform, providing high-throughput storage for AI training.
pstg.description: Pure Storage 是全闪存企业存储的领先者。传统企业存储用机械硬盘,又慢又难管;Pure 一开始就全押注闪存,加上简洁的软件与「订阅式(存储即服务)」模式,把企业存储做得更快、更省心。AI 让存储的重要性大增:训练大模型要反复读写海量数据,如果存储喂数据太慢,再多 GPU 也会「饿着」;推理和企业 AI 也要高性能、可扩展的存储。Pure 的高吞吐全闪存方案正好契合 AI 数据管线的需求,还拿下超大规模云厂的大额订单。作为「AI 时代高性能数据存储」的直接受益者,Pure Storage 是存储板块里最贴近 AI 的公司之一。
pstg.descriptionEn: Pure Storage is a leader in all-flash enterprise storage. Traditional enterprise storage used mechanical hard drives — slow and hard to manage; Pure bet entirely on flash from the start, and with simple software and a "subscription (storage-as-a-service)" model made enterprise storage faster and easier. AI greatly raises storage's importance: training large models repeatedly reads and writes massive data, and if storage feeds data too slowly, even many GPUs go "starved"; inference and enterprise AI also need high-performance, scalable storage. Pure's high-throughput all-flash solutions fit AI data pipelines and it has won large orders from hyperscalers. As a direct beneficiary of "high-performance data storage in the AI era," Pure Storage is one of the AI-closest names in storage.
whyItMatters: 全闪存企业存储领先者,一开始就全押注闪存
简洁软件 + 存储即服务订阅模式
训练/推理要高吞吐存储,否则 GPU「饿着」
拿下超大规模云厂大单,AI 高性能存储直接受益

gev.name: GE Vernova
gev.oneLiner: 通用电气拆分出的能源装备巨头。
gev.oneLinerEn: The energy-equipment giant spun off from General Electric.
gev.tagline: 为电气化的世界提供动力
gev.taglineEn: The energy to change the world
gev.subcategory: 燃气轮机 / 风电 / 电网
gev.business: 燃气/风电/电网设备与电气化解决方案，承接 AI 用电激增带来的电力装备需求。
gev.businessEn: Gas turbines, wind and grid equipment plus electrification solutions, meeting the power-equipment demand from surging AI electricity use.
gev.description: GE Vernova 是通用电气(GE)在 2024 年拆分后专注能源的独立公司,业务分三块:燃气发电(燃气轮机)、风电,以及电网设备与电气化。AI 数据中心的用电缺口需要「立刻能上、能持续」的电力,而燃气轮机正好满足这种基荷/调峰需求,GE Vernova 的燃气轮机订单因此爆满、排期拉长;同时电网侧要大规模升级变压器、开关站等来消纳新增负荷,它的电网业务也水涨船高。作为少数能同时供「发电装备 + 电网装备」的巨头,GE Vernova 是 AI 电力紧缺的核心受益者之一。
gev.descriptionEn: GE Vernova is the energy-focused independent company created when General Electric split in 2024, with three segments: gas power (gas turbines), wind, and grid equipment/electrification. AI data centers' power gap needs electricity that can come online quickly and run continuously, and gas turbines fit this baseload/peaking need — so GE Vernova's gas-turbine order book is full with lengthening lead times; meanwhile the grid needs large-scale upgrades of transformers, switchgear and substations to absorb the new load, lifting its grid business too. As one of the few giants supplying both generation and grid equipment, GE Vernova is a core beneficiary of the AI power crunch.
whyItMatters: GE 拆分,专注燃气/风电/电网三块能源装备
燃气轮机满足 AI 基荷/调峰,订单爆满
电网升级消纳新增负荷,业务水涨船高
少数「发电+电网」双供的巨头

sie.name: 西门子
sie.oneLiner: 工业自动化与数字化巨头。
sie.oneLinerEn: A giant of industrial automation and digitalization.
sie.subcategory: 工业自动化 / 数字孪生
sie.business: 工业自动化、数字孪生(Xcelerator)、轨道交通与楼宇。Industrial AI 落地智能制造。
sie.businessEn: Industrial automation, digital twins (Xcelerator), rail and buildings. Bringing Industrial AI to smart manufacturing.
sie.description: 西门子是全球工业自动化与数字化的巨头,产品遍布工厂产线、电网、轨道交通、楼宇等实体世界的关键基础设施。它的差异化在于「工业 AI」与数字孪生:通过其 Xcelerator 平台,把工厂、产品用软件建成一个虚拟的「数字孪生」,在虚拟世界里模拟、优化、再指导物理世界的生产,让制造更高效、更少出错。它还与英伟达等合作,把生成式 AI 和工业元宇宙引入设计与制造。作为「把 AI 落到真实工业场景」的代表,西门子是连接数字 AI 与物理制造的关键一极,受益于智能制造与工业数字化的长期趋势。
sie.descriptionEn: Siemens is a global giant of industrial automation and digitalization, with products across factory lines, grids, rail and buildings — the critical infrastructure of the physical world. Its differentiation is "Industrial AI" and digital twins: through its Xcelerator platform, it builds software "digital twins" of factories and products to simulate, optimize and then guide physical production, making manufacturing more efficient and less error-prone. It also partners with NVIDIA and others to bring generative AI and the industrial metaverse into design and manufacturing. As a representative of "bringing AI into real industrial settings," Siemens is a key link between digital AI and physical manufacturing, benefiting from the long-term trends of smart manufacturing and industrial digitalization.
whyItMatters: 全球工业自动化与数字化巨头,遍布关键实体基建
Xcelerator 数字孪生:虚拟模拟优化再指导物理生产
与英伟达合作引入生成式 AI 与工业元宇宙
连接数字 AI 与物理制造的关键一极

foxconn.name: 富士康
foxconn.oneLiner: 全球最大电子代工厂，AI 服务器组装主力。
foxconn.oneLinerEn: The world's largest electronics contract manufacturer and a mainstay of AI-server assembly.
foxconn.taglineEn: Building the future of smart manufacturing
foxconn.subcategory: 消费电子 / AI 服务器
foxconn.business: 消费电子与服务器代工(含英伟达 AI 服务器)，推进「灯塔工厂」智能制造。
foxconn.businessEn: Consumer-electronics and server contract manufacturing (including NVIDIA AI servers), advancing "lighthouse factory" smart manufacturing.
foxconn.description: 富士康(鸿海)是全球最大的电子代工厂,以组装 iPhone 而闻名,是苹果最重要的制造伙伴。凭借无与伦比的规模制造、供应链与工程能力,它如今把重心大举转向 AI 服务器——是英伟达 GB200/GB300 等 AI 机柜整柜组装的全球最大承接方(其 A 股子公司工业富联是核心平台),鸿海在全球 AI 服务器机柜组装的份额约 40%、居首,2026 年 AI 服务器出货有望翻倍。除代工外,它还布局电动车、机器人、半导体与低轨卫星,并推进「灯塔工厂」把 AI 用进自己的生产。作为「把 AI 芯片变成实物、成规模交付」的关键一双手,鸿海是 AI 算力落地环节体量最大的公司之一。
foxconn.descriptionEn: Foxconn (Hon Hai) is the world's largest electronics contract manufacturer, famous for assembling the iPhone as Apple's most important manufacturing partner. With unmatched scale manufacturing, supply chain and engineering, it has shifted heavily toward AI servers — the world's largest assembler of NVIDIA GB200/GB300 AI racks (its A-share subsidiary Foxconn Industrial Internet is the core platform), with Hon Hai holding roughly 40% of global AI-server rack assembly (No.1) and AI-server shipments expected to double in 2026. Beyond contract manufacturing, it is building into EVs, robotics, semiconductors and low-Earth-orbit satellites, and advancing "lighthouse factories" that use AI in its own production. As the key pair of hands turning AI chips into physical, at-scale deliveries, Hon Hai is one of the largest companies in the AI-compute deployment layer.
whyItMatters: 全球最大电子代工厂,苹果最重要制造伙伴
英伟达 GB200/GB300 整柜组装全球最大承接方
鸿海全球 AI 机柜组装份额约 40% 居首,2026 出货或翻倍
布局 EV/机器人/半导体/卫星,AI 落地体量最大之一

schneider.name: 施耐德电气
schneider.oneLiner: 能源管理与自动化巨头，数据中心配电/制冷主力。
schneider.oneLinerEn: An energy-management and automation giant, a mainstay of data-center power and cooling.
schneider.tagline: 让能源与资源发挥最大价值
schneider.taglineEn: Make the most of energy and resources
schneider.industry: 数据中心基建 / 电气
schneider.business: 数据中心供配电与制冷(EcoStruxure)、工业自动化，AI 数据中心基建核心供应商。
schneider.businessEn: Data-center power distribution and cooling (EcoStruxure) and industrial automation — a core supplier of AI-data-center infrastructure.
schneider.description: 施耐德电气是全球能源管理与工业自动化巨头,在数据中心基建上是核心供应商之一。建一个 AI 数据中心,除了芯片,更要一整套「电」与「冷」的系统:从园区供配电、母线、不间断电源(UPS)、机架配电,到制冷与液冷方案,施耐德通过其 EcoStruxure 平台提供从设计、供电到冷却的整套解决方案,并用软件做能效管理。AI 数据中心的功率与密度暴增,让施耐德的供配电与制冷业务成为直接受益的增长引擎;它还收购/整合了 AI 数据中心设计等能力。作为「AI 数据中心供电+散热」全套供应商,施耐德是这轮基建狂潮里最核心的电气巨头之一。
schneider.descriptionEn: Schneider Electric is a global giant of energy management and industrial automation, and a core supplier of data-center infrastructure. Building an AI data center requires, beyond chips, a full system of "power" and "cooling": from campus power distribution, busways, uninterruptible power supplies (UPS) and rack PDUs to cooling and liquid-cooling solutions, Schneider provides an end-to-end solution from design to power to cooling through its EcoStruxure platform, with software for energy-efficiency management. As AI-data-center power and density surge, Schneider's power-distribution and cooling businesses become a direct growth engine; it has also acquired/integrated AI-data-center design capabilities. As a full-suite supplier of "AI-data-center power + cooling," Schneider is one of the most central electrical giants of this infrastructure boom.
whyItMatters: 全球能源管理与工业自动化巨头
EcoStruxure 提供数据中心供电到冷却整套方案
AI 数据中心功率密度暴增,供配电/制冷直接受益
「AI 数据中心供电+散热」全套核心供应商

envicool.name: 英维克
envicool.oneLiner: 中国数据中心温控/液冷龙头。
envicool.oneLinerEn: China's leader in data-center thermal management and liquid cooling.
envicool.business: 机房精密温控与液冷方案，受益 AI 算力散热需求。
envicool.businessEn: Precision thermal management and liquid-cooling solutions for data centers, benefiting from AI compute's cooling needs.
envicool.description: 英维克(Envicool)是中国数据中心温控(散热)的龙头,主打精密空调与液冷方案。AI 服务器功率暴增,散热成了数据中心的硬约束——风冷不够就得上液冷,英维克恰好在机房精密温控、冷板式与浸没式液冷、以及从芯片到机房的整体散热(「端到端」液冷)上都有布局,是国内 AI 液冷渗透率提升的直接受益者。它服务于中国的互联网、电信与算力中心客户,并随着国产 AI 算力(华为昇腾、寒武纪等)与数据中心建设放量而增长。作为 A 股「AI 散热/液冷」的核心标的之一,英维克在这轮国内算力基建里业绩弹性较大。
envicool.descriptionEn: Envicool is China's leader in data-center thermal management (cooling), focused on precision air conditioning and liquid-cooling solutions. As AI-server power surges, cooling becomes a hard constraint for data centers — when air cooling isn't enough, liquid cooling is required, and Envicool has offerings across precision room cooling, cold-plate and immersion liquid cooling, and end-to-end "chip-to-room" cooling, making it a direct beneficiary of rising AI liquid-cooling penetration in China. It serves Chinese internet, telecom and compute-center customers and grows as domestic AI compute (Huawei Ascend, Cambricon) and data-center build-out ramp. As one of the A-share core "AI cooling/liquid cooling" names, Envicool has high earnings leverage in this domestic compute-infrastructure cycle.
whyItMatters: 中国数据中心温控龙头,精密空调+液冷
AI 功率暴增,风冷不够上液冷,直接受益
冷板/浸没/端到端液冷全布局
国产算力与数据中心放量,A 股 AI 散热核心之一

innolight.name: 中际旭创
innolight.oneLiner: 全球高速光模块出货龙头。
innolight.oneLinerEn: The world's top shipper of high-speed optical modules.
innolight.business: 800G/1.6T 高速光模块，AI 数据中心光互联核心供应商。
innolight.businessEn: 800G/1.6T high-speed optical modules — a core supplier of optical interconnect for AI data centers.
innolight.description: 中际旭创(Innolight)是全球高速光模块出货量龙头,深交所上市(300308)。它把上游的激光芯片(如 Lumentum 的 EML)、光器件封装成 400G/800G/1.6T 数据中心光收发模块,直供英伟达、谷歌等超大规模客户,是 AI 算力网络里「把 GPU 集群连起来」的核心一环。AI 数据中心从 800G 向 1.6T 快速升级,加上北美云厂资本开支高涨,让中际旭创量价齐升、业绩与股价大幅增长,是 A 股「AI 光模块」最核心的标的。
innolight.descriptionEn: Innolight is the world's top shipper of high-speed optical modules, listed in Shenzhen (300308). It packages upstream laser chips (such as Lumentum's EMLs) and optical components into 400G/800G/1.6T data-center optical transceivers, supplying hyperscalers like NVIDIA and Google directly — a core link in "connecting GPU clusters" in AI compute networks. The fast upgrade of AI data centers from 800G to 1.6T, plus surging North American cloud capex, has lifted both Innolight's volumes and prices, driving strong earnings and share-price growth — the most central "AI optical module" name on China's A-share market.
whyItMatters: 全球高速光模块出货量第一
直供英伟达/谷歌等超大规模客户
800G→1.6T 升级 + 北美云厂资本开支高涨
A 股「AI 光模块」最核心标的

eoptolink.name: 新易盛
eoptolink.oneLiner: 中国高速光模块主要厂商。
eoptolink.oneLinerEn: A leading Chinese maker of high-speed optical modules.
eoptolink.business: 高速光模块研发与制造，AI 算力网络受益标的。
eoptolink.businessEn: R&D and manufacturing of high-speed optical modules — a beneficiary of AI compute networks.
eoptolink.description: 新易盛(Eoptolink)是中国高速光模块的主要厂商之一,深交所上市(300502)。它研发制造 400G/800G/1.6T 数据中心光收发模块,与中际旭创同为 A 股「AI 光模块」核心标的。新易盛以较高的盈利能力(毛利率)著称,踩中 AI 算力网络对高速光互联的暴增需求,业绩与股价在 2025–2026 年大幅增长,是北美云厂 800G/1.6T 放量的直接受益者之一。
eoptolink.descriptionEn: Eoptolink is one of China's leading makers of high-speed optical modules, listed in Shenzhen (300502). It develops and manufactures 400G/800G/1.6T data-center optical transceivers and, alongside Innolight, is a core "AI optical module" name on China's A-share market. Known for relatively high profitability (gross margin), Eoptolink has ridden the surging demand for high-speed optical interconnect in AI compute networks, with earnings and share price growing sharply in 2025–2026 — a direct beneficiary of North American hyperscalers' 800G/1.6T ramp.
whyItMatters: A 股「AI 光模块」核心标的之一
以较高毛利率著称,盈利能力强
踩中 800G/1.6T 高速光互联暴增需求
北美云厂放量的直接受益者

skhynix.name: SK 海力士
skhynix.oneLiner: HBM 高带宽显存的绝对龙头，英伟达最核心的内存供应商。
skhynix.oneLinerEn: The undisputed HBM leader and NVIDIA's most critical memory supplier.
skhynix.tagline: 以存储技术驱动 AI 时代
skhynix.taglineEn: Powering the AI era with memory technology
skhynix.role: 存储 · AI 内存瓶颈
skhynix.business: DRAM、NAND 闪存与 HBM 高带宽显存三大主业。**HBM 是 AI GPU 最紧的瓶颈部件**，SK 海力士份额长期第一、率先量产 HBM3E 并主供英伟达，是这轮 AI 内存超级周期最大赢家。2026 年 7 月以 ADR 形式登陆纳斯达克(SKHY)，募资 265 亿美元创外国公司美股 IPO 纪录。
skhynix.businessEn: Three core businesses: DRAM, NAND flash and HBM high-bandwidth memory. **HBM is the tightest bottleneck part for AI GPUs**, and SK Hynix has long held the No.1 HBM share, was first to mass-produce HBM3E and is NVIDIA's primary supplier — the biggest winner of this AI memory super-cycle. In July 2026 it listed on Nasdaq as an ADR (SKHY), raising $26.5 billion in a record IPO for a foreign company on U.S. markets.
skhynix.description: SK 海力士(SK Hynix)是全球第二大存储芯片厂、韩国第二市值公司，主业为 DRAM、NAND 与 HBM。AI 爆发让「离 GPU 最近的高带宽显存 HBM」成为最紧俏的瓶颈部件，而 SK 海力士在 HBM 上份额长期领先、技术领先(率先量产 HBM3E、领跑 HBM4)，并深度绑定英伟达——每一张顶级 AI GPU 上都堆着它的 HBM，是这轮 AI「内存超级周期」最大的受益者。2026 年 7 月，它以 ADR 形式在纳斯达克上市(代码 SKHY)，募资约 265 亿美元，成为外国公司在美最大规模 IPO，把资金投向 HBM 与新厂扩产。
skhynix.descriptionEn: SK Hynix is the world's second-largest memory-chip maker and South Korea's second most valuable company, with DRAM, NAND and HBM as its core. The AI boom has made HBM — the high-bandwidth memory sitting closest to the GPU — the scarcest bottleneck part, and SK Hynix has long led in HBM share and technology (first to mass-produce HBM3E, ahead on HBM4) while being deeply tied to NVIDIA: its HBM is stacked on every top-tier AI GPU, making it the biggest beneficiary of this AI "memory super-cycle." In July 2026 it listed on Nasdaq as an ADR (ticker SKHY), raising about $26.5 billion — the largest U.S. IPO ever by a foreign company — directing the proceeds toward HBM and new-fab expansion.
whyItMatters: HBM 份额长期第一，AI GPU 最紧瓶颈的头号供应商
率先量产 HBM3E、领跑 HBM4，技术代差领先
深度绑定英伟达，AI 内存超级周期最大赢家
2026 登陆纳斯达克，265 亿美元创外企美股 IPO 纪录

products.name: HBM3E / HBM4
products.description: AI GPU 的关键瓶颈部件，份额第一。

products.name: 服务器 DRAM (DDR5)
products.description: AI 服务器大容量主内存。

products.name: 企业级 NAND / SSD
products.description: 高吞吐固态存储。

samsung.name: 三星电子
samsung.oneLiner: 存储 + 代工 + 消费电子巨头，全力追赶 HBM。
samsung.oneLinerEn: A memory + foundry + consumer-electronics giant racing to catch up in HBM.
samsung.industry: 存储 / 半导体 / 消费电子
samsung.business: 全球最大存储芯片厂(DRAM/NAND 份额第一)、第二大晶圆代工厂，也是手机/家电龙头。AI 时代其胜负手在 **HBM**——过去在 HBM3E 上落后于 SK 海力士，正全力追赶导入英伟达；同时用先进制程代工争夺 AI 芯片订单。
samsung.businessEn: The world's largest memory-chip maker (No.1 in DRAM/NAND share), the second-largest foundry, and a leader in phones/appliances. In the AI era its make-or-break battle is **HBM** — it fell behind SK Hynix on HBM3E and is now racing to qualify with NVIDIA, while also chasing AI-chip orders with its leading-edge foundry.
samsung.description: 三星电子是韩国最大企业、全球存储芯片龙头，DRAM 与 NAND 份额常年第一，还有晶圆代工(仅次台积电)与庞大的手机/显示/家电业务。在 AI 内存这条最关键的战线上，三星过去在 HBM3E 的良率与英伟达认证上落后于 SK 海力士，正投入巨资追赶，并押注下一代 HBM4 与自研封装扳回一城；同时其先进制程代工(2nm/GAA)也在争夺 AI 芯片订单。作为「存储 + 代工」双轮巨头，三星在 AI 硬件供应链里举足轻重，但也面临份额被海力士侵蚀的压力。
samsung.descriptionEn: Samsung Electronics is South Korea's largest company and a global memory leader, perennially No.1 in DRAM and NAND share, with a foundry (second only to TSMC) and vast phone/display/appliance businesses. On the most critical front — AI memory — Samsung fell behind SK Hynix on HBM3E yield and NVIDIA qualification, and is now investing heavily to catch up, betting on next-gen HBM4 and in-house packaging to claw back share; meanwhile its leading-edge foundry (2nm/GAA) competes for AI-chip orders. As a memory + foundry giant, Samsung is pivotal in the AI hardware supply chain, though it faces pressure as Hynix erodes its share.
whyItMatters: 全球最大存储厂(DRAM/NAND 份额第一)
HBM 追赶战的关键一方，导入英伟达是胜负手
先进制程代工争夺 AI 芯片订单，制衡台积电
存储 + 代工双轮，AI 硬件供应链举足轻重

products.name: HBM3E / HBM4
products.description: 追赶海力士，力争导入英伟达。

products.name: DRAM / NAND
products.description: 全球份额第一的主存与闪存。

products.name: 晶圆代工
products.description: 2nm/GAA 先进制程争 AI 芯片订单。

lite.name: Lumentum
lite.oneLiner: 光模块的「卖铲人」——1.6T 时代关键 EML 激光芯片的量产者。
lite.oneLinerEn: The "picks-and-shovels" of optical modules — a volume maker of the EML laser chips key to the 1.6T era.
lite.subcategory: EML 激光芯片 / 光器件
lite.role: 光模块上游 · 卖铲人
lite.business: 激光器、EML/光芯片与光器件。目前少数能量产 200G/lane EML（1.6T 光模块核心元件）的厂商，另有大额光交换(OCS)订单。2026 营收高速增长。
lite.businessEn: Lasers, EML/photonic chips and optical components. One of the few able to volume-produce 200G/lane EML (the core part of 1.6T optical modules), plus large optical-circuit-switch (OCS) orders. Revenue is growing fast in 2026.
lite.description: Lumentum 2015 年从 JDSU 分拆而来,是光通信与激光的上游关键供应商——扮演光模块产业链里「卖铲人」的角色。它的核心壁垒是 EML(电吸收调制激光器)芯片:1.6T 光模块要用到 200G/lane 的高速 EML,而全球能稳定量产的厂商屈指可数,Lumentum 是其中之一,因此吃到 AI 光互联升级最上游的红利。此外它还做面向谷歌等的光交换(OCS)、3D 传感激光(用于消费电子)等。随着 AI 数据中心向 1.6T 光模块升级,Lumentum 的 EML 与光器件需求高速增长。
lite.descriptionEn: Spun out of JDSU in 2015, Lumentum is a key upstream supplier in optical communications and lasers — the "picks-and-shovels" of the optical-module supply chain. Its core moat is EML (electro-absorption modulated laser) chips: 1.6T optical modules need high-speed 200G/lane EMLs, and only a handful of makers worldwide can volume-produce them — Lumentum among them — so it captures the most upstream gains of the AI optical-interconnect upgrade. It also makes optical circuit switches (OCS) for the likes of Google and 3D-sensing lasers (for consumer electronics). As AI data centers upgrade to 1.6T modules, demand for its EMLs and optical components is growing rapidly.
whyItMatters: 少数能量产 200G/lane EML 的厂商,1.6T 模块最上游卡位
EML 激光芯片是高速光模块的核心瓶颈件
另有谷歌等光交换(OCS)大单
AI 向 1.6T 升级,EML 需求高速增长

aaoi.name: 应用光电
aaoi.oneLiner: 2026 涨幅最猛的光模块股之一，800G/1.6T 收发模块放量。
aaoi.oneLinerEn: One of 2026's hottest optical-module stocks, ramping 800G/1.6T transceivers.
aaoi.tagline: 为数据中心提供光连接
aaoi.taglineEn: Optical connectivity for the data center
aaoi.business: 数据中心光收发模块(800G/1.6T)。2026 完成 800G 放量并拿下 1.6T 大单，全年营收指引超 10 亿美元。
aaoi.businessEn: Data-center optical transceivers (800G/1.6T). In 2026 it ramped 800G to volume and won large 1.6T orders, guiding full-year revenue above $1 billion.
aaoi.description: 应用光电(Applied Optoelectronics,AAOI)成立于 1997 年,主做数据中心光收发模块与光器件(也有有线电视 CATV 业务)。它体量不大、股价波动极大,是典型的高弹性光模块标的。踩中 AI 数据中心从 400G 向 800G/1.6T 升级的浪潮,AAOI 在 2026 年完成 800G 大规模放量、拿下 1.6T 大单,并把全年营收指引提到 10 亿美元以上,成为 2026 年涨幅最猛的光模块股之一,微软、亚马逊等超大规模云厂是其重要客户。
aaoi.descriptionEn: Applied Optoelectronics (AAOI), founded in 1997, mainly makes data-center optical transceivers and components (with a CATV business too). It is small and highly volatile — a classic high-beta optical-module name. Catching the AI-data-center upgrade from 400G to 800G/1.6T, AAOI ramped 800G to volume in 2026, won large 1.6T orders, and raised its full-year revenue guidance above $1 billion, becoming one of 2026's best-performing optical-module stocks, with hyperscalers like Microsoft and Amazon among its key customers.
whyItMatters: 拿下 1.6T 大单,全年营收指引超 10 亿美元
高弹性光模块标的,2026 涨幅最猛之一
微软/亚马逊等超大规模云厂为客户

cien.name: Ciena
cien.oneLiner: 相干光网络与高容量路由设备龙头。
cien.oneLinerEn: A leader in coherent optical networking and high-capacity routing gear.
cien.tagline: 连接彼此,推动世界前行
cien.taglineEn: Connecting everything to move the world forward
cien.business: 相干光传输、路由与网络自动化软件，连接 AI 数据中心之间的长途 / 城域网络。
cien.businessEn: Coherent optical transport, routing and network-automation software connecting AI data centers over long-haul and metro networks.
cien.description: Ciena(思科系统的老对手之一)是相干光传输与高容量路由的龙头。它的核心是自研的 WaveLogic 相干 DSP——把海量数据以极高速率、极低误码地在城域与长途光纤上传输,是「数据中心之间」互联(DCI)的关键设备商。随着 AI 训练把算力分散到多个数据中心、并在园区间搬运海量数据,数据中心互联(DCI)需求快速上升,Ciena 的相干光与路由、以及网络自动化软件正是这一波「把 AI 数据中心连起来」的直接受益者。
cien.descriptionEn: Ciena is a leader in coherent optical transport and high-capacity routing. At its core is its own WaveLogic coherent DSP — moving vast amounts of data at very high rates with very low error over metro and long-haul fiber — making it a key vendor for data-center interconnect (DCI). As AI training spreads compute across multiple data centers and shuttles huge volumes of data between sites, DCI demand is rising fast, and Ciena's coherent optics, routing and network-automation software are direct beneficiaries of this wave of "connecting AI data centers together."
whyItMatters: 自研 WaveLogic 相干 DSP,长途/城域传输核心
数据中心互联(DCI)关键设备商
AI 把算力分散到多数据中心,DCI 需求上升
相干光+路由+网络自动化一体

nok.name: 诺基亚
nok.oneLiner: 电信级网络基建巨头，光网络与数据中心互联业务增长。
nok.business: 移动 / 固定网络基础设施、IP 路由与光网络，正向 AI 数据中心互联延伸。

mu.name: 美光
mu.oneLiner: 美系唯一存储大厂，HBM 供不应求、订单排到明年。
mu.oneLinerEn: The only U.S. memory major — its HBM is sold out with orders booked into next year.
mu.taglineEn: Transforming how the world uses information to enrich life
mu.business: DRAM、NAND 与 HBM 高带宽显存。作为三大 HBM 供应商中**唯一的美系厂商**，美光的 HBM3E 已导入英伟达并供不应求、产能提前售罄；本土属性使其在美国「芯片自主」政策下额外受益。
mu.businessEn: DRAM, NAND and HBM high-bandwidth memory. As the **only U.S.-based** maker among the three HBM suppliers, Micron's HBM3E is already designed into NVIDIA and is sold out with capacity pre-committed; its domestic footprint gives it extra upside under U.S. "chip self-sufficiency" policy.
mu.description: 美光(Micron)成立于 1978 年，是美国唯一的存储芯片大厂，与三星、SK 海力士并称存储三巨头，主业 DRAM、NAND 与 HBM。AI 掀起的内存超级周期让美光量价齐升——其 HBM3E 已通过英伟达认证并大规模供货，产能提前售罄、订单能见度延伸到下一年；同时作为唯一美系存储厂，它在美国推动「先进制程与存储本土化」的政策(如芯片法案补贴、在美建厂)下额外受益。美光是美股投资者押注「AI 内存」最直接的标的之一。
mu.descriptionEn: Founded in 1978, Micron is the only major U.S. memory-chip maker and, alongside Samsung and SK Hynix, one of the "big three" of memory, with DRAM, NAND and HBM as its core. The AI-driven memory super-cycle has lifted both Micron's volumes and prices — its HBM3E is qualified by NVIDIA and shipping at scale, capacity is sold out, and order visibility extends into the following year. As the sole U.S.-based memory maker, it gains extra benefit from American policy pushing to localize advanced-node and memory production (CHIPS Act subsidies, U.S. fabs). Micron is one of the most direct ways for U.S. investors to bet on "AI memory."
whyItMatters: 三大 HBM 供应商中唯一美系厂，本土政策受益
HBM3E 导入英伟达、产能售罄，量价齐升
AI 内存超级周期最直接的美股标的之一
存储三巨头之一，与三星/海力士鼎立

products.name: HBM3E / HBM4
products.description: 已导入英伟达，产能售罄。

products.name: 服务器 DRAM (DDR5)
products.description: AI 服务器主内存。

products.name: 企业级 NAND / SSD
products.description: 数据中心固态存储。

fn.name: Fabrinet
fn.oneLiner: 全球光模块/光器件代工龙头。
fn.business: 为 Lumentum、Cisco、NVIDIA 等代工光模块与精密光机电组件，是光通信中游的隐形巨头。

csco.name: 思科
csco.oneLiner: 企业与数据中心网络设备龙头，光网络的下游买家。
csco.oneLinerEn: A leader in enterprise/data-center networking gear and a downstream buyer of optical networking.
csco.business: 交换机、路由器、网络安全与协作软件；自研硅光与光模块，是光通信下游主力。
csco.businessEn: Switches, routers, cybersecurity and collaboration software; it makes its own silicon photonics and optical modules and is a major optical-networking buyer.
csco.description: 思科(Cisco)是全球企业与运营商网络设备的老牌龙头——路由器、交换机曾是「让互联网互联」的基础设施,思科一度是全球市值最高的公司。如今它的版图横跨网络硬件、网络安全(收购了 Splunk 等)、协作软件(Webex)与可观测性。在 AI 时代,它一方面是光模块、连接芯片等的下游大买家,并自研硅光与网络芯片,推出面向 AI 数据中心的高性能网络方案,与 Arista、英伟达在「谁来连 GPU 集群」上竞争;另一方面把 AI 用于自家的网络运维与安全产品。相比增长凶猛的新贵,思科更偏「稳健的网络与安全基本盘 + AI 化升级」,是企业 IT 基础设施里体量最大、最稳的一极。
csco.descriptionEn: Cisco is a veteran global leader in enterprise and carrier networking equipment — its routers and switches were the infrastructure that "connected the internet," and Cisco was once the world's most valuable company. Today its footprint spans networking hardware, cybersecurity (it acquired Splunk and others), collaboration software (Webex) and observability. In the AI era, it is both a major downstream buyer of optical modules and connectivity chips and a maker of its own silicon photonics and networking chips, offering high-performance networking for AI data centers and competing with Arista and NVIDIA over "who connects the GPU clusters"; it also applies AI to its own network-operations and security products. Compared with fast-growing upstarts, Cisco leans toward a "steady networking-and-security base + AI upgrade," the largest and steadiest pole of enterprise IT infrastructure.
whyItMatters: 全球企业/运营商网络设备老牌龙头
横跨网络硬件+安全(收购 Splunk)+协作(Webex)
AI 数据中心高性能网络,与 Arista/英伟达竞争
稳健网络与安全基本盘 + AI 化升级

accelink.name: 光迅科技
accelink.oneLiner: 国产光器件与光模块老牌厂商。
accelink.business: 光芯片、光器件与光模块全产业链，国产光通信骨干。

tianfu.name: 天孚通信
tianfu.oneLiner: 光器件配套龙头，光模块「卖铲人」。
tianfu.business: 光器件、陶瓷套管、光引擎等配套，深度绑定头部光模块厂。

yuanjie.name: 源杰科技
yuanjie.oneLiner: 国产高速光芯片(激光器)代表。
yuanjie.business: DFB/EML 激光器芯片，国产替代上游光芯片的关键力量。

mtsi.name: MACOM
mtsi.oneLiner: 高速模拟与光电芯片(激光驱动器/TIA)供应商。
mtsi.oneLinerEn: A supplier of high-speed analog and optoelectronic chips (laser drivers/TIAs).
mtsi.tagline: 为光与射频提供关键器件
mtsi.subcategory: 高速模拟 / 光电器件
mtsi.business: 光模块用的激光驱动器、跨阻放大器(TIA)与高速模拟/射频芯片，光通信上游关键器件。
mtsi.businessEn: Laser drivers, transimpedance amplifiers (TIAs) and high-speed analog/RF chips for optical modules — key upstream optical components.
mtsi.description: MACOM 是高速模拟与光电芯片的重要供应商,处在光通信产业链的上游关键位置。一个光模块要「发光」和「收光」:发端要激光驱动器(驱动激光器发信号),收端要跨阻放大器 TIA(把微弱光电流放大成电信号),这些高速模拟芯片正是 MACOM 的强项。它还做射频/微波芯片(用于国防、卫星、电信)。AI 数据中心对 800G/1.6T 高速光模块的暴增需求,直接拉动 MACOM 的激光驱动器与 TIA 出货,它是「光互联上游器件」里受益明确的一员。
mtsi.descriptionEn: MACOM is an important supplier of high-speed analog and optoelectronic chips, at a key upstream position in the optical-communications chain. An optical module must "emit" and "receive" light: the transmit side needs a laser driver (to drive the laser to send signals), and the receive side needs a transimpedance amplifier (TIA, to amplify weak photocurrent into an electrical signal) — high-speed analog chips that are MACOM's strength. It also makes RF/microwave chips (for defense, satellite, telecom). Surging AI-data-center demand for 800G/1.6T high-speed optical modules directly drives MACOM's laser-driver and TIA shipments, making it a clear beneficiary among "optical-interconnect upstream components."
whyItMatters: 光模块激光驱动器/TIA 上游关键芯片
发光/收光两端的高速模拟芯片是其强项
还做射频/微波(国防/卫星/电信)
800G/1.6T 光模块暴增,出货明确受益

smtc.name: Semtech
smtc.oneLiner: 光模块信号芯片与 LoRa 物联网。
smtc.oneLinerEn: Optical-module signal chips plus LoRa IoT.
smtc.tagline: 连接万物的模拟与混合信号
smtc.taglineEn: Analog and mixed-signal that connect everything
smtc.business: 光通信 CDR/PMD 信号芯片、模拟混合信号 IC 与 LoRa 物联网，受益 AI 数据中心光互联。
smtc.businessEn: Optical CDR/PMD signal chips, analog/mixed-signal ICs and LoRa IoT — benefiting from AI-data-center optical interconnect.
smtc.description: Semtech 有两块主要业务。一是光通信/数据中心的信号芯片——如时钟数据恢复(CDR)、物理介质相关(PMD)器件与各类模拟混合信号 IC,用于把高速信号在光模块、铜缆里可靠地收发;它收购 Sierra Wireless 后也拓展了连接业务,并推出面向 AI 机柜内铜缆的 CopperEdge 等方案。二是 LoRa——一种低功耗广域物联网无线技术,Semtech 是 LoRa 芯片的核心供应商,广泛用于智慧城市、农业、资产追踪等 IoT 场景。AI 数据中心对高速互联的需求让 Semtech 的信号芯片业务受益,而 LoRa 则提供物联网侧的长期增长。
smtc.descriptionEn: Semtech has two main businesses. First, signal chips for optical communications/data centers — such as clock-data recovery (CDR), physical-medium-dependent (PMD) devices and various analog/mixed-signal ICs used to reliably transmit and receive high-speed signals in optical modules and copper cables; after acquiring Sierra Wireless it expanded connectivity, and it offers solutions like CopperEdge for in-rack AI copper cabling. Second, LoRa — a low-power wide-area IoT wireless technology for which Semtech is the core chip supplier, widely used in smart cities, agriculture and asset tracking. AI-data-center demand for high-speed interconnect benefits Semtech's signal-chip business, while LoRa provides long-term IoT-side growth.
whyItMatters: 光通信 CDR/PMD 与模拟混合信号芯片
收购 Sierra Wireless,推 CopperEdge 等 AI 铜缆方案
LoRa 低功耗广域物联网核心供应商
AI 高速互联 + IoT 双轮

jnpr.name: 瞻博网络
jnpr.oneLiner: 数据中心与电信网络设备商（已并入 HPE）。
jnpr.oneLinerEn: A data-center and telecom networking vendor (now part of HPE).
jnpr.tagline: 由 AI 驱动的网络
jnpr.subcategory: 路由 / 交换 / AI 运维
jnpr.business: 路由器、交换机与 AI 驱动的网络运维(Mist)，光模块的下游买家。
jnpr.businessEn: Routers, switches and AI-driven network operations (Mist); a downstream buyer of optical modules.
jnpr.description: 瞻博网络(Juniper)是老牌的数据中心与电信网络设备商,做高性能路由器、交换机与网络软件。它的一大差异化是 Mist——用 AI 做「网络运维」(自动发现故障、优化 WiFi 与网络性能),主打「AI 原生网络」。作为网络设备商,Juniper 是光模块、连接芯片等的下游买家,也直接受益于 AI 数据中心对高速网络的需求。2025 年 7 月,慧与(HPE)以约 140 亿美元完成对 Juniper 的收购,把两家的网络业务合并,一举让 HPE 的网络规模翻倍、补强 AI 网络组合。Juniper 从此并入 HPE 体系。
jnpr.descriptionEn: Juniper Networks is a veteran data-center and telecom networking vendor making high-performance routers, switches and network software. A key differentiation is Mist — using AI for "network operations" (auto-detecting faults, optimizing WiFi and network performance), branded "AI-Native Networking." As a network-equipment vendor, Juniper is a downstream buyer of optical modules and connectivity chips and benefits directly from AI-data-center demand for high-speed networking. In July 2025 HPE completed its ~$14 billion acquisition of Juniper, merging the two companies' networking businesses to roughly double HPE's networking scale and strengthen its AI-networking portfolio. Juniper is now part of HPE.
whyItMatters: 老牌数据中心/电信网络设备商
Mist 用 AI 做网络运维,「AI 原生网络」
光模块/连接芯片下游买家,AI 网络需求受益
2025.7 被 HPE 约 140 亿美元收购,并入 HPE

eric.name: 爱立信
eric.oneLiner: 全球电信网络设备巨头。
eric.taglineEn: Making the limitless connected world possible
eric.business: 5G/电信无线与传输网络设备，光传输是其重要一环。
eric.businessEn: 5G/telecom radio and transport networking equipment, with optical transport as an important piece.
eric.description: 爱立信(Ericsson)是全球电信网络设备三巨头之一(与诺基亚、华为并列),核心是给运营商建 5G/4G 移动网络——基站、无线接入网(RAN)、核心网与传输网。它是移动通信基础设施的支柱级供应商。在 AI 语境下,爱立信一方面把 AI 用于网络自身(智能优化、节能、自动化运维),另一方面随着 AI 把海量数据推向网络边缘、以及「电信级 + 卫星」融合,它的传输与网络能力也被重新重视;它还与超大规模云厂合作、开放网络 API 探索新模式。相比纯 AI 弹性标的,爱立信更偏「稳健的通信基建」一极,是 AI 时代连接层的重要一员。
eric.descriptionEn: Ericsson is one of the world's big-three telecom-equipment vendors (alongside Nokia and Huawei), centered on building 5G/4G mobile networks for operators — base stations, radio access network (RAN), core network and transport. It is a pillar supplier of mobile-communications infrastructure. In the AI context, Ericsson applies AI to the network itself (intelligent optimization, energy saving, automated operations), and as AI pushes vast data toward the network edge and "telecom + satellite" converges, its transport and networking capabilities gain renewed importance; it also partners with hyperscalers and explores open network APIs. Compared with pure AI-elasticity names, Ericsson is more the "steady communications-infrastructure" pole — an important member of the connectivity layer in the AI era.
whyItMatters: 全球电信设备三巨头之一,给运营商建 5G
基站/RAN/核心网/传输,移动基建支柱供应商
把 AI 用于网络优化/节能/自动化运维
AI 推数据到边缘、电信+卫星融合,连接层重要一员

ceg.name: Constellation
ceg.oneLiner: 美国最大核电运营商，直接给 AI 数据中心供电。
ceg.oneLinerEn: The largest U.S. nuclear operator, supplying power directly to AI data centers.
ceg.business: 核电为主的无碳电力生产，与微软等签署数据中心长期供电协议（含重启三里岛）。
ceg.businessEn: Mostly nuclear carbon-free power generation, with long-term data-center supply deals such as Microsoft's (including restarting Three Mile Island).
ceg.description: Constellation Energy(2022 年从爱克斯龙 Exelon 分拆)是美国最大的核电运营商,掌握全美最大的无碳发电机队。核电的独特价值在于「24 小时稳定的基荷电力」——这正是 AI 数据中心最需要的。它与微软签下 20 年供电协议、重启三里岛 Unit 1(更名 Crane 清洁能源中心、约 835MW,预计 2028 年并网、专供微软 AI 数据中心),成为「AI + 核电」叙事的标志性事件。稳定的无碳电力 + 与科技巨头绑定的长期合约,让 Constellation 从传统公用事业股变成 AI 电力的核心标的。
ceg.descriptionEn: Constellation Energy (spun off from Exelon in 2022) is the largest U.S. nuclear operator, with the nation's biggest carbon-free generation fleet. Nuclear's unique value is 24/7 stable baseload power — exactly what AI data centers need most. It signed a 20-year supply deal with Microsoft to restart Three Mile Island Unit 1 (rebranded the Crane Clean Energy Center, ~835MW, expected online in 2028, dedicated to Microsoft's AI data centers), a landmark of the "AI + nuclear" story. Stable carbon-free power plus long-term contracts tied to tech giants have turned Constellation from a traditional utility into a core AI-power name.
whyItMatters: 美国最大核电运营商,最大无碳发电机队
核电 24 小时基荷,正是 AI 数据中心刚需
微软 20 年协议、重启三里岛专供 AI
「AI + 核电」叙事标志性玩家

vst.name: Vistra
vst.oneLiner: 综合电力生产商，核电 + 燃气 + 储能。
vst.oneLinerEn: An integrated power producer spanning nuclear, gas and storage.
vst.subcategory: 核电 / 燃气 / 储能
vst.business: 发电与零售电力，收购核电资产受益 AI 用电激增。
vst.businessEn: Power generation and retail electricity; its nuclear acquisitions benefit from surging AI electricity demand.
vst.description: Vistra 是美国大型综合电力生产商,拥有约 50GW 的多元发电机队(核电、燃气、煤电、太阳能与储能),并经营零售售电。它通过收购 Energy Harbor 拿下多座核电站,一举成为核电大户,踩中 AI 用电激增的红利。2026 年,Vistra 与 Meta 签下 20 年、总计逾 2600MW 的无碳核电供电协议(供 Meta 的 AI 数据中心,含大规模机组增容与延寿),把核电资产的价值直接兑现。灵活的燃气+储能机队 + 长期核电合约,让 Vistra 成为 AI 电力紧缺行情里最受关注的发电商之一。
vst.descriptionEn: Vistra is a large integrated U.S. power producer with about 50GW of diversified generation (nuclear, gas, coal, solar and storage) and a retail electricity business. Its acquisition of Energy Harbor added several nuclear plants, making it a major nuclear operator right as AI electricity demand surged. In 2026 Vistra signed 20-year carbon-free nuclear supply agreements with Meta totaling over 2,600MW (for Meta's AI data centers, including large capacity uprates and license extensions), directly monetizing its nuclear assets. A flexible gas + storage fleet plus long-term nuclear contracts make Vistra one of the most-watched generators in the AI power-crunch trade.
whyItMatters: 约 50GW 多元机队,核电+燃气+储能
收购 Energy Harbor 成核电大户
2026 与 Meta 签 20 年逾 2600MW 核电供电
AI 电力紧缺行情最受关注发电商之一

oklo.name: Oklo
oklo.oneLiner: 先进核裂变 / SMR 新锐，Sam Altman 押注。
oklo.oneLinerEn: An advanced fission / SMR upstart backed by Sam Altman.
oklo.business: 小型模块化反应堆(微堆)，瞄准数据中心专属供电。
oklo.businessEn: Small modular (micro) reactors aimed at dedicated power for data centers.
oklo.description: Oklo 成立于 2013 年,是先进核裂变的明星新锐,主打 Aurora「微堆」——一种小型快中子反应堆,可就地为数据中心等提供长期、无碳、稳定的专属电力,还能用核废料再利用作燃料。它采用「自建自营、卖电而非卖堆」的商业模式(签长期购电协议 PPA)。公司由 Sam Altman 长期支持(曾任董事长),通过 SPAC 上市(NYSE: OKLO),踩中 AI 对专属电力的渴求而备受追捧。2026 年其 Aurora 在爱达荷的首堆推进 NRC 许可、力争实现临界,是「AI 专属核电」最受关注的标的,但也面临监管周期长、尚未商业化发电的风险。
oklo.descriptionEn: Founded in 2013, Oklo is a star advanced-fission upstart built around its Aurora "powerhouse" — a small fast reactor that can provide long-term, carbon-free, stable dedicated power on-site for data centers and others, and can even reuse nuclear waste as fuel. It uses a "build-own-operate, sell power not reactors" model (signing long-term PPAs). Long backed by Sam Altman (a former chairman), it went public via SPAC (NYSE: OKLO) and has been sought after as AI's hunger for dedicated power grows. In 2026 its first Aurora in Idaho advanced through NRC licensing toward criticality, making it the most-watched "AI dedicated nuclear" name — though it faces long regulatory timelines and is not yet generating commercially.
whyItMatters: Aurora「微堆」为数据中心就地供专属核电
自建自营、卖电(PPA)而非卖堆的商业模式
Sam Altman 长期押注,踩中 AI 专属电力需求
2026 推进 NRC 许可,但尚未商业化、监管周期长

smr.name: NuScale
smr.oneLiner: 小型模块化反应堆(SMR)先行者。
smr.business: 首个获 NRC 认证的 SMR 设计，面向数据中心等专属电力需求。

cat.name: 卡特彼勒
cat.oneLiner: 工程机械巨头，也是数据中心备用 / 就地发电主力。
cat.business: 工程机械与燃气 / 柴油发电机组，AI 数据中心抢电期的供电设备供应商。

cmi.name: 康明斯
cmi.oneLiner: 发动机与发电机组龙头。
cmi.business: 发电机组、发动机与电力系统，数据中心备电常用。

harmonic.name: 哈默纳科
harmonic.oneLiner: 谐波减速器全球龙头，人形机器人关节核心。
harmonic.oneLinerEn: The global leader in harmonic reducers — core of humanoid-robot joints.
harmonic.tagline: 以精密传动驱动机器人
harmonic.business: 谐波减速器(精密减速器)，是人形机器人关节的关键零部件，全球份额领先。
harmonic.businessEn: Harmonic (strain-wave) reducers — a key part in humanoid-robot joints, with leading global share.
harmonic.description: 哈默纳科(Harmonic Drive)是全球谐波减速器的龙头。机器人的每个关节都要一个「减速器」——把电机的高速旋转变成低速、高扭矩、又极其精准的运动,这决定了机器人动作的精度与稳定。谐波减速器(应变波减速器)体积小、精度高、无回差,是人形机器人手臂/关节的首选,而哈默纳科长期占据这一领域的绝大部分份额、技术门槛极高。随着特斯拉 Optimus 等人形机器人走向量产,每台机器人要用几十个减速器,哈默纳科被视为「人形机器人量产」最确定的上游卖铲人之一,但也面临国产替代(如绿的谐波)的追赶。
harmonic.descriptionEn: Harmonic Drive is the global leader in harmonic reducers. Every robot joint needs a "reducer" — converting a motor's high-speed rotation into low-speed, high-torque, extremely precise motion, which determines a robot's motion accuracy and stability. Harmonic (strain-wave) reducers are compact, high-precision and zero-backlash, the top choice for humanoid arms/joints, and Harmonic Drive has long held the vast majority of this field with very high technical barriers. As humanoids like Tesla's Optimus head toward mass production — each robot using dozens of reducers — Harmonic Drive is seen as one of the most certain upstream "picks-and-shovels" of "humanoid mass production," though it faces catch-up from domestic alternatives (like Leaderdrive).
whyItMatters: 全球谐波减速器龙头,技术门槛极高
减速器决定机器人动作精度与稳定
人形机器人手臂/关节首选,每台用几十个
「人形量产」最确定上游卖铲人之一

teradyne.name: 泰瑞达
teradyne.oneLiner: 半导体测试设备 + 协作机器人(Universal Robots)。
teradyne.business: 芯片测试设备，并通过 Universal Robots 做协作机械臂，横跨芯片与机器人。

asml.name: 阿斯麦
asml.oneLiner: 全球唯一 EUV 光刻机供应商，半导体设备皇冠上的明珠。
asml.oneLinerEn: The world's only EUV lithography supplier — the crown jewel of chip equipment.
asml.tagline: 缩小的极限，前进的动力
asml.taglineEn: Pushing the limits of what's possible in chips
asml.business: 光刻机（含独家 EUV/High-NA EUV），先进制程绕不开它，是整个芯片产业的咽喉。
asml.businessEn: Lithography machines (including the exclusive EUV/High-NA EUV) that no advanced node can bypass — the chokepoint of the entire chip industry.
asml.description: ASML(阿斯麦)是全球唯一能造 EUV(极紫外)光刻机的公司,处在整个半导体产业链最关键的「咽喉」位置——没有 EUV,就造不出 7nm 以下的先进芯片,而下一代 High-NA EUV 单台售价高达数亿美元、重如公交车。台积电、三星、英特尔的先进制程都必须向它买机器,因此 ASML 拥有几乎无可替代的垄断地位,也成为中美科技博弈中出口管制的焦点。除卖机器外,它还是欧洲科技的旗帜:2025 年领投法国大模型公司 Mistral、持股约 11%。AI 对先进算力芯片的暴增需求,是 ASML 长期成长的底层动力。
asml.descriptionEn: ASML is the world's only maker of EUV (extreme ultraviolet) lithography machines, sitting at the most critical chokepoint of the entire semiconductor supply chain — without EUV, chips below 7nm can't be made, and the next-generation High-NA EUV costs hundreds of millions of dollars per machine and is as heavy as a bus. TSMC, Samsung and Intel must all buy from it for advanced nodes, giving ASML a nearly irreplaceable monopoly and making it a focal point of export controls in U.S.-China tech rivalry. Beyond selling machines, it is a flagship of European tech: in 2025 it led the funding round for French model company Mistral, taking an ~11% stake. Surging AI demand for advanced compute chips is the underlying driver of ASML's long-term growth.
whyItMatters: 全球唯一 EUV 光刻机供应商,先进制程绕不开
High-NA EUV 单台数亿美元,技术代差极大
中美科技博弈出口管制焦点
领投并持股 Mistral,欧洲科技旗帜

amat.name: 应用材料
amat.oneLiner: 全球最大半导体设备厂（沉积/刻蚀/CMP 等）。
amat.oneLinerEn: The world's largest semiconductor-equipment maker (deposition/etch/CMP and more).
amat.tagline: 让下一代技术成为可能
amat.taglineEn: Making possible the technology shaping the future
amat.subcategory: 沉积 / 刻蚀 / 量测
amat.business: 薄膜沉积、刻蚀、离子注入、量测等多类制造设备，覆盖面最广。
amat.businessEn: The broadest lineup of fab equipment — thin-film deposition, etch, ion implantation, metrology and more.
amat.description: 应用材料(Applied Materials,AMAT)是全球最大、产品覆盖面最广的半导体设备厂。芯片制造要在晶圆上反复「加一层材料、刻掉一部分、掺入杂质、测一测」,AMAT 在薄膜沉积、刻蚀、离子注入、快速热处理、CMP 与量测等几乎每一道关键工序上都有设备,是芯片工厂的「万能军火商」。它同时受益于两条主线:AI 芯片对先进逻辑/HBM 存储制程的投资,以及先进封装(把多颗芯粒堆叠互连)的兴起。制程越先进、封装越复杂,需要的设备种类和金额就越大,AMAT 因此长期成长。
amat.descriptionEn: Applied Materials (AMAT) is the world's largest semiconductor-equipment maker with the broadest product range. Chip fabrication repeatedly "adds a layer of material, etches part away, implants dopants, and measures" on the wafer, and AMAT has tools for nearly every key step — thin-film deposition, etch, ion implantation, rapid thermal processing, CMP and metrology — making it the fab's all-purpose "arms dealer."
