It benefits from two main trends: AI-chip investment in advanced logic/HBM memory processes, and the rise of advanced packaging (stacking and interconnecting multiple chiplets). The more advanced the node and the more complex the packaging, the more equipment types and dollars are needed — driving AMAT's long-term growth.
whyItMatters: 全球最大、覆盖最广的半导体设备厂
沉积/刻蚀/注入/量测几乎每道工序都有设备
受益 AI 先进逻辑/HBM 制程投资
先进封装兴起,设备需求进一步放大

lrcx.name: 泛林
lrcx.oneLiner: 刻蚀与沉积设备龙头，存储芯片制造关键。
lrcx.oneLinerEn: A leader in etch and deposition equipment, crucial to memory-chip manufacturing.
lrcx.tagline: 在原子尺度上塑造未来
lrcx.taglineEn: Shaping the future at the atomic scale
lrcx.business: 等离子刻蚀与薄膜沉积设备，在 3D NAND/DRAM 制造中份额领先。
lrcx.businessEn: Plasma etch and thin-film deposition equipment, with leading share in 3D NAND/DRAM manufacturing.
lrcx.description: 泛林集团(Lam Research)是等离子刻蚀与薄膜沉积设备的龙头,尤其在存储芯片制造上份额领先。3D NAND 要把存储单元一层层往上堆(如今已数百层),每堆一层都要精准地沉积薄膜、再刻出极深极窄的孔洞,这正是 Lam 最强的领域;DRAM 与先进逻辑的深宽比结构也高度依赖它。AI 掀起的 HBM 与大容量存储需求,直接拉动存储厂扩产,而扩产就要买 Lam 的刻蚀/沉积设备,因此它是「AI 内存超级周期」在设备端的核心受益者。
lrcx.descriptionEn: Lam Research is a leader in plasma etch and thin-film deposition equipment, with especially strong share in memory-chip manufacturing. 3D NAND stacks memory cells layer upon layer (now hundreds of layers), and each layer requires precise film deposition and then etching extremely deep, narrow holes — exactly Lam's strength; DRAM and advanced logic's high-aspect-ratio structures also depend heavily on it. The AI-driven demand for HBM and high-capacity memory directly spurs memory makers to expand capacity, and expansion means buying Lam's etch/deposition tools — making it a core equipment-side beneficiary of the "AI memory super-cycle."
whyItMatters: 等离子刻蚀与薄膜沉积龙头
3D NAND 堆叠制造最强,存储份额领先
AI 拉动 HBM/存储扩产,直接买它的设备
「AI 内存超级周期」设备端核心受益者

klac.name: 科磊
klac.oneLiner: 半导体量测与检测设备龙头。
klac.oneLinerEn: The leader in semiconductor metrology and inspection equipment.
klac.business: 缺陷检测与量测设备，保障先进制程良率。
klac.businessEn: Defect-inspection and metrology equipment that safeguards advanced-node yield.
klac.description: 科磊(KLA)是半导体「过程控制」的绝对龙头——在芯片制造的每一道关键工序后,用它的检测与量测设备找出比病毒还小的缺陷、测量线宽与薄膜厚度,把良率控制住。制程越先进,一个微小缺陷造成的损失越大,过程控制的价值就越高,而 KLA 在缺陷检测这一细分领域占据近乎垄断的份额、护城河极深。AI 推动先进逻辑、HBM 与先进封装的产能扩张,每一片高价值晶圆都要反复被 KLA 的设备「体检」,因此它是设备板块里盈利质量最高、最稳的公司之一。
klac.descriptionEn: KLA is the dominant leader in semiconductor "process control" — after each key step in chip manufacturing, its inspection and metrology tools find defects smaller than a virus and measure line widths and film thicknesses to keep yield in check. The more advanced the node, the greater the loss from a tiny defect and the higher the value of process control — and KLA holds a near-monopoly share in defect inspection with a very deep moat. As AI drives capacity expansion in advanced logic, HBM and advanced packaging, every high-value wafer is repeatedly "health-checked" by KLA's tools, making it one of the highest-quality, most stable earners in the equipment sector.
whyItMatters: 过程控制绝对龙头,缺陷检测近乎垄断
制程越先进,良率控制价值越高
护城河极深,盈利质量高、波动小
AI 扩产,每片高价值晶圆都要反复检测

snps.name: 新思科技
snps.oneLiner: EDA 芯片设计软件双雄之一。
snps.oneLinerEn: One of the two giants of EDA chip-design software.
snps.tagline: 从芯片到系统的智能设计
snps.taglineEn: Smart design from silicon to systems
snps.business: EDA 工具、IP 与系统设计软件——没有它画不出现代芯片。
snps.businessEn: EDA tools, IP and system-design software — modern chips can't be designed without it.
snps.description: 新思科技(Synopsys)与楷登(Cadence)是 EDA(电子设计自动化)软件的「双雄」,共同垄断了芯片设计的最上游工具链。现代芯片有几百亿到上千亿颗晶体管,工程师根本不可能手工画,必须依赖 EDA 软件来综合、布局布线、仿真验证——没有 EDA,就没有现代芯片。Synopsys 在数字设计综合与 IP(可复用电路模块)上尤其领先,并深度把 AI 引入设计流程(用 AI 自动优化芯片布局)。2025 年它以约 350 亿美元完成对仿真巨头 Ansys 的收购,把能力从「芯片」扩展到「系统级仿真」。AI 芯片设计的爆发让 EDA 需求水涨船高。
snps.descriptionEn: Synopsys and Cadence are the "twin giants" of EDA (electronic design automation) software, together dominating the most upstream tool chain of chip design. Modern chips have tens to hundreds of billions of transistors that engineers can't possibly lay out by hand, so they rely on EDA software for synthesis, place-and-route, and simulation/verification — without EDA there are no modern chips. Synopsys leads especially in digital design synthesis and IP (reusable circuit blocks), and has deeply infused AI into the design flow (using AI to automatically optimize chip layout). In 2025 it completed its ~$35 billion acquisition of simulation giant Ansys, extending its reach from "chip" to "system-level simulation." The boom in AI-chip design keeps lifting EDA demand.
whyItMatters: EDA 双雄之一,芯片设计最上游工具链
数字综合与 IP 领先,AI 引入设计流程
约 350 亿美元收购 Ansys,扩展系统级仿真
AI 芯片设计爆发,EDA 需求水涨船高

cdns.name: 楷登
cdns.oneLiner: EDA 芯片设计软件双雄之一。
cdns.oneLinerEn: One of the two giants of EDA chip-design software.
cdns.subcategory: EDA 工具 / IP / 仿真
cdns.business: EDA 工具、IP 与系统仿真，和新思共同主导芯片设计软件。
cdns.businessEn: EDA tools, IP and system simulation that, together with Synopsys, dominate chip-design software.
cdns.description: 楷登(Cadence)与新思(Synopsys)并列 EDA 双雄,是芯片设计软件的另一极。它在模拟/定制电路设计、芯片布局布线、以及多物理场系统仿真(如芯片散热、电磁、结构)上很强,并把 AI 深度用于设计——其 Cerebrus 等工具能用强化学习自动探索更优的芯片实现,大幅缩短设计周期。除芯片外,Cadence 还把仿真能力延伸到系统与生命科学等领域。作为「画芯片离不开」的卖水人,它的护城河极深(客户迁移成本高、与代工厂制程深度绑定),AI 芯片设计浪潮是其长期成长动力。
cdns.descriptionEn: Cadence, alongside Synopsys, is one of the twin giants of EDA and the other pole of chip-design software. It is strong in analog/custom circuit design, chip place-and-route, and multiphysics system simulation (chip thermal, electromagnetic, structural), and applies AI deeply to design — tools like Cerebrus use reinforcement learning to automatically explore better chip implementations, greatly shortening design cycles. Beyond chips, Cadence extends its simulation into systems and even life sciences. As an indispensable "picks-and-shovels" vendor for chip design, its moat is very deep (high switching costs, tight ties to foundry process nodes), and the AI-chip design wave is its long-term growth driver.
whyItMatters: EDA 双雄之一,模拟/定制与系统仿真见长
AI 用于设计(如 Cerebrus 强化学习优化布局)
护城河极深:迁移成本高、与代工深度绑定
AI 芯片设计浪潮的长期受益者

ase.name: 日月光
ase.oneLinerEn: The world's largest outsourced chip assembly and test (OSAT) company.
ase.business: 芯片封装与测试，承接先进封装外包需求。
ase.businessEn: Chip packaging and testing, absorbing the outsourced demand for advanced packaging.
ase.description: 日月光(ASE)是全球最大的封装测试(OSAT)厂。芯片造好后要「封装」——把裸晶保护起来、连出引脚、做成能装到板子上的成品,再测试筛选,这一环 ASE 做到全球第一。AI 时代芯片性能越来越依赖「先进封装」:把 GPU 裸晶、HBM 显存等多颗芯粒用 CoWoS、2.5D/3D 等方式堆叠互连。台积电产能有限,大量先进封装订单外溢给 ASE 等 OSAT 承接,加上传统封测的稳定基本盘,AI 让 ASE 的先进封装业务成为新的增长引擎。
ase.descriptionEn: ASE Technology is the world's largest outsourced assembly and test (OSAT) company. After a chip is fabricated it must be "packaged" — protecting the bare die, routing out the pins, and turning it into a board-ready product, then tested and screened — and ASE leads the world in this step. In the AI era, chip performance increasingly depends on "advanced packaging": stacking and interconnecting multiple chiplets like GPU dies and HBM memory via CoWoS, 2.5D/3D and similar methods. With TSMC's capacity limited, much advanced-packaging demand overflows to OSATs like ASE, and combined with its stable traditional test-and-assembly base, AI has made advanced packaging a new growth engine for ASE.
whyItMatters: 全球最大封装测试(OSAT)厂
AI 芯片性能越来越靠先进封装(多芯粒堆叠)
台积电产能有限,先进封装订单外溢承接
传统封测稳基本盘 + AI 先进封装新引擎

amkr.name: 安靠
amkr.oneLinerEn: The leading U.S. outsourced packaging-and-test company.
amkr.business: 封装与测试服务，是西方供应链本地化的关键一环。
amkr.businessEn: Packaging and testing services — a key link in localizing the Western supply chain.
amkr.description: 安靠(Amkor)是全球第二大、美系最大的封装测试(OSAT)厂,与日月光同台竞争。它为芯片提供封装与测试,并在先进封装(如 2.5D/3D、扇出型封装)上持续投入。在「供应链去风险、制造回流」的大背景下,美国推动把封装这一长期外包到亚洲的环节部分搬回本土,Amkor 与台积电合作在亚利桑那建先进封装厂,承接美国本土晶圆的封装需求,成为西方半导体供应链本地化的关键一环,也因此获政策与大客户的双重加持。
amkr.descriptionEn: Amkor is the world's second-largest and the largest U.S.-based OSAT, competing head-to-head with ASE. It provides packaging and testing for chips and keeps investing in advanced packaging (2.5D/3D, fan-out). Amid "supply-chain de-risking and reshoring," the U.S. is pushing to bring packaging — long outsourced to Asia — partly back home, and Amkor is partnering with TSMC to build an advanced-packaging plant in Arizona to serve U.S.-made wafers, becoming a key link in localizing the Western semiconductor supply chain and gaining support from both policy and major customers.
whyItMatters: 全球第二、美系最大封装测试(OSAT)厂
投入 2.5D/3D、扇出型等先进封装
与台积电在亚利桑那建先进封装厂
西方供应链本地化关键一环,政策加持

rklb.name: 火箭实验室
rklb.oneLiner: 小型可回收火箭 + 卫星系统的太空新贵。
rklb.oneLinerEn: A space upstart in small reusable rockets and satellite systems.
rklb.business: Electron 小型火箭、在研的中型可回收火箭 Neutron，以及卫星与航天系统，2026 订单饱满。
rklb.businessEn: The Electron small rocket, the in-development medium reusable Neutron, plus satellites and space systems, with a full 2026 order book.
rklb.description: Rocket Lab 是仅次于 SpaceX、最受关注的太空公司之一。它以小型火箭 Electron 打开市场——高频次、低成本地把小卫星送上轨道,发射次数长期居美国第二。同时它在研更大的、可回收的中型火箭 Neutron,直接对标 SpaceX 猎鹰 9 号,冲击更大的发射市场。除火箭外,Rocket Lab 还做卫星平台、航天器组件与整星制造(「太空系统」业务),提供从造卫星到发射的端到端服务。作为「小 SpaceX」,它是商业航天/太空经济里增长最快、订单最饱满的上市公司之一。
rklb.descriptionEn: Rocket Lab is one of the most-watched space companies after SpaceX. It broke into the market with the small Electron rocket — launching small satellites to orbit frequently and cheaply, long ranking second in the U.S. by launch count. It is developing the larger, reusable medium-lift Neutron rocket to take on SpaceX's Falcon 9 and reach the bigger launch market. Beyond rockets, Rocket Lab builds satellite platforms, spacecraft components and complete satellites (its "Space Systems" business), offering end-to-end service from building satellites to launching them. As a "mini-SpaceX," it is one of the fastest-growing, most order-backed public companies in commercial space.
whyItMatters: Electron 小火箭高频低成本发射,美国发射次数第二
在研可回收中型火箭 Neutron,对标猎鹰 9 号
卫星平台/航天器/整星制造,端到端太空系统
「小 SpaceX」,商业航天增长最快上市公司之一

asts.name: AST SpaceMobile
asts.oneLiner: 卫星直连普通手机，无需地面基站。
asts.oneLinerEn: Satellites that connect directly to ordinary phones, no cell towers needed.
asts.business: 建设可与普通手机直连的低轨卫星星座，瞄准全球移动覆盖盲区。
asts.businessEn: Building a low-Earth-orbit constellation that connects directly to ordinary phones, targeting the world's mobile coverage gaps.
asts.description: AST SpaceMobile 想做一件颠覆性的事:让你手里那台普通手机,在没有任何地面基站的地方(海上、沙漠、山区),直接连上天上的卫星打电话、上网。它建设的是一批「超大天线」的低轨卫星,相当于把基站搬到太空,直接与标准手机通信,填补全球移动网络的覆盖盲区。它与 AT&T、Verizon、乐天、沃达丰等大量电信运营商合作(运营商入股/签约),让卫星成为地面网络的「补盲」延伸。这是一条技术难度极高、资本极重、但一旦成功市场极大的路线,ASTS 是「卫星直连手机」赛道最受瞩目、进展领先的玩家之一(与 SpaceX Starlink Direct-to-Cell 竞争)。
asts.descriptionEn: AST SpaceMobile aims to do something disruptive: let the ordinary phone in your hand connect directly to satellites overhead — for calls and internet — in places with no cell towers at all (at sea, in deserts, in the mountains). It is building low-Earth-orbit satellites with "giant antennas," essentially moving the cell tower into space to communicate directly with standard phones, filling the world's mobile-coverage gaps. It partners with many telecom operators — AT&T, Verizon, Rakuten, Vodafone (with operators investing/contracting) — making satellites a "gap-filling" extension of terrestrial networks. This is a technically very hard, capital-heavy path with an enormous market if it works, and ASTS is one of the most-watched, most-advanced players in "satellite direct-to-phone" (competing with SpaceX's Starlink Direct-to-Cell).
whyItMatters: 让普通手机在无基站处直连卫星打电话上网
「超大天线」低轨卫星,相当于把基站搬上太空
与 AT&T/Verizon/沃达丰等运营商合作补盲
「卫星直连手机」进展领先玩家,与 Starlink 竞争

spacex.name: SpaceX
spacex.oneLiner: 可回收火箭 + 星链 + 轨道数据中心，太空领域的绝对主角。
spacex.oneLinerEn: Reusable rockets + Starlink + orbital data centers — the dominant force in space.
spacex.tagline: 让人类成为跨行星物种
spacex.hq: 美国·霍桑（星舰基地在得州）
spacex.business: Falcon 9 / Falcon Heavy 可回收火箭、完全可回收的下一代重型火箭 Starship、载人/货运飞船 Dragon，以及全球最大低轨卫星互联网 Starlink。凭借可回收把入轨成本打到极低，几乎垄断商业发射；并探索在太空部署 AI 算力(轨道数据中心)。
spacex.businessEn: The reusable Falcon 9 / Falcon Heavy rockets, the fully reusable next-gen heavy-lift Starship, the crew/cargo Dragon capsules, and Starlink, the world's largest low-Earth-orbit internet. Reusability has driven launch costs to record lows, giving it a near-monopoly on commercial launch; it is also exploring deploying AI compute in space (orbital data centers).
spacex.description: SpaceX 由 Elon Musk 于 2002 年创立，用「火箭可回收复用」彻底改写了航天经济学：Falcon 9 一级火箭反复回收再飞，把每公斤入轨成本降到历史低点，如今承担全球大部分商业与政府发射。旗下 Starlink 是全球最大的低轨卫星星座(数千颗在轨)，为偏远地区、航海航空乃至战场提供高速低延迟上网，是 SpaceX 现金流支柱。下一代 Starship 追求「完全可回收 + 超大运力」，目标把发射成本再压一个数量级，并为登月/火星与在轨基础设施铺路——包括马斯克设想的「太空数据中心」(利用太空连续阳光与天然散热放 AI 算力)。SpaceX 是全球估值最高的未上市公司之一。
spacex.descriptionEn: Founded by Elon Musk in 2002, SpaceX rewrote the economics of spaceflight through rocket reuse: Falcon 9 first stages fly again and again, driving cost-per-kilogram to orbit to historic lows, and today it handles most of the world's commercial and government launches. Its Starlink is the largest low-Earth-orbit constellation (thousands of satellites in orbit), delivering fast, low-latency internet to remote regions, maritime and aviation, and even battlefields — and it is SpaceX's cash-flow engine. The next-generation Starship pursues "full reusability + massive payload," aiming to cut launch costs by another order of magnitude and pave the way for the Moon/Mars and orbital infrastructure — including Musk's vision of "space data centers" that place AI compute in orbit using continuous sunlight and natural cooling. SpaceX is one of the world's most valuable private companies.
whyItMatters: 火箭可回收把入轨成本打到极低，近乎垄断商业发射
Starlink 是全球最大低轨星座，AI 时代的天基连接底座
Starship 超大运力为在轨算力/太空数据中心打开想象
全球估值最高的私营公司之一，太空经济的绝对核心

products.name: Falcon 9 / Falcon Heavy
products.description: 反复回收复用，承担全球大部分发射。

products.name: Starship
products.description: 完全可回收、超大运力的下一代火箭。

products.name: Starlink
products.description: 全球最大低轨星座，高速低延迟上网。

products.name: Dragon
products.description: 为 NASA 等提供天地往返运输。

openai.name: OpenAI
openai.oneLiner: ChatGPT 与 GPT/o 系列、Sora 的缔造者，本轮 AI 浪潮的引爆点。
openai.oneLinerEn: Creator of ChatGPT, the GPT/o series and Sora — the spark that ignited the current AI wave.
openai.tagline: 确保通用人工智能(AGI)造福全人类
openai.taglineEn: Ensuring that artificial general intelligence benefits all of humanity
openai.business: 前沿大模型(GPT 系列、主打推理的 o 系列)、消费级产品 ChatGPT、文生视频 Sora、文生图 DALL·E、语音 Whisper、面向开发者的 API 平台，以及会自主操作电脑/浏览器的 Agent。微软是其最大投资方与独家云伙伴(Azure)。
openai.businessEn: Frontier large models (the GPT series and the reasoning-focused o series), the consumer product ChatGPT, the Sora text-to-video model, the DALL·E image model, Whisper speech recognition, a developer API platform, and agents that autonomously operate a computer/browser. Microsoft is its largest investor and exclusive cloud partner (Azure).
openai.description: OpenAI 成立于 2015 年，最初是非营利研究机构，由 Sam Altman、Greg Brockman、Ilya Sutskever、Elon Musk 等联合发起，使命是确保 AGI 惠及全人类。2019 年设立「利润上限(capped-profit)」子公司以吸纳大额投资，微软累计投资数百亿美元并提供 Azure 算力。2022 年底 ChatGPT 发布，两个月内月活破亿，成为史上增长最快的消费应用，直接引爆全球生成式 AI 浪潮。如今 OpenAI 横跨「前沿模型研究 + 消费产品 + 开发者平台」三条线，是这轮 AI 竞赛的定义者与领跑者之一。
openai.descriptionEn: Founded in 2015, OpenAI began as a non-profit research lab co-founded by Sam Altman, Greg Brockman, Ilya Sutskever, Elon Musk and others, with a mission to ensure AGI benefits all of humanity. In 2019 it created a "capped-profit" subsidiary to raise large-scale capital, and Microsoft has since invested tens of billions of dollars while providing Azure compute. ChatGPT launched in late 2022 and passed 100 million monthly users within two months — the fastest-growing consumer app in history — directly igniting the global generative-AI wave. Today OpenAI spans three fronts — frontier model research, consumer products, and a developer platform — and is one of the defining leaders of this AI race.
whyItMatters: ChatGPT 定义了「对话式 AI」品类，把大模型带给数亿普通用户
GPT / o 系列长期占据前沿能力标杆，推动整个行业节奏
微软数百亿美元投资 + Azure 独家云，绑定最深的巨头联盟
从模型到 Agent(Operator)全栈推进，抢占「AI 智能体」入口

products.name: ChatGPT
products.description: 对话助手，含免费版、Plus、Team 与 Enterprise。

products.name: GPT-5.6（Sol/Terra/Luna）
products.description: 2026.7 发布的旗舰家族：前沿/均衡/高效三档。

products.name: o 系列
products.description: 面向数学/代码/科学的深度推理模型。

products.name: 视频生成（原 Sora）
products.description: Sora 独立产品 2026 停用，能力并入 ChatGPT。

products.name: DALL·E
products.description: 文生图模型。

products.name: API 平台
products.description: 模型、微调、Assistants 与实时语音 API。

anthropic.name: Anthropic
anthropic.oneLiner: Claude 系列大模型的研发公司，主打 AI 安全与编程能力。
anthropic.oneLinerEn: The lab behind the Claude models, focused on AI safety and coding capability.
anthropic.tagline: 构建可靠、可解释、可引导的 AI
anthropic.taglineEn: Building AI that is reliable, interpretable and steerable
anthropic.business: Claude 大模型家族(Opus / Sonnet / Haiku 三档)、Claude.ai 产品、AI 编程工具 Claude Code、企业与开发者 API，以及开放的模型上下文协议(MCP)。强调 AI 安全(Constitutional AI)与可解释性。亚马逊、谷歌为主要投资方与云伙伴。
anthropic.businessEn: The Claude model family (Opus / Sonnet / Haiku tiers), the Claude.ai product, the Claude Code AI coding tool, enterprise and developer APIs, and the open Model Context Protocol (MCP). It emphasizes AI safety (Constitutional AI) and interpretability. Amazon and Google are its main investors and cloud partners.
anthropic.description: Anthropic 由前 OpenAI 研究与安全负责人 Dario Amodei(CEO)与 Daniela Amodei(总裁)等人于 2021 年创立，是一家以「安全优先」为纲领的前沿 AI 公司。其核心方法「宪法式 AI(Constitutional AI)」用一套明确原则来引导模型行为，减少对人工标注的依赖。旗舰模型 Claude 以编程、长上下文、写作与严谨性著称，Opus 为最强档、Sonnet 均衡、Haiku 轻量快速。Anthropic 还推出了广受开发者欢迎的 Claude Code 与开放标准 MCP(把外部工具/数据接入模型)。亚马逊累计投资约百亿美元并以 AWS/Trainium 提供算力，谷歌亦为重要股东。
anthropic.descriptionEn: Anthropic was founded in 2021 by former OpenAI research and safety leaders Dario Amodei (CEO) and Daniela Amodei (President), among others, as a frontier AI company organized around a "safety-first" charter. Its core method, Constitutional AI, uses an explicit set of principles to guide model behavior and reduce reliance on human labeling. Its flagship Claude models are known for coding, long context, writing and rigor — Opus is the most capable tier, Sonnet the balanced one, and Haiku the fast, lightweight option. Anthropic also created the developer-favorite Claude Code and the open MCP standard (connecting external tools and data to models). Amazon has invested roughly ten billion dollars and supplies AWS/Trainium compute, and Google is also a major shareholder.
whyItMatters: Claude 在编程与长上下文任务上口碑领先，是 Cursor 等工具的首选引擎
「宪法式 AI」与可解释性研究引领行业安全范式
MCP 正成为「AI 连接工具与数据」的事实标准之一
亚马逊(约百亿美元)+ 谷歌双巨头投资，算力与渠道兼得

products.name: Claude Fable 5 · Opus 4.8 · Sonnet 5 · Haiku 4.5
products.description: Fable 5 为 Opus 之上最强档；Sonnet 5 为默认均衡档。

products.name: Claude.ai
products.description: 对话助手网页与 App。

products.name: Claude Code
products.description: 命令行/IDE 里的智能体式编程工具。

products.name: MCP
products.description: 模型上下文协议，接入外部工具与数据。

products.name: API / 平台
products.description: 模型 API、工具调用与智能体能力。

xai.name: xAI
xai.oneLiner: 马斯克创立的 AI 公司，产品 Grok，深度绑定 X 平台。
xai.oneLinerEn: Elon Musk's AI company, maker of Grok, tightly integrated with the X platform.
xai.taglineEn: To understand the true nature of the universe
xai.business: Grok 大模型(旗舰 Grok 4.5，Opus 级推理 + 内置文档/表格/PPT 生成)与 Grok 应用，原生接入 X 实时数据；自建 Colossus 超大 GPU 集群(位于孟菲斯，数十万张 GPU)。2025 年 xAI 与 X(原推特)合并。
xai.businessEn: The Grok large models (flagship Grok 4.5, with Opus-class reasoning plus built-in document/spreadsheet/slide generation) and the Grok app, natively wired into X's real-time feed; the self-built Colossus GPU supercluster in Memphis (hundreds of thousands of GPUs). In 2025 xAI merged with X (formerly Twitter).
xai.description: xAI 由 Elon Musk 于 2023 年创立，目标是「理解宇宙」，走一条相对开放、guardrails 更宽松的路线。其大模型 Grok 深度绑定 X 平台的实时信息流，能第一时间对时事作答，这是它相对其他前沿模型的差异化。当前旗舰 Grok 4.5(2026 年 7 月起为公开旗舰)在推理上对标 Opus 级，并能直接生成可下载的 PDF、表格与幻灯片。xAI 自建的 Colossus 超算(孟菲斯)以极快速度堆到数十万张英伟达 GPU，是其算力护城河；2025 年 xAI 与 X 合并，形成「模型 + 社交平台 + 数据」的闭环。
xai.descriptionEn: Founded by Elon Musk in 2023 with the goal of "understanding the universe," xAI takes a relatively open path with looser guardrails. Its Grok models are deeply tied to X's real-time information stream, letting them answer on breaking events instantly — its key differentiator among frontier models. The current flagship Grok 4.5 (the public flagship since July 2026) targets Opus-class reasoning and can directly generate downloadable PDFs, spreadsheets and slide decks. xAI's self-built Colossus supercomputer in Memphis scaled to hundreds of thousands of NVIDIA GPUs at remarkable speed, forming its compute moat; the 2025 merger with X created a closed loop of model + social platform + data.
whyItMatters: Grok 绑定 X 实时数据，时效性是差异化优势
Colossus 超算以惊人速度扩到数十万张 GPU，算力自主
与 X 合并，形成模型-平台-数据闭环，分发不求人
马斯克光环 + 激进节奏，是前沿第一梯队的搅局者

products.name: Grok 4.5
products.description: 旗舰模型，Opus 级推理 + 文档/表格/PPT 生成。

products.name: Grok 应用
products.description: 内置于 X 的对话助手，实时信息问答。

products.name: Colossus
products.description: 孟菲斯自建的数十万卡 GPU 超算。

deepseek.name: 深度求索
deepseek.oneLiner: 中国开源大模型黑马，以极致性价比震动行业。
deepseek.oneLinerEn: China's open-source dark horse, shaking the industry with extreme cost efficiency.
deepseek.tagline: 以开源与极致效率追赶前沿
deepseek.taglineEn: Chasing the frontier through open weights and extreme efficiency
deepseek.business: DeepSeek-V3/R1 等高性能开源模型，训练成本与推理价格大幅低于同行，推动开源平权。
deepseek.businessEn: High-performance open-weight models such as DeepSeek-V3/R1, with training costs and inference prices far below peers — a force for open-source democratization.
deepseek.description: 深度求索(DeepSeek)由梁文锋于 2023 年创立，背靠其量化基金幻方(High-Flyer)提供算力与资金。2025 年初，DeepSeek 以 V3 与主打推理的 R1 一举震动全球——据称训练成本仅数百万美元级、却逼近顶尖闭源模型，且以 MIT 协议完全开源、API 价格极低，一度引发美股 AI 板块剧烈回调，被称为「DeepSeek 时刻」。公司走「极致工程效率 + 开源」路线：用更少的算力、更巧的架构(MoE、MLA 等)把成本压到行业最低，推动开源模型平权。2026 年 4 月，DeepSeek 发布 V4 系列预览(V4-Flash 2840 亿参数、V4-Pro 1.6 万亿参数，均为百万 token 上下文、MIT 开源)；R2 因梁文锋对效果不满而延后。2026 年公司完成首轮外部融资，估值据报道在 500 亿美元以上。
deepseek.descriptionEn: DeepSeek was founded by Liang Wenfeng in 2023, backed by his quant fund High-Flyer for compute and capital. In early 2025 DeepSeek shook the world with V3 and its reasoning-focused R1 — reportedly trained for only single-digit millions of dollars yet approaching top closed models, fully open-sourced under the MIT license, and priced extremely cheaply via API. It triggered a sharp sell-off in U.S. AI stocks, dubbed the "DeepSeek moment." The company follows a path of extreme engineering efficiency plus open weights: using less compute and cleverer architectures (MoE, MLA, etc.) to push costs to the industry's lowest and democratize open models. In April 2026 DeepSeek previewed its V4 series (the 284-billion-parameter V4-Flash and 1.6-trillion-parameter V4-Pro, both with a one-million-token context and MIT-licensed); R2 was delayed as Liang was unsatisfied with its performance. In 2026 the company closed its first outside funding round, reportedly at a valuation above $50 billion.
whyItMatters: 「DeepSeek 时刻」证明低成本也能逼近前沿，重塑行业成本预期
MIT 全开源 + 极低 API 价，推动开源模型平权
MoE/MLA 等工程创新把训练/推理成本压到最低
中国开源模型代表，牵动全球算力与估值叙事

huawei.name: 华为
huawei.oneLiner: 中国 ICT 巨头，昇腾 AI 芯片 + 盘古大模型自成体系。
huawei.oneLinerEn: China's ICT giant, with a self-contained stack of Ascend AI chips and Pangu models.
huawei.tagline: 构建万物互联的智能世界
huawei.taglineEn: Building a fully connected, intelligent world
huawei.subcategory: 昇腾 AI 芯片 / 云 / 通信
huawei.business: 通信设备、终端、云与昇腾(Ascend)AI 芯片、鲲鹏 CPU、盘古大模型，构建国产算力闭环。
huawei.businessEn: Telecom equipment, consumer devices, cloud, Ascend AI chips, Kunpeng CPUs and the Pangu model family — a self-contained domestic compute stack.
huawei.description: 华为由任正非于 1987 年创立，是全球最大的通信设备商，也是横跨手机/终端、华为云与半导体的中国科技巨头(员工持股、未上市)。自 2019 年被列入美国实体清单后，华为全力自建「国产算力闭环」：昇腾(Ascend)AI 芯片是英伟达 H100 在中国的主要替代——910C(双芯粒设计)自 2025 年 5 月起量产，5nm、4-die、支持 FP8 的 910D 预计 2026 年二三季度量产，2026 年 910C 出货量有望翻倍至约 60 万颗。其 CloudMatrix 384 超节点用 384 颗 910C + 192 颗鲲鹏 CPU、以自研 Unified Bus 全互联，单域约 300 PFLOPS、48TB HBM，被视为对标英伟达 GB200 NVL72 的系统级答案。软件侧，盘古(Pangu)大模型(如 Pangu 5.5、Ultra MoE 718B)是少数完全在国产昇腾硬件上训练的前沿级中文大模型。作为政府认可供应商，华为在英伟达被排除的中国政企/国企市场具结构性优势。
huawei.descriptionEn: Founded by Ren Zhengfei in 1987, Huawei is the world's largest telecom-equipment maker and a Chinese tech giant spanning phones/devices, Huawei Cloud and semiconductors (employee-owned and private). Since being placed on the U.S. Entity List in 2019, it has gone all-in on building a self-contained domestic compute stack: its Ascend AI chips are the main alternative to NVIDIA's H100 in China — the dual-chiplet 910C has been in mass production since May 2025, while the 5nm, 4-die, FP8-capable 910D is expected to ramp in Q2–Q3 2026, with 910C output projected to roughly double to about 600,000 units in 2026. Its CloudMatrix 384 supernode links 384 910C chips and 192 Kunpeng CPUs over Huawei's self-developed Unified Bus for all-to-all interconnect — roughly 300 PFLOPS and 48 TB of HBM in a single domain — positioned as a system-level answer to NVIDIA's GB200 NVL72. On software, the Pangu models (such as Pangu 5.5 and Ultra MoE 718B) are among the few frontier-class Chinese models trained entirely on domestic Ascend hardware. As a government-approved supplier, Huawei holds a structural advantage in Chinese state and SOE markets where NVIDIA is excluded.
whyItMatters: 昇腾 910C/910D 是英伟达在中国的主要国产替代
CloudMatrix 384 超节点对标 GB200 NVL72，系统级算力自主
盘古是少数全程用国产硬件训练的前沿级中文大模型
政府认可供应商，在英伟达受限的政企市场卡位

bostondynamics.name: 波士顿动力
bostondynamics.oneLiner: 传奇机器人公司，Atlas 人形机器人的缔造者(现属现代汽车)。
bostondynamics.oneLinerEn: The legendary robotics company behind the Atlas humanoid (now owned by Hyundai).
bostondynamics.tagline: 打造能在真实世界灵活行动的机器人
bostondynamics.taglineEn: Building robots that move with real-world agility
bostondynamics.business: Atlas 人形机器人、Spot 四足、Stretch 物流机器人，运动控制能力业界标杆。
bostondynamics.businessEn: The Atlas humanoid, the Spot quadruped and the Stretch logistics robot — the industry benchmark for motion control.
bostondynamics.description: 波士顿动力 1992 年从 MIT 分拆、由 Marc Raibert 创立，以极致的运动控制与动态平衡闻名，现为现代汽车集团旗下公司。经历谷歌、软银两任东家后，2021 年被现代收购。其全新全电动版 Atlas 人形机器人于 2026 年 1 月 CES 发布量产版本，并在波士顿总部投产——2026 年产能已全部认购，将交付给现代的机器人元工厂应用中心(RMAC)与谷歌 DeepMind。软件上，波士顿动力与谷歌 DeepMind 重新联手，把 Gemini Robotics 基础模型接入 Atlas 的感知与推理，补齐「大脑」。母公司现代计划在美投资 260 亿美元建机器人产业链，目标 2028 年具备年产 3 万台人形机器人的能力。除 Atlas 外，Spot 四足机器人已在电力/油气/制造业巡检广泛商用，Stretch 专攻仓储卸货。
bostondynamics.descriptionEn: Spun out of MIT in 1992 and founded by Marc Raibert, Boston Dynamics is famous for extreme motion control and dynamic balance, and is now part of Hyundai Motor Group. After stints under Google and SoftBank, it was acquired by Hyundai in 2021. Its all-new, fully electric Atlas humanoid debuted in a production version at CES in January 2026 and entered production at its Boston headquarters — all 2026 output is already committed, shipping to Hyundai's Robot Metaplant Application Center (RMAC) and Google DeepMind. On software, Boston Dynamics reunited with Google DeepMind to integrate Gemini Robotics foundation models into Atlas's perception and reasoning, supplying the "brain." Parent Hyundai plans to invest $26 billion in U.S. robotics, targeting the capacity to build 30,000 humanoids a year by 2028. Beyond Atlas, the Spot quadruped is widely deployed for inspection across power, oil-and-gas and manufacturing, while Stretch specializes in warehouse unloading.
whyItMatters: 运动控制与动态平衡的业界标杆，技术积淀最深
全电动 Atlas 2026 量产，产能全部认购给现代与 DeepMind
接入谷歌 Gemini Robotics 基础模型，补齐机器人「大脑」
现代 260 亿美元押注，2028 年目标年产 3 万台人形

figure.name: Figure
figure.oneLiner: 明星人形机器人初创，主打通用具身智能。
figure.oneLinerEn: The marquee humanoid-robot startup, focused on general-purpose embodied AI.
figure.tagline: 为世界打造通用人形机器人
figure.taglineEn: Building a general-purpose humanoid robot for the world
figure.role: 机器人本体 + VLA 模型
figure.business: Figure 人形机器人与自研 Helix VLA 模型，目标工厂与家庭通用作业。
figure.businessEn: The Figure humanoid robots and the in-house Helix vision-language-action model, targeting general work in factories and homes.
figure.description: Figure AI 由连续创业者 Brett Adcock 于 2022 年创立，是当前最受瞩目的人形机器人公司之一。它走「本体 + 大脑全栈自研」路线：自研 Helix 视觉-语言-动作(VLA)模型直接把语言指令映射到全身动作，一套神经网络可同时控制两台机器人。2025 年 2 月，Figure 终止与 OpenAI 的合作、转为完全自研 AI，CEO 称「要在真实世界大规模解决具身智能，必须垂直整合机器人 AI」。产品上，工业款 Figure 02 已在宝马斯帕坦堡工厂日跑 10 小时、累计搬运逾 9 万个零件；2025 年 10 月发布的 Figure 03 转向家庭场景——2 万美元价位、软织物外壳、无线充电、可感知一枚回形针重量的触觉传感。2025 年 9 月完成超 10 亿美元的 C 轮融资，估值达 390 亿美元，投资方包括英伟达、英特尔、高通、Salesforce、T-Mobile、Brookfield 等。
figure.descriptionEn: Figure AI was founded by serial entrepreneur Brett Adcock in 2022 and is one of the most closely watched humanoid-robot companies. It pursues a full-stack, in-house approach to both body and brain: its own Helix vision-language-action (VLA) model maps language instructions directly to whole-body motion, and a single neural network can control two robots at once. In February 2025 Figure ended its partnership with OpenAI and pivoted to fully in-house AI, with the CEO saying that "to solve embodied AI at scale in the real world, you have to vertically integrate robot AI." On products, the industrial Figure 02 has run 10-hour daily shifts at BMW's Spartanburg plant, handling over 90,000 parts; the Figure 03, launched in October 2025, targets the home — a $20,000 price point, soft textile coverings, wireless charging, and tactile sensors able to feel the weight of a paperclip. In September 2025 Figure closed a Series C of over $1 billion at a $39 billion valuation, with investors including NVIDIA, Intel, Qualcomm, Salesforce, T-Mobile and Brookfield.
whyItMatters: 自研 Helix VLA，把语言指令直接映射到全身动作
Figure 02 在宝马工厂真实产线跑通，商用落地领先
Figure 03 转向 2 万美元家用款，冲量产与消费市场
390 亿美元估值、英伟达等豪华投资阵容

agility.name: Agility Robotics
agility.oneLiner: 物流人形机器人 Digit 的开发商，已进仓库商用。
agility.oneLinerEn: Maker of the Digit logistics humanoid, already deployed commercially in warehouses.
agility.tagline: 让机器人在人类的世界里工作
agility.taglineEn: Robots that work in the world built for people
agility.business: Digit 双足人形机器人，主攻仓储搬运，已在亚马逊等场景试用。
agility.businessEn: The Digit bipedal humanoid, focused on warehouse material handling and piloted at Amazon and others.
agility.description: Agility Robotics 2015 年从俄勒冈州立大学分拆成立，是最早把人形机器人推向真实商用的公司之一。其双足机器人 Digit 专为仓储物流设计——搬运料箱、上下料，能在为人类设计的货架与通道间作业。Agility 在俄勒冈建成 RoboFab，号称全球首座人形机器人量产工厂，并与 GXO Logistics 等达成商用部署、在亚马逊等场景试用，是「人形机器人先落地物流」路线的代表。
agility.descriptionEn: Spun out of Oregon State University in 2015, Agility Robotics is one of the first companies to bring humanoids into real commercial use. Its bipedal robot Digit is purpose-built for warehouse logistics — moving totes and handling loads, working amid shelves and aisles designed for people. Agility built RoboFab in Oregon, billed as the world's first humanoid mass-production factory, and has reached commercial deployments with GXO Logistics and pilots at sites like Amazon — a leading example of the "humanoids land in logistics first" approach.
whyItMatters: Digit 是最早进真实仓库商用的人形机器人之一
RoboFab 号称全球首座人形机器人量产工厂
与 GXO、亚马逊等落地，物流先行路线代表
为人类环境设计，无需改造现有仓库

apptronik.name: Apptronik
apptronik.oneLiner: 人形机器人 Apollo 的开发商，与奔驰、GXO 合作。
apptronik.oneLinerEn: Maker of the Apollo humanoid, partnering with Mercedes-Benz and GXO.
apptronik.tagline: 打造服务人类的通用机器人
apptronik.taglineEn: Building general-purpose robots to serve people
apptronik.business: Apollo 通用人形机器人，瞄准制造与物流，获谷歌等投资。
apptronik.businessEn: The Apollo general-purpose humanoid, targeting manufacturing and logistics, with investment from Google and others.
apptronik.description: Apptronik 2016 年从德州大学奥斯汀分校「以人为中心机器人实验室」分拆成立，是美国人形机器人的头部玩家之一。其通用人形机器人 Apollo 主打模块化、可换电、面向制造与物流搬运，强调安全与量产可行性。公司与奔驰(汽车工厂试用)、GXO(物流)等达成合作，并与谷歌 DeepMind 合作把 Gemini Robotics 模型接入 Apollo。2025 年初完成由 B Capital、Capital Factory 领投、谷歌参与的约 3.5 亿美元 A 轮融资。
apptronik.descriptionEn: Founded in 2016 as a spinout of the Human Centered Robotics Lab at UT Austin, Apptronik is a leading U.S. humanoid player. Its general-purpose humanoid Apollo emphasizes modularity, swappable batteries and manufacturing/logistics handling, with a focus on safety and mass-production feasibility. The company has partnered with Mercedes-Benz (automotive-plant pilots) and GXO (logistics), and works with Google DeepMind to bring Gemini Robotics models onto Apollo. In early 2025 it closed a roughly $350 million Series A led by B Capital and Capital Factory with participation from Google.
whyItMatters: Apollo 主打模块化、可换电、面向制造与物流
与奔驰、GXO 落地合作，量产导向
接入谷歌 Gemini Robotics 模型做「大脑」
3.5 亿美元 A 轮，谷歌等加持

unitree.name: 宇树科技
unitree.oneLiner: 中国人形/四足机器人黑马，以高性价比著称。
unitree.oneLinerEn: China's humanoid/quadruped dark horse, famous for aggressive cost-performance.
unitree.tagline: 让机器人走进每个人的生活
unitree.business: G1 人形与四足机器人，价格大幅低于同行，出货量领先。
unitree.businessEn: The G1 humanoid and quadruped robots, priced far below peers, with leading shipment volumes.
unitree.description: 宇树科技由王兴兴于 2016 年创立，是全球出货量领先的机器人公司，以「极致性价比」颠覆行业。它先靠四足机器人(Go/B 系列)打开市场，再推出人形 G1、H1、R1——G1 售价约 1.6 万美元、R1 低至数千美元，把人形机器人的价格拉到同行零头。2025 年央视春晚上宇树机器人集体扭秧歌一夜出圈。公司 2025 年营收约 17.08 亿元、同比暴增 335%，是全球出货最多的人形机器人厂商。2026 年 7 月，宇树以创纪录速度获批科创板 IPO(拟募资约 42 亿元、目标估值约 62 亿美元，市场预期更高)。
unitree.descriptionEn: Unitree was founded in 2016 by Wang Xingxing and is one of the world's top-shipping robot companies, disrupting the industry with extreme cost-performance. It first broke through with quadrupeds (the Go/B series), then launched the G1, H1 and R1 humanoids — the G1 priced around $16,000 and the R1 as low as a few thousand dollars, a fraction of peers' prices. Its robots went viral overnight performing a group dance at China's 2025 CCTV Spring Festival Gala. Unitree's 2025 revenue was about RMB 1.71 billion, up 335% year over year, making it the world's highest-shipping humanoid maker. In July 2026 it won record-fast approval for a STAR Market IPO (planning to raise about RMB 4.2 billion at a target valuation of roughly $6.2 billion, with market expectations running higher).
whyItMatters: 全球出货量领先的人形/四足机器人厂商
极致性价比：G1 约 1.6 万美元、R1 低至数千美元
2025 营收暴增 335%，央视春晚一夜出圈
2026.7 创纪录获批科创板 IPO

onex.name: 1X
onex.oneLiner: 挪威人形机器人公司，主打家用机器人 NEO。
onex.oneLinerEn: A Norwegian humanoid company centered on the NEO home robot.
onex.tagline: 打造能进家庭的安全人形机器人
onex.taglineEn: Safe humanoids built for the home
onex.business: NEO 家用人形机器人，OpenAI 为投资方之一。
onex.businessEn: The NEO home humanoid robot, with OpenAI among its investors.
onex.description: 1X Technologies(原 Halodi Robotics)2014 年创立于挪威，专注「能安全进家庭」的人形机器人。与工业系强调力量与速度不同，1X 主打腱驱动、软外形、低惯量的设计，让机器人在家中与人相处更安全。其家用人形 NEO 面向家务与陪伴，2025–2026 年推进消费级发布。OpenAI 是其重要投资方之一(另有 EQT、Tiger 等)，公司走「先攻家庭场景」的差异化路线。
onex.descriptionEn: 1X Technologies (formerly Halodi Robotics) was founded in Norway in 2014 and focuses on humanoids that can safely enter the home. Unlike industrial designs that emphasize strength and speed, 1X favors tendon-driven, soft-bodied, low-inertia designs so robots are safer around people at home. Its NEO home humanoid targets chores and companionship, with a consumer launch progressing through 2025–2026. OpenAI is among its key investors (alongside EQT, Tiger and others), and the company pursues a differentiated "home-first" strategy.
whyItMatters: 腱驱动 + 软外形，主打「安全进家庭」
NEO 家用人形面向家务与陪伴
OpenAI 投资，差异化「家庭先行」路线
消费级人形量产的探路者

anysphere.name: Anysphere
anysphere.oneLiner: AI 代码编辑器 Cursor 的开发商，史上增长最快的软件之一。
anysphere.oneLinerEn: Maker of the Cursor AI code editor — one of the fastest-growing software products ever.
anysphere.tagline: 用 AI 的方式写代码
anysphere.taglineEn: The AI way to write code
anysphere.business: Cursor —— 深度集成大模型的 AI 代码编辑器(基于 VS Code)，主打整库理解、Tab 智能补全与「Agent 模式」自主改代码/跑命令；自研 Composer 等模型并调用 Claude/GPT。ARR 增长破纪录，是 AI 编程当红炸子鸡。
anysphere.businessEn: Cursor — an AI code editor (built on VS Code) with deep model integration, featuring whole-repo understanding, Tab autocomplete and an "Agent mode" that autonomously edits code and runs commands; it builds its own Composer model while also calling Claude/GPT. Its ARR growth has broken records, making it the hottest name in AI coding.
anysphere.description: Anysphere 由几位 MIT 校友于 2022 年创立，产品 Cursor 把「AI 原生」做进代码编辑器：不只是补全，而是能读懂整个代码库、跨文件理解上下文，并以 Agent 模式自主编辑多个文件、运行命令、修 bug。它以极快的补全(Tab)体验和智能体能力赢得海量开发者，ARR 以史上罕见的速度冲上数亿美元级别，估值飙升。Cursor 大量调用 Claude 等前沿模型，同时自研 Composer 模型，是「AI 写代码」这波浪潮最耀眼的应用。
anysphere.descriptionEn: Anysphere was founded by MIT alumni in 2022, and its product Cursor bakes "AI-native" into the code editor: not just autocomplete, but understanding an entire codebase, reasoning across files, and using Agent mode to autonomously edit multiple files, run commands and fix bugs. Its extremely fast Tab completion and agentic capabilities have won a massive developer following, driving ARR to the hundreds of millions at a rarely seen pace, with valuation soaring. Cursor is one of the biggest consumers of frontier models like Claude while also building its own Composer model — the standout application of the "AI writes code" wave.
whyItMatters: 把 AI 原生做进编辑器，整库理解 + Agent 自主改码
ARR 增长破纪录，AI 编程第一梯队
Claude 等前沿模型最大的应用出口之一
重新定义开发者日常工作流

products.name: Cursor
products.description: 整库理解 + Tab 补全 + Agent 模式。

products.name: Composer
products.description: 自研的编程模型。

codeium.name: Codeium
codeium.oneLiner: AI 编程工具 Windsurf 的开发商。
codeium.oneLinerEn: Maker of the Windsurf AI coding tool.
codeium.business: Windsurf 编辑器与代码补全/智能体，面向个人与企业。
codeium.businessEn: The Windsurf editor plus code completion/agents, for individuals and enterprises.
codeium.description: Codeium 的旗舰产品是 AI 代码编辑器 Windsurf,与 Cursor 是「AI 原生 IDE」的主要竞争者。它把 AI 深度做进编辑器,主打「Cascade」智能体式流程——让 AI 能理解整个代码库、跨文件自动改代码、跑命令,帮开发者更快完成任务,同时提供面向企业的私有部署与合规版本。2025 年 Windsurf 经历了戏剧性的一年:先是谷歌以「反向收购」方式请走了其 CEO 与部分核心团队及技术授权,随后剩下的 Windsurf(编辑器与团队)被 AI 编程公司 Cognition(Devin 的开发商)收购,并入其「智能体 + 编辑器」组合。Windsurf 是 AI 编程赛道里技术领先、但也见证了行业剧烈整合与人才争夺的代表性产品之一。
codeium.descriptionEn: Codeium's flagship product is the AI code editor Windsurf, a main competitor to Cursor among "AI-native IDEs." It builds AI deeply into the editor, centered on its agentic "Cascade" flow — letting AI understand an entire codebase, autonomously edit code across files and run commands to help developers finish tasks faster, while offering enterprise private-deployment and compliance versions. 2025 was a dramatic year for Windsurf: first Google, via a "reverse acquihire," took its CEO and part of the core team plus a technology license, and then the remaining Windsurf (editor and team) was acquired by AI-coding company Cognition (maker of Devin) and folded into its "agent + editor" combination. Windsurf is a technically leading product in AI coding, and also a case study of the sector's intense consolidation and talent wars.
whyItMatters: 旗舰 Windsurf 与 Cursor 争「AI 原生 IDE」
Cascade 智能体式流程,理解整库、跨文件改码
2025 谷歌反向收购请走 CEO/核心团队与技术授权
剩余 Windsurf 被 Cognition 收购,行业剧烈整合缩影

replit.name: Replit
replit.oneLiner: 浏览器云 IDE，Replit Agent 让人人「说话就能建应用」。
replit.oneLinerEn: A browser cloud IDE whose Replit Agent lets anyone "build an app just by talking."
replit.business: 浏览器内的云开发环境(写码/运行/部署一站式)，Replit Agent 让非程序员用自然语言描述需求就能生成、迭代并一键部署完整应用；主打「零环境配置 + 从想法到上线」。ARR 因 Agent 爆发式增长。
replit.businessEn: A browser-based cloud dev environment (code, run and deploy in one place); Replit Agent lets non-programmers describe needs in natural language to generate, iterate on and one-click-deploy full apps — "zero setup, from idea to live." Its ARR has grown explosively on the back of Agent.
replit.description: Replit 成立于 2016 年，最早是「浏览器里就能写代码、开箱即跑」的云 IDE，深受学生与业余开发者喜爱。生成式 AI 兴起后，它推出 Replit Agent——你用一句话描述想做的应用，Agent 就自动搭项目、写代码、装依赖、跑起来并一键部署，把「从想法到上线」压缩到几分钟，让完全不会编程的人也能造软件。这波「vibe coding(说话建应用)」浪潮让 Replit 的 ARR 爆发式增长，成为该赛道头部之一。
replit.descriptionEn: Founded in 2016, Replit began as a cloud IDE where you could "write code in the browser and run it instantly," beloved by students and hobbyist developers. As generative AI took off, it launched Replit Agent — describe the app you want in a sentence and the Agent scaffolds the project, writes the code, installs dependencies, runs it and deploys with one click, compressing "idea to live" into minutes and letting complete non-coders build software. This "vibe coding" wave drove Replit's ARR to explosive growth, making it one of the category leaders.
whyItMatters: 云 IDE + Agent，把「想法到上线」压到几分钟
让非程序员也能造应用，vibe coding 浪潮头部
ARR 因 Agent 爆发式增长

products.name: Replit Agent
products.description: 自然语言生成并部署完整应用。

products.name: Replit 云 IDE
products.description: 浏览器内写码/运行/部署一站式。

stackblitz.name: StackBlitz
stackblitz.oneLiner: Bolt.new —— 浏览器里说话建全栈应用，增长神话。
stackblitz.oneLinerEn: Bolt.new — build full-stack apps by talking, right in the browser; a growth phenomenon.
stackblitz.business: 旗舰产品 Bolt.new 用 AI 在浏览器内(基于 WebContainers 技术，Node 直接跑在浏览器里)生成、编辑并即时预览/部署全栈应用；发布后数月 ARR 从零冲到数千万美元，是 2025 年增长最快的产品之一。
stackblitz.businessEn: Its flagship Bolt.new uses AI to generate, edit and instantly preview/deploy full-stack apps inside the browser (via WebContainers, which runs Node directly in the browser); within months of launch its ARR went from zero to tens of millions, one of 2025's fastest-growing products.
stackblitz.description: StackBlitz 成立于 2017 年，靠 WebContainers 技术出名——让 Node.js 直接跑在浏览器里，无需服务器就能运行完整开发环境。2024 年底它推出 Bolt.new：输入一句话，AI 就在浏览器里生成一个能实时预览、编辑并一键部署的全栈应用。凭借「即时可运行 + 零配置」的独特体验，Bolt.new 上线后数月 ARR 就从零冲到数千万美元，是「说话建应用」赛道最耀眼的增长神话之一。
stackblitz.descriptionEn: Founded in 2017, StackBlitz became known for WebContainers — running Node.js directly in the browser so a full dev environment works with no server. In late 2024 it launched Bolt.new: type a sentence and AI generates a full-stack app in the browser that you can preview live, edit and deploy in one click. With its unique "instantly runnable, zero-config" experience, Bolt.new's ARR went from zero to tens of millions within months of launch — one of the brightest growth stories in the "build apps by talking" category.
whyItMatters: WebContainers 让全栈应用在浏览器里即时跑起来
Bolt.new 数月 ARR 破数千万，增长神话
vibe coding 赛道领跑者之一

products.name: Bolt.new
products.description: 浏览器内说话建全栈应用，即时预览部署。

products.name: WebContainers
products.description: 让 Node 跑在浏览器里的核心技术。

lovable.name: Lovable
lovable.oneLiner: 欧洲爆红的「说话做应用」平台，增长速度创纪录。
lovable.oneLinerEn: Europe's breakout "build apps by talking" platform, with record-setting growth.
lovable.business: 用自然语言对话生成可部署的 Web 应用与网站，面向创业者、产品经理与设计师等「非工程师」，主打漂亮的界面与快速上线。作为欧洲 AI 明星，ARR 增长速度屡创纪录。
lovable.businessEn: Generates deployable web apps and sites through natural-language chat, aimed at "non-engineers" such as founders, product managers and designers, with a focus on beautiful UI and fast launch. As a European AI star, its ARR growth has repeatedly set records.
lovable.description: Lovable 成立于 2023 年(瑞典)，是「vibe coding」浪潮里欧洲跑出来的明星：用户像聊天一样描述想要的产品，Lovable 就生成一个界面美观、可直接部署的 Web 应用或落地页，特别受创业者、产品经理与设计师这类「有想法但不会写代码」的人欢迎。它以惊人的 ARR 增长速度成为欧洲增长最快的软件公司之一，是「人人都能做软件」这一叙事的代表。
lovable.descriptionEn: Founded in Sweden in 2023, Lovable is Europe's breakout star of the "vibe coding" wave: users describe the product they want as if chatting, and Lovable generates a beautifully designed, directly deployable web app or landing page — especially popular with founders, product managers and designers who "have ideas but can't code." Its astonishing ARR growth has made it one of Europe's fastest-growing software companies and a poster child for the "anyone can build software" narrative.
whyItMatters: 让非工程师用聊天做出漂亮可上线的应用
欧洲增长最快的软件之一，ARR 纪录级
vibe coding 浪潮的欧洲代表

products.name: Lovable
products.description: 对话式生成可部署 Web 应用/网站。

mistral.name: Mistral AI
mistral.oneLiner: 欧洲开源大模型旗手，以 MoE 架构著称。
mistral.oneLinerEn: Europe's open-weight model champion, known for its mixture-of-experts architecture.
mistral.tagline: 前沿 AI，掌握在你自己手中
mistral.business: Mistral/Mixtral 开源与商用模型，混合专家(MoE)架构高效。
mistral.businessEn: Open-weight and commercial Mistral/Mixtral models built on efficient mixture-of-experts (MoE) architectures.
mistral.description: Mistral AI 由前 DeepMind 与 Meta 研究者 Arthur Mensch(CEO)、Guillaume Lample、Timothée Lacroix 于 2023 年在巴黎创立，是欧洲最具代表性的前沿 AI 公司，也是「开源权重 + 主权 AI」路线的旗手。它以高效的混合专家(MoE)架构著称：旗舰 Mistral Large 3(2025 年 12 月发布)是主流大厂中最大的开源权重 MoE 模型之一(激活 410 亿、总参数 6750 亿)；2025 年 6 月推出首个推理模型 Magistral(Small 开源、Medium 商用)，并有面向编程的 Devstral、语音的 Voxtral 等。消费端产品 Le Chat(2026 年 5 月底更名 Vibe)提供助手与联网能力。融资方面，2025 年 9 月荷兰光刻巨头 ASML 领投约 13–15 亿欧元，公司估值达约 120 亿欧元(约 140 亿美元)，ASML 持股约 11%；2026 年公司据报道再寻求约 30 亿欧元融资、估值升至约 200 亿欧元。
mistral.descriptionEn: Mistral AI was founded in Paris in 2023 by former DeepMind and Meta researchers Arthur Mensch (CEO), Guillaume Lample and Timothée Lacroix. It is Europe's flagship frontier-AI company and the standard-bearer for the "open weights + sovereign AI" path. It is known for efficient mixture-of-experts (MoE) architectures: its flagship Mistral Large 3 (released December 2025) is one of the largest open-weight MoE models from a major lab (41 billion active, 675 billion total parameters). In June 2025 it launched its first reasoning models, Magistral (Small open-source, Medium commercial), alongside the coding-focused Devstral and audio-focused Voxtral. Its consumer product Le Chat (renamed Vibe in late May 2026) offers an assistant with web access. On funding, in September 2025 Dutch lithography giant ASML led a roughly €1.3–1.5 billion round valuing the company at about €12 billion (~$14 billion), with ASML holding around 11%; in 2026 the company reportedly sought a further ~€3 billion at a valuation approaching €20 billion.
whyItMatters: 欧洲主权 AI 旗手，开源权重路线的代表
MoE 架构高效，Mistral Large 3 是最大开源权重 MoE 之一
ASML 领投、持股约 11%，绑定欧洲半导体巨头
Le Chat/Vibe + Magistral + Devstral 覆盖助手、推理与编程

stabilityai.name: Stability AI
stabilityai.oneLiner: 开源图像生成模型 Stable Diffusion 的推手。
stabilityai.oneLinerEn: The force behind the open-source image model Stable Diffusion.
stabilityai.tagline: 以开放模型激活人类的创造力
stabilityai.taglineEn: Activating humanity's potential through open generative AI
stabilityai.subcategory: 开源图像 / 音频生成
stabilityai.business: Stable Diffusion 系列开源生成模型(图像/视频/音频)。
stabilityai.businessEn: The Stable Diffusion family of open generative models spanning image, video and audio.
stabilityai.description: Stability AI 因开源文生图模型 Stable Diffusion 而闻名——2022 年这款可本地运行、免费开放的模型点燃了整个开源图像生成生态。公司早期由 Emad Mostaque 创立，2024 年经历资金危机后重组：Sean Parker 牵头的投资人注资约 8000 万美元并豁免大额债务，前 Weta Digital CEO Prem Akkaraju 出任 CEO，《阿凡达》导演 James Cameron 加入董事会，管理层转向影视/创意工业。当前旗舰为 Stable Diffusion 3.5，配合 2026 年 5 月发布的 Stable Audio 3.0，构成业界最强的开源生成生态之一。战略上从「烧钱开源」转向企业授权与好莱坞/媒体合作，估值约 28 亿美元。
stabilityai.descriptionEn: Stability AI is best known for the open text-to-image model Stable Diffusion — the free, locally runnable model that ignited the entire open-source image-generation ecosystem in 2022. Founded by Emad Mostaque, the company went through a cash crisis in 2024 and restructured: an investor group led by Sean Parker put in about $80 million and forgave large debts, former Weta Digital CEO Prem Akkaraju became CEO, and Avatar director James Cameron joined the board, pivoting leadership toward film and creative industries. Its current flagship is Stable Diffusion 3.5, which together with Stable Audio 3.0 (released May 2026) forms one of the strongest open generative ecosystems available. Strategically it has shifted from cash-burning open releases toward enterprise licensing and Hollywood/media partnerships, at a valuation of roughly $2.8 billion.
whyItMatters: Stable Diffusion 点燃了开源图像生成生态
SD 3.5 + Stable Audio 3.0，最强开源生成生态之一
Prem Akkaraju + James Cameron + Sean Parker 的影视化领导层
从烧钱开源转向企业授权与好莱坞合作

midjourney.name: Midjourney
midjourney.oneLiner: 以画质著称的 AI 图像生成产品。
midjourney.oneLinerEn: The AI image generator renowned for its image quality.
midjourney.taglineEn: Expanding the imaginative powers of the human species
midjourney.business: 高质量文生图服务，独立小团队、无外部融资仍高营收。
midjourney.businessEn: A high-quality text-to-image service run by a small, independent, VC-free team that is nonetheless highly profitable.
midjourney.description: Midjourney 由 Leap Motion 联合创始人 David Holz 于 2021 年创办，是一家独立研究实验室，以「画面质感」在文生图领域独树一帜、长期被视为审美天花板。它最不寻常之处在于商业模式：不融外部风投、团队仅数十人，却凭订阅实现高盈利，年收入据报道达数亿美元。产品最初完全跑在 Discord 上，后推出网页版，并持续迭代模型(V7 至 V8 系列画质与一致性大幅提升)，同时探索 3D/「世界」生成与硬件。2025 年迪士尼与环球对其提起版权诉讼，成为生成式 AI 版权争议的焦点之一。
midjourney.descriptionEn: Midjourney was founded in 2021 by Leap Motion co-founder David Holz as an independent research lab, and stands out in text-to-image generation for its distinctive aesthetic quality — long regarded as the bar for visual beauty. Its most unusual trait is its business model: it takes no outside venture capital and has only a few dozen employees, yet is highly profitable on subscriptions, with revenue reportedly in the hundreds of millions. The product originally ran entirely on Discord before adding a web app, and it keeps iterating its models (from V7 to the V8 series, with big gains in quality and consistency) while exploring 3D/"world" generation and hardware. In 2025 Disney and Universal sued it for copyright infringement, making it a focal point of the generative-AI copyright debate.
whyItMatters: 文生图审美天花板，画面质感长期领先
无外部融资、数十人团队却年入数亿美元，商业模式独特
从 Discord 走向网页版，并探索 3D/世界生成与硬件
迪士尼/环球版权诉讼，站在生成式 AI 版权争议前沿

physicalint.name: Physical Intelligence
physicalint.oneLiner: 机器人基础模型公司，打造通用「动作大模型」。
physicalint.oneLinerEn: A robotics foundation-model company building a universal "action model."
physicalint.tagline: 把通用智能带入物理世界
physicalint.taglineEn: Bringing general-purpose intelligence to the physical world
physicalint.business: π0 等跨本体通用机器人策略模型，目标让一个模型驱动各种机器人。
physicalint.businessEn: Cross-embodiment general robot policy models such as π0 — aiming for a single model that can drive many different robots.
physicalint.description: Physical Intelligence(简称 PI 或 π)2024 年成立于旧金山，由 Karol Hausman、Sergey Levine、Chelsea Finn、Brian Ichter 等顶尖机器人学习研究者创办，目标是打造一个「通用机器人大脑」——不针对单一机型，而是训练一个跨本体的视觉-语言-动作(VLA)基础模型，让同一个模型驱动机械臂、人形、移动底盘等各种机器人。其 π0 展示了从叠衣服到收拾餐桌的通用操作能力；2025 年 4 月发布的 π0.5 进一步实现「开放世界泛化」，能在从未见过的真实家庭里自主完成家务。融资上，2025 年 11 月由谷歌 CapitalG 领投、以 56 亿美元估值融资 6 亿美元；2026 年据报道正洽谈以超 110 亿美元估值再融约 10 亿美元。早期投资方还包括 Jeff Bezos、Thrive、Lux、OpenAI 等。
physicalint.descriptionEn: Physical Intelligence (PI, or π) was founded in San Francisco in 2024 by leading robot-learning researchers including Karol Hausman, Sergey Levine, Chelsea Finn and Brian Ichter. Its goal is to build a "general robot brain" — not tailored to one machine, but a cross-embodiment vision-language-action (VLA) foundation model so a single model can drive robot arms, humanoids, mobile bases and more. Its π0 model demonstrated general manipulation from folding laundry to clearing a table; π0.5, released in April 2025, achieved "open-world generalization," autonomously doing chores in real homes it had never seen. On funding, in November 2025 it raised $600 million at a $5.6 billion valuation led by Google's CapitalG; in 2026 it was reportedly in talks to raise about $1 billion at a valuation above $11 billion. Early backers also include Jeff Bezos, Thrive, Lux and OpenAI.
whyItMatters: 跨本体 VLA 基础模型，一个模型驱动多种机器人
π0.5 实现开放世界泛化，进陌生家庭做家务
谷歌 CapitalG 领投，估值从 56 亿冲向 110 亿美元
汇聚 Levine/Finn 等机器人学习顶级研究者

covariant.name: Covariant
covariant.oneLiner: 仓储机器人 AI 公司，主攻拣选大模型。
covariant.business: RFM 机器人基础模型，用于仓储分拣等真实操作任务。

ai21.name: AI21 Labs
ai21.oneLiner: 以色列大模型公司，Jamba 融合 SSM 与 Transformer。
ai21.oneLinerEn: An Israeli large-model company whose Jamba blends SSM and Transformer architectures.
ai21.tagline: 让机器成为人类的思考伙伴
ai21.taglineEn: Making machines thought partners for people
ai21.subcategory: 混合架构 / 长上下文
ai21.business: Jurassic/Jamba 模型，Jamba 采用 Mamba(SSM)+Transformer 混合架构处理超长上下文。
ai21.businessEn: The Jurassic and Jamba models — Jamba uses a Mamba (SSM) + Transformer hybrid architecture to handle ultra-long context.
ai21.description: AI21 Labs 由 Amnon Shashua(Mobileye 创始人)、Ori Goshen 与 Yoav Shoham 于 2017 年在特拉维夫创立，是最早一批做大语言模型的公司之一。早期以 Jurassic 系列著称，如今主打 Jamba——业界领先的 Mamba(状态空间模型 SSM)+Transformer 混合架构，兼顾长上下文吞吐与效率，可在同等硬件上处理远超纯 Transformer 的上下文长度。公司战略偏企业级(可私有部署、可控可靠)，并推出面向复杂任务的智能体系统 Maestro，估值约 14 亿美元级别。
ai21.descriptionEn: AI21 Labs was founded in Tel Aviv in 2017 by Amnon Shashua (founder of Mobileye), Ori Goshen and Yoav Shoham, and is one of the earliest large-language-model companies. Known early on for its Jurassic series, it now centers on Jamba — a leading Mamba (state-space model, SSM) + Transformer hybrid architecture that balances long-context throughput and efficiency, handling far longer context on the same hardware than a pure Transformer. Its strategy leans enterprise (privately deployable, controllable and reliable), and it offers the Maestro agent system for complex tasks, at a valuation on the order of $1.4 billion.
whyItMatters: Jamba 是领先的 SSM+Transformer 混合架构，长上下文高效
创始人含 Mobileye 之父 Amnon Shashua，学术工业双强
定位企业级、可私有部署，主打可靠可控
Maestro 智能体系统面向复杂多步任务

insilico.name: 英矽智能
insilico.oneLiner: AI 制药公司，端到端生成式药物发现。
insilico.business: 用生成式 AI 做靶点发现与分子设计，多条管线进入临床。

perplexity.name: Perplexity
perplexity.oneLiner: 对话式「答案引擎」，AI 搜索的代表，正做 AI 浏览器 Comet。
perplexity.oneLinerEn: The conversational "answer engine" — the face of AI search, now building the Comet AI browser.
perplexity.subcategory: 答案引擎 / AI 浏览器
perplexity.business: 用大模型 + 实时检索做「答案引擎」，直接给带引用来源的答案而不是一堆链接；自研 Sonar 检索模型与 API，并推出 AI 浏览器 Comet(基于 Chromium，内置能跨标签页操作、自动订会/发邮件的 AI 助手)、Deep Research 深研、Spaces 知识空间。挑战谷歌搜索。
perplexity.businessEn: An "answer engine" combining large models with real-time retrieval to return cited answers rather than a list of links; it builds its own Sonar retrieval models and API, and offers the Comet AI browser (Chromium-based, with a built-in assistant that works across tabs and can auto-book meetings or send email), Deep Research, and Spaces. It takes direct aim at Google Search.
perplexity.description: Perplexity 成立于 2022 年，把「搜索」重新定义为「问答」——你用自然语言提问，它实时检索网络并给出简洁、带引用出处的答案，可追问、可深挖。除消费端「答案引擎」外，它自研 Sonar 系列检索模型并开放 API 供开发者给自己的应用加 AI 搜索。2026 年 3 月 Perplexity 把 AI 浏览器 Comet 免费开放(iOS 上线 48 小时冲上美区 App Store 第三)，Comet 基于 Chromium 但深度内置 AI，能总结页面、跨标签工作、自动执行任务，直指浏览器这一新入口。年化收入(ARR)已达数亿美元级别，是挑战谷歌搜索最凶的新势力。
perplexity.descriptionEn: Founded in 2022, Perplexity reframes "search" as "question-and-answer": you ask in natural language, and it retrieves the web in real time to return a concise, source-cited answer that you can follow up on and dig deeper into. Beyond the consumer answer engine, it builds its own Sonar retrieval models and opens an API so developers can add AI search to their own apps. In March 2026 Perplexity made its Comet AI browser free (hitting #3 on the U.S. App Store within 48 hours of the iOS launch); Comet is Chromium-based but deeply infused with AI, able to summarize pages, work across tabs and execute tasks — aiming squarely at the browser as a new entry point. Its annualized revenue (ARR) has reached the hundreds of millions, making it the fiercest new challenger to Google Search.
whyItMatters: 把「找链接」变成「给带出处的答案」，重塑搜索体验
Comet 浏览器抢占「AI 原生入口」，直接挑战 Chrome/谷歌
Sonar API 让开发者一行接入 AI 搜索，生态外溢
增长迅猛(ARR 数亿美元)，估值飙升的明星独角兽

products.name: Perplexity 答案引擎
products.description: 带引用来源的对话式搜索。

products.name: Comet 浏览器
products.description: 内置 AI 的 Chromium 浏览器，可跨标签操作。

products.name: Sonar API
products.description: 把实时 AI 搜索接入第三方应用。

products.name: Deep Research
products.description: 自动做多源深度研究报告。

gm.name: 通用汽车
gm.oneLiner: 美国汽车巨头，旗下 Cruise 做自动驾驶。
gm.business: 整车制造与电动化，自动驾驶子公司 Cruise 运营 Robotaxi。

oss_graph.name: 图机器学习开源社区
oss_graph.oneLiner: 图神经网络的主流开源框架。
oss_graph.business: PyTorch Geometric 与 DGL 等开源库，是学术与工业界做图神经网络的基础工具。

mamba.name: Mamba（学术）
mamba.oneLiner: 状态空间模型(SSM)的代表，Transformer 的高效挑战者。
mamba.business: 由卡内基梅隆与普林斯顿研究者提出的 SSM 架构，线性复杂度处理超长序列。

llava.name: LLaVA（学术）
llava.oneLiner: 开源视觉语言模型的代表作。
llava.business: 把视觉编码器接到开源 LLM 上的多模态模型，是开源 VLM 研究的常用基线。

openvla.name: OpenVLA（学术）
openvla.oneLiner: 开源的视觉-语言-动作机器人模型。
openvla.business: 斯坦福等团队开源的 VLA 模型，让机器人从图像+指令直接输出动作。

ualink.name: UALink 联盟
ualink.oneLiner: 对标 NVLink 的开放加速器互联标准联盟。
ualink.business: AMD、博通、谷歌等共同推动的开放 GPU/加速器高速互联标准，挑战英伟达 NVLink。

elevenlabs.name: ElevenLabs
elevenlabs.oneLiner: 最逼真的 AI 语音合成与配音平台。
elevenlabs.oneLinerEn: The most lifelike AI voice-synthesis and dubbing platform.
elevenlabs.tagline: 让内容以任何语言、任何声音开口
elevenlabs.taglineEn: Making content speak in any language and any voice
elevenlabs.business: 文本转语音(TTS)、语音克隆、多语种配音与实时对话式语音(Conversational AI)。以自然度与情感表现力著称，支持数十种语言的口音保留；产品覆盖有声书、游戏、影视配音、语音智能体接口，是众多语音 AI 应用的底层引擎。
elevenlabs.businessEn: Text-to-speech (TTS), voice cloning, multilingual dubbing and real-time Conversational AI. Renowned for naturalness and emotional expressiveness with accent preservation across dozens of languages, its products span audiobooks, games, film dubbing and voice-agent APIs — the underlying engine for many voice-AI applications.
elevenlabs.description: ElevenLabs 由两位波兰创始人于 2022 年创立，凭借业界领先的语音自然度迅速走红。它能把文字转成几可乱真的人声，支持语音克隆(用几秒样本复刻音色)与跨语种配音(保留原说话人的音色与情感)，并推出面向开发者的实时对话式语音栈，让 AI 智能体能自然地打电话、做客服。其 Eleven v3 模型(2026 年 2 月 GA)仅需几秒音频就能生成可用音色。产品被有声书、游戏工作室、影视与短视频创作者广泛采用，年化收入(ARR)到 2026 年 4 月已约 5 亿美元。2026 年 2 月红杉领投的 D 轮把估值推上 110 亿美元，同年 7 月更传出以约 220 亿美元估值的老股转让。语音克隆也带来深伪(deepfake)与滥用的治理挑战。
elevenlabs.descriptionEn: ElevenLabs was founded in 2022 by two Polish founders and rose quickly on industry-leading voice naturalness. It turns text into near-indistinguishable human speech, supports voice cloning (replicating a voice from a few seconds of sample) and cross-lingual dubbing (preserving the original speaker's timbre and emotion), and offers a real-time conversational-voice stack so AI agents can naturally make calls and handle support. Its Eleven v3 model (GA in February 2026) can generate a usable voice from just a few seconds of audio. Its products are widely used by audiobook, game, film and short-video creators, and its annualized revenue reached roughly $500 million by April 2026. A Sequoia-led Series D in February 2026 pushed its valuation to $11 billion, and by July 2026 it was reportedly in talks for a secondary share sale at about a $22 billion valuation. Voice cloning also raises deepfake and abuse-governance challenges.
whyItMatters: 语音自然度业界标杆，是众多语音应用的底层引擎
语音克隆 + 跨语种配音，重塑配音与本地化产业
实时对话式语音栈支撑起一整批语音智能体创业
语音深伪治理的关键玩家，影响行业规范

products.name: 文本转语音 (TTS)
products.description: 高自然度多语种语音生成。

products.name: 语音克隆
products.description: 少量样本复刻音色。

products.name: 配音 / Dubbing
products.description: 跨语种配音，保留音色情感。

products.name: Conversational AI
products.description: 实时对话式语音接口。

runwayml.name: Runway
runwayml.oneLiner: AI 视频生成先驱，Gen 系列 + 影视级创作工具。
runwayml.oneLinerEn: A pioneer of AI video generation — the Gen series plus film-grade creative tools.
runwayml.tagline: 用 AI 讲故事的新工具
runwayml.taglineEn: New tools for storytelling with AI
runwayml.business: 旗舰视频模型 Gen-4.5(文/图生视频)配套一整套创作环境——关键帧、运动笔刷、视频到视频、镜头控制等，面向影视、广告与专业创作者。是最早把生成式视频做成可用产品的公司之一，Stable Diffusion 早期亦有其贡献。
runwayml.businessEn: Its flagship Gen-4.5 video model (text/image-to-video) comes with a full creative environment — keyframes, motion brush, video-to-video, camera controls — aimed at film, advertising and professional creators. Runway was one of the first to turn generative video into a usable product, and also contributed to early Stable Diffusion research.
runwayml.description: Runway 成立于 2018 年，是生成式视频的先行者，早年就把 AI 引入影视后期，还参与了 Stable Diffusion 的早期研究。其 Gen 系列模型不断迭代到 Gen-4.5，能从文字或图片生成有连贯运镜与一致角色的视频片段；更重要的是，Runway 把模型包进一套「创作工作台」——关键帧、运动笔刷、视频到视频转换、相机控制，让导演和剪辑师能真正把 AI 用进流程，而不只是出一段 demo。它在好莱坞与广告圈渗透很深，是专业向 AI 视频的代表。
runwayml.descriptionEn: Founded in 2018, Runway is a pioneer of generative video that brought AI into film post-production early on and contributed to the early research behind Stable Diffusion. Its Gen-series models have iterated to Gen-4.5, generating clips with coherent camera movement and consistent characters from text or images. More importantly, Runway wraps the model in a full "creative workbench" — keyframes, motion brush, video-to-video conversion, camera control — so directors and editors can genuinely fold AI into their workflow rather than just produce a demo. It is deeply embedded in Hollywood and advertising, and is the standard-bearer for professional-grade AI video.
whyItMatters: 生成式视频的先驱，把 AI 真正带进影视/广告工作流
不止模型，更是完整创作工作台（关键帧/运镜/视频到视频）
在专业创作者中渗透深，商业化领先
Sora 停用后，专业向 AI 视频的领跑者之一

products.name: Gen-4.5
products.description: 文/图生视频，连贯运镜与角色一致性。

products.name: 创作工作台
products.description: 关键帧、运动笔刷、视频到视频、镜头控制。

pika.name: Pika
pika.oneLiner: 主打易用与创意特效的 AI 视频生成，年轻用户社区活跃。
pika.oneLinerEn: AI video generation built on ease of use and playful effects, with an active young community.
pika.business: 文/图生视频与一系列好玩的创意特效(Pikaffects、Pikadditions 等)，主打「上手快、够好玩」，在社媒与年轻创作者中传播极快；由斯坦福退学生创立，融资顺利。
pika.businessEn: Text/image-to-video plus a set of fun creative effects (Pikaffects, Pikadditions, etc.), built to be "easy and fun," spreading fast on social media and among young creators; founded by Stanford dropouts with strong funding.
pika.description: Pika 由两位斯坦福博士生 2023 年退学创立，切入 AI 视频生成，走的是「消费化、社区化」路线：不像 Runway 那么专业向，Pika 把重点放在易用性与好玩的特效上——一键让照片里的物体膨胀、压扁、融化，或把自己 P 进场景，这类「梗特效」在 TikTok/X 上疯传，带来病毒式增长。它以小团队、快迭代著称，是 AI 视频里最贴近大众消费者的一家。
pika.descriptionEn: Pika was founded in 2023 by two Stanford PhD students who dropped out to build AI video generation, taking a "consumer and community" path: unlike the more professional Runway, Pika focuses on ease of use and playful effects — one-tap effects that inflate, squish or melt objects in a photo, or drop yourself into a scene. These "meme effects" went viral on TikTok/X, driving explosive growth. Known for a small team and fast iteration, Pika is the most consumer-facing of the AI video companies.
whyItMatters: 把 AI 视频做成大众消费品，社媒病毒传播力强
创意特效降低门槛，人人可玩，用户增长快
小团队快迭代，是消费向 AI 视频的代表

products.name: Pika
products.description: 文/图生视频 + 创意特效。

luma.name: Luma AI
luma.oneLiner: Dream Machine 视频生成 + 3D 重建，横跨视频与三维。
luma.oneLinerEn: Dream Machine video generation + 3D reconstruction, spanning video and 3D.
luma.business: 旗舰 Dream Machine 文/图生视频，兼具高保真与可控运镜；同时深耕 3D——用 NeRF/高斯泼溅从手机拍摄重建三维场景，是少数同时做「视频生成 + 三维捕捉」的公司。
luma.businessEn: The flagship Dream Machine does text/image-to-video with high fidelity and controllable camera moves; it also works deeply in 3D — reconstructing scenes from phone footage via NeRF/Gaussian splatting — one of the few companies doing both video generation and 3D capture.
luma.description: Luma AI 成立于 2021 年，早期以「用手机拍照就能重建 3D 物体/场景」的 NeRF 技术出圈，是神经渲染(neural rendering)的代表。随着生成式视频兴起，它推出 Dream Machine，从文字或图片生成流畅、可控运镜的视频，画质与物理真实感受好评。横跨「视频生成」与「3D 重建」让 Luma 在通往「世界模型/空间智能」的路上有独特身位——它既能生成动态影像，也理解三维结构。
luma.descriptionEn: Founded in 2021, Luma AI first broke out with NeRF technology that could reconstruct 3D objects/scenes from phone photos, a standard-bearer for neural rendering. As generative video rose, it launched Dream Machine, generating smooth video with controllable camera movement from text or images, praised for image quality and physical realism. Spanning both video generation and 3D reconstruction gives Luma a unique position on the road to "world models / spatial intelligence" — it can both generate moving imagery and understand 3D structure.
whyItMatters: Dream Machine 视频质量与运镜控制受好评
同时做 3D 重建(NeRF/高斯泼溅)，通往空间智能
视频 + 三维双能力，身位独特

products.name: Dream Machine
products.description: 高保真、可控运镜的文/图生视频。

products.name: 3D 重建
products.description: 手机拍摄重建三维场景(NeRF/高斯泼溅)。

suno.name: Suno
suno.oneLiner: 现象级 AI 音乐生成，一句话生成整首带人声的歌。
suno.oneLinerEn: The breakout AI music generator — a full song with vocals from a single prompt.
suno.business: 从一句提示词生成带人声、编曲完整的歌曲。最新 v5.5(2026 年 3 月)升级表现力，新增「Voices(用你自己的歌声)、Custom Models(按你的作品微调)、My Taste」，输出达 48kHz/320kbps 广播级音质。重塑音乐创作门槛，同时面临与唱片公司的版权争议与诉讼。
suno.businessEn: Generates complete songs with vocals and arrangement from a single prompt. Its latest v5.5 (March 2026) upgrades expressiveness and adds Voices (use your own singing), Custom Models (fine-tune on your own work) and My Taste, with broadcast-grade 48kHz/320kbps output. It has reset the barrier to making music, while facing copyright disputes and lawsuits from record labels.
suno.description: Suno 成立于 2023 年，是 AI 音乐生成的现象级产品：输入一句话或一段歌词，它就能生成有主唱、和声与编曲的完整歌曲，几十秒出成品，把「作曲/编曲/演唱」的门槛降到零。2026 年 3 月发布的 v5.5 是其迄今最强、最富表现力的模型，可用创作者自己的嗓音生成、按个人作品微调专属模型，音质提升到 48kHz 的专业标准。2026 年 6 月，Suno 完成 4 亿美元 D 轮融资、估值达 54 亿美元(半年内翻倍)。同时它与环球、索尼等唱片公司就 6.1 万首录音的版权陷入拉锯，「用受版权保护的录音训练模型是否属合理使用」的关键判决预计 2026 年 7 月开庭，或将成为生成式 AI 版权的标志性判例(华纳已率先和解)。
suno.descriptionEn: Founded in 2023, Suno is the breakout AI music product: type a sentence or some lyrics and it generates a complete song with lead vocals, harmonies and arrangement in seconds, dropping the barrier to composing, arranging and singing to zero. Its v5.5 (March 2026) is its most capable, expressive model yet, able to generate with a creator's own voice, fine-tune a personal model on their catalog, and lift audio quality to a professional 48kHz standard. In June 2026 Suno raised a $400 million Series D at a $5.4 billion valuation (doubling in six months). At the same time it is locked in a copyright fight with labels such as Universal and Sony over 61,000 recordings; a pivotal ruling on whether training on copyrighted recordings is fair use is expected to be heard in July 2026 and could set precedent for generative-AI copyright (Warner has already settled).
whyItMatters: 把「作曲+演唱+编曲」门槛降到零，人人可出歌
v5.5 达广播级音质，从玩具走向可用创作工具
生成式 AI 版权争议的风暴中心，判例影响全行业
音乐生成赛道的领跑者，用户与热度双高

products.name: Suno v5.5
products.description: 一句话生成带人声完整歌曲，48kHz 音质。

products.name: Voices / Custom Models
products.description: 用自己的嗓音与作品微调专属模型。

udio.name: Udio
udio.oneLiner: 高音质 AI 音乐生成，Suno 的主要对手。
udio.oneLinerEn: High-fidelity AI music generation — Suno's main rival.
udio.business: 文本生成带人声的完整歌曲，主打音质与可控性(段落编辑、续写、重混)。团队多来自 DeepMind，获 a16z 等投资，与 Suno 并列 AI 音乐两强，同样面临唱片业版权诉讼。
udio.businessEn: Generates complete songs with vocals from text, emphasizing audio quality and control (section editing, extension, remixing). Its team largely comes from DeepMind, backed by a16z and others; alongside Suno it is one of the top two in AI music, and likewise faces record-industry copyright lawsuits.
udio.description: Udio 由多位前 DeepMind 研究者于 2023 年创立，是 AI 音乐生成的另一强手，与 Suno 双雄并立。它以音质细腻、对生成过程的可控性(如分段编辑、续写、重混、指定风格)见长，受专业与半专业创作者青睐。和 Suno 一样，Udio 也处在生成式音乐版权争议的中心——主流唱片公司就训练数据提起诉讼，这场官司的走向将影响整个 AI 音乐行业。
udio.descriptionEn: Udio was founded in 2023 by several former DeepMind researchers and is the other heavyweight in AI music generation, standing alongside Suno. It is known for refined audio quality and control over the generation process (section editing, extension, remixing, style specification), favored by professional and semi-professional creators. Like Suno, Udio sits at the center of the generative-music copyright dispute — major labels have sued over training data, and the outcome will shape the entire AI music industry.
whyItMatters: 音质与可控性突出，AI 音乐两强之一
团队出自 DeepMind，技术底子强
与 Suno 同为版权诉讼焦点，判例影响全行业

products.name: Udio
products.description: 高音质、可分段编辑的歌曲生成。

heygen.name: HeyGen
heygen.oneLiner: AI 数字人视频与口播生成，营销/短视频创作者最爱。
heygen.oneLinerEn: AI avatar and talking-head video generation, a favorite of marketing and short-video creators.
heygen.business: 用 AI 头像(可克隆你本人)+ 语音克隆，几分钟批量产出多语种口播视频；主打营销、销售外联、社媒与培训，还能一键把已有视频翻译成几十种语言并对口型。增长迅猛、变现能力强。
heygen.businessEn: Uses AI avatars (which can clone you) plus voice cloning to mass-produce multilingual talking-head videos in minutes; aimed at marketing, sales outreach, social media and training, it can also one-click-translate existing videos into dozens of languages with lip-sync. Fast-growing and strongly monetized.
heygen.description: HeyGen 成立于 2020 年，把「拍口播视频」变成「打字生成视频」：选一个 AI 头像(或用你自己的形象克隆一个)，输入文案，就能生成自然、对口型的口播视频，还能一键把视频翻成几十种语言并保持音色与口型同步。它在营销、销售、跨境电商与社媒创作者中极受欢迎，ARR 增长很快，是「AI 数字人视频」赛道商业化最好的公司之一。
heygen.descriptionEn: Founded in 2020, HeyGen turns "shooting a talking-head video" into "typing to generate one": pick an AI avatar (or clone your own likeness), enter a script, and it produces a natural, lip-synced presenter video — and can one-click-translate a video into dozens of languages while keeping voice and lip movement in sync. It is hugely popular with marketing, sales, cross-border e-commerce and social-media creators, with fast ARR growth, and is one of the best-monetized companies in the "AI avatar video" category.
whyItMatters: 把口播视频变成「打字即生成」，效率革命
一键多语种翻译 + 对口型，跨境营销刚需
商业化极强，ARR 增长迅猛

products.name: HeyGen 数字人视频
products.description: AI 头像 + 语音克隆生成口播视频。

products.name: 视频翻译
products.description: 一键多语种翻译并对口型。

synthesia.name: Synthesia
synthesia.oneLiner: 企业级 AI 数字人视频平台，覆盖大量世界 500 强。
synthesia.oneLinerEn: An enterprise AI avatar-video platform used across much of the Fortune 500.
synthesia.tagline: 无需摄像机的视频制作
synthesia.business: 面向企业的 AI 虚拟主播视频平台：用 AI 头像 + 多语种配音，把文档/PPT 一键变成培训、沟通、产品说明视频，强调合规、品牌一致与规模化。客户覆盖大量《财富》500 强。
synthesia.businessEn: An enterprise AI presenter-video platform: using AI avatars plus multilingual voiceover to turn documents/slides into training, communication and product videos, emphasizing compliance, brand consistency and scale. Its customers include much of the Fortune 500.
synthesia.description: Synthesia 成立于 2017 年(伦敦)，是企业级 AI 数字人视频的标杆。相比消费向的 HeyGen，它更聚焦大企业的「规模化视频生产」——培训课程、内部沟通、产品与合规视频，支持上百种语言的 AI 主播，并强调品牌模板、审核与合规。它服务大量《财富》500 强，是「用 AI 替代传统企业视频拍摄」的代表，估值进入独角兽行列。
synthesia.descriptionEn: Founded in London in 2017, Synthesia is the benchmark for enterprise AI avatar video. Compared with the consumer-facing HeyGen, it focuses on large enterprises' "video production at scale" — training courses, internal communications, product and compliance videos — with AI presenters in over a hundred languages, and an emphasis on brand templates, review and compliance. It serves much of the Fortune 500 and is the standard-bearer for "replacing traditional corporate video shoots with AI," now a unicorn by valuation.
whyItMatters: 企业级 AI 数字人标杆，服务大量 500 强
把企业培训/沟通视频规模化、多语种化
强合规与品牌控制，契合大客户需求

products.name: Synthesia 平台
products.description: 企业级 AI 主播视频，百种语言。

deepl.name: DeepL
deepl.oneLiner: 以质量著称的 AI 翻译公司，欧洲 AI 名片。
deepl.oneLinerEn: The quality-renowned AI translation company, a calling card for European AI.
deepl.business: 高质量神经机器翻译，覆盖数十种语言，译文自然度与专业性口碑领先谷歌翻译；并推出 AI 写作助手 DeepL Write 与企业翻译 API。服务大量企业客户，是欧洲最知名的 AI 公司之一。
deepl.businessEn: High-quality neural machine translation across dozens of languages, with a reputation for naturalness and professionalism that outshines Google Translate; it also offers the DeepL Write AI writing assistant and an enterprise translation API. It serves many corporate customers and is one of Europe's best-known AI companies.
deepl.description: DeepL 成立于 2017 年(德国科隆)，脱胎于在线词典 Linguee，凭借「译文更自然、更懂语境」的口碑迅速赢得专业用户，被广泛认为在多个语向上质量优于谷歌翻译。除翻译外，它推出 AI 写作助手 DeepL Write(润色、改写)与面向企业的翻译 API，服务大量跨国公司的合规与本地化需求。作为欧洲少数进入全球第一梯队的 AI 公司，DeepL 是「主权 AI/欧洲 AI」叙事里的标志性名字。
deepl.descriptionEn: Founded in Cologne, Germany in 2017 and grown out of the online dictionary Linguee, DeepL quickly won over professional users with a reputation for "more natural, context-aware translations," widely considered better than Google Translate on many language pairs. Beyond translation, it offers the DeepL Write AI writing assistant (polishing, rewriting) and an enterprise translation API, serving many multinationals' compliance and localization needs. As one of the few European AI companies in the global top tier, DeepL is an emblematic name in the "sovereign AI / European AI" narrative.
whyItMatters: 翻译质量口碑领先，专业用户与企业刚需
欧洲最知名 AI 公司之一，主权 AI 代表
从翻译扩展到写作与企业 API，场景变宽

products.name: DeepL 翻译
products.description: 高质量神经机器翻译，数十种语言。

products.name: DeepL Write
products.description: 润色与改写助手。

ideogram.name: Ideogram
ideogram.oneLiner: 最擅长「在图里准确写字」的 AI 图像生成。
ideogram.oneLinerEn: The AI image generator best at rendering accurate text inside images.
ideogram.business: 文生图工具，最大差异化是**能在图中准确生成文字与排版**(海报、Logo、标语)，解决了多数模型「画不好字」的痛点；团队多来自谷歌 Imagen。还提供 Canvas 画布与风格控制。
ideogram.businessEn: A text-to-image tool whose biggest differentiator is **rendering accurate text and typography inside images** (posters, logos, slogans), solving the pain point where most models "can't spell"; its team largely comes from Google Imagen. It also offers a Canvas board and style controls.
ideogram.description: Ideogram 由多位前谷歌 Imagen 研究者于 2022 年创立，专攻「文字渲染」这一多数文生图模型的老大难——它能在生成的图片里准确、美观地写出文字，因此在做海报、Logo、标语、封面这类「图 + 字」的场景上体验远超同行。配合 Canvas 无限画布与风格/构图控制，Ideogram 成为设计师与营销人常用的图像工具之一。
ideogram.descriptionEn: Ideogram was founded in 2022 by several former Google Imagen researchers to tackle "text rendering," the long-standing weakness of most text-to-image models — it can write text accurately and attractively inside generated images, so it far outperforms peers for "image + text" use cases like posters, logos, slogans and covers. Combined with an infinite Canvas and style/composition controls, Ideogram has become a go-to image tool for designers and marketers.
whyItMatters: 解决「AI 画不好字」痛点，图中文字准确美观
海报/Logo/标语场景体验领先，设计营销刚需
团队出自谷歌 Imagen，技术底子强

products.name: Ideogram
products.description: 擅长图中文字与排版的文生图。

blackforest.name: Black Forest Labs
blackforest.oneLiner: 开源图像模型 FLUX 的开发商，原 Stable Diffusion 核心团队。
blackforest.business: FLUX 系列高质量开源/商用图像生成模型，被 X(Grok) 等集成。

groq.name: Groq
groq.oneLiner: LPU 推理芯片，主打超低延迟大模型推理。
groq.oneLinerEn: LPU inference chips built for ultra-low-latency large-model inference.
groq.tagline: 为推理而生的极速芯片
groq.business: 自研 LPU(语言处理单元)与 GroqCloud，以极快的 token 生成速度切入推理市场。
groq.businessEn: Its own LPU (Language Processing Unit) and GroqCloud, entering the inference market with extremely fast token generation.
groq.description: Groq 由前谷歌 TPU 核心设计者 Jonathan Ross 于 2016 年创立,专攻推理:其自研 LPU(语言处理单元)采用确定性、单一大内存的架构,把大模型的 token 生成速度做到极快、延迟极低,常在演示里以「每秒数百 token」惊艳观众。它通过 GroqCloud 对外提供推理服务,并拿下沙特 15 亿美元承诺(在达曼建 GroqCloud 数据中心)。2024 年 9 月约 6.9 亿美元融资、估值约 69 亿美元;2025 年 12 月英伟达同意以约 200 亿美元收购其资产(非独家授权),是推理专用芯片里最受关注的挑战者之一。
groq.descriptionEn: Groq was founded in 2016 by Jonathan Ross, a core designer of Google's TPU, and focuses on inference: its in-house LPU (Language Processing Unit) uses a deterministic, single-large-memory architecture to generate tokens extremely fast at very low latency, often wowing audiences with "hundreds of tokens per second" in demos. It offers inference via GroqCloud and secured a $1.5 billion commitment from Saudi Arabia (a GroqCloud data center in Dammam). A ~$750 million round in late 2024 valued it at about $6.9 billion; in December 2025 NVIDIA agreed to buy its assets for roughly $20 billion (a non-exclusive licensing deal) — one of the most-watched challengers in inference-specialized chips.
whyItMatters: LPU 确定性架构,token 生成速度与低延迟惊艳
创始人 Jonathan Ross 是谷歌 TPU 核心设计者
沙特 15 亿美元承诺,GroqCloud 出海中东
2025 英伟达约 200 亿美元收购其资产(非独家)

cerebras.name: Cerebras
cerebras.oneLiner: 晶圆级引擎(WSE)——世界最大的 AI 芯片，2026 年上市。
cerebras.oneLinerEn: The Wafer-Scale Engine (WSE) — the world's largest AI chip; went public in 2026.
cerebras.tagline: 为 AI 打造晶圆级算力
cerebras.business: 把整块晶圆做成一颗巨型芯片(WSE-3)，主打超大模型训练与高速推理。
cerebras.businessEn: Turns an entire wafer into one giant chip (WSE-3), aimed at very large model training and high-speed inference.
cerebras.description: Cerebras 成立于 2015 年,以「晶圆级引擎(Wafer-Scale Engine,WSE)」独树一帜——别人把一片晶圆切成很多小芯片,Cerebras 直接把整片晶圆做成一颗巨型芯片(WSE-3 有数万亿晶体管、几十万个核心),从而避开芯片间通信瓶颈,在超大模型训练与高速推理上给出极高性能。它近年主打推理速度,并深度绑定阿联酋 G42 等大客户(客户集中度较高),还有 OpenAI 相关合作传闻。2026 年 5 月,Cerebras 以每股 185 美元 IPO、募资约 55 亿美元、估值约 400 亿美元(首日大涨、市值一度冲到约 700 亿),成为 2026 年最大的科技 IPO 之一。
cerebras.descriptionEn: Founded in 2015, Cerebras stands apart with its Wafer-Scale Engine (WSE) — where others cut a wafer into many small chips, Cerebras makes the entire wafer into one giant chip (the WSE-3 has trillions of transistors and hundreds of thousands of cores), avoiding chip-to-chip communication bottlenecks to deliver very high performance on large-model training and high-speed inference. It has emphasized inference speed and is deeply tied to large customers like the UAE's G42 (relatively high concentration), with reported OpenAI-related collaboration. In May 2026 Cerebras IPO'd at $185 per share, raising about $5.55 billion at roughly a $40 billion valuation (surging on debut, briefly reaching about a $70 billion market cap) — one of 2026's largest tech IPOs.
whyItMatters: 晶圆级引擎,整片晶圆一颗芯片,避开互联瓶颈
主打超大模型训练与极速推理
2026 最大科技 IPO 之一,估值约 400 亿美元
深度绑定 G42 等大客户(集中度较高)

sambanova.name: SambaNova
sambanova.oneLiner: 数据流架构 AI 芯片与整机系统。
sambanova.oneLinerEn: Dataflow-architecture AI chips and full-system appliances.
sambanova.tagline: 为企业提供开箱即用的 AI 平台
sambanova.taglineEn: Turnkey AI platforms for the enterprise
sambanova.business: 可重构数据流单元(RDU)与 AI 一体机，面向企业私有部署大模型。
sambanova.businessEn: Reconfigurable Dataflow Units (RDUs) and AI appliances for enterprises to run large models privately.
sambanova.description: SambaNova 成立于 2017 年(斯坦福背景,CEO Rodrigo Liang),主打「数据流」架构:其可重构数据流单元(RDU)不像 GPU 那样以固定核心跑指令,而是按模型的数据流动态配置硬件,擅长高效跑大模型推理。它把芯片、系统与软件打包成 AI 一体机,面向银行、政府等要私有部署、要数据可控的企业客户(JPMorgan 是其推理合作方之一)。2026 年 7 月完成 F 轮首关 10 亿美元、投后估值约 110 亿美元,由 General Atlantic 领投,英特尔亦为投资方,是英伟达企业级推理挑战者之一。
sambanova.descriptionEn: SambaNova was founded in 2017 (Stanford roots, CEO Rodrigo Liang) around a "dataflow" architecture: its Reconfigurable Dataflow Unit (RDU) doesn't run instructions on fixed cores like a GPU but reconfigures hardware to the model's data flow, excelling at efficient large-model inference. It packages chips, systems and software into AI appliances for enterprise customers — banks, governments and others that need private deployment and data control (JPMorgan is an inference partner). In July 2026 it completed a first close of a $1 billion Series F at about an $11 billion post-money valuation, led by General Atlantic and with Intel among its investors — a challenger to NVIDIA in enterprise inference.
whyItMatters: 数据流(RDU)架构,按数据流配置硬件跑推理
芯片+系统+软件一体机,面向私有部署企业
JPMorgan 等为推理合作方,英特尔投资
2026 F 轮估值约 110 亿美元

graphcore.name: Graphcore
graphcore.oneLiner: IPU 智能处理器，已被软银收购。
graphcore.oneLinerEn: The IPU intelligence processor maker, acquired by SoftBank.
graphcore.tagline: 为机器智能重新设计处理器
graphcore.taglineEn: A processor redesigned for machine intelligence
graphcore.business: IPU(智能处理单元)架构 AI 芯片，2024 年被软银收购。
graphcore.businessEn: AI chips built on the IPU (Intelligence Processing Unit) architecture; acquired by SoftBank in 2024.
graphcore.description: Graphcore 成立于 2016 年(英国布里斯托),曾是欧洲最受期待的 AI 芯片独角兽,自研 IPU(智能处理单元)——一种为并行、稀疏的机器学习负载重新设计的处理器架构,试图另辟蹊径挑战英伟达 GPU。但在生态与商业化上进展不及预期,持续承压。2024 年,Graphcore 被软银(SoftBank)收购,并入其庞大的 AI 与算力布局,为软银「算力帝国」再添一块自研芯片拼图。
graphcore.descriptionEn: Founded in 2016 in Bristol, UK, Graphcore was once Europe's most anticipated AI-chip unicorn, with its own IPU (Intelligence Processing Unit) — a processor architecture redesigned for parallel, sparse machine-learning workloads, aiming to challenge NVIDIA GPUs from a different angle. But it fell short on ecosystem and commercialization and remained under pressure. In 2024 Graphcore was acquired by SoftBank and folded into its sprawling AI and compute ambitions, adding an in-house chip piece to SoftBank's "compute empire."
whyItMatters: 自研 IPU,为并行/稀疏 ML 负载重新设计架构
曾是欧洲最受期待的 AI 芯片独角兽
生态与商业化受挫,2024 被软银收购
并入软银 AI 与算力版图

tenstorrent.name: Tenstorrent
tenstorrent.oneLiner: Jim Keller 掌舵的 RISC-V + AI 芯片新锐。
tenstorrent.oneLinerEn: A RISC-V + AI chip upstart led by Jim Keller.
tenstorrent.tagline: 用开放架构做 AI 算力
tenstorrent.business: 基于 RISC-V 的 AI 处理器与 IP 授权，走开放路线挑战英伟达。
tenstorrent.businessEn: RISC-V-based AI processors and IP licensing, challenging NVIDIA via an open approach.
tenstorrent.description: Tenstorrent 由传奇芯片架构师 Jim Keller(曾主导 AMD Zen、苹果 A 系列、特斯拉 FSD 芯片)掌舵,主打「开放」路线:把 AI 加速与开源指令集 RISC-V CPU 结合,既卖芯片/整机,也像 Arm 那样对外授权 IP,让客户能自建可控的 AI 算力,避开对英伟达 CUDA 生态的锁定。它获三星、现代、贝索斯及中东主权基金等投资,估值约 26 亿美元级别,是「开放架构挑战英伟达」这一叙事里最受关注的玩家之一。
tenstorrent.descriptionEn: Tenstorrent is led by legendary chip architect Jim Keller (who drove AMD Zen, Apple's A-series and Tesla's FSD chip) and pursues an "open" approach: combining AI acceleration with open-standard RISC-V CPUs, it both sells chips/systems and licenses IP like Arm, letting customers build controllable AI compute and avoid lock-in to NVIDIA's CUDA ecosystem. Backed by Samsung, Hyundai, Jeff Bezos and Middle Eastern sovereign funds, at a valuation on the order of $2.6 billion, it is one of the most-watched players in the "open architecture challenges NVIDIA" story.
whyItMatters: Jim Keller 掌舵,芯片架构界传奇背书
RISC-V + AI 开放路线,可授权 IP 像 Arm
帮客户避开 CUDA 锁定,自建可控算力
三星/现代/贝索斯等投资,估值约 26 亿美元

etched.name: Etched
