etched.oneLiner: 把 Transformer 直接刻进芯片的 ASIC。
etched.oneLinerEn: An ASIC that etches the Transformer architecture directly into silicon.
etched.tagline: 为 Transformer 而生的芯片
etched.business: Sohu 芯片专为 Transformer 架构定制，宣称推理吞吐远超 GPU。
etched.businessEn: Its Sohu chip is customized specifically for the Transformer architecture, claiming inference throughput far beyond GPUs.
etched.description: Etched 由几位哈佛退学生于 2022 年创立,押上了一个极端的赌注:与其做通用 AI 芯片,不如把 Transformer 架构本身「刻」进硅片。其 Sohu 芯片专为 Transformer 定制,放弃通用性换取极致效率,宣称在 Transformer 推理上的吞吐与性价比远超 GPU。这是一场豪赌——如果未来主流架构仍是 Transformer,Etched 可能极具颠覆性;若架构迭代,则风险巨大。它以约 1.2 亿美元融资、约 15 亿美元估值成为最受关注的芯片新星之一。
etched.descriptionEn: Etched was founded in 2022 by Harvard dropouts on an extreme bet: rather than build a general AI chip, etch the Transformer architecture itself into silicon. Its Sohu chip is customized purely for Transformers, trading generality for extreme efficiency and claiming throughput and cost-performance on Transformer inference far beyond GPUs. It is a high-stakes wager — hugely disruptive if Transformers remain dominant, very risky if architectures shift. With about $120 million raised at roughly a $1.5 billion valuation, it is one of the most-watched chip newcomers.
whyItMatters: 把 Transformer 刻进硅片,放弃通用换极致效率
Sohu 宣称 Transformer 推理吞吐远超 GPU
架构豪赌:押注 Transformer 长期主导
约 15 亿美元估值,最受关注芯片新星之一

crwv.name: CoreWeave
crwv.oneLiner: 最大的 AI 专属 GPU 云，2025 年上市。
crwv.oneLinerEn: The largest AI-specialized GPU cloud, which went public in 2025.
crwv.business: 以英伟达 GPU 为核心的 AI 云算力租赁，微软、OpenAI 等为大客户。
crwv.businessEn: AI cloud compute rental centered on NVIDIA GPUs, with Microsoft, OpenAI and others as major customers.
crwv.description: CoreWeave 成立于 2017 年(最初做加密挖矿)，后转型为专注 AI 的「新云(neocloud)」——把海量英伟达 GPU 打包成弹性云算力出租，靠更贴近 AI 工作负载的架构与更快的部署赢得前沿客户。它是英伟达的重要合作伙伴与被投对象，微软、OpenAI 等是其大客户(客户集中度高，微软一度占营收过半)。2025 年 3 月 27 日 CoreWeave 以每股 40 美元 IPO、估值约 230 亿美元，成为当年最受关注的科技上市；2025 年营收约 51 亿美元、同比增长约 170%，并指引 2026 年营收 120–130 亿美元。它是「AI 算力租赁」这一新赛道的旗帜，但也背负巨额资本开支与债务。
crwv.descriptionEn: Founded in 2017 (originally in crypto mining), CoreWeave pivoted into an AI-focused "neocloud" — packaging vast fleets of NVIDIA GPUs into elastic cloud compute for rent, winning frontier customers with an architecture tuned to AI workloads and faster deployment. It is a key NVIDIA partner and investee, with Microsoft, OpenAI and others as major customers (high concentration — Microsoft was once over half of revenue). On March 27, 2025 CoreWeave IPO'd at $40 per share at about a $23 billion valuation, the most-watched tech listing of the year; its 2025 revenue was about $5.1 billion, up ~170%, and it guided 2026 revenue of $12–13 billion. It is the flagship of the "AI compute rental" category, though it carries heavy capex and debt.
whyItMatters: 最大的 AI 专属 GPU 云,neocloud 赛道旗帜
英伟达合作+被投,微软/OpenAI 为大客户
2025 营收约 51 亿、增速约 170%,当年最受关注 IPO
承载 AI 算力扩张,但资本开支与债务巨大

lambda.name: Lambda
lambda.oneLiner: 面向研究者与企业的 GPU 云与工作站。
lambda.oneLinerEn: GPU cloud and workstations for researchers and enterprises.
lambda.tagline: 为深度学习而生的算力
lambda.business: GPU 云、AI 工作站与集群，主打易用与性价比。
lambda.businessEn: GPU cloud, AI workstations and clusters, focused on ease of use and value for money.
lambda.description: Lambda(Lambda Labs)成立于 2012 年，起家于深度学习工作站与服务器，深受研究者与工程师喜爱，后扩展为 GPU 云——提供按需与预留的英伟达 GPU 算力、集群与一站式训练环境，主打易用、贴近科研工作流与高性价比。随着 AI 算力需求爆发，Lambda 快速扩张:2025 年 2 月完成 4.8 亿美元 D 轮(估值约 25 亿美元),11 月又融 15 亿美元 E 轮(估值升至约 40–50 亿美元),ARR 约 3 亿美元,并被传备战 IPO,是 GPU 云新势力中的代表之一。
lambda.descriptionEn: Lambda (Lambda Labs) was founded in 2012, starting with deep-learning workstations and servers beloved by researchers and engineers, then expanding into a GPU cloud — offering on-demand and reserved NVIDIA GPU compute, clusters and turnkey training environments, focused on ease of use, fit with research workflows and value. As AI compute demand exploded, Lambda scaled fast: a $480 million Series D in February 2025 (about $2.5 billion valuation) and a $1.5 billion Series E in November 2025 (raising it to roughly $4–5 billion), with ARR around $300 million and reported IPO preparations — one of the leading GPU-cloud upstarts.
whyItMatters: 从深度学习工作站起家,研究者口碑好
GPU 云易用、贴近科研工作流、性价比高
2025 连融 D/E 轮,估值升至约 40–50 亿美元
ARR 约 3 亿美元,传备战 IPO

crusoe.name: Crusoe
crusoe.oneLiner: 用低碳能源驱动的 AI 数据中心与 GPU 云。
crusoe.oneLinerEn: AI data centers and GPU cloud powered by low-carbon energy.
crusoe.tagline: 把浪费的能源变成算力
crusoe.subcategory: AI 数据中心 / 能源
crusoe.business: 自建低碳(弃电/天然气)供电的 AI 数据中心与 GPU 云，绑定能源与算力。
crusoe.businessEn: Self-built AI data centers and GPU cloud powered by low-carbon energy (stranded gas/power), tying energy to compute.
crusoe.description: Crusoe 成立于 2018 年,最初用油田本会被烧掉的伴生气(弃气)就地发电挖矿/算力,主打「把浪费的能源变成算力」的低碳路线。随着 AI 爆发,Crusoe 全面转向 AI 数据中心与 GPU 云,把「能源 + 算力」垂直整合——自建供电、自建数据中心、再出租 GPU 算力。它承建了得州阿比林的大型 AI 数据中心(星际之门 Stargate 的重要站点之一),是「算力即能源」叙事里最受关注的玩家之一。
crusoe.descriptionEn: Founded in 2018, Crusoe initially generated power on-site from flared gas (otherwise burned) at oil fields to run mining/compute, built on a low-carbon "turn wasted energy into compute" thesis. As AI took off, Crusoe pivoted fully to AI data centers and GPU cloud, vertically integrating "energy + compute" — building its own power and data centers and renting out GPU capacity. It is constructing the large AI data center in Abilene, Texas (a major site of the Stargate project), and is one of the most-watched players in the "compute is energy" narrative.
whyItMatters: 把弃电/弃气变算力,低碳能源+数据中心垂直整合
承建阿比林大型 AI 数据中心(星际之门站点)
「算力即能源」叙事的代表玩家
自建供电解决 AI 数据中心最紧的电力瓶颈

nbis.name: Nebius
nbis.oneLiner: 源自 Yandex 的欧洲 AI 云算力商。
nbis.oneLinerEn: A European AI cloud provider spun out of Yandex.
nbis.tagline: 为 AI 时代打造的云
nbis.taglineEn: Cloud infrastructure for the AI era
nbis.business: 全栈 AI 云与 GPU 算力，自建数据中心，英伟达为战略投资方之一。
nbis.businessEn: A full-stack AI cloud with GPU compute and self-built data centers; NVIDIA is a strategic investor.
nbis.description: Nebius Group 由原俄罗斯搜索巨头 Yandex 的国际资产重组而来,总部迁至荷兰,2024 年以「独立欧洲 AI 云」身份在纳斯达克交易(NBIS)。它做全栈 AI 云:自建数据中心、部署海量英伟达 GPU,为 AI 训练与推理提供算力,英伟达是其战略投资方之一。搭上 AI 算力需求的顺风,Nebius 增长极快——2026 年一季度营收约 4 亿美元、同比暴增约 684%,并拿下与微软等的数百亿美元长约,市值一度升至约 600 亿美元,是欧洲 AI 算力的代表标的。
nbis.descriptionEn: Nebius Group was formed from the international assets of former Russian search giant Yandex, relocated its headquarters to the Netherlands, and since 2024 trades on Nasdaq (NBIS) as an independent European AI cloud. It runs a full-stack AI cloud: building its own data centers, deploying large fleets of NVIDIA GPUs, and providing compute for AI training and inference, with NVIDIA as a strategic investor. Riding surging AI-compute demand, Nebius has grown extremely fast — Q1 2026 revenue of about $400 million, up roughly 684% year over year — and won multi-billion-dollar long-term contracts with the likes of Microsoft, briefly lifting its market cap to about $60 billion, a flagship of European AI compute.
whyItMatters: 源自 Yandex 的独立欧洲 AI 云,纳斯达克上市
全栈自建数据中心 + 海量英伟达 GPU
一季度营收暴增约 684%,拿下微软等大额长约
英伟达战略投资,欧洲 AI 算力代表

together.name: Together AI
together.oneLiner: 开源模型的推理/训练云平台。
together.oneLinerEn: An inference/training cloud platform for open-source models.
together.business: 为开源大模型提供高性价比推理与微调云，主打开放生态。
together.businessEn: A cost-efficient inference and fine-tuning cloud for open-source large models, centered on the open ecosystem.
together.description: Together AI 成立于 2022 年,专注「开放 AI 的云」:为开源大模型(Llama、DeepSeek、Qwen 等)提供高性价比的推理、微调与训练算力,让企业不必绑定单一闭源 API 也能用上前沿能力。其首席科学家 Tri Dao 是 FlashAttention 的作者,团队在高效推理/训练系统上很强。融资上,2025 年 2 月 B 轮 3.05 亿美元(估值 33 亿),随后 C 轮再融 8 亿美元、投后估值约 83 亿美元,是开源模型算力赛道的头部之一。
together.descriptionEn: Founded in 2022, Together AI focuses on the "cloud for open AI": providing cost-efficient inference, fine-tuning and training compute for open-source models (Llama, DeepSeek, Qwen and more), so enterprises can access frontier capability without locking into a single closed API. Its chief scientist Tri Dao is the author of FlashAttention, and the team is strong in efficient inference/training systems. On funding, a $305 million Series B in February 2025 (at a $3.3 billion valuation) was followed by an $800 million Series C at about an $8.3 billion post-money valuation — a leader in open-model compute.
whyItMatters: 开源模型的算力底座,推理/微调/训练一体
首席科学家 Tri Dao 是 FlashAttention 作者
C 轮 8 亿美元、估值约 83 亿美元
让企业无需绑定闭源 API 也能用前沿能力

fireworks.name: Fireworks AI
fireworks.oneLiner: 极速开源模型推理平台。
fireworks.oneLinerEn: A blazing-fast inference platform for open-source models.
fireworks.tagline: 让生成式 AI 快到极致
fireworks.business: 面向开发者的高速、低成本大模型推理 API，主打开源模型托管。
fireworks.businessEn: A fast, low-cost large-model inference API for developers, centered on hosting open-source models.
fireworks.description: Fireworks AI 成立于 2022 年,由前 Meta PyTorch 负责人 Lin Qiao(乔琳)等创立,专注「极速推理」:通过深度的推理引擎优化(自研 kernel、量化、投机解码等),让开源大模型跑得更快、更省,面向开发者提供低延迟、低成本的推理 API 与微调服务。它与 Together 同处开源模型算力赛道,主打速度与性价比,增长迅速,2025 年估值升至约 40 亿美元级别,是开发者调用开源模型的热门底座之一。
fireworks.descriptionEn: Founded in 2022 by former Meta PyTorch lead Lin Qiao and others, Fireworks AI focuses on "blazing-fast inference": through deep inference-engine optimization (custom kernels, quantization, speculative decoding, etc.) it runs open-source models faster and cheaper, offering developers low-latency, low-cost inference APIs and fine-tuning. Competing with Together in open-model compute, it emphasizes speed and value, has grown quickly, and by 2025 was valued at roughly the $4 billion range — a popular backbone for developers calling open-source models.
whyItMatters: 深度推理引擎优化,开源模型跑得更快更省
创始人 Lin Qiao 是前 Meta PyTorch 负责人
低延迟低成本推理 API,开发者热门底座
2025 估值升至约 40 亿美元级别

huggingface.name: Hugging Face
huggingface.oneLiner: 开源 AI 社区与模型托管中心——AI 界的 GitHub。
huggingface.oneLinerEn: The open-source AI community and model hub — the GitHub of AI.
huggingface.taglineEn: The AI community building the future
huggingface.subcategory: 模型托管 / 开源社区
huggingface.business: 模型/数据集托管、Transformers 库与协作平台，开源 AI 生态的枢纽。
huggingface.businessEn: Model/dataset hosting, the Transformers library and a collaboration platform — the hub of the open-source AI ecosystem.
huggingface.description: Hugging Face 被称为「AI 界的 GitHub」,是开源 AI 生态的中心枢纽。全球的研究者和公司(包括 Meta、谷歌、微软、Mistral、阿里 Qwen 等)把训练好的开源模型、数据集发布到 Hugging Face,其他开发者可以一键下载、试用、微调与部署——如今它托管着上百万个模型与数据集。它维护的开源库 Transformers 更是几乎所有做大模型开发的人都要用的基础工具,极大降低了用 AI 的门槛。凭借「开源模型的分发与协作中心」这个独特而中立的卡位,Hugging Face 成为整个开源 AI 运动不可或缺的基础设施,虽然商业化(企业版、算力)规模不算大,但其生态影响力与地位无可替代。
huggingface.descriptionEn: Hugging Face is called "the GitHub of AI" and is the central hub of the open-source AI ecosystem. Researchers and companies worldwide (including Meta, Google, Microsoft, Mistral and Alibaba's Qwen) publish their trained open models and datasets to Hugging Face, where other developers can download, try, fine-tune and deploy them in one click — it now hosts millions of models and datasets. Its open-source Transformers library is a foundational tool used by nearly everyone doing large-model development, greatly lowering the barrier to using AI. With its unique, neutral position as the "distribution and collaboration center for open models," Hugging Face is indispensable infrastructure for the entire open-source AI movement — its commercialization (enterprise, compute) is modest in scale, but its ecosystem influence and standing are irreplaceable.
whyItMatters: 「AI 界的 GitHub」,托管上百万模型与数据集
Transformers 库是做大模型开发的基础工具
Meta/谷歌/Mistral/Qwen 等把开源模型发布于此
中立的开源模型分发与协作枢纽,生态影响力无可替代

databricks.name: Databricks
databricks.oneLiner: 数据 + AI 一体化平台，估值最高的 AI 独角兽之一。
databricks.oneLinerEn: The unified data + AI platform, and one of the highest-valued AI unicorns.
databricks.tagline: 让每个组织都能用自己的数据做 AI
databricks.taglineEn: Helping every organization do AI on its own data
databricks.business: 湖仓一体(Lakehouse)数据平台与 DBRX 开源模型，帮企业用自有数据训练/部署 AI。
databricks.businessEn: A lakehouse data platform and the open DBRX model, helping enterprises train and deploy AI on their own data.
databricks.description: Databricks 由 Apache Spark 的创造者、来自 UC Berkeley 的 Ali Ghodsi 等人于 2013 年创立，开创了「湖仓一体(Lakehouse)」架构——把数据湖的灵活与数据仓库的治理合二为一，让企业在同一份数据上既做分析又做 AI。2023 年 13 亿美元收购 MosaicML 后，它补上了模型训练能力并推出开源模型 DBRX，还发布了自然语言分析 Genie、事务型数据库 Lakebase 等。凭借 AI 浪潮，Databricks 年化营收突破 54 亿美元、同比增长约 65%，2025 年底完成约 40–50 亿美元融资、估值达 1340 亿美元，是全球估值最高的私营科技公司之一，并被传冲击 1750 亿美元。其主要对手是 Snowflake。
databricks.descriptionEn: Databricks was founded in 2013 by Ali Ghodsi and other UC Berkeley creators of Apache Spark. It pioneered the "lakehouse" architecture — merging the flexibility of a data lake with the governance of a data warehouse — so enterprises can run both analytics and AI on a single copy of their data. After its $1.3 billion acquisition of MosaicML in 2023, it added model-training capability and released the open DBRX model, along with the natural-language analytics tool Genie and the transactional database Lakebase. Riding the AI wave, Databricks surpassed a $5.4 billion annualized revenue run-rate, up about 65% year over year, and closed a roughly $4–5 billion round in late 2025 at a $134 billion valuation — one of the world's most valuable private tech companies, and reportedly eyeing $175 billion. Its main rival is Snowflake.
whyItMatters: 开创湖仓一体架构，成为企业数据+AI 的事实底座
13 亿美元收购 MosaicML，补齐模型训练与开源 DBRX
年化营收超 54 亿、增速约 65%，1340 亿美元估值
帮企业在自有数据上安全训练/部署 AI，卡位数据入口

snow.name: Snowflake
snow.oneLiner: 云数据仓库龙头，向 AI 数据平台延伸。
snow.oneLinerEn: The cloud-data-warehouse leader, extending into an AI data platform.
snow.business: 云数据云与 Cortex AI，帮企业在数据上直接跑 AI。
snow.businessEn: A cloud data platform plus Cortex AI, letting enterprises run AI directly on their data.
snow.description: Snowflake 是云数据仓库的龙头,以「存算分离、按用量付费、跨云好用」的架构颠覆了传统数据仓库,让企业能把海量数据集中到云上做分析。它掌握着大量企业的核心数据,这是它做 AI 的最大底气——AI 要有用,得跑在企业自己的真实数据上。它推出 Cortex AI,让用户能直接在 Snowflake 里用大模型对数据做问答、抽取、生成,而无需把数据搬来搬去(数据不出平台,兼顾安全合规)。Snowflake 与 Databricks 是「企业数据 + AI 平台」赛道最直接的两大对手:一个从数据仓库出发、一个从数据湖/AI 出发,都想成为企业「数据 + AI」的统一底座。
snow.descriptionEn: Snowflake is the leader in cloud data warehousing, disrupting traditional warehouses with a "separate storage and compute, pay-per-use, cross-cloud" architecture that lets enterprises centralize massive data in the cloud for analytics. It commands the core data of many enterprises, its biggest advantage in AI — for AI to be useful, it must run on an enterprise's own real data. Its Cortex AI lets users apply large models to data directly inside Snowflake for Q&A, extraction and generation without moving data around (data stays on the platform for security/compliance). Snowflake and Databricks are the two most direct rivals in "enterprise data + AI platforms": one from the data-warehouse side, the other from the data-lake/AI side, both aiming to be the enterprise's unified "data + AI" foundation.
whyItMatters: 云数据仓库龙头,存算分离+按用量付费颠覆传统
掌握大量企业核心数据,做 AI 的最大底气
Cortex AI 让 AI 直接在平台内跑,数据不出平台
与 Databricks 争「企业数据+AI 统一底座」

pinecone.name: Pinecone
pinecone.oneLiner: 最流行的向量数据库，RAG 标配。
pinecone.oneLinerEn: The most popular vector database — the standard for RAG.
pinecone.tagline: 为 AI 提供长期记忆
pinecone.business: 托管向量数据库，为检索增强(RAG)与语义搜索提供长期记忆。
pinecone.businessEn: A managed vector database providing long-term memory for retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and semantic search.
pinecone.description: Pinecone 是最流行的「向量数据库」,是 RAG(检索增强生成)的标配基础设施。大模型的知识是「冻结」在训练时刻的,也记不住太多东西;要让 AI 用上企业自己的、最新的资料,常用做法是把文档转成「向量」存起来,提问时先检索出最相关的片段再喂给模型——这就需要一个能高效存储和搜索海量向量的数据库,即向量数据库。Pinecone 提供全托管的向量数据库服务,让开发者不用自己搭,就能给 AI 应用加上「长期记忆」与「基于自有知识的问答」。作为这一细分品类的开创者与头部,Pinecone 是 AI 应用检索层最常用的基础设施之一。
pinecone.descriptionEn: Pinecone is the most popular "vector database," the standard infrastructure for RAG (retrieval-augmented generation). A model's knowledge is "frozen" at training time and it can't remember much; to let AI use an enterprise's own, up-to-date material, a common approach is to convert documents into "vectors" and store them, then at query time retrieve the most relevant snippets to feed the model — which needs a database that can efficiently store and search massive vectors, i.e. a vector database. Pinecone offers a fully managed vector-database service so developers don't build their own but can add "long-term memory" and "Q&A over your own knowledge" to AI apps. As the creator and leader of this category, Pinecone is one of the most-used pieces of infrastructure in the retrieval layer of AI applications.
whyItMatters: 最流行向量数据库,RAG 标配基础设施
把文档转向量存储,检索相关片段喂给模型
全托管服务,给 AI 应用加「长期记忆」与自有知识问答
向量数据库品类开创者与头部

weaviate.name: Weaviate
weaviate.tagline: 开放的 AI 原生数据库
weaviate.business: 开源向量数据库与混合检索，面向 RAG 与 AI 搜索。
weaviate.businessEn: An open-source vector database with hybrid search, for RAG and AI search.
weaviate.description: Weaviate 是与 Pinecone 齐名的向量数据库,但走开源路线。它同样解决「给 AI 加检索记忆」的问题:把数据向量化存起来,让 AI 应用能语义搜索、做 RAG。Weaviate 的差异化在于开源(可自行部署、可控)与「混合检索」——把传统关键词搜索和向量语义搜索结合起来,往往比单一方式更准。它既提供开源版本供开发者自建,也提供托管云服务。作为开源向量数据库的代表,Weaviate 在注重数据可控、想避免被单一厂商锁定的企业和开发者中很受欢迎,是 AI 检索层的重要选择之一。
weaviate.descriptionEn: Weaviate is a vector database on par with Pinecone but takes an open-source route. It solves the same problem of "adding retrieval memory to AI": storing vectorized data so AI apps can do semantic search and RAG. Weaviate's differentiation is open source (self-hostable, controllable) and "hybrid search" — combining traditional keyword search with vector semantic search, often more accurate than either alone. It offers both an open-source version for developers to self-host and a managed cloud service. As a leading open-source vector database, Weaviate is popular with enterprises and developers who value data control and want to avoid single-vendor lock-in — an important option in the AI retrieval layer.
whyItMatters: 与 Pinecone 齐名的向量数据库,走开源路线
「混合检索」结合关键词与向量语义,更准
可自行部署可控,避免被单一厂商锁定
开源向量数据库代表,AI 检索层重要选择

chroma.name: Chroma
chroma.oneLiner: 开发者友好的开源向量库。
chroma.tagline: 让 AI 检索简单起步
chroma.taglineEn: The easiest way to build AI retrieval
chroma.business: 轻量开源向量数据库，深受 AI 应用开发者欢迎。
chroma.businessEn: A lightweight open-source vector database, beloved by AI-application developers.
chroma.description: Chroma 是一款轻量、开发者友好的开源向量数据库。它主打「极简、易上手」——几行代码就能在本地跑起来给你的 AI 应用加上检索记忆(RAG),特别适合做原型、做实验、以及中小规模应用,是很多开发者「第一次做 RAG」时的默认选择。相比 Pinecone/Weaviate 更偏企业级、大规模,Chroma 更贴近独立开发者和快速迭代的场景,以「简单好用 + 开源」积累了庞大的开发者社区。随着需求增长,它也在往可扩展的云与更大规模演进。Chroma 是 AI 应用检索层里最受开发者喜爱的入门级选择之一。
chroma.descriptionEn: Chroma is a lightweight, developer-friendly open-source vector database. It emphasizes "minimal and easy to start" — a few lines of code run it locally to add retrieval memory (RAG) to your AI app, especially good for prototypes, experiments and small-to-mid-scale applications, and it is many developers' default choice for "building RAG for the first time." Compared with the more enterprise/large-scale Pinecone/Weaviate, Chroma is closer to independent developers and fast iteration, building a large developer community on "simple and easy + open source." As demand grows, it is evolving toward a scalable cloud and larger scale. Chroma is one of the most developer-loved entry-level options in the AI retrieval layer.
whyItMatters: 轻量、开发者友好的开源向量数据库
几行代码本地跑起来,给 AI 应用加 RAG
适合原型/实验/中小应用,「第一次做 RAG」默认选择
「简单好用+开源」积累庞大开发者社区

langchain.name: LangChain
langchain.oneLiner: 最流行的大模型应用编排框架。
langchain.oneLinerEn: The most popular framework for orchestrating LLM applications.
langchain.tagline: 构建可用的大模型应用
langchain.business: LangChain/LangGraph 开发框架与 LangSmith 可观测平台，串起模型、工具与数据。
langchain.businessEn: The LangChain/LangGraph development frameworks and the LangSmith observability platform, wiring together models, tools and data.
langchain.description: LangChain 是最流行的大模型应用开发框架之一。做一个真正有用的 AI 应用,通常不是「调一次模型」那么简单,而要把大模型、外部工具(搜索、数据库、API)、企业数据、记忆、以及多步流程「串」起来。LangChain 提供了一套标准的积木和胶水,让开发者能快速把这些拼装成一个能干活的应用或智能体;它的 LangGraph 进一步支持更复杂、可控的多步/多智能体流程,LangSmith 则提供调试、评测与可观测(看清 AI 每一步在干嘛)。作为开源+商业化并行、社区极大的开发框架,LangChain 是「把大模型变成真实应用」这一环里被最广泛使用的工具之一。
langchain.descriptionEn: LangChain is one of the most popular development frameworks for LLM applications. Building a genuinely useful AI app is usually not as simple as "calling a model once" — it requires wiring together the model, external tools (search, databases, APIs), enterprise data, memory and multi-step flows. LangChain provides standard building blocks and glue so developers can quickly assemble these into a working app or agent; its LangGraph supports more complex, controllable multi-step/multi-agent flows, and LangSmith provides debugging, evaluation and observability (seeing what the AI does at each step). As a large-community framework with parallel open-source and commercial offerings, LangChain is one of the most widely used tools in the "turn LLMs into real applications" layer.
whyItMatters: 最流行的大模型应用开发框架之一
把模型+工具+数据+记忆+多步流程「串」起来
LangGraph 支持复杂多智能体流程,LangSmith 做可观测
社区极大,「把大模型变真实应用」最常用工具之一

llamaindex.name: LlamaIndex
llamaindex.oneLiner: 面向 RAG 的数据编排框架。
llamaindex.tagline: 把你的数据接进大模型
llamaindex.business: 把企业数据接进大模型的检索/索引框架，主攻知识型 AI 应用。
llamaindex.businessEn: A retrieval/indexing framework connecting enterprise data to large models, focused on knowledge-based AI apps.
llamaindex.description: LlamaIndex 是专注「把数据接进大模型」的开发框架,与 LangChain 是这一层的两大代表。它主攻 RAG(检索增强)最难的一环:如何把企业各种杂乱的数据(PDF、网页、数据库、PPT、表格等)高质量地读进来、切分、建索引,让大模型在回答时能准确检索到相关内容。相比更「大而全」的 LangChain,LlamaIndex 更聚焦「数据摄取 + 检索」这条主线,做得更深,尤其在处理复杂文档、企业知识库上口碑好。它也推出了云服务 LlamaCloud 与文档解析等商业产品。作为「知识型 AI 应用」数据层的核心工具之一,LlamaIndex 是很多企业做「基于自有知识的问答/助手」时的首选框架。
llamaindex.descriptionEn: LlamaIndex is a development framework focused on "connecting data to large models," and together with LangChain is one of the two representatives of this layer. It targets the hardest part of RAG (retrieval-augmented generation): how to ingest an enterprise's messy data (PDFs, web pages, databases, slides, tables) with high quality, chunk it, and build indexes so the model can accurately retrieve relevant content when answering. Compared with the more "broad" LangChain, LlamaIndex focuses on the "data ingestion + retrieval" main line and goes deeper, with a strong reputation especially for complex documents and enterprise knowledge bases. It also offers the LlamaCloud service and document-parsing commercial products. As a core tool in the data layer of "knowledge-based AI applications," LlamaIndex is a top choice for many enterprises building "Q&A/assistants over their own knowledge."
whyItMatters: 专注「把数据接进大模型」,与 LangChain 两大代表
主攻 RAG 最难的数据摄取+切分+建索引
处理复杂文档/企业知识库口碑好
「知识型 AI 应用」数据层核心工具之一

scaleai.name: Scale AI
scaleai.oneLiner: AI 训练数据标注与评测龙头。
scaleai.oneLinerEn: The leader in AI training-data labeling and evaluation.
scaleai.tagline: 为 AI 提供数据燃料
scaleai.subcategory: 数据标注 / RLHF / 评测
scaleai.business: 为大模型提供数据标注、RLHF 与评测，Meta 于 2025 年大额入股。
scaleai.businessEn: Provides data labeling, RLHF and evaluation for large models; Meta took a major stake in 2025.
scaleai.description: Scale AI 由 Alexandr Wang 与 Lucy Guo 于 2016 年创立，是 AI「数据燃料」的头部供应商——为自动驾驶、大模型与政府/国防提供高质量数据标注、人类反馈(RLHF)与模型评测，客户一度覆盖 OpenAI、Meta、谷歌等几乎所有前沿实验室。2025 年 6 月，Meta 以 143 亿美元收购 Scale 约 49% 股权(无投票权)，公司估值达 290 亿美元，创始人 Alexandr Wang 随之离开、去领导 Meta 新成立的「超级智能」实验室，Jason Droege 接任 CEO。这笔交易被视为 Meta 追赶前沿的关键一步，但也让 OpenAI、谷歌等竞争对手因数据中立性顾虑而减少合作，Scale 因此加速转向企业与政府市场。
scaleai.descriptionEn: Scale AI was founded in 2016 by Alexandr Wang and Lucy Guo and is the leading supplier of AI's "data fuel" — high-quality data labeling, human feedback (RLHF) and model evaluation for autonomous driving, large models and government/defense, at one point serving nearly every frontier lab including OpenAI, Meta and Google. In June 2025 Meta acquired about 49% of Scale (with no voting power) for $14.3 billion, valuing the company at $29 billion; founder Alexandr Wang then left to lead Meta's new "superintelligence" lab, and Jason Droege became CEO. The deal was seen as a key step in Meta's push to catch the frontier, but it also led rivals like OpenAI and Google to pull back over data-neutrality concerns, pushing Scale to accelerate toward enterprise and government markets.
whyItMatters: AI「数据燃料」头部供应商，服务几乎所有前沿实验室
Meta 143 亿美元入股 49%，估值 290 亿美元
创始人 Wang 出走领导 Meta 超级智能实验室
交易引发数据中立性顾虑，加速转向企业/政府

surge.name: Surge AI
surge.oneLiner: 高质量 RLHF 数据标注新贵。
surge.business: 面向前沿实验室的高质量人类反馈与数据标注服务。

cohere.name: Cohere
cohere.oneLiner: 面向企业的大模型公司，主打私有部署。
cohere.oneLinerEn: An enterprise-focused LLM company built around private deployment.
cohere.tagline: 为企业打造安全的 AI
cohere.taglineEn: Secure AI, built for the enterprise
cohere.business: Command 系列大模型与 Embed/Rerank 检索模型，专注企业级安全部署。
cohere.businessEn: The Command family of models plus Embed/Rerank retrieval models, focused on secure enterprise deployment.
cohere.description: Cohere 由 Transformer 论文《Attention Is All You Need》的合著者 Aidan Gomez 与 Nick Frosst、Ivan Zhang 于 2019 年在多伦多创立，专注「企业级、可私有部署」的大模型——不追消费爆款，而是让银行、电信、政府等把模型部署在自己的云或本地，满足数据合规与安全。其 Command 系列擅长检索增强(RAG)与工具调用，Embed/Rerank 是业界常用的检索组件；2025 年推出安全优先的 AI 工作空间 North，直接对标微软 Copilot，客户包括 RBC、Dell、LG、Oracle、SAP 等。融资上，2025 年 9 月估值约 70 亿美元，2026 年 4 月与德国 Aleph Alpha 合并、整体估值约 200 亿美元，年化收入约 2.4 亿美元并推进 IPO。
cohere.descriptionEn: Cohere was founded in Toronto in 2019 by Aidan Gomez — a co-author of the Transformer paper "Attention Is All You Need" — with Nick Frosst and Ivan Zhang. It focuses on enterprise-grade, privately deployable large models: rather than chasing consumer hits, it lets banks, telecoms and governments run models in their own cloud or on-prem to meet data-compliance and security needs. Its Command models excel at retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and tool use, and its Embed/Rerank are widely used retrieval components; in 2025 it launched North, a security-first AI workspace aimed squarely at Microsoft Copilot, with customers including RBC, Dell, LG, Oracle and SAP. On funding, it was valued around $7 billion in September 2025, and in April 2026 combined with Germany's Aleph Alpha at a combined valuation of roughly $20 billion, with about $240 million in annualized revenue as it moves toward an IPO.
whyItMatters: 创始人是 Transformer 论文合著者，血统纯正
专注企业可私有部署，卡位合规与安全需求
North 工作空间直接对标微软 Copilot
并购 Aleph Alpha、估值约 200 亿美元并推进 IPO

reka.name: Reka AI
reka.oneLinerEn: A rising challenger in multimodal foundation models.
reka.tagline: 为所有人打造多模态智能
reka.business: Reka 系列原生多模态模型，团队来自 DeepMind/FAIR。
reka.businessEn: The Reka family of natively multimodal models, from a team drawn from DeepMind and FAIR.
reka.description: Reka AI 由来自 DeepMind、谷歌大脑与 Meta FAIR 的研究者(CEO Dani Yogatama、首席科学家 Yi Tay 等)于 2022 年创立，专注「原生多模态」大模型——从设计之初就统一处理文本、图像、音频与视频，而非事后拼接。其 Reka Core / Flash / Edge 覆盖从旗舰到端侧的不同规模，以小团队做出接近一线的多模态能力著称。2024 年曾传出被 Snowflake 以约 10 亿美元收购但最终未成，此后继续独立运营，主攻企业与私有部署。
reka.descriptionEn: Reka AI was founded in 2022 by researchers from DeepMind, Google Brain and Meta FAIR (CEO Dani Yogatama, chief scientist Yi Tay, and others), focused on natively multimodal models — unifying text, image, audio and video from the ground up rather than bolting them together. Its Reka Core / Flash / Edge span flagship to on-device scales, and it is known for delivering near-frontier multimodal capability with a small team. In 2024 a reported ~$1 billion acquisition by Snowflake fell through; it has since continued independently, targeting enterprise and private deployment.
whyItMatters: 原生多模态，从底层统一文本/图像/音频/视频
团队出身 DeepMind/谷歌大脑/FAIR，血统硬
小团队做出接近一线的多模态能力
Snowflake 收购未成后独立，主攻企业私有部署

zeroone.name: 零一万物
zeroone.oneLiner: 李开复创立的中国大模型公司，Yi 系列开源。
zeroone.oneLinerEn: The Chinese large-model company founded by Kai-Fu Lee, maker of the open-source Yi series.
zeroone.tagline: 让通用人工智能普及每个人
zeroone.business: Yi 系列开源大模型与应用，主打高性价比与中英双语。
zeroone.businessEn: The open-source Yi model family and applications, emphasizing cost efficiency and bilingual (Chinese/English) strength.
zeroone.description: 零一万物由创新工场董事长、AI 科学家李开复于 2023 年创立，是中国大模型创业潮的明星公司之一。其 Yi 系列开源模型(如 Yi-34B)以中英双语与高性价比著称，一度在开源榜单名列前茅。2025 年起，面对头部厂商与开源模型(如 DeepSeek)的激烈竞争与巨大预训练成本，零一万物战略收缩超大模型自研、转向行业应用与解决方案，并与阿里云等在算力/训练上深度合作，走「模型 + 落地」的务实路线。
zeroone.descriptionEn: 01.AI was founded in 2023 by AI scientist Kai-Fu Lee (chairman of Sinovation Ventures) and is one of the stars of China's large-model startup wave. Its open-source Yi models (such as Yi-34B) are known for Chinese/English bilingual strength and cost efficiency, once topping open-source leaderboards. From 2025, facing intense competition from leading vendors and open models (like DeepSeek) and the huge cost of pretraining, 01.AI scaled back frontier in-house pretraining and pivoted toward industry applications and solutions, partnering deeply with Alibaba Cloud on compute/training — a pragmatic "model + deployment" path.
whyItMatters: 李开复背书，中国大模型创业代表之一
Yi 系列开源，中英双语 + 高性价比口碑好
2025 起战略转向行业应用，务实落地
与阿里云在算力/训练上深度绑定

moonshot2.name: 月之暗面
moonshot2.oneLiner: 中国大模型独角兽，Kimi 以超长上下文见长。
moonshot2.oneLinerEn: A Chinese large-model unicorn whose Kimi assistant excels at ultra-long context.
moonshot2.business: Kimi 助手与月之暗面大模型，长上下文能力突出。
moonshot2.businessEn: The Kimi assistant and Moonshot's large models, distinguished by long-context capability.
moonshot2.description: 月之暗面(Moonshot AI)由 90 后 AI 研究者杨植麟(前 Google Brain、CMU/清华)于 2023 年创立，是中国「AI 六小龙」之一，背后有阿里、腾讯、红杉中国等。它以消费级助手 Kimi 出圈，最早把「超长上下文」(可读整本书、长文档)做成大众功能。2025 年发布的开源权重模型 Kimi K2 及后续 K2 Thinking，在编程与智能体(agentic)任务上表现亮眼，成为全球开发者热议的开源模型之一，也把月之暗面从「长文本助手」推向前沿模型第一梯队。
moonshot2.descriptionEn: Moonshot AI was founded in 2023 by young AI researcher Yang Zhilin (formerly Google Brain, CMU/Tsinghua) and is one of China's "six AI tigers," backed by Alibaba, Tencent and HongShan. It broke out with the consumer assistant Kimi, which was among the first to turn "ultra-long context" (reading whole books and long documents) into a mainstream feature. Its 2025 open-weight model Kimi K2 and the later K2 Thinking impressed on coding and agentic tasks, becoming one of the most-discussed open models globally and pushing Moonshot from a "long-text assistant" into the frontier-model top tier.
whyItMatters: Kimi 把「超长上下文」做成大众功能，率先出圈
开源 Kimi K2 / K2 Thinking 在编程与智能体上惊艳
创始人杨植麟是华人青年模型研究代表
阿里腾讯红杉加持，中国「AI 六小龙」之一

cognition.name: Cognition
cognition.oneLiner: 首个「AI 软件工程师」Devin 的开发商，收购了 Windsurf。
cognition.oneLinerEn: Maker of Devin, the first "AI software engineer"; acquired Windsurf.
cognition.business: Devin —— 能像人类工程师一样自主接需求、规划、写码、调试、跑测试、提 PR 的 AI 智能体，可并行处理多任务。2025 年收购 AI 编辑器 Windsurf(原 Codeium)，形成「Agent + 编辑器」组合。
cognition.businessEn: Devin — an AI agent that, like a human engineer, autonomously takes requirements, plans, writes code, debugs, runs tests and opens PRs, and can handle multiple tasks in parallel. In 2025 it acquired the AI editor Windsurf (formerly Codeium), forming an "agent + editor" combination.
cognition.description: Cognition 成立于 2023 年，凭借「首个 AI 软件工程师」Devin 一炮而红：不同于补全类工具，Devin 被定位为能独立完成完整开发任务的自主智能体——读需求、拆解计划、跨文件写代码、运行与调试、提交 PR，还能同时跑多个任务。2025 年 Cognition 收购了 AI 代码编辑器 Windsurf(原 Codeium)，把「自主 Agent」和「人机协同编辑器」两条路线合到一起，是 AI 编程赛道最受关注的公司之一。2025 年 9 月估值达 102 亿美元，2026 年 5 月再融超 10 亿美元、估值约 250 亿美元。
cognition.descriptionEn: Founded in 2023, Cognition shot to fame with Devin, the "first AI software engineer": unlike autocomplete tools, Devin is positioned as an autonomous agent that can complete entire development tasks — reading requirements, breaking down a plan, writing code across files, running and debugging, and submitting PRs, all while handling multiple tasks at once. In 2025 Cognition acquired the AI code editor Windsurf (formerly Codeium), merging the "autonomous agent" and "human-in-the-loop editor" approaches, making it one of the most-watched companies in AI coding. It was valued at $10.2 billion in September 2025 and raised over $1 billion more in May 2026 at roughly a $25 billion valuation.
whyItMatters: Devin 定义「自主 AI 软件工程师」品类
从需求到 PR 全流程自主，可并行多任务
收购 Windsurf，Agent + 编辑器双线布局

products.name: Devin
products.description: 自主完成完整开发任务的智能体。

products.name: Windsurf
products.description: 收购而来的智能体式编辑器。

glean.name: Glean
glean.oneLiner: 企业 AI 搜索与工作助手，「公司内部的 ChatGPT」。
glean.oneLinerEn: Enterprise AI search and work assistant — "ChatGPT for your company."
glean.business: 连接企业内部各系统(邮件、文档、Slack、Jira、CRM…)，用 AI 做统一搜索、问答与智能体，让员工用一句话找到跨系统的信息并自动化工作；权限感知、企业级安全。是「企业知识 + AI」的代表。
glean.businessEn: Connects a company's internal systems (email, docs, Slack, Jira, CRM…) for unified AI search, Q&A and agents, so employees can find cross-system information in one query and automate work — permission-aware and enterprise-secure. It is the standard-bearer for "enterprise knowledge + AI."
glean.description: Glean 由前谷歌搜索工程师、Rubrik 联合创始人 Arvind Jain 于 2019 年创立，做的是「企业内部的搜索与助手」：它把公司散落在几十个 SaaS 系统里的知识索引成一张知识图谱，员工用自然语言就能跨系统找到文档、对话、工单并得到带出处的答案，还能用智能体自动完成工作流。它严格遵循每个人的访问权限，主打企业级安全与合规。2025 年 6 月 F 轮融资 1.5 亿美元、估值达 72 亿美元；年化收入(ARR)从 2025 年初约 1 亿美元一路增长到 2026 年 5 月的约 3 亿美元。随着企业把 AI 落到「自己的数据」上，Glean 成为企业 AI 搜索/助手赛道的领跑者，与微软 Copilot 正面竞争。
glean.descriptionEn: Glean was founded in 2019 by Arvind Jain, a former Google search engineer and Rubrik co-founder. It builds an "internal search and assistant" for companies: it indexes knowledge scattered across dozens of SaaS systems into a knowledge graph, so employees can use natural language to find documents, conversations and tickets across systems and get cited answers, and use agents to automate workflows. It strictly respects each person's access permissions, emphasizing enterprise-grade security and compliance. Its June 2025 Series F raised $150 million at a $7.2 billion valuation, and its annualized revenue (ARR) grew from about $100 million in early 2025 to roughly $300 million by May 2026. As enterprises ground AI in "their own data," Glean has become the leader in enterprise AI search/assistants, competing head-on with Microsoft Copilot.
whyItMatters: 把企业散落的知识统一成「可问答」，找信息效率革命
权限感知 + 企业级安全，大客户放心用
企业 AI 搜索/助手赛道领跑者，增长快

products.name: Glean 企业搜索
products.description: 跨系统统一搜索与带出处问答。

products.name: Glean 智能体
products.description: 自动化跨系统工作流。

tabnine.name: Tabnine
tabnine.oneLiner: 注重隐私与私有部署的 AI 代码助手。
tabnine.oneLinerEn: A privacy-focused, privately deployable AI code assistant.
tabnine.tagline: 值得企业信任的 AI 编程
tabnine.business: 企业级 AI 代码补全与智能体，支持私有化与合规部署。
tabnine.businessEn: Enterprise AI code completion and agents, supporting private and compliant deployment.
tabnine.description: Tabnine 是最早的 AI 代码补全工具之一,如今主打「隐私与合规优先」的企业级 AI 编程。与很多把代码发到第三方云的工具不同,Tabnine 强调:可以私有部署(甚至完全离线)、模型只用授权来源的代码训练、客户代码不外流、也不会被拿去训练别人的模型。这套「零数据外泄 + 可审计 + 可私有化」的定位,特别契合金融、医疗、国防等对代码保密极敏感、监管严格的大企业。相比追求最强能力的消费向工具,Tabnine 走的是「让企业敢用、合规能过」的差异化路线。
tabnine.descriptionEn: Tabnine is one of the earliest AI code-completion tools and now emphasizes "privacy- and compliance-first" enterprise AI coding. Unlike many tools that send code to a third-party cloud, Tabnine stresses that it can be deployed privately (even fully offline), trains models only on permissively licensed code, keeps customer code from leaving, and never uses it to train others' models. This "zero data exfiltration + auditable + privately deployable" positioning fits large enterprises in finance, healthcare and defense that are highly sensitive about code confidentiality and tightly regulated. Rather than chasing peak capability like consumer tools, Tabnine differentiates on "letting enterprises adopt it with compliance approved."
whyItMatters: 最早的 AI 代码补全工具之一,主打隐私合规
可私有部署甚至离线,客户代码不外流
只用授权来源代码训练,契合金融/医疗/国防
差异化:「让企业敢用、合规能过」

vercel.name: Vercel
vercel.oneLiner: 前端云平台，v0 从一句话生成生产级界面/应用。
vercel.oneLinerEn: A frontend cloud whose v0 turns a single prompt into production-grade UIs/apps.
vercel.tagline: 让开发者构建更快、更好的 Web
vercel.taglineEn: Helping developers build a faster, better web
vercel.business: Next.js 框架的母公司与前端部署云(全球最流行的前端托管平台之一)；AI 产品 v0 用自然语言生成生产级 React/Next.js + Tailwind 代码，2026 年升级为含 Git 集成、编辑器、数据库、智能体工作流的完整开发平台。并提供聚合各家模型的 AI Gateway。2025 年估值约 93 亿美元。
vercel.businessEn: The company behind the Next.js framework and a frontend deployment cloud (one of the world's most popular hosting platforms); its AI product v0 generates production-grade React/Next.js + Tailwind code from natural language, and in 2026 grew into a full dev platform with Git integration, an editor, databases and agent workflows. It also offers an AI Gateway aggregating many models. It was valued at about $9.3 billion in 2025.
vercel.description: Vercel 成立于 2015 年，是开源前端框架 Next.js 的母公司，也是全球最流行的前端部署平台之一，为海量网站与应用提供托管与全球加速。生成式 AI 兴起后，它推出 v0——用一句话描述就能生成界面美观、可直接投产的 React/Next.js + Tailwind 代码；2026 年 v0 从「组件生成器」升级为含 Git、类 VS Code 编辑器、数据库连接与智能体工作流的完整开发平台。Vercel 还运营 AI Gateway，聚合 GPT-5.6、Claude 等多家模型供开发者调用。2025 年融资后估值约 93 亿美元，是「Web 开发 + AI」的枢纽玩家。
vercel.descriptionEn: Founded in 2015, Vercel is the company behind the open-source frontend framework Next.js and one of the world's most popular frontend deployment platforms, hosting and globally accelerating a vast number of sites and apps. As generative AI rose, it launched v0 — describe an interface in a sentence and it generates beautiful, production-ready React/Next.js + Tailwind code; in 2026 v0 grew from a "component generator" into a full dev platform with Git, a VS Code-like editor, database connections and agent workflows. Vercel also runs an AI Gateway that aggregates models like GPT-5.6 and Claude for developers. Valued at about $9.3 billion after its 2025 round, it is a hub player at the intersection of web development and AI.
whyItMatters: Next.js 母公司 + 最流行前端云，Web 开发枢纽
v0 升级为完整开发平台，从生成到投产一体
AI Gateway 聚合各家模型，开发者调用入口
估值约 93 亿美元，Web × AI 核心玩家

products.name: v0
products.description: 自然语言生成生产级前端代码与应用。

products.name: Vercel 前端云
products.description: Next.js 托管与全球加速。

products.name: AI Gateway
products.description: 聚合各家大模型供开发者调用。

writer.name: Writer
writer.oneLiner: 面向大企业的全栈生成式 AI 平台，自研 Palmyra 模型。
writer.oneLinerEn: A full-stack generative-AI platform for large enterprises, with its own Palmyra models.
writer.taglineEn: Full-stack generative AI for the enterprise
writer.business: 自研 Palmyra 系列企业模型 + 一站式平台(工作流、知识图谱、智能体)，主攻大企业的内容生成、知识问答与流程自动化，强调合规、可控与全栈自有(不依赖第三方模型)。客户多为《财富》500 强。
writer.businessEn: In-house Palmyra enterprise models plus an all-in-one platform (workflows, knowledge graph, agents), focused on content generation, knowledge Q&A and process automation for large enterprises, emphasizing compliance, control and a fully owned stack (no reliance on third-party models). Its customers are largely Fortune 500.
writer.description: Writer 成立于 2020 年，走「全栈自研」路线做企业 AI：不像多数应用套用 OpenAI/Anthropic，Writer 自研 Palmyra 系列模型，再配上工作流、企业知识图谱与智能体，端到端交付给大企业。它主打合规、数据可控与可预测成本，因此在金融、医疗、零售等对合规敏感的大客户里渗透很深，是「企业级生成式 AI 平台」的代表之一。
writer.descriptionEn: Founded in 2020, Writer takes a "fully in-house" approach to enterprise AI: unlike most apps that wrap OpenAI/Anthropic, Writer builds its own Palmyra models and pairs them with workflows, an enterprise knowledge graph and agents, delivered end-to-end to large companies. It emphasizes compliance, data control and predictable cost, so it has penetrated deeply among compliance-sensitive customers in finance, healthcare and retail — a leading example of an "enterprise-grade generative-AI platform."
whyItMatters: 全栈自研 Palmyra 模型，不依赖第三方，成本可控
强合规/可控，契合大企业与受监管行业
从内容到智能体的一站式企业平台

products.name: Writer 平台
products.description: 工作流 + 知识图谱 + 智能体。

products.name: Palmyra
products.description: 自研企业级大模型系列。

sierra.name: Sierra
sierra.oneLiner: Bret Taylor 创立的企业级对话 AI 智能体平台。
sierra.oneLinerEn: An enterprise conversational-AI agent platform founded by Bret Taylor.
sierra.tagline: 为企业打造更好的客户体验
sierra.taglineEn: Better customer experiences for every business
sierra.business: 面向企业的对话式 AI 智能体平台，帮企业搭建能真正解决问题(退换货、账单、预约)的客服/交互智能体，强调可控、合规与品牌一致。创始人 Bret Taylor(前 Salesforce 联席 CEO、OpenAI 董事长)。
sierra.businessEn: An enterprise conversational-AI agent platform that helps companies build customer-service/interaction agents that actually resolve issues (returns, billing, scheduling), with an emphasis on control, compliance and brand consistency. Founded by Bret Taylor (former Salesforce co-CEO and OpenAI chairman).
sierra.description: Sierra 由 Bret Taylor(前 Salesforce 联席 CEO、现 OpenAI 董事长)与 Clay Bavor(前谷歌)于 2023 年创立，做企业级对话 AI 智能体：不是简单聊天机器人，而是能接入企业系统、真正把客户问题办完(改订单、退款、排故障、预约)的智能体，并强调可控、审计与品牌语气。凭借创始人光环与扎实的企业落地，Sierra 迅速成为企业 AI 客服/交互赛道的头部，估值快速攀升——2025 年估值达约 100 亿美元、超 40% 的《财富》50 强为其客户、ARR 超 1.5 亿美元。
sierra.descriptionEn: Sierra was founded in 2023 by Bret Taylor (former Salesforce co-CEO, now OpenAI chairman) and Clay Bavor (formerly Google) to build enterprise conversational-AI agents: not simple chatbots, but agents that plug into company systems and actually get customer issues done (changing orders, refunds, troubleshooting, scheduling), with an emphasis on control, auditability and brand voice. With its founders' pedigree and solid enterprise adoption, Sierra quickly became a leader in enterprise AI service/interaction, with a rapidly climbing valuation — around $10 billion in 2025, more than 40% of the Fortune 50 as customers, and ARR over $150 million.
whyItMatters: 创始人 Bret Taylor 光环 + 深厚企业软件经验
做「能真正办完事」的客服智能体，非玩具
企业 AI 交互赛道头部，估值飙升

products.name: Sierra 智能体平台
products.description: 接入企业系统、真正解决问题的对话智能体。

decagon.name: Decagon
decagon.oneLiner: AI 客服智能体新贵，自动化大规模客户支持。
decagon.oneLinerEn: A rising AI customer-service agent startup automating support at scale.
decagon.tagline: 让每次客户对话都完美
decagon.business: 面向企业的 AI 客服智能体平台，跨聊天/邮件/语音自动化大规模客户支持，能解决而非只是转接问题；服务电商、金融科技等高咨询量客户，增长迅猛。
decagon.businessEn: An enterprise AI customer-service agent platform that automates large-scale support across chat, email and voice, resolving issues rather than just routing them; it serves high-volume customers in e-commerce, fintech and beyond, and is growing fast.
decagon.description: Decagon 成立于 2023 年，专注「AI 客服智能体」：把企业的知识库、工单系统与业务流程接进来，让 AI 在聊天、邮件、语音里独立处理海量客户咨询——退换、账单、账户问题都能自己办完，把人工客服解放出来处理复杂个案。它在电商、金融科技等咨询量巨大的行业落地很快，是与 Sierra 并列的 AI 客服赛道新贵，融资与估值节节走高。
decagon.descriptionEn: Founded in 2023, Decagon focuses on "AI customer-service agents": it connects a company's knowledge base, ticketing system and business processes so AI can independently handle huge volumes of customer inquiries across chat, email and voice — resolving returns, billing and account issues on its own and freeing human agents for complex cases. It has deployed quickly in high-inquiry-volume industries like e-commerce and fintech, and stands alongside Sierra as a rising star in AI customer service, with steadily climbing funding and valuation.
whyItMatters: 跨渠道自动化大规模客服，降本显著
在高咨询量行业(电商/金融科技)落地快
AI 客服赛道新贵，增长迅猛

products.name: Decagon
products.description: 跨聊天/邮件/语音的客服智能体。

harvey.name: Harvey
harvey.oneLiner: 法律行业专用的 AI 智能体，顶级律所标配。
harvey.oneLinerEn: A legal-specialized AI agent that has become standard at top law firms.
harvey.business: 面向律所与企业法务的生成式 AI，处理合同起草/审查、法律检索、尽调、案卷分析等专业工作；与 OpenAI 深度合作、被大量顶级律所(如年利达、A&O 等)采用。
harvey.businessEn: Generative AI for law firms and in-house legal teams, handling contract drafting/review, legal research, due diligence and case-file analysis; it works closely with OpenAI and is used by many top law firms (such as Linklaters and A&O).
harvey.description: Harvey 成立于 2022 年，是法律垂直 AI 的领跑者：把大模型调教到能处理律师的真实工作——起草与审查合同、检索判例与法条、做并购尽调、分析海量案卷，并对准确性与保密要求做专门优化。它与 OpenAI 关系密切，被全球一批顶级律所与企业法务部门采用，是「专业服务 + AI」里商业化最成功的案例之一，估值快速攀升。
harvey.descriptionEn: Founded in 2022, Harvey is the leader in vertical legal AI: it tunes large models to handle lawyers' real work — drafting and reviewing contracts, researching case law and statutes, doing M&A due diligence, and analyzing massive case files — with special optimization for accuracy and confidentiality. Closely tied to OpenAI, it is used by a roster of top global law firms and corporate legal departments, one of the most commercially successful examples of "professional services + AI," with a rapidly rising valuation.
whyItMatters: 法律垂直 AI 领跑者，顶级律所标配
把大模型调到能做真实法律工作，准确/保密优先
「专业服务 + AI」商业化标杆

products.name: Harvey
products.description: 合同/检索/尽调/案卷分析的法律智能体。

hebbia.name: Hebbia
hebbia.oneLiner: 面向金融/专业服务的 AI 知识智能体。
hebbia.oneLinerEn: An AI knowledge agent for finance and professional services.
hebbia.tagline: 在你的文档上做真正的工作
hebbia.taglineEn: Do real work on your documents
hebbia.business: Matrix 平台对海量文档做深度检索与分析——像给分析师配一个能同时读上万页材料、逐条给出带出处答案的 AI，主攻投行、私募、资管、法律等文档密集型专业场景。
hebbia.businessEn: Its Matrix platform performs deep retrieval and analysis over huge document sets — like giving an analyst an AI that can read tens of thousands of pages at once and answer point by point with citations — aimed at document-heavy professional work in investment banking, private equity, asset management and law.
hebbia.description: Hebbia 成立于 2020 年，做的是「专业服务的文档智能」：它的 Matrix 平台能让 AI 同时读入成千上万页的招股书、财报、合同、研报，按用户的问题逐条抽取、比对并给出带引用的结构化答案，就像给投行分析师、PE 尽调团队配了一支不知疲倦的助手。相比通用问答，它更强调可追溯与深度分析，是金融与专业服务领域 AI 落地的代表，获 a16z 等投资。
hebbia.descriptionEn: Founded in 2020, Hebbia does "document intelligence for professional services": its Matrix platform lets AI ingest thousands of pages of prospectuses, financial reports, contracts and research at once, then extract, compare and answer point by point with cited, structured output — like giving investment-banking analysts and PE due-diligence teams a tireless assistant. Compared with general Q&A, it emphasizes traceability and deep analysis, and is a leading example of AI adoption in finance and professional services, backed by a16z and others.
whyItMatters: 让 AI 同时读上万页并逐条给带出处答案，深度分析
主攻投行/PE/资管等高价值文档密集场景
可追溯、可审计，契合专业服务合规要求

products.name: Matrix
products.description: 海量文档深度检索与结构化分析。

characterai.name: Character.AI
characterai.oneLiner: AI 角色扮演聊天平台，用户黏性极高。
characterai.oneLinerEn: An AI roleplay chat platform with exceptionally high user engagement.
characterai.business: 可自定义 AI 角色的对话娱乐平台，用户可创建或与海量虚拟角色聊天，主打陪伴与娱乐，日均使用时长远超一般聊天助手。2024 年创始团队(Transformer 论文作者 Noam Shazeer 等)与部分技术授权给谷歌，Shazeer 回归谷歌。
characterai.businessEn: A conversational entertainment platform with customizable AI characters, where users create or chat with a vast library of virtual personas for companionship and fun, with daily usage far exceeding a typical chat assistant. In 2024 its founding team (including Transformer co-author Noam Shazeer) and a technology license went to Google, and Shazeer returned to Google.
characterai.description: Character.AI 由 Transformer 论文共同作者 Noam Shazeer 与 Daniel De Freitas 于 2021 年创立，做的是「与虚拟角色对话」——用户可以和名人、动漫角色、历史人物乃至自建角色聊天，主打情感陪伴与娱乐。它的用户黏性极高，年轻用户日均停留时间远超一般 AI 助手，是「AI 陪伴」这一品类的代表。2024 年 8 月，谷歌以约 27 亿美元达成技术授权协议并请回 Shazeer 与 De Freitas 回归 DeepMind，公司继续独立运营消费产品(Karandeep Anand 出任 CEO)；这笔「绕过收购」的交易引来美国司法部反垄断关注。产品高黏性的同时也深陷未成年人保护争议——多起青少年自杀/心理伤害诉讼(如佛州 Megan Garcia 案)于 2026 年 1 月与谷歌一并达成和解。
characterai.descriptionEn: Character.AI was founded in 2021 by Transformer co-authors Noam Shazeer and Daniel De Freitas to enable "conversations with virtual characters" — users chat with celebrities, anime characters, historical figures or their own creations, centered on emotional companionship and entertainment. Its engagement is exceptionally high, with young users spending far more time daily than on a typical AI assistant, making it the face of the "AI companion" category. In August 2024 Google struck a roughly $2.7 billion technology-licensing deal and brought Shazeer and De Freitas back to DeepMind, while the company kept running its consumer product independently (with Karandeep Anand as CEO); this "acquisition-bypassing" structure drew antitrust scrutiny from the U.S. Department of Justice. Alongside that high engagement, it has been mired in child-safety controversy — several teen suicide/mental-harm lawsuits (such as Florida's Megan Garcia case) were settled together with Google in January 2026.
whyItMatters: 定义「AI 陪伴/角色扮演」品类，用户黏性行业最高
创始人是 Transformer 论文作者，技术底子深厚
谷歌授权交易是「人才+技术回流巨头」的典型案例
AI 陪伴的伦理与未成年保护议题的焦点

products.name: Character.AI
products.description: 与海量虚拟角色聊天，可自建角色。

canva.name: Canva
canva.oneLiner: 全球最大在线设计平台，深度接入 AI。
canva.oneLinerEn: The world's largest online design platform, deeply infused with AI.
canva.business: 拖拽式在线平面设计平台，海量模板 + Magic Studio 系列生成式 AI(文生图、AI 改写、一键设计、背景消除、Magic Design 等)，服务数亿非专业用户与企业团队；并收购图像生成公司 Leonardo.Ai 强化 AI 能力。
canva.businessEn: A drag-and-drop online graphic-design platform with vast templates plus the Magic Studio generative-AI suite (text-to-image, AI rewriting, one-click design, background removal, Magic Design), serving hundreds of millions of non-professional users and enterprise teams; it acquired image-generation company Leonardo.Ai to strengthen its AI.
canva.description: Canva 成立于 2013 年(澳大利亚)，用「拖拽 + 模板」把平面设计的门槛降到零，让完全没有设计功底的人也能做出海报、PPT、社媒图。近年 Canva 把生成式 AI 全面装进产品——Magic Studio 提供文生图、AI 文案改写、一键排版、背景移除、把草图变设计等，还收购了图像生成公司 Leonardo.Ai。它服务全球数亿用户与大量企业团队，是「AI 普惠创意」的代表，也是 Adobe 在中小企业与个人市场最强的挑战者。
canva.descriptionEn: Founded in Australia in 2013, Canva dropped the barrier to graphic design to zero with "drag-and-drop + templates," letting people with no design background create posters, slide decks and social graphics. In recent years Canva has built generative AI throughout the product — Magic Studio offers text-to-image, AI copy rewriting, one-click layout, background removal and turning sketches into designs — and it acquired image-generation company Leonardo.Ai. Serving hundreds of millions of users and many enterprise teams worldwide, it is a poster child for "democratized creativity with AI" and Adobe's strongest challenger in the SMB and individual market.
whyItMatters: 全球最大在线设计平台，数亿用户的创意入口
Magic Studio 把生成式 AI 铺给普通人，普惠创意
收购 Leonardo.Ai 补强底层图像生成能力
在中小企业/个人市场强力挑战 Adobe

products.name: Canva 设计平台
products.description: 拖拽 + 海量模板的平面设计。

products.name: Magic Studio
products.description: 文生图/改写/一键设计等 AI 套件。

notion.name: Notion
notion.oneLiner: 全能协作文档/知识库，深度嵌入 AI。
notion.oneLinerEn: An all-in-one collaborative docs/knowledge base with AI built deeply in.
notion.tagline: 一个工具，连接你的团队与知识
notion.taglineEn: One tool to connect your team and knowledge
notion.business: 把文档、知识库、数据库、项目管理揉进一个灵活「积木」式工作空间；Notion AI 提供写作、总结、跨库问答与自动化智能体，让 AI 直接在你的工作数据上干活。深受初创团队与知识工作者欢迎。
notion.businessEn: Blends documents, knowledge bases, databases and project management into one flexible "building-block" workspace; Notion AI provides writing, summarization, cross-database Q&A and automation agents so AI works directly on your work data. It is a favorite of startups and knowledge workers.
notion.description: Notion 成立于 2013 年，用「一切皆积木(block)」的理念把笔记、文档、维基、数据库、看板等整合进一个高度自定义的工作空间，几乎能搭出任何团队工具。Notion AI 把大模型直接嵌进这套工作数据里——写作与润色、长文总结、跨页面/数据库问答、以及能自动执行任务的智能体，让 AI 在「你自己的知识与项目上下文」里工作，而不是空对空。它在初创公司、设计与产品团队、内容创作者中黏性极高，是「AI 原生办公」的代表之一。
notion.descriptionEn: Founded in 2013, Notion uses an "everything is a block" philosophy to combine notes, docs, wikis, databases and boards into a highly customizable workspace that can build almost any team tool. Notion AI embeds large models directly into that work data — writing and polishing, long-document summarization, cross-page/database Q&A, and agents that execute tasks — so AI works within "your own knowledge and project context" rather than in a vacuum. It has extremely high stickiness among startups, design and product teams, and content creators, and is a standard-bearer for "AI-native productivity."
whyItMatters: 把文档/知识库/数据库/项目融为一体，团队工作底座
Notion AI 在你自己的数据上工作，上下文即护城河
在初创与知识工作者中黏性极高，社区生态繁荣
「AI 原生办公」的标杆产品之一

products.name: Notion
products.description: 积木式文档/数据库/项目一体化。

products.name: Notion AI
products.description: 写作/总结/跨库问答与智能体。

grammarly.name: Grammarly
grammarly.oneLiner: AI 写作辅助龙头，向全场景 AI 助手升级。
grammarly.oneLinerEn: The AI writing-assistance leader, evolving into an everywhere AI assistant.
grammarly.business: 跨浏览器/应用的实时写作辅助——语法、拼写、语气、清晰度与改写建议，并升级为能在任意应用里帮你起草与改写的生成式 AI 助手；数千万日活用户，覆盖大量企业。近年收购邮件客户端 Superhuman，扩展生产力版图。
grammarly.businessEn: Real-time writing assistance across browsers and apps — grammar, spelling, tone, clarity and rewriting suggestions — upgraded into a generative-AI assistant that drafts and rewrites in any app; tens of millions of daily active users across many enterprises. It recently acquired the email client Superhuman to expand its productivity footprint.
grammarly.description: Grammarly 成立于 2009 年，最早以「实时语法/拼写纠错」出名，几乎随处可用(浏览器插件、桌面、移动、各类应用内)。随着大模型兴起，它从「纠错」升级为「生成式写作助手」——改写、调整语气、扩写缩写、按场景生成草稿，让每个知识工作者随身带一个写作 AI。它拥有数千万日活与大量企业客户，并通过收购高效邮件客户端 Superhuman 等拓展到更广的办公生产力场景，是「AI 无处不在地帮你写」的代表。
grammarly.descriptionEn: Founded in 2009, Grammarly first became known for real-time grammar/spelling correction available almost everywhere (browser extension, desktop, mobile, inside all kinds of apps). As large models rose, it upgraded from "correction" to a "generative writing assistant" — rewriting, adjusting tone, expanding or condensing, and drafting for specific contexts — giving every knowledge worker a writing AI at hand. With tens of millions of daily active users and many enterprise customers, and through acquisitions like the fast email client Superhuman, it has expanded into broader office productivity, a standard-bearer for "AI helping you write everywhere."
whyItMatters: 随处可用的写作辅助，数千万日活的高频入口
从纠错升级为生成式写作助手，场景大幅扩张
深入企业沟通场景，B 端付费稳健
收购 Superhuman 等，向全场景生产力扩张

products.name: Grammarly 写作助手
products.description: 跨应用实时语法/语气/改写建议。

products.name: 生成式改写
products.description: 按场景起草与改写内容。

sanctuary.name: Sanctuary AI
sanctuary.oneLiner: 加拿大人形机器人公司，主打灵巧手操作。
sanctuary.business: Phoenix 人形机器人与 Carbon 控制系统，强调类人灵巧操作。

fourier.name: 傅利叶
fourier.oneLiner: 中国人形与康复机器人公司。
fourier.oneLinerEn: A Chinese company making humanoid and rehabilitation robots.
fourier.tagline: 以机器人赋能人类健康与生产
fourier.taglineEn: Robotics for human health and productivity
fourier.business: GR 系列通用人形机器人与康复机器人，产学结合落地。
fourier.businessEn: The GR series of general-purpose humanoids plus rehabilitation robots, with strong academia-industry ties.
fourier.description: 傅利叶(Fourier Intelligence)成立于 2015 年(上海),最早以康复机器人(外骨骼、上下肢康复训练设备)在医疗领域打开市场,积累了运动控制与人机交互经验。近年它把这些能力延伸到通用人形机器人,推出 GR-1、GR-2 等全尺寸人形,面向科研、教育与工业等场景,并开放平台供开发者做二次开发。相比纯科技新贵,傅利叶的差异化在于「医疗康复 + 通用人形」双线,以及扎实的运动控制积累,是中国人形机器人赛道产学结合的代表之一。
fourier.descriptionEn: Fourier Intelligence was founded in 2015 in Shanghai and first broke into the medical market with rehabilitation robots (exoskeletons and upper/lower-limb rehab training devices), building expertise in motion control and human-robot interaction. In recent years it has extended these capabilities to general-purpose humanoids, launching full-size robots like the GR-1 and GR-2 for research, education and industrial use, and opening its platform for developer customization. Unlike pure tech upstarts, Fourier's differentiation is its dual focus on "medical rehab + general humanoids" and solid motion-control heritage, making it a representative of academia-industry collaboration in China's humanoid space.
whyItMatters: 康复机器人起家,运动控制与人机交互积累深
延伸到 GR 系列全尺寸通用人形
「医疗康复 + 通用人形」双线差异化
开放平台供开发者二次开发

mbly.name: Mobileye
mbly.oneLiner: 自动驾驶视觉与芯片老牌龙头（英特尔控股）。
mbly.oneLinerEn: A veteran leader in autonomous-driving vision and chips (Intel-controlled).
mbly.business: EyeQ 视觉芯片与 ADAS/自动驾驶方案，供货全球主流车企。
mbly.businessEn: EyeQ vision chips and ADAS/autonomous-driving solutions, supplied to major global automakers.
mbly.description: Mobileye 成立于 1999 年(以色列),是辅助驾驶(ADAS)与自动驾驶视觉的老牌龙头,由 Amnon Shashua 创立,2017 年被英特尔收购、后分拆上市但仍由英特尔控股。它的 EyeQ 系列视觉芯片装在全球数亿辆车上,是「用摄像头看懂路况」的行业标准供应商;并向上延伸出更完整的 SuperVision(高阶辅助)与 Chauffeur/Drive(L3-L4)方案。面对特斯拉、英伟达与端到端新势力的冲击,Mobileye 凭借庞大的车企客户与量产经验守住基本盘,是传统「渐进式」智驾路线的代表。
mbly.descriptionEn: Founded in 1999 in Israel by Amnon Shashua, Mobileye is a veteran leader in ADAS and autonomous-driving vision; it was acquired by Intel in 2017 and later spun out via IPO while remaining Intel-controlled. Its EyeQ vision chips are in hundreds of millions of vehicles worldwide — the standard supplier for "cameras understanding the road" — and it has extended into more complete SuperVision (advanced assist) and Chauffeur/Drive (L3-L4) solutions. Facing pressure from Tesla, NVIDIA and end-to-end upstarts, Mobileye holds its base with a huge automaker customer roster and mass-production experience, representing the traditional "incremental" path to autonomy.
whyItMatters: EyeQ 视觉芯片装在全球数亿辆车上
「用摄像头看懂路况」的行业标准供应商
向上延伸 SuperVision 与 L3-L4 方案
庞大车企客户+量产经验,渐进式智驾代表

aurora.name: Aurora
aurora.oneLiner: 自动驾驶卡车领先者，已开启无人商运。
aurora.oneLinerEn: A leader in autonomous trucking that has launched driverless commercial operations.
aurora.tagline: 安全地推动运输的未来
aurora.taglineEn: Delivering the benefits of self-driving safely
aurora.business: Aurora Driver 自动驾驶系统，率先在美国德州开展无人重卡货运。
aurora.businessEn: The Aurora Driver autonomous system, first to run driverless heavy-truck freight on U.S. public roads in Texas.
aurora.description: Aurora Innovation 由前谷歌自动驾驶、特斯拉 Autopilot、Uber ATG 的核心人物创立,专攻自动驾驶卡车。2025 年它在得州(达拉斯—沃斯堡—休斯顿、后扩展至埃尔帕索)率先开启美国公共道路上的无人重卡商业货运,累计无人里程快速突破数十万英里。其核心 Aurora Driver 结合自研 FirstLight 长距激光雷达,主攻高速公路干线货运这一相对结构化、商业价值高的场景。公司计划 2026 年底把无人卡车扩到 200 辆以上、并追求毛利转正,是自动驾驶「先落地货运」路线的领跑者。
aurora.descriptionEn: Aurora Innovation was founded by core figures from Google's self-driving program, Tesla Autopilot and Uber ATG, focusing on autonomous trucking. In 2025 it became first to launch driverless heavy-truck commercial freight on U.S. public roads in Texas (Dallas-Fort Worth-Houston, later extended to El Paso), rapidly surpassing hundreds of thousands of cumulative driverless miles. Its Aurora Driver combines an in-house long-range FirstLight lidar and targets highway line-haul freight — a relatively structured, high-value use case. The company plans to expand to more than 200 driverless trucks by the end of 2026 and reach positive gross margin, leading the "freight-first" path to autonomy.
whyItMatters: 2025 率先在美公共道路开启无人重卡商运
Aurora Driver + 自研 FirstLight 长距激光雷达
主攻高速干线货运,结构化、商业价值高
2026 底目标 200+ 无人卡车、毛利转正

wayve.name: Wayve
wayve.oneLiner: 端到端学习的自动驾驶英国新锐。
wayve.oneLinerEn: A British upstart pursuing end-to-end learned autonomous driving.
wayve.taglineEn: Teaching vehicles to drive by learning
wayve.business: 用端到端 AI(无高精地图)做通用自动驾驶，获软银、英伟达投资。
wayve.businessEn: End-to-end AI (no HD maps) for general-purpose autonomous driving, backed by SoftBank and NVIDIA.
wayve.description: Wayve 成立于 2017 年(英国伦敦),是「端到端学习驾驶(AV2.0)」路线的代表:不依赖高精地图与大量手写规则,而是像人一样通过神经网络从视频数据里学会开车,因此理论上能快速泛化到新城市、新国家。它把自己定位为「嵌入式自动驾驶软件」供应商,授权给车企装进量产车,而非自营车队。2026 年 2 月完成 12 亿美元 D 轮,投后估值约 86 亿美元,投资方包括软银、微软、英伟达、Uber 及奔驰/日产/Stellantis 等车企,还获 AMD/Arm/高通追加投资,是欧洲最受瞩目的自动驾驶公司。
wayve.descriptionEn: Founded in 2017 in London, Wayve is the standard-bearer for "end-to-end learned driving (AV2.0)": rather than relying on HD maps and extensive hand-written rules, it learns to drive from video data through neural networks like a human, so it can in principle generalize quickly to new cities and countries. It positions itself as an "embedded self-driving software" supplier, licensing to automakers for production cars rather than running its own fleet. In February 2026 it closed a $1.2 billion Series D at about an $8.6 billion post-money valuation, with investors including SoftBank, Microsoft, NVIDIA, Uber and automakers Mercedes-Benz/Nissan/Stellantis, plus follow-on investment from AMD/Arm/Qualcomm — Europe's most watched autonomous-driving company.
whyItMatters: 端到端学习驾驶(AV2.0),不依赖高精地图
从视频学会开车,理论上快速泛化到新市场
定位嵌入式软件供应商,授权车企量产
2026 D 轮 12 亿、估值约 86 亿美元,阵容豪华

nuro.name: Nuro
nuro.oneLiner: 无人配送车先驱，转向授权自动驾驶。
nuro.oneLinerEn: A delivery-robot pioneer that pivoted to licensing its autonomy stack.
nuro.business: 自研 Nuro Driver，从无人配送转向对外授权 L4 自动驾驶方案。
nuro.businessEn: The in-house Nuro Driver; it pivoted from delivery robots to licensing its L4 autonomy stack.
nuro.description: Nuro 由两位前谷歌自动驾驶工程师于 2016 年创立,最早以低速无人配送小车出名(在城市街道送货)。但自营配送车队难以规模化盈利,Nuro 因此战略转向:把精力集中到核心的 Nuro Driver 自动驾驶系统上,改走「对外授权」模式——把这套能在城市道路行驶、可适配多种车型的 L4 方案授权给车企、出行与配送平台,而不再自己运营车队。这一转型让它在自动驾驶行业整合期以「卖技术」的轻资产路线重新定位,并获新融资支持。
nuro.descriptionEn: Nuro was founded in 2016 by two former Google self-driving engineers and first became known for low-speed delivery robots (delivering goods on city streets). But running its own delivery fleet was hard to scale profitably, so Nuro pivoted strategically: concentrating on its core Nuro Driver autonomy system and shifting to a "licensing" model — licensing its L4 stack, which can drive on city streets and adapt to many vehicle types, to automakers and mobility/delivery platforms rather than operating its own fleet. The pivot repositions it with an asset-light "sell the technology" approach during the AV industry's consolidation, backed by fresh funding.
whyItMatters: 无人配送车先驱,曾在城市街道送货
自营车队难规模化,转向 Nuro Driver 授权
L4 方案可适配多车型,授权车企/出行/配送
行业整合期以「卖技术」轻资产重新定位

xaira.name: Xaira
xaira.oneLiner: 重金起步的 AI 药物发现公司。
xaira.business: 由 ARCH 等重金孵化，用生成式 AI 与大规模实验做新药发现。

evoscale.name: EvolutionaryScale
evoscale.oneLiner: 蛋白质大语言模型 ESM3 的开发商。
evoscale.business: ESM 系列蛋白质语言模型，能生成全新蛋白，原 Meta FAIR 团队创立。

minimax.name: MiniMax
minimax.oneLiner: 中国大模型独角兽，海螺 AI 与视频生成出圈。
minimax.oneLinerEn: A Chinese large-model unicorn, breaking out with the Hailuo assistant and video generation.
minimax.business: 自研大模型与海螺 AI 助手、Hailuo 视频生成，出海表现亮眼。
minimax.businessEn: In-house large models, the Hailuo AI assistant and Hailuo video generation, with strong traction in overseas markets.
minimax.description: MiniMax 由前商汤科技高管闫俊杰于 2021 年创立，是中国「AI 六小龙」之一，背后有阿里、腾讯、红杉中国等投资。它走「全模态 + 出海」路线：自研文本大模型 MiniMax M 系列(最新 M2.1 强化编程)，消费端有海螺 AI 助手，以及在海外爆火的 Hailuo 文/图生视频——被黄仁勋点名称赞为「世界级」。2026 年 1 月 9 日，MiniMax 在港交所上市，IPO 募资约 5.4 亿美元，首日大涨约 109% 至 345 港元，估值约 137 亿美元，是这波中国 AI 公司赴港上市潮的代表之一。
minimax.descriptionEn: MiniMax was founded in 2021 by former SenseTime executive Yan Junjie and is one of China's "six AI tigers," backed by Alibaba, Tencent and HongShan (Sequoia China). It follows an "all-modality + global" path: its in-house MiniMax M-series text models (the latest M2.1 strengthens coding), the consumer Hailuo AI assistant, and the overseas-hit Hailuo text/image-to-video product — which NVIDIA's Jensen Huang singled out as "world-class." On January 9, 2026, MiniMax listed in Hong Kong, raising about $538 million; its shares jumped roughly 109% on debut to HK$345, valuing it at about $13.7 billion — a flagship of the wave of Chinese AI companies going public in Hong Kong.
whyItMatters: Hailuo 视频生成海外出圈，被黄仁勋称「世界级」
全模态布局：文本 M 系列 + 海螺助手 + 视频
2026.1 港交所上市，首日大涨 109%、估值约 137 亿美元
中国「AI 六小龙」之一，阿里腾讯红杉加持

zhipu.name: 智谱 AI
zhipu.oneLiner: 清华系大模型公司，GLM 系列，全球首家上市的大模型公司。
zhipu.oneLinerEn: The Tsinghua-rooted GLM model company — the world's first listed large-language-model company.
zhipu.taglineEn: Teaching machines to think like humans
zhipu.subcategory: GLM 系列 / 企业应用
zhipu.business: GLM 系列大模型与企业应用，中国「AI 六小龙」之一。
zhipu.businessEn: The GLM family of large models and enterprise applications — one of China's "six AI tigers."
zhipu.description: 智谱 AI(国际品牌 Z.ai)脱胎于清华大学知识工程实验室(KEG)，2019 年成立，是中国「AI 六小龙」中学术血统最纯的一家。其 GLM 系列快速迭代(GLM-4.5/4.6/4.7 到 2026 年的 GLM-5/5.1)，在开源与编程/智能体能力上口碑领先，被广泛用于企业与开发者。2026 年 1 月 8 日，智谱在港交所上市(股票代码 2513)，成为全球首家上市的纯大模型公司，IPO 估值约 70 亿美元；上市后因散户狂热，股价一度暴涨十几倍到二十几倍，市值一度冲上约 1000 亿美元量级(涨幅与市值均属高度投机、波动极大)。2025 年营收约 72.4 亿元人民币、同比增长 132%，但仍处大额亏损。
zhipu.descriptionEn: Zhipu AI (international brand Z.ai) grew out of Tsinghua University's Knowledge Engineering Group (KEG) lab and was founded in 2019, making it the most academically rooted of China's "six AI tigers." Its GLM series iterates rapidly (GLM-4.5/4.6/4.7 through GLM-5/5.1 in 2026), with a strong reputation for open weights and coding/agentic capability, widely used by enterprises and developers. On January 8, 2026, Zhipu listed in Hong Kong (ticker 2513), becoming the world's first listed pure large-model company, at an IPO valuation of about $7 billion; after listing, a retail frenzy sent the stock up more than ten- to twenty-fold, briefly pushing its market cap to the ~$100 billion range (a highly speculative, extremely volatile move). Its 2025 revenue was about RMB 7.24 billion, up 132% year over year, though it remained deeply loss-making.
whyItMatters: 全球首家上市的纯大模型公司(港股 2513)
清华 KEG 血统，GLM 系列开源与编程能力领先
上市后散户狂热，市值一度冲上千亿美元(高度投机)
中国「AI 六小龙」学术派代表

stepfun.name: 阶跃星辰
stepfun.oneLiner: 中国多模态大模型公司。
stepfun.oneLinerEn: A Chinese frontier lab focused on multimodal large models.
stepfun.business: Step 系列多模态大模型，主打万亿参数与多模态能力。
stepfun.businessEn: The Step series of multimodal large models, emphasizing trillion-parameter scale and multimodal capability.
stepfun.description: 阶跃星辰(StepFun)由前微软全球副总裁姜大昕于 2023 年创立，是中国「AI 六小龙」中最强调「全模态」的一家。其 Step 系列覆盖语言、图像、语音与视频：万亿参数的 Step-2 语言模型、Step-Video 视频生成、Step-Audio 语音等，主打「一个团队做全模态」。公司在多模态基准上表现突出，背后有腾讯等投资方，走「模型能力 + 终端/Agent 落地」的路线，是中国多模态大模型的代表玩家之一。
stepfun.descriptionEn: StepFun was founded in 2023 by Jiang Daxin, a former corporate vice president at Microsoft, and is the most "all-modality"-focused of China's "six AI tigers." Its Step series spans language, image, speech and video: the trillion-parameter Step-2 language model, Step-Video generation, Step-Audio, and more, built around one team covering all modalities. The company performs strongly on multimodal benchmarks, is backed by investors including Tencent, and follows a "model capability + device/agent deployment" path — one of China's leading multimodal model players.
whyItMatters: 全模态布局：语言/图像/语音/视频一个团队做
万亿参数 Step-2，多模态基准表现突出
创始人姜大昕出身微软，团队实力强
中国「AI 六小龙」多模态代表

sensetime.name: 商汤科技
sensetime.oneLiner: 中国 AI 视觉与大模型老牌公司。
sensetime.oneLinerEn: A veteran Chinese AI company spanning computer vision and large models.
sensetime.tagline: 坚持原创，让 AI 引领人类进步
sensetime.taglineEn: Advancing human progress through original AI research
sensetime.business: 计算机视觉起家，日日新(SenseNova)大模型与 AI 算力基础设施。
sensetime.businessEn: Rooted in computer vision, now offering the SenseNova large-model family and AI compute infrastructure.
sensetime.description: 商汤科技 2014 年由汤晓鸥教授团队(港中文)创立，是中国最早的「AI 视觉四小龙」之一，2021 年在港交所上市(0020)。它以人脸识别、智慧城市、自动驾驶感知等计算机视觉业务起家，近年重心转向生成式 AI：自研「日日新(SenseNova)」大模型家族，并把早年积累的大规模算力基础设施(SenseCore 大装置)对外提供 AI 算力服务。作为老牌 AI 公司，商汤在模型、算力与行业落地上都有布局，但也长期面临盈利压力与美国实体清单限制。
sensetime.descriptionEn: SenseTime was founded in 2014 by a team led by CUHK professor Tang Xiao'ou and is one of China's original "four AI-vision dragons," listing in Hong Kong in 2021 (0020). It began in computer vision — face recognition, smart cities, autonomous-driving perception — and has recently shifted focus to generative AI: it develops the SenseNova large-model family and offers AI compute services through its large-scale SenseCore infrastructure built up over years. As a veteran AI company, SenseTime spans models, compute and industry deployment, but has long faced profitability pressure and U.S. Entity List restrictions.
whyItMatters: 中国「AI 视觉四小龙」老牌代表，港股上市
日日新 SenseNova 大模型 + SenseCore 算力大装置
从视觉转向生成式 AI，模型/算力/落地全布局
长期面临盈利压力与美国实体清单限制

iflytek.name: 科大讯飞
iflytek.oneLiner: 中国智能语音龙头，星火大模型。
iflytek.oneLinerEn: China's speech-AI leader, maker of the Spark (Xinghuo) large model.
iflytek.tagline: 用人工智能建设美好世界
iflytek.taglineEn: Building a better world with artificial intelligence
iflytek.subcategory: 语音 / 翻译 / 教育
iflytek.business: 智能语音、翻译与教育硬件，讯飞星火大模型自研自主可控。
iflytek.businessEn: Speech AI, translation and education hardware, with the self-developed, self-controlled iFlytek Spark large model.
iflytek.description: 科大讯飞成立于 1999 年，源自中国科学技术大学，是中国智能语音与语言技术的绝对龙头，深交所上市(002230)。它长期主导语音识别、语音合成、机器翻译等核心技术，产品深入教育(学习机)、办公(录音笔/会议转写)、医疗、智慧城市等场景。生成式 AI 时代，讯飞推出「讯飞星火」大模型，并强调基于国产算力(如华为昇腾)的自主可控训练，是国产大模型「自主链条」的代表之一。教育硬件与 To B/To G 业务是其重要基本盘。
iflytek.descriptionEn: Founded in 1999 and spun out of the University of Science and Technology of China, iFlytek is the dominant leader in Chinese speech and language technology, listed in Shenzhen (002230). It has long led speech recognition, speech synthesis and machine translation, with products embedded in education (learning devices), office work (voice recorders/meeting transcription), healthcare and smart cities. In the generative-AI era it launched the iFlytek Spark large model, emphasizing self-controlled training on domestic compute (such as Huawei Ascend), making it a standard-bearer for China's "self-sufficient" model stack. Education hardware and B2B/B2G business form its core base.
whyItMatters: 中国智能语音绝对龙头，技术积淀深厚
讯飞星火大模型 + 国产昇腾算力，自主可控
教育/办公/医疗硬件落地广，商业化扎实
国产大模型「自主链条」代表之一

cambricon.name: 寒武纪
cambricon.oneLiner: 中国 AI 芯片第一股，思元系列。
cambricon.oneLinerEn: China's "first AI-chip stock," maker of the Siyuan (MLU) series.
cambricon.tagline: 让机器更好地理解世界
cambricon.taglineEn: Helping machines better understand the world
cambricon.business: 思元(MLU)系列 AI 训练/推理芯片，国产算力替代核心标的。
cambricon.businessEn: The Siyuan (MLU) series of AI training/inference chips — a core beneficiary of China's push for domestic compute.
cambricon.description: 寒武纪由陈天石、陈云霁兄弟(中科院背景)于 2016 年创立，是中国 AI 芯片的旗帜企业，2020 年登陆科创板、被称为「AI 芯片第一股」(688256)。其思元(MLU)系列覆盖训练与推理加速卡，是英伟达在中国受出口管制后最受关注的国产替代标的之一。随着国产算力需求爆发，寒武纪股价在 2024–2025 年大幅上涨、一度成为 A 股最贵股票之一(股价冲上千元级)，并于 2025 财年实现上市以来首次全年盈利、拟首次分红。它是「国产算力自主」叙事的核心受益者，但也伴随高估值与高波动。
cambricon.descriptionEn: Cambricon was founded in 2016 by brothers Chen Tianshi and Chen Yunji (with roots in the Chinese Academy of Sciences) and is a flagship of China's AI-chip industry; it listed on the STAR Market in 2020 as the country's "first AI-chip stock" (688256). Its Siyuan (MLU) series spans training and inference accelerators and is among the most closely watched domestic alternatives after NVIDIA faced export controls in China. As demand for domestic compute exploded, Cambricon's shares soared in 2024–2025 — briefly one of the most expensive A-shares (topping RMB 1,000 per share) — and it posted its first full-year profit since listing in fiscal 2025, planning a maiden dividend. It is a core beneficiary of the "domestic compute self-sufficiency" story, though with high valuation and volatility.
whyItMatters: 中国「AI 芯片第一股」，国产替代标杆
思元系列覆盖训练/推理，受益出口管制下的国产需求
2024–2025 股价暴涨，一度成 A 股最贵股票之一
2025 财年首次全年盈利、拟首次分红

moorethreads.name: 摩尔线程
moorethreads.oneLiner: 国产全功能 GPU 新锐，「中国英伟达」。
moorethreads.oneLinerEn: A rising Chinese full-function GPU maker dubbed "China's NVIDIA."
moorethreads.tagline: 打造中国人自己的全功能 GPU
moorethreads.business: 自研全功能 GPU(MTT 系列)，覆盖 AI 计算与图形，冲刺国产替代。
moorethreads.businessEn: In-house full-function GPUs (the MTT series) spanning AI compute and graphics, racing to become a domestic alternative.
moorethreads.description: 摩尔线程由英伟达中国区前总经理张建中于 2020 年创立，主打「全功能 GPU」——同一颗芯片兼顾 AI 计算、图形渲染、视频编解码与科学计算，对标英伟达完整能力，因此常被称为「中国英伟达」。其 MTT 系列 GPU 面向数据中心 AI 训练/推理与图形工作站。2025 年 12 月 5 日，摩尔线程登陆科创板(688795)、募资约 11 亿美元，首日暴涨逾 400%、收于 600.5 元(发行价 114.28 元的五倍多)，成为国产 GPU IPO 热潮的标志性事件之一。
moorethreads.descriptionEn: Moore Threads was founded in 2020 by Zhang Jianzhong, former general manager of NVIDIA China, and focuses on "full-function GPUs" — a single chip handling AI compute, graphics rendering, video codec and scientific computing, mirroring NVIDIA's full capability, which is why it is often called "China's NVIDIA." Its MTT-series GPUs target data-center AI training/inference and graphics workstations. On December 5, 2025, Moore Threads listed on the STAR Market (688795), raising about $1.1 billion; it jumped more than 400% on debut to close at RMB 600.5 (over five times its RMB 114.28 IPO price), a landmark of the domestic-GPU IPO frenzy.
whyItMatters: 全功能 GPU 对标英伟达完整能力，「中国英伟达」
创始人张建中是英伟达中国前总经理，团队豪华
2025.12 科创板上市，首日暴涨逾 400%
国产 GPU 替代与算力自主的热门标的

biren.name: 壁仞科技
biren.oneLiner: 国产高端 GPGPU 新锐，2026 港股首个 AI 芯片 IPO。
biren.oneLinerEn: A rising Chinese high-end GPGPU maker — Hong Kong's first AI-chip IPO of 2026.
biren.tagline: 为通用计算打造国产 GPU
biren.business: 壁砺(BR)系列通用 GPU，面向 AI 训练与通用计算。
biren.businessEn: The Bili (BR) series of general-purpose GPUs, aimed at AI training and general compute.
biren.description: 壁仞科技由张文于 2019 年在上海创立，专注高端通用 GPU(GPGPU)，其壁砺(BR)系列面向数据中心 AI 训练与通用计算，是国产大算力 GPU 的第一梯队之一。在美国出口管制、国产替代加速的背景下，壁仞成为资本追捧对象：2026 年 1 月 2 日，它率先登陆港交所、募资约 7.17 亿美元，成为 2026 年香港首个 AI 芯片 IPO，首日大涨约 76%(发行价 19.60 港元、收 34.46 港元)，为这一轮国产芯片上市潮打响头炮。
biren.descriptionEn: Biren Technology was founded in Shanghai in 2019 by Zhang Wen, focusing on high-end general-purpose GPUs (GPGPUs); its Bili (BR) series targets data-center AI training and general compute, placing it among the front rank of domestic high-performance GPUs. Amid U.S. export controls and accelerating import substitution, Biren became a capital-markets favorite: on January 2, 2026 it was first to list in Hong Kong, raising about $717 million as 2026's first AI-chip IPO, and surged roughly 76% on debut (from a HK$19.60 offer to close at HK$34.46), firing the opening shot of this wave of domestic-chip listings.
whyItMatters: 国产高端 GPGPU 第一梯队，面向 AI 训练
2026 香港首个 AI 芯片 IPO，首日大涨约 76%
出口管制下国产大算力替代的热门标的
打响 2026 国产芯片赴港上市潮头炮

hygon.name: 海光信息
hygon.oneLiner: 国产 CPU + DCU 加速卡厂商。
hygon.oneLinerEn: A Chinese maker of domestic x86 CPUs and DCU accelerators.
hygon.business: x86 CPU 与 DCU(深度计算单元)加速卡，国产算力重要一极。
hygon.businessEn: x86 CPUs and DCU (Deep Computing Unit) accelerators — an important pillar of domestic compute.
hygon.description: 海光信息成立于 2014 年，是国产 CPU 与 AI 加速卡的重要玩家，2022 年登陆科创板(688041)。其 x86 服务器 CPU 早年基于与 AMD 的授权合作起步，广泛用于国产服务器；DCU(深度计算单元)是其面向 AI 训练/推理的 GPGPU 加速卡，兼容主流生态、便于迁移，是英伟达受限背景下的国产替代选项之一。海光与中科曙光(Sugon)同属中科系、关系紧密，2025 年一度推进吸收合并以整合「芯片+整机+算力」，是国产自主可控算力链条的关键一环。
hygon.descriptionEn: Founded in 2014, Hygon is a key player in domestic CPUs and AI accelerators, listing on the STAR Market in 2022 (688041). Its x86 server CPUs originated from a licensing partnership with AMD and are widely used in Chinese servers; its DCU (Deep Computing Unit) is a GPGPU accelerator for AI training/inference that is compatible with mainstream ecosystems for easy migration — one of the domestic alternatives amid NVIDIA restrictions. Hygon is closely tied to Sugon (both part of the Chinese Academy of Sciences orbit), and in 2025 advanced a plan to absorb-merge with Sugon to integrate "chips + systems + compute," making it a key link in China's self-controlled compute chain.
whyItMatters: 国产 x86 CPU + DCU 加速卡双线，算力自主重要一极
DCU 兼容主流生态、迁移成本低，替代英伟达
与中科曙光整合，打通「芯片+整机+算力」
科创板上市，国产自主可控核心标的

ubtech.name: 优必选
ubtech.oneLiner: 中国人形机器人第一股。
ubtech.oneLinerEn: China's first publicly listed humanoid-robot company.
ubtech.tagline: 让智能机器人走进千家万户
ubtech.taglineEn: Bringing intelligent robots into every home
ubtech.business: Walker 系列人形机器人，率先进入工厂实训，教育机器人起家。
ubtech.businessEn: The Walker humanoid series — first into factory training — with roots in educational robots.
ubtech.description: 优必选(UBTech)成立于 2012 年,以伺服舵机与教育机器人(Alpha 系列)起家,2023 年在港交所上市(9880),被称为「中国人形机器人第一股」。近年它全力押注工业人形:Walker S 系列率先进入比亚迪、富士康、蔚来等车厂/3C 工厂做实训与分拣、搬运,推进「群脑网络」让多台机器人协同作业。相比科研或消费路线,优必选主打「先进工厂」的商用落地,靠真实产线打磨机器人能力。作为上市公司,它的进展与订单是观察中国人形机器人商业化节奏的重要窗口。
ubtech.descriptionEn: UBTech was founded in 2012, starting with servo actuators and educational robots (the Alpha series), and listed in Hong Kong in 2023 (9880) as "China's first humanoid-robot stock." In recent years it has bet heavily on industrial humanoids: its Walker S series was among the first into automotive/3C factories such as BYD, Foxconn and Nio for training, sorting and material handling, advancing a "swarm-brain network" for multi-robot collaboration. Unlike research or consumer routes, UBTech emphasizes commercial deployment in "advanced factories," honing robot capabilities on real production lines. As a listed company, its progress and orders are an important window into the pace of Chinese humanoid commercialization.
whyItMatters: 「中国人形机器人第一股」,港股上市
Walker S 率先进比亚迪/富士康等工厂实训
「群脑网络」让多台机器人协同作业
主打先进工厂商用落地,上市窗口价值高

agibot.name: 智元机器人
agibot.oneLiner: 中国明星人形机器人公司，量产落地快。
agibot.oneLinerEn: A star Chinese humanoid-robot company with fast mass-production rollout.
agibot.tagline: 以智能机器创造无限生产力
agibot.role: 机器人本体 + 具身数据
agibot.business: 远征/灵犀系列人形机器人，主打量产与具身数据，稚晖君联合创立。
agibot.businessEn: The Yuanzheng/Lingxi humanoid series, focused on mass production and embodied data; co-founded by "Zhihui Jun."
agibot.description: 智元机器人(AgiBot)由前华为「天才少年」彭志辉(网名稚晖君)与邓泰华等于 2023 年联合创立,是中国最受关注的人形机器人公司之一。它走「量产优先 + 数据驱动」路线:快速推出远征、灵犀等多款人形机器人并推进量产下线,同时用真机大规模采集具身操作数据来训练机器人「大脑」,还开源了 AgiBot World 等具身数据集/模型。凭借明星团队、快速迭代与量产能力,智元估值一路走高(市场传闻约 400–500 亿港元/50–64 亿美元),并计划 2026 年赴港 IPO,是中国具身智能第一梯队。
agibot.descriptionEn: AgiBot was co-founded in 2023 by Peng Zhihui (known online as "Zhihui Jun"), a former Huawei "genius youth," with Deng Taihua and others, and is one of China's most-watched humanoid-robot companies. It follows a "mass-production-first, data-driven" path: rapidly launching multiple humanoids (Yuanzheng, Lingxi) and pushing them off the production line, while using real robots to collect embodied manipulation data at scale to train the robot "brain," and open-sourcing embodied datasets/models like AgiBot World. With a star team, fast iteration and manufacturing capability, its valuation has climbed (reportedly around HK$40-50 billion / $5-6.4 billion), and it plans a Hong Kong IPO in 2026 — a front-runner in Chinese embodied intelligence.
whyItMatters: 稚晖君(前华为天才少年)联合创立,明星团队
量产优先:远征/灵犀多款人形快速下线
真机大规模采集具身数据训「大脑」,开源数据集
估值约 50-64 亿美元,计划 2026 赴港 IPO

galbot.name: 银河通用
galbot.oneLiner: 中国具身智能机器人公司，估值最高的未上市人形公司之一。
galbot.oneLinerEn: A Chinese embodied-AI robot company — one of the highest-valued unlisted humanoid firms.
galbot.tagline: 让机器人走进真实世界
galbot.taglineEn: Bringing robots into the real world
galbot.subcategory: 人形机器人 + 具身大模型
galbot.business: 轮式人形机器人与具身大模型，主打真实场景通用操作。
galbot.businessEn: Wheeled humanoid robots and embodied foundation models, focused on general manipulation in real-world settings.
galbot.description: 银河通用(Galbot)由北京大学助理教授王鹤于 2023 年创立,是中国具身智能的头部公司。它主打「本体 + 大脑」结合:代表产品是轮式人形机器人 Galbot G1(用轮式底盘 + 双臂,兼顾稳定与成本),配上自研的具身大模型,用大量仿真数据训练,主打在药店、商超、工厂等真实场景做通用抓取与操作,并已落地无人药店等商用试点。2025 年底—2026 年初,银河通用在三个月内密集融资近 50 亿元人民币(约 3.6 亿美元)、估值达约 30 亿美元,成为中国估值最高的未上市人形机器人公司之一,并谋求赴港 IPO。
galbot.descriptionEn: Galbot was founded in 2023 by Wang He, an assistant professor at Peking University, and is a leading Chinese embodied-AI company. It emphasizes combining "body + brain": its flagship is the wheeled humanoid Galbot G1 (a wheeled base + dual arms, balancing stability and cost) paired with an in-house embodied foundation model trained on large-scale simulation data, targeting general grasping and manipulation in real settings like pharmacies, supermarkets and factories — already piloted commercially in unmanned pharmacies. From late 2025 to early 2026 Galbot raised nearly RMB 5 billion (about $362 million) in three months at roughly a $3 billion valuation, becoming one of China's highest-valued unlisted humanoid firms and seeking a Hong Kong IPO.
whyItMatters: 创始人王鹤是北大教授,学术+产业结合
轮式人形 Galbot G1 + 自研具身大模型
仿真数据训练,落地药店/商超等真实场景
三个月融近 50 亿、估值约 30 亿美元,拟赴港 IPO

magicdev.name: Magic.dev
magicdev.oneLiner: 主攻超长上下文的 AI 编程模型。
magicdev.oneLinerEn: An AI coding-model company focused on ultra-long context.
magicdev.tagline: 打造能自主编程的 AI 同事
magicdev.taglineEn: Building an AI coworker that codes
magicdev.business: 自研超长上下文代码模型，目标打造自动化软件工程师。
magicdev.businessEn: In-house ultra-long-context code models, aiming to build an automated software engineer.
magicdev.description: Magic.dev 走的是「自研模型」的 AI 编程路线,最大的技术标签是「超长上下文」——它宣称做出了能一次读入上亿(甚至数千万到 1 亿) token 上下文的模型,相当于让 AI 一口气「读完」整个代码库、文档与历史,再来写代码和推理,试图解决现有工具「看不全全局」的问题。它的目标不是补全,而是真正自主的「AI 软件工程师」。公司获得了大额融资(包括谷歌云、Eric Schmidt 等支持),并与谷歌云合作建专属算力。作为押注「长上下文 + 自研基座」的代表,Magic 是 AI 编程里技术叙事最激进的公司之一。
magicdev.descriptionEn: Magic.dev takes the "build our own model" path to AI coding, with "ultra-long context" as its signature: it claims models that can take in context of up to hundreds of millions (even tens of millions to 100 million) of tokens at once — effectively letting the AI "read" an entire codebase, docs and history in one go before writing code and reasoning, addressing existing tools' inability to see the whole picture. Its goal isn't autocomplete but a truly autonomous "AI software engineer." It has raised large funding (including support from Google Cloud and Eric Schmidt) and partnered with Google Cloud for dedicated compute. As a champion of "long context + in-house foundation models," Magic is one of the most aggressive technical-narrative companies in AI coding.
whyItMatters: 主攻超长上下文,宣称可一次读入上亿 token
让 AI「读完」整个代码库再写码,补全局视野
目标是自主「AI 软件工程师」而非补全
谷歌云/Eric Schmidt 支持,合建专属算力

poolside.name: Poolside
poolside.oneLiner: 自研代码大模型的 AI 编程公司。
poolside.oneLinerEn: An AI coding company training its own code foundation models.
