poolside.tagline: 为软件开发打造前沿模型
poolside.business: 从零训练代码基座模型，面向企业私有部署的 AI 软件开发。
poolside.businessEn: Trains code foundation models from scratch for enterprise, privately deployable AI software development.
poolside.description: Poolside 由前 GitHub CTO 等创立,主张「专攻代码的前沿基座模型」——不是套用通用大模型,而是从零训练专门面向软件开发的大模型,并用「从代码执行的反馈中强化学习(RLCE)」等方法让模型真正学会写出能跑通的代码。它主打企业与政府的私有部署,把整套「模型 + 平台」搬进客户自己的环境,满足代码保密与合规。Poolside 获大额融资(据报道估值达数十亿美元级、含中东主权基金参与),并与英伟达等合作建算力,是「自研代码基座 + 企业私有化」路线的代表之一。
poolside.descriptionEn: Poolside was founded by a former GitHub CTO and others, arguing for "frontier foundation models specialized for code" — not adapting a general model but training a large model from scratch specifically for software development, using methods like reinforcement learning from code-execution feedback (RLCE) so the model truly learns to write code that runs. It targets enterprise and government private deployment, moving the whole "model + platform" into the customer's own environment for code confidentiality and compliance. Poolside has raised large funding (reportedly a multibillion-dollar valuation with Middle Eastern sovereign participation) and partnered with NVIDIA on compute — a champion of the "in-house code foundation model + enterprise private deployment" path.
whyItMatters: 前 GitHub CTO 创立,从零训练代码专用基座模型
用代码执行反馈强化学习,学会写能跑的代码
主打企业/政府私有部署,满足保密与合规
大额融资(含中东主权基金),与英伟达建算力

abridge.name: Abridge
abridge.oneLiner: AI 临床问诊记录龙头。
abridge.oneLinerEn: The leader in AI clinical documentation.
abridge.business: 实时把医患对话转成结构化病历，深度接入大型医院系统。
abridge.businessEn: Turns doctor-patient conversations into structured clinical notes in real time, deeply integrated with major hospital systems.
abridge.description: Abridge 是 AI 临床文书(ambient clinical documentation)的龙头。医生每天要花大量时间写病历,是职业倦怠的主因之一。Abridge 用语音 AI 实时「听」医患对话,自动生成结构化、可核对的病历草稿,并深度接入 Epic 等主流电子病历系统(EHR),让医生把时间还给病人。凭借与大型医院/医疗集团的深度合作、对医学术语与合规的专门优化,Abridge 成为该赛道商业化最快的公司之一,被众多顶级医疗系统采用,估值进入独角兽行列。
abridge.descriptionEn: Abridge is the leader in AI ambient clinical documentation. Doctors spend enormous time writing notes, a leading cause of burnout. Abridge uses voice AI to "listen" to the doctor-patient conversation in real time, automatically generating structured, reviewable draft notes and integrating deeply with major electronic health record (EHR) systems like Epic, giving clinicians their time back with patients. With deep partnerships across large hospitals/health systems and special optimization for medical terminology and compliance, Abridge is one of the fastest-commercializing companies in the category, adopted by many top health systems, and a unicorn by valuation.
whyItMatters: AI 临床文书龙头,缓解医生写病历倦怠
实时把医患对话转成结构化病历
深度接入 Epic 等主流 EHR 系统
众多顶级医疗系统采用,商业化最快之一

openevidence.name: OpenEvidence
openevidence.oneLiner: 医生用的 AI 医学证据搜索。
openevidence.oneLinerEn: AI medical-evidence search built for doctors.
openevidence.taglineEn: The latest evidence, at the point of care
openevidence.business: 面向临床医生的循证医学问答，被大量美国医生日常使用。
openevidence.businessEn: Evidence-based medical Q&A for clinicians, used daily by a large share of U.S. doctors.
openevidence.description: OpenEvidence 被称为「医生版的 ChatGPT」:医生用自然语言提出临床问题,它基于权威医学文献(与《新英格兰医学杂志》NEJM、JAMA 等合作)给出带引用出处的循证答案,帮医生在几秒内查到最新指南与研究。它的关键差异是「专业、可信、有出处」——只面向持证医生开放、答案锚定权威文献,避免通用大模型的臆造风险。凭借免费+高实用性,OpenEvidence 在美国医生中渗透极快(号称覆盖大量美国临床医生的日常使用),融资与估值迅速攀升,是医疗 AI 最受关注的应用之一。
openevidence.descriptionEn: OpenEvidence is often called "ChatGPT for doctors": clinicians ask clinical questions in natural language, and it returns cited, evidence-based answers grounded in authoritative medical literature (partnering with journals like NEJM and JAMA), helping doctors find the latest guidelines and research in seconds. Its key differentiation is being "professional, trustworthy and sourced" — open only to licensed doctors, with answers anchored to authoritative literature to avoid the hallucination risk of general models. With a free, highly useful product, OpenEvidence has spread very fast among U.S. physicians (claiming daily use by a large share of them), with rapidly rising funding and valuation — one of the most-watched medical-AI applications.
whyItMatters: 「医生版 ChatGPT」,带出处的循证医学问答
与 NEJM/JAMA 等权威文献合作,答案可信可溯
仅向持证医生开放,避免通用模型臆造
在美国医生中渗透极快,估值迅速攀升

tempus.name: Tempus AI
tempus.oneLiner: 精准医疗数据与 AI 诊断公司。
tempus.oneLinerEn: A precision-medicine data and AI-diagnostics company.
tempus.taglineEn: Bringing the power of data to medicine
tempus.business: 汇聚基因组与临床数据，用 AI 做精准医疗与药物研发辅助。
tempus.businessEn: Aggregates genomic and clinical data, using AI for precision medicine and drug-development support.
tempus.description: Tempus AI 由 Groupon 创始人 Eric Lefkofsky 于 2015 年创立,做的是「用数据战胜疾病」的精准医疗。它一边为癌症等患者做基因测序与分子诊断(直接产生收入),一边把海量的基因组 + 临床 + 影像数据结构化、连接起来,形成一个庞大的真实世界医疗数据库;再用 AI 在这份数据上辅助诊断、匹配疗法、支持药企做研发与临床试验(数据授权变现)。这种「诊断服务 + 数据平台」的双轮,让 Tempus 成为精准医疗数据的头部玩家,2024 年上市(TEM),是「AI + 医疗数据」最具规模的商业化案例之一。
tempus.descriptionEn: Tempus AI was founded in 2015 by Groupon co-founder Eric Lefkofsky to pursue "beating disease with data" precision medicine. On one side it provides genomic sequencing and molecular diagnostics for cancer and other patients (direct revenue); on the other it structures and connects vast genomic + clinical + imaging data into a large real-world medical database, then uses AI on that data to assist diagnosis, match therapies, and support pharma R&D and clinical trials (monetized via data licensing). This "diagnostics service + data platform" flywheel has made Tempus a leader in precision-medicine data; it went public in 2024 (TEM), one of the largest-scale commercializations of "AI + medical data."
whyItMatters: 精准医疗:基因测序诊断 + 真实世界医疗数据库
「诊断服务 + 数据平台」双轮驱动
AI 辅助诊断/匹配疗法/支持药企研发
2024 上市,「AI+医疗数据」规模化商业化代表

hippocratic.name: Hippocratic AI
hippocratic.oneLiner: 医疗语音智能体，做「AI 护士」。
hippocratic.oneLinerEn: A healthcare voice-agent company building "AI nurses."
hippocratic.tagline: 以安全为先的医疗 AI
hippocratic.business: 面向非诊断场景的医疗语音 AI 智能体，主打患者随访与健康关怀。
hippocratic.businessEn: Healthcare voice AI agents for non-diagnostic use, focused on patient follow-up and care outreach.
hippocratic.description: Hippocratic AI 做的是面向医疗的「AI 护士/健康助手」语音智能体。它刻意避开高风险的「诊断」,专注非诊断场景——术后随访、慢病管理、用药提醒、检查前准备、健康宣教等,用能自然对话、有同理心的语音 AI 大规模地给患者打电话、做关怀,缓解医护人手短缺。安全是其核心卖点:公司用一整套「护士与医生参与」的安全评测体系来约束模型,只有通过才上线。凭借「安全优先 + 大规模低成本触达患者」的定位,Hippocratic 获红杉、a16z、英伟达等投资,估值进入独角兽行列,是医疗语音智能体的代表。
hippocratic.descriptionEn: Hippocratic AI builds healthcare "AI nurse / health assistant" voice agents. It deliberately avoids high-risk "diagnosis" and focuses on non-diagnostic use — post-op follow-up, chronic-disease management, medication reminders, pre-procedure prep and health education — using empathetic, naturally conversational voice AI to call and care for patients at scale, easing clinician shortages. Safety is its core selling point: the company constrains its models with an extensive "nurse- and physician-in-the-loop" safety evaluation, and only what passes goes live. With a "safety-first + low-cost patient outreach at scale" positioning, Hippocratic has raised from Sequoia, a16z and NVIDIA at a unicorn valuation — a leader in healthcare voice agents.
whyItMatters: 做非诊断「AI 护士」,避开高风险诊断
术后随访/慢病管理/用药提醒等大规模触达
「护士+医生参与」安全评测为核心卖点
红杉/a16z/英伟达投资,缓解医护短缺

lightmatter.name: Lightmatter
lightmatter.oneLiner: 光子计算与光互联新锐。
lightmatter.tagline: 用光突破算力互联的瓶颈
lightmatter.taglineEn: Breaking the interconnect bottleneck with light
lightmatter.business: 用光子技术做芯片间高带宽互联(Passage)与光计算，攻 AI 互联瓶颈。
lightmatter.businessEn: Uses photonics for high-bandwidth chip-to-chip interconnect (Passage) and optical computing, attacking the AI interconnect bottleneck.
lightmatter.description: Lightmatter 是光子(光学)芯片的头部公司,瞄准 AI 算力的「互联瓶颈」。随着单颗芯片性能见顶,AI 靠成千上万颗 GPU 协同工作,而它们之间的数据搬运(互联)正成为新瓶颈——铜线在高速下又费电又发热。Lightmatter 的 Passage 用光子把互联搬到光上,在芯片封装层面提供超高带宽、低功耗的连接,让海量芯片像一颗大芯片一样高效协同;它也探索用光做计算。2024 年 D 轮融资 4 亿美元、估值达 44 亿美元(一年翻近 4 倍),是「光互联替代铜」这一趋势最受关注的玩家之一。
lightmatter.descriptionEn: Lightmatter is a leading photonic (optical) chip company targeting AI's "interconnect bottleneck." As single-chip performance plateaus, AI relies on thousands of GPUs working together, and moving data between them (interconnect) is becoming the new bottleneck — copper wires are power-hungry and hot at high speeds. Lightmatter's Passage shifts interconnect onto light, providing ultra-high-bandwidth, low-power connections at the chip-package level so massive numbers of chips work together efficiently like one big chip; it also explores computing with light. Its 2024 Series D raised $400 million at a $4.4 billion valuation (nearly 4x in a year), one of the most-watched players in the "optical interconnect replaces copper" trend.
whyItMatters: 瞄准 AI 算力的「互联瓶颈」,光替代铜
Passage 在封装层提供超高带宽低功耗连接
让海量芯片像一颗大芯片般高效协同
2024 D 轮 4 亿、估值 44 亿美元,一年翻近 4 倍

ayarlabs.name: Ayar Labs
ayarlabs.oneLiner: 硅光 I/O(光互连)领先者。
ayarlabs.oneLinerEn: A leader in silicon-photonics optical I/O.
ayarlabs.business: 把光 I/O 直接集成进芯片封装(共封装光学 CPO)，英伟达等参与投资。
ayarlabs.businessEn: Integrates optical I/O directly into the chip package (co-packaged optics, CPO), with investment from NVIDIA and others.
ayarlabs.description: Ayar Labs 是硅光 I/O(光互连)的领先者,核心是把「光引擎」做成一颗小芯粒(TeraPHY),直接和 GPU/交换芯片封装在一起——即「共封装光学(CPO)」。传统上光模块插在服务器边缘,而 CPO 把光直接引到芯片旁,大幅缩短电走线、降低功耗、提升带宽,被视为下一代 AI 互联的关键方向。Ayar 是这条路线的先行者,获英伟达、英特尔、AMD、台积电、GlobalFoundries 等产业链巨头投资与合作,身位独特。随着 AI 集群规模膨胀、互联功耗成为大问题,CPO 与 Ayar 的战略价值持续上升。
ayarlabs.descriptionEn: Ayar Labs is a leader in silicon-photonics optical I/O, centered on packaging an "optical engine" as a chiplet (TeraPHY) directly alongside a GPU/switch chip — i.e. "co-packaged optics (CPO)." Traditionally optical modules sit at the server edge, but CPO brings light right next to the chip, dramatically shortening electrical traces, cutting power and raising bandwidth — seen as a key direction for next-generation AI interconnect. Ayar is a pioneer of this path, backed and partnered by supply-chain giants like NVIDIA, Intel, AMD, TSMC and GlobalFoundries, giving it a distinctive position. As AI clusters balloon and interconnect power becomes a major problem, the strategic value of CPO and Ayar keeps rising.
whyItMatters: 共封装光学(CPO)先行者,把光引擎做成芯粒
光直接引到芯片旁,降功耗、提带宽
英伟达/英特尔/AMD/台积电等投资与合作
AI 集群膨胀,互联功耗使 CPO 战略价值升

celestial.name: Celestial AI
celestial.oneLiner: 光子互联「光子结构」新锐。
celestial.oneLinerEn: A photonic-interconnect upstart building a "Photonic Fabric."
celestial.tagline: 用光重构内存与算力的连接
celestial.taglineEn: Reconnecting memory and compute with light
celestial.subcategory: 光子互联 / 内存扩展
celestial.business: Photonic Fabric 光互联技术，主攻 AI 内存与算力扩展的带宽瓶颈。
celestial.businessEn: Its Photonic Fabric optical-interconnect technology attacks the bandwidth bottleneck of scaling AI memory and compute.
celestial.description: Celestial AI 的核心是自研的「光子结构(Photonic Fabric)」——一种用光把算力与内存(HBM)高带宽、低延迟连起来的互联技术。AI 大模型不仅缺算力,更常被「内存墙」卡住:GPU 旁的显存不够、又贵,而远处的大内存带宽又跟不上。Celestial 想用光把「内存池」和 GPU 高效连起来,让算力能按需访问远端的大容量内存,从而突破内存与带宽瓶颈、提升大模型的效率与经济性。它获 a16z、Fidelity、AMD 风投等投资,估值达约 25 亿美元级别,是光互联赛道里主攻「内存扩展」方向的代表。
celestial.descriptionEn: Celestial AI is built around its own "Photonic Fabric" — an interconnect technology that uses light to connect compute and memory (HBM) with high bandwidth and low latency. Large AI models lack not only compute but are often stuck at the "memory wall": the memory next to a GPU is limited and expensive, while distant large memory can't keep up on bandwidth. Celestial aims to use light to efficiently connect a "memory pool" to GPUs so compute can access large remote memory on demand, breaking through memory and bandwidth bottlenecks to improve the efficiency and economics of large models. Backed by a16z, Fidelity and AMD Ventures at a valuation on the order of $2.5 billion, it is the standard-bearer for the "memory-expansion" direction in optical interconnect.
whyItMatters: 自研 Photonic Fabric,用光连算力与内存
主攻 AI「内存墙」:让算力访问远端大内存
突破内存与带宽瓶颈,提升大模型经济性
a16z/AMD 风投等投资,估值约 25 亿美元

modal.name: Modal
modal.oneLiner: 面向 AI 的无服务器计算平台。
modal.oneLinerEn: A serverless compute platform for AI.
modal.tagline: 秒级弹性的 AI 算力
modal.business: 让开发者秒级弹性调用 GPU 跑 AI 任务，主打开发体验。
modal.businessEn: Lets developers spin up GPUs elastically in seconds to run AI workloads, with a focus on developer experience.
modal.description: Modal 做的是「面向 AI 的无服务器(serverless)计算」:开发者只需写 Python 函数、加个装饰器,Modal 就能在几秒内自动调度 GPU/CPU 把它跑起来,用完即释放、按秒计费,完全不用管服务器、容器、扩缩容这些基础设施。它以极佳的开发体验著称,特别适合模型推理、批处理、微调、数据处理等 AI 工作负载。在「人人都要跑 AI、但没人想搞运维」的浪潮里,Modal 成为开发者友好型 AI 算力平台的代表之一,增长迅速。
modal.descriptionEn: Modal builds "serverless compute for AI": a developer just writes a Python function with a decorator, and Modal automatically schedules GPUs/CPUs to run it within seconds, releasing them when done and billing by the second — with no need to manage servers, containers or autoscaling. Known for excellent developer experience, it suits AI workloads like model inference, batch jobs, fine-tuning and data processing. Amid the wave of "everyone needs to run AI but no one wants to do ops," Modal has become a leading developer-friendly AI compute platform, growing fast.
whyItMatters: 面向 AI 的无服务器计算,秒级起 GPU
写个 Python 函数即可跑,免运维、按秒计费
适合推理/批处理/微调等 AI 工作负载
开发体验极佳,开发者友好算力平台代表

baseten.name: Baseten
baseten.tagline: 让模型上线像点个开关
baseten.business: 把机器学习模型一键部署为可扩展的推理服务。
baseten.businessEn: Deploys machine-learning models as scalable inference services with one click.
baseten.description: Baseten 做的是「把模型部署上线」这件事:开发者把训练好或开源的模型交给它,Baseten 就自动打包、优化并部署成一个能自动扩缩容、高性能、低延迟的推理 API,帮企业把 AI 模型稳定、经济地跑到生产环境里。它对推理性能(如吞吐、延迟、成本)做了大量优化,并支持多云弹性调度。随着企业从「做 demo」进入「大规模上线 AI」阶段,推理成为最大的花钱与工程难点,Baseten 迅速增长——2026 年 6 月完成 15 亿美元 F 轮、估值达 130 亿美元,成为 AI 推理基础设施赛道的头部之一。
baseten.descriptionEn: Baseten focuses on "getting models to production": developers hand it a trained or open-source model, and Baseten automatically packages, optimizes and deploys it as an autoscaling, high-performance, low-latency inference API, helping enterprises run AI models in production reliably and economically. It heavily optimizes inference performance (throughput, latency, cost) and supports elastic multi-cloud scheduling. As enterprises move from "building demos" to "deploying AI at scale," inference becomes the biggest cost and engineering challenge, and Baseten has grown fast — in June 2026 it closed a $1.5 billion Series F at a $13 billion valuation, one of the leaders in AI-inference infrastructure.
whyItMatters: 把模型一键部署为可扩展、低延迟推理 API
深度优化推理吞吐/延迟/成本,支持多云弹性
企业「大规模上线 AI」阶段,推理是最大难点
2026.6 F 轮 15 亿、估值 130 亿美元,推理头部

replicate.name: Replicate
replicate.oneLiner: 一行代码调用开源模型的托管平台。
replicate.oneLinerEn: A hosting platform to run open-source models in one line of code.
replicate.business: 把开源模型打包成 API，开发者按用量调用，社区生态活跃。
replicate.businessEn: Packages open-source models as APIs that developers call on-demand, with an active community.
replicate.description: Replicate 让开发者「一行代码就能跑开源模型」:社区把各种开源模型(文生图、语音、视频、大语言模型等)用其开源打包工具 Cog 封装好,发布到 Replicate,其他开发者就能通过一个简单的 API、按用量付费直接调用,完全不用自己配 GPU 环境。它以「模型即 API + 活跃社区」著称,是很多 AI 应用快速接入开源能力的首选。相比自建推理,Replicate 主打「上手快、生态广」,让长尾的开源模型也能被方便地用起来,是开源 AI 应用化的重要一环。
replicate.descriptionEn: Replicate lets developers "run open-source models in one line of code": the community packages open models (text-to-image, speech, video, LLMs and more) using its open-source Cog tool and publishes them to Replicate, so other developers can call them through a simple pay-per-use API without setting up their own GPU environment. Known for "models as APIs + an active community," it is a go-to for AI apps to quickly tap open-source capabilities. Compared with self-hosting inference, Replicate emphasizes "fast to start, broad ecosystem," making even long-tail open models easy to use — an important link in turning open-source AI into applications.
whyItMatters: 一行代码调用开源模型,免配 GPU 环境
Cog 打包 + 活跃社区,「模型即 API」
AI 应用快速接入开源能力的首选之一
让长尾开源模型也能方便用起来

anyscale.name: Anyscale
anyscale.oneLiner: Ray 分布式计算框架的商业公司。
anyscale.oneLinerEn: The commercial company behind the Ray distributed-computing framework.
anyscale.tagline: 让分布式计算像写单机代码一样简单
anyscale.taglineEn: Distributed computing as easy as single-machine code
anyscale.business: 开源 Ray 框架与托管平台，支撑大规模分布式训练与推理。
anyscale.businessEn: The open-source Ray framework and a managed platform, powering large-scale distributed training and inference.
anyscale.description: Anyscale 由加州大学伯克利 RISELab 的研究者创立,是开源分布式计算框架 Ray 的背后公司。训练/服务大模型需要把工作拆到成百上千台机器上并行跑,而这种分布式编程极其复杂;Ray 让开发者用接近「写单机 Python」的方式,就能把任务扩展到大规模集群,被 OpenAI(曾用 Ray 训练 GPT)、Uber、蚂蚁等广泛采用,几乎成为 AI 分布式计算的事实标准之一。Anyscale 在 Ray 之上提供托管平台,帮企业更省心地做大规模训练、微调与推理,是 AI 基础设施软件层的重要玩家。
anyscale.descriptionEn: Anyscale was founded by researchers from UC Berkeley's RISELab and is the company behind the open-source distributed-computing framework Ray. Training/serving large models requires splitting work across hundreds or thousands of machines in parallel, and such distributed programming is extremely complex; Ray lets developers scale tasks to large clusters in a way close to "writing single-machine Python," and is widely adopted by OpenAI (which used Ray to train GPT), Uber, Ant and others — effectively a de facto standard for AI distributed computing. Anyscale offers a managed platform on top of Ray to help enterprises do large-scale training, fine-tuning and inference more easily — an important player in the AI-infrastructure software layer.
whyItMatters: 开源 Ray 框架背后公司,伯克利 RISELab 血统
让分布式编程像写单机 Python 一样简单
OpenAI/Uber/蚂蚁等广泛采用,近事实标准
在 Ray 之上提供托管平台,AI 基础设施软件层

wandb.name: Weights & Biases
wandb.oneLiner: AI 实验跟踪与 MLOps 平台，已被 CoreWeave 收购。
wandb.oneLinerEn: An AI experiment-tracking and MLOps platform, acquired by CoreWeave.
wandb.business: 模型训练实验管理、可视化与评测，2025 年被 CoreWeave 收购。
wandb.businessEn: Model-training experiment management, visualization and evaluation; acquired by CoreWeave in 2025.
wandb.description: Weights & Biases(W&B)是 AI 开发者最常用的「实验跟踪与 MLOps」平台。训练模型时要不断调参、跑很多次实验,W&B 帮团队自动记录每次实验的指标、超参、数据与结果,做可视化对比、协作与复现,还扩展到模型评测、数据集版本与生产监控,是机器学习工程师的「实验室笔记本 + 仪表盘」。它几乎是行业标准工具之一,被大量 AI 团队采用。2025 年,GPU 云龙头 CoreWeave 以约 14 亿美元收购 W&B,把它的开发者工具与自身算力整合成「从算力到开发」的一体化 AI 平台。
wandb.descriptionEn: Weights & Biases (W&B) is the most widely used "experiment tracking and MLOps" platform among AI developers. Training models involves constant tuning and many experiment runs, and W&B automatically logs each run's metrics, hyperparameters, data and results for visualization, comparison, collaboration and reproducibility, extending into model evaluation, dataset versioning and production monitoring — the machine-learning engineer's "lab notebook + dashboard." It is effectively an industry-standard tool used by many AI teams. In 2025 GPU-cloud leader CoreWeave acquired W&B for about $1.4 billion, integrating its developer tools with its own compute into an end-to-end "compute-to-development" AI platform.
whyItMatters: AI 开发者最常用的实验跟踪/MLOps 平台
自动记录实验指标/超参/结果,可视化对比复现
扩展到评测、数据集版本与生产监控
2025 被 CoreWeave 约 14 亿美元收购,算力+开发一体

figma.name: Figma
figma.oneLiner: 协作式 UI 设计龙头，2025 年上市。
figma.oneLinerEn: The leader in collaborative UI design; went public in 2025.
figma.business: 云端协作设计平台，Figma AI 辅助生成与自动化设计。
figma.businessEn: A cloud collaborative-design platform with Figma AI for generation and design automation.
figma.description: Figma 是协作式界面(UI/UX)设计的龙头,把设计从「本地软件、来回传文件」变成「多人实时在浏览器里一起改同一个设计稿」,像设计界的 Google Docs,深受设计师与产品团队喜爱。2022 年 Adobe 曾拟以约 200 亿美元收购,但因反垄断在 2023 年告吹,Figma 随后于 2025 年独立上市。在 AI 上,Figma 推出一系列 AI 功能:从文字生成界面、自动整理图层、生成占位内容,到把设计更快变成代码(Dev Mode),让「设计到开发」的链路提速。作为 Web 时代协作设计的事实标准,Figma 正把生成式 AI 融入创作与协作流程,是「设计 × AI」里最核心的平台之一。
figma.descriptionEn: Figma is the leader in collaborative interface (UI/UX) design, turning design from "local software, passing files back and forth" into "many people editing the same design in the browser in real time" — like Google Docs for design, beloved by designers and product teams. In 2022 Adobe planned to acquire it for about $20 billion, but the deal collapsed in 2023 over antitrust, and Figma went public independently in 2025. On AI, Figma launched a range of features: generating interfaces from text, auto-organizing layers, generating placeholder content, and turning designs into code faster (Dev Mode), speeding up the "design to development" path. As the de facto standard for collaborative design in the web era, Figma is weaving generative AI into creation and collaboration — one of the most central platforms in "design × AI."
whyItMatters: 协作式 UI 设计龙头,「设计界的 Google Docs」
Adobe 200 亿收购因反垄断告吹,2025 独立上市
AI 功能:文字生成界面、Dev Mode 设计变代码
Web 协作设计事实标准,「设计×AI」核心平台之一

stx.name: 希捷
stx.oneLiner: 机械硬盘(HDD)双雄之一，AI 冷数据受益者。
stx.business: 大容量机械硬盘与 HAMR 新技术，为 AI 数据湖提供低成本海量存储。

kioxia.name: 铠侠
kioxia.oneLiner: NAND 闪存发明者，原东芝存储。
kioxia.oneLinerEn: The inventor of NAND flash, formerly Toshiba Memory.
kioxia.business: NAND 闪存与企业级 SSD 主要厂商，闪存技术的开创者。
kioxia.businessEn: A major maker of NAND flash and enterprise SSDs — the originator of flash memory.
kioxia.description: 铠侠(Kioxia)前身是东芝存储,而东芝正是当年 NAND 闪存的发明者——今天手机、SSD、数据中心里的闪存都源自这项发明。铠侠是全球主要的 NAND 闪存与企业级 SSD 原厂之一(与三星、SK 海力士/西部数据等竞争),并与西部数据长期合资建厂。AI 时代不仅拉动 HBM,也拉动大容量、高性能的企业级 SSD(存海量训练数据、做高速缓存),让闪存进入上行周期。铠侠 2024 年底在东京上市,受 AI 存储需求推动股价大涨;2026 年 5 月又宣布计划在美国发行 ADR,进一步对接全球资本。
kioxia.descriptionEn: Kioxia was formerly Toshiba Memory, and Toshiba was the original inventor of NAND flash — the flash in today's phones, SSDs and data centers descends from that invention. Kioxia is one of the world's major makers of NAND flash and enterprise SSDs (competing with Samsung, SK Hynix/Western Digital), with a long-running fab joint venture with Western Digital. The AI era drives not only HBM but also high-capacity, high-performance enterprise SSDs (to store vast training data and serve as fast cache), putting flash into an up-cycle. Kioxia listed in Tokyo in late 2024, with its stock surging on AI storage demand; in May 2026 it announced plans to issue ADRs in the U.S. to further tap global capital.
whyItMatters: 前身东芝存储,NAND 闪存的发明者血统
全球主要 NAND/企业级 SSD 原厂,与西数合资建厂
AI 拉动大容量高性能企业级 SSD,闪存上行周期
2024 东京上市股价大涨,2026 拟发美股 ADR

vast.name: VAST Data
vast.oneLiner: 为 AI 打造的高性能数据平台，估值 300 亿美元。
vast.oneLinerEn: A high-performance data platform built for AI, valued at $30 billion.
vast.tagline: 为 AI 重构数据基础设施
vast.taglineEn: Rebuilding the data stack for AI
vast.subcategory: AI 数据平台 / 存储
vast.business: 全闪存分布式存储与数据平台，深度绑定 AI 训练/推理数据管线。
vast.businessEn: An all-flash distributed storage and data platform deeply tied to AI training/inference data pipelines.
vast.description: VAST Data 做的是「为 AI 重构数据基础设施」。它用全闪存 + 独特的解耦架构(DASE),把海量数据以高性能、低成本的方式统一存储和访问,让成千上万张 GPU 在训练/推理时不会因为「喂数据太慢」而饿着——数据吞吐往往是大规模 AI 集群的隐形瓶颈。近年它从「存储」向上扩展成一整套 AI 数据平台(数据库、数据引擎、事件流等)。凭借与 CoreWeave 等 AI 云的大单,VAST 增长极快:约 6 亿美元 ARR、90% 毛利率、连续多年正现金流,2026 年融资后估值达 300 亿美元(英伟达参投),是 AI 数据基础设施最耀眼的公司之一。
vast.descriptionEn: VAST Data is "rebuilding data infrastructure for AI." Using all-flash storage plus a unique disaggregated architecture (DASE), it stores and serves massive data at high performance and low cost so that thousands of GPUs aren't starved by "feeding data too slowly" during training/inference — data throughput is an invisible bottleneck of large AI clusters. It has recently expanded from "storage" into a full AI data platform (database, data engine, event streaming). On the back of large deals with AI clouds like CoreWeave, VAST has grown extremely fast: about $600 million ARR, 90% gross margins and multiple years of positive cash flow; after its 2026 round it reached a $30 billion valuation (with NVIDIA investing) — one of the most striking AI-data-infrastructure companies.
whyItMatters: 全闪存 + DASE 架构,为 AI 统一高性能存储数据
解决大规模 GPU 集群「喂数据太慢」的隐形瓶颈
从存储扩展成完整 AI 数据平台
约 6 亿 ARR、90% 毛利,2026 估值 300 亿、英伟达参投

talen.name: Talen Energy
talen.oneLiner: 核电直供亚马逊数据中心的独立发电商。
talen.oneLinerEn: An independent power producer supplying nuclear power directly to Amazon's data centers.
talen.tagline: 为数字经济提供可靠电力
talen.taglineEn: Reliable power for the digital economy
talen.business: 拥有 Susquehanna 核电站，把核电直供亚马逊 AI 数据中心，AI 电力概念标杆。
talen.businessEn: Owns the Susquehanna nuclear plant and supplies its power directly to Amazon's AI data centers — a bellwether for the AI-power theme.
talen.description: Talen Energy 是美国独立发电商,最有价值的资产是宾州的 Susquehanna 核电站(约 2.5GW 无碳基荷)。它开创了「核电站直连数据中心(behind-the-meter)」的模式:把核电就近卖给建在电站旁的亚马逊 AWS 大型数据中心园区,绕开公共电网、直接给 AI 算力供稳定的无碳电力。这笔交易被视为「AI + 核电」的开山之作,带动整个独立发电与核电板块重估。凭借稀缺的核电资产与科技巨头长约,Talen 从传统电力股变成 AI 电力概念的标杆之一。
talen.descriptionEn: Talen Energy is a U.S. independent power producer whose most valuable asset is the Susquehanna nuclear plant in Pennsylvania (about 2.5GW of carbon-free baseload). It pioneered the "nuclear-plant-directly-connected-to-data-center (behind-the-meter)" model: selling nuclear power on-site to a large Amazon AWS data-center campus built next to the plant, bypassing the public grid to supply stable carbon-free electricity straight to AI compute. The deal is seen as a founding move of "AI + nuclear" and drove a re-rating of the whole independent-power and nuclear sector. With scarce nuclear assets and a long-term deal with a tech giant, Talen turned from a traditional power stock into a bellwether of the AI-power theme.
whyItMatters: 拥有 Susquehanna 核电站,约 2.5GW 无碳基荷
开创核电站直连数据中心(behind-the-meter)模式
把核电直供亚马逊 AWS 大型数据中心
「AI + 核电」开山之作,带动板块重估

cameco.name: Cameco
cameco.oneLiner: 全球最大铀矿商之一，核燃料龙头。
cameco.oneLinerEn: One of the world's largest uranium miners and a nuclear-fuel leader.
cameco.business: 铀矿开采与核燃料服务，并持有西屋电气股权，核电复兴的最上游受益者。
cameco.businessEn: Uranium mining and nuclear-fuel services, plus a stake in Westinghouse — an upstream beneficiary of the nuclear renaissance.
cameco.description: Cameco(卡梅科)是全球最大的铀矿商之一,拥有加拿大 McArthur River、Cigar Lake 等世界顶级高品位铀矿,是核电最上游的燃料供应龙头。它还与 Brookfield 联手收购了核电巨头西屋电气(Westinghouse,持股约 49%),从「挖铀」延伸到反应堆技术与核燃料服务全链条。AI 数据中心用电激增让核电重新成为香饽饽,新建反应堆与延寿都要更多铀,铀价与长约需求上行——2026 年 Cameco 业绩强劲增长,还拿下向印度供铀约 26 亿美元的九年长约,是「核电复兴」最直接的上游受益者。
cameco.descriptionEn: Cameco is one of the world's largest uranium miners, owning top-tier high-grade deposits in Canada such as McArthur River and Cigar Lake — the upstream fuel-supply leader for nuclear power. Together with Brookfield it acquired nuclear giant Westinghouse (a ~49% stake), extending from "mining uranium" into reactor technology and the full nuclear-fuel-services chain. Surging AI-data-center electricity demand has made nuclear attractive again, and new reactors and life extensions require more uranium, lifting prices and long-term contract demand — in 2026 Cameco posted strong earnings growth and won a ~$2.6 billion nine-year contract to supply uranium to India, making it the most direct upstream beneficiary of the "nuclear renaissance."
whyItMatters: 全球最大铀矿商之一,顶级高品位铀矿
联手 Brookfield 收购西屋电气(约 49%)
AI 用电激增,核电复兴推升铀价与长约
2026 业绩强劲,拿下印度约 26 亿美元供铀长约

centrus.name: Centrus Energy
centrus.oneLiner: 美国唯一 HALEU 高丰度铀浓缩商。
centrus.oneLinerEn: The only U.S. producer of HALEU high-assay enriched uranium.
centrus.tagline: 为先进核能提供本土燃料
centrus.business: 铀浓缩服务，是先进反应堆/SMR 所需 HALEU 燃料的关键本土供应方。
centrus.businessEn: Uranium enrichment services — a key domestic supplier of the HALEU fuel needed by advanced reactors/SMRs.
centrus.description: Centrus Energy 是美国核燃料浓缩的关键公司,最重要的身份是「美国唯一持牌生产 HALEU 的厂商」。HALEU(高丰度低浓铀)是几乎所有先进反应堆与小型模块化反应堆(SMR,如 Oklo、TerraPower、X-energy)所需的新型燃料,而过去这种燃料主要依赖俄罗斯供应。在「核燃料去俄化 + 先进核电兴起」的背景下,美国政府大力扶持 Centrus 在俄亥俄扩产 HALEU,使其成为先进核电燃料本土化的战略卡位者。随着 SMR 陆续落地,对 HALEU 的需求与 Centrus 的战略价值同步上升。
centrus.descriptionEn: Centrus Energy is a key U.S. nuclear-fuel enrichment company, most importantly "the only licensed U.S. producer of HALEU." HALEU (high-assay low-enriched uranium) is the new fuel needed by almost all advanced reactors and small modular reactors (SMRs, such as Oklo, TerraPower and X-energy), which was previously supplied mainly by Russia. Amid "de-Russifying nuclear fuel + the rise of advanced nuclear," the U.S. government is heavily supporting Centrus's HALEU expansion in Ohio, making it a strategic gatekeeper for domesticating advanced-nuclear fuel. As SMRs come online, demand for HALEU and Centrus's strategic value rise together.
whyItMatters: 美国唯一持牌生产 HALEU 的厂商
HALEU 是几乎所有 SMR/先进反应堆的燃料
替代过去主要依赖俄罗斯的供应
政府扶持扩产,先进核电燃料本土化卡位

nanonuclear.name: Nano Nuclear
nanonuclear.oneLiner: 微型模块化反应堆新锐。
nanonuclear.business: 开发便携式微型核反应堆与核燃料运输，瞄准偏远与数据中心供电。

terrapower.name: TerraPower
terrapower.oneLiner: 比尔·盖茨创立的先进核反应堆公司。
terrapower.oneLinerEn: The advanced-reactor company founded by Bill Gates.
terrapower.business: 钠冷快堆 Natrium 等先进核电，盖茨押注，已在怀俄明动工。
terrapower.businessEn: Advanced nuclear like the Natrium sodium fast reactor, backed by Bill Gates, now under construction in Wyoming.
terrapower.description: TerraPower 由比尔·盖茨于 2008 年创立、并任董事长,是先进核电的旗舰公司。其核心产品 Natrium 是一座 345MW 的钠冷快堆,创新之处在于配了一套熔盐储能系统——反应堆稳定运行,储能则像「电池」一样把功率灵活放大到 500MW 顶峰,完美匹配电网波动与可再生能源。2024 年 Natrium 在怀俄明州 Kemmerer 破土动工,是美国首座公用事业级先进核电站,预计 2030 年建成。在 AI 用电激增、核电复兴的浪潮里,TerraPower 是「下一代核电」最受关注、落地最快的玩家之一。
terrapower.descriptionEn: TerraPower was founded in 2008 by Bill Gates, who chairs it, and is a flagship of advanced nuclear. Its core product, Natrium, is a 345MW sodium fast reactor whose innovation is a molten-salt energy-storage system — the reactor runs steadily while the storage acts like a "battery" to flex output up to a 500MW peak, matching grid swings and renewables. In 2024 Natrium broke ground in Kemmerer, Wyoming — the first utility-scale advanced nuclear plant in the U.S., expected to be complete by 2030. Amid surging AI electricity demand and the nuclear renaissance, TerraPower is one of the most-watched and fastest-executing players in "next-generation nuclear."
whyItMatters: 比尔·盖茨创立并任董事长,先进核电旗舰
Natrium 钠冷快堆 + 熔盐储能,功率可灵活放大
2024 怀俄明 Kemmerer 动工,美首座公用级先进核电
AI 用电+核电复兴,落地最快的下一代核电之一

xenergy.name: X-energy
xenergy.oneLiner: 高温气冷堆 SMR，亚马逊押注。
xenergy.business: Xe-100 高温气冷小堆与 TRISO 燃料，获亚马逊领投，供电数据中心。

kairos.name: Kairos Power
kairos.oneLiner: 熔盐冷却先进反应堆，谷歌签约。
kairos.business: 氟盐冷却高温反应堆(KP-FHR)，与谷歌签署 SMR 供电协议。

helion.name: Helion
helion.oneLiner: 核聚变新锐，微软已签购电协议。
helion.oneLinerEn: A fusion upstart that already signed a power-purchase agreement with Microsoft.
helion.business: 磁惯性核聚变，目标 2028 年前发电；微软签下全球首份聚变购电协议，Altman 领投。
helion.businessEn: Magneto-inertial fusion targeting power before 2028; Microsoft signed the world's first fusion PPA; led by Sam Altman.
helion.description: Helion Energy 是最受关注的核聚变初创之一,由 Sam Altman 长期押注并领投(累计融资约 15 亿美元)。它走一条与众不同的技术路线:磁惯性聚变 + 采用氘-氦3 燃料,并主打「直接发电」——不用像传统方案那样烧水推汽轮机,而是让聚变等离子体的磁场变化直接感应出电流,理论上更高效。2023 年 Helion 与微软(及 Constellation)签下全球首份聚变购电协议,承诺 2028 年起向微软供电 50MW;2025 年其 Orion 电厂破土动工。尽管聚变商业化仍充满不确定性,Helion 是「聚变最快落地」叙事里最激进、最受瞩目的玩家。
helion.descriptionEn: Helion Energy is one of the most-watched fusion startups, long backed and led by Sam Altman (about $1.5 billion raised). It takes an unusual technical path: magneto-inertial fusion using deuterium-helium-3 fuel, and focuses on "direct electricity" — rather than boiling water to spin a turbine like conventional designs, it induces current directly from the changing magnetic field of the fusion plasma, in principle more efficient. In 2023 Helion signed the world's first fusion power-purchase agreement with Microsoft (and Constellation), committing to supply Microsoft 50MW starting in 2028; in 2025 it broke ground on its Orion plant. Although commercial fusion remains highly uncertain, Helion is the most aggressive and closely watched player in the "fastest to fusion" narrative.
whyItMatters: Sam Altman 长期押注并领投,约 15 亿美元融资
磁惯性聚变 + 氘氦3,主打「直接发电」
微软全球首份聚变购电协议,2028 供 50MW
2025 Orion 电厂动工,聚变最快落地叙事代表

cfs.name: 联邦聚变
cfs.oneLiner: MIT 分拆的托卡马克核聚变领跑者。
cfs.tagline: 以更小更快的路径实现商业聚变
cfs.taglineEn: A faster, smaller path to commercial fusion
cfs.business: 用高温超导磁体做紧凑型托卡马克(SPARC/ARC)，商业聚变最被看好的玩家之一。
cfs.businessEn: Uses high-temperature superconducting magnets to build compact tokamaks (SPARC/ARC) — one of the most-favored bets in commercial fusion.
cfs.description: 联邦聚变(Commonwealth Fusion Systems,CFS)由 MIT 等离子体实验室分拆,是商业核聚变最被看好的玩家之一,融资规模行业领先。它的关键突破是高温超导(HTS)磁体——用更强的磁场把聚变装置做得更小、更快、更省,从而绕开传统托卡马克「越大越贵越慢」的困境。其示范装置 SPARC 于 2026 年初装上首块磁体(并与西门子、英伟达合作用 AI 数字孪生加速研发),目标 2027 年实现 Q>1(输出能量超过输入)——即世界首台「商业相关」的净产能聚变机器;下一步 ARC 电厂将真正并网发电。CFS 是「用工程突破加速聚变」路线的领跑者。
cfs.descriptionEn: Commonwealth Fusion Systems (CFS) was spun out of MIT's plasma lab and is one of the most-favored bets in commercial fusion, with industry-leading funding. Its key breakthrough is high-temperature superconducting (HTS) magnets — using stronger magnetic fields to make fusion devices smaller, faster and cheaper, sidestepping the traditional tokamak's "bigger, costlier, slower" trap. Its demonstration device SPARC installed its first magnet in early 2026 (and partnered with Siemens and NVIDIA on AI digital twins to accelerate R&D), targeting Q>1 (more energy out than in) in 2027 — the world's first "commercially relevant" net-energy fusion machine; the next step, the ARC plant, would actually feed the grid. CFS leads the "engineering-breakthrough-accelerates-fusion" path.
whyItMatters: MIT 分拆,商业聚变最被看好玩家之一
高温超导磁体让聚变装置更小更快更省
SPARC 2026 装首块磁体,目标 2027 Q>1
与西门子/英伟达用 AI 数字孪生加速研发

tae.name: TAE
tae.oneLiner: 老牌核聚变公司，主攻场反位形。
tae.business: 场反位形(FRC)聚变路线，融资规模居行业前列。

bloom.name: Bloom Energy
bloom.oneLiner: 固体氧化物燃料电池，数据中心就地供电。
bloom.oneLinerEn: Solid-oxide fuel cells for on-site data-center power.
bloom.taglineEn: Power where and when you need it
bloom.business: Bloom Energy Server 燃料电池，用天然气/氢就地发电，绕开电网拥堵直供 AI 数据中心。
bloom.businessEn: The Bloom Energy Server fuel cell generates power on-site from natural gas/hydrogen, bypassing grid congestion to supply AI data centers directly.
bloom.description: Bloom Energy 做的是固体氧化物燃料电池(SOFC):它的 Bloom Energy Server 像一个「电力盒子」,用天然气、生物气或氢气通过电化学反应直接发电(不燃烧),效率高、排放低,还能就地部署。这在 AI 时代变得极有价值——很多数据中心想扩容却被「电网接不进来、排队等好几年」卡住,而 Bloom 的燃料电池能在园区内几个月就装好、立刻供电,绕开电网拥堵。它已与甲骨文等签下大单为 AI 数据中心供电,成为「电网等不及、就地自己发」这一刚需的直接受益者,订单与股价大涨。
bloom.descriptionEn: Bloom Energy makes solid-oxide fuel cells (SOFC): its Bloom Energy Server is a "power box" that generates electricity directly (without combustion) from natural gas, biogas or hydrogen via electrochemical reaction — high efficiency, low emissions and deployable on-site. This has become extremely valuable in the AI era — many data centers want to expand but are stuck waiting years for grid interconnection, whereas Bloom's fuel cells can be installed on the campus in months and supply power immediately, bypassing grid congestion. It has signed large deals with the likes of Oracle to power AI data centers, becoming a direct beneficiary of the "can't wait for the grid, generate on-site" need, with orders and stock surging.
whyItMatters: 固体氧化物燃料电池,不燃烧、就地发电
数据中心被「电网排队数年」卡住,Bloom 几月装好
绕开电网拥堵,立刻给 AI 算力供电
与甲骨文等签大单,订单与股价大涨

plugpower.name: 普拉格能源
plugpower.business: 氢燃料电池系统与绿氢产供，面向物流与备用电源。

hitachienergy.name: 日立能源
hitachienergy.oneLiner: 全球变压器与电网设备龙头。
hitachienergy.oneLinerEn: A global leader in transformers and grid equipment.
hitachienergy.tagline: 为可持续能源未来供电
hitachienergy.business: 高压变压器、高压直流(HVDC)与电网设备，AI 用电激增下变压器一柜难求。
hitachienergy.businessEn: High-voltage transformers, HVDC and grid equipment — with AI power demand surging, transformers are in acute short supply.
hitachienergy.description: 日立能源(前身为 ABB 的电网业务,被日立收购)是全球高压电网设备的龙头,尤其在大型电力变压器与高压直流输电(HVDC)上份额领先。AI 数据中心用电暴增,不只是「多发点电」这么简单——新增的电要通过变压器、开关站、输电线送到数据中心,而全球大型变压器产能长期紧张、交货周期拉长到数年,「一台变压器一柜难求」。日立能源正处在这个瓶颈的核心:它的变压器、HVDC 与电网设备订单饱满,是「AI 用电激增 → 电网必须扩容升级」这条逻辑最上游、最卡脖子的受益者之一。作为电网现代化与能源转型的关键装备商,它是 AI 电力叙事里不可或缺的一环。
hitachienergy.descriptionEn: Hitachi Energy (formerly ABB's grid business, acquired by Hitachi) is a global leader in high-voltage grid equipment, with leading share especially in large power transformers and high-voltage direct current (HVDC) transmission. Surging AI-data-center power demand isn't simply "generate more electricity" — the new power must reach data centers through transformers, substations and transmission lines, and global large-transformer capacity has long been tight with lead times stretching to years, so "a transformer is hard to come by." Hitachi Energy sits at the core of this bottleneck: its transformer, HVDC and grid-equipment order books are full, making it one of the most upstream, most bottlenecked beneficiaries of "AI power surge → the grid must expand and upgrade." As a key equipment maker for grid modernization and the energy transition, it is an indispensable link in the AI-power story.
whyItMatters: 全球高压电网设备龙头,大型变压器/HVDC 份额领先
AI 用电要经变压器/输电送达,变压器一柜难求
订单饱满,「AI 用电激增→电网扩容」最卡脖子受益者
电网现代化与能源转型关键装备商

siemensenergy.name: 西门子能源
siemensenergy.oneLiner: 燃气轮机与电网设备巨头。
siemensenergy.oneLinerEn: A giant of gas turbines and grid equipment.
siemensenergy.business: 燃气/蒸汽轮机、输配电与电网设备，AI 电力需求推动订单大增。
siemensenergy.businessEn: Gas/steam turbines, transmission and distribution, and grid equipment — with AI power demand driving order surges.
siemensenergy.description: 西门子能源(从西门子拆分)是全球发电与电网设备的巨头,业务横跨燃气/蒸汽轮机(发电)、输配电与电网设备(送电)、以及风电(旗下 Siemens Gamesa)。AI 用电激增给它带来两条主线:一是发电端——数据中心要「立刻能上、能持续」的电,燃气轮机需求猛增,订单排期拉长;二是电网端——变压器、开关站、电网设备同样供不应求。作为少数能同时供「发电 + 电网」的欧洲巨头,西门子能源直接承接了这轮 AI 电力扩张的红利,业绩与订单大幅回暖(此前曾因风电业务亏损承压,如今靠燃气与电网强劲复苏)。它是 AI 电力紧缺行情里最核心的欧洲电气标的之一。
siemensenergy.descriptionEn: Siemens Energy (spun off from Siemens) is a global giant in power-generation and grid equipment, spanning gas/steam turbines (generation), transmission and distribution and grid gear (delivery), and wind (its Siemens Gamesa unit). Surging AI power demand brings two main lines: on generation, data centers need electricity that can "come online now and run continuously," spiking gas-turbine demand with lengthening lead times; on the grid, transformers, substations and grid equipment are equally in short supply. As one of the few European giants supplying both generation and grid, Siemens Energy directly captures this AI-power expansion, with results and orders rebounding strongly (after earlier pressure from wind-business losses, now recovering on strong gas and grid). It is one of the most central European electrical names in the AI power-crunch trade.
whyItMatters: 全球发电与电网设备巨头,燃气轮机+输配电+风电
数据中心要即时持续供电,燃气轮机需求猛增排期长
变压器/电网设备同样供不应求
「发电+电网」双供,AI 电力紧缺核心欧洲标的之一

powell.name: Powell
powell.oneLiner: 配电与开关设备制造商，AI 电力受益股。
powell.oneLinerEn: A maker of distribution and switchgear equipment, an AI-power beneficiary.
powell.tagline: 为关键设施提供电气基础设施
powell.business: 中高压配电设备、开关柜与电气系统，直接受益数据中心供配电扩张。
powell.businessEn: Medium/high-voltage distribution gear, switchgear and electrical systems, directly benefiting from data-center power-distribution expansion.
powell.description: Powell Industries 是美国的中高压配电与开关设备制造商,做的是把电「分配和控制」到用电设施里的电气系统(开关柜、配电盘、电气房等)。它原本主要服务石油天然气、工业等领域,近年数据中心成为新的强劲增长点——每个 AI 数据中心都需要大量中高压配电设备来安全地分配园区里的巨大电力。作为一家体量不大的专业厂商,Powell 在 AI 数据中心与电网扩张的带动下订单与业绩大增、股价一度暴涨,是「AI 电力」链条里弹性很大的中小盘受益股之一。
powell.descriptionEn: Powell Industries is a U.S. maker of medium/high-voltage distribution and switchgear equipment — the electrical systems that "distribute and control" power into facilities (switchgear, panels, electrical houses). Historically it mainly served oil-and-gas and industrial sectors, but data centers have become a strong new growth driver — every AI data center needs large amounts of medium/high-voltage distribution gear to safely allocate the campus's enormous power. As a relatively small specialist, Powell has seen orders and results jump on AI-data-center and grid expansion, with its stock surging at times — a high-beta small/mid-cap beneficiary of the "AI power" chain.
whyItMatters: 美国中高压配电与开关设备制造商
数据中心需大量配电设备安全分配园区巨大电力
从油气/工业拓展到数据中心新增长点
AI 电力链条弹性很大的中小盘受益股

pwr.name: Quanta Services
pwr.oneLiner: 北美最大电网工程建设商。
pwr.tagline: 建设与守护能源基础设施
pwr.taglineEn: Building the infrastructure that powers society
pwr.business: 输配电网络的工程、建设与维护，AI 用电扩张下电网基建的直接承接方。
pwr.businessEn: Engineering, construction and maintenance of transmission/distribution networks — the direct contractor for grid build-out amid AI power expansion.
pwr.description: Quanta Services 是北美最大的电力与基建工程建设商——它不造设备,而是「干活」的那家:雇佣数万名技工,去架设与检修高压输电线、建变电站、扩配电网、铺光缆等。AI 用电激增最终都要落到「电网得实际建起来、扩起来」这件事上,而这正是 Quanta 承接的活。它手握庞大的在手订单(backlog),受益于数据中心接入、电网现代化、可再生能源并网、以及电网老化改造的多重长期需求。作为「把电网蓝图变成现实」的最大承包商,Quanta 是 AI 电力与能源转型里劳动力密集、订单能见度高的核心受益者之一。
pwr.descriptionEn: Quanta Services is North America's largest power and infrastructure construction contractor — it doesn't make equipment but is the one that "does the work": employing tens of thousands of skilled workers to build and repair high-voltage transmission lines, build substations, expand distribution grids and lay fiber. Surging AI power demand ultimately comes down to "the grid actually being built and expanded," which is exactly what Quanta does. It holds a huge order backlog and benefits from the multiple long-term needs of data-center interconnection, grid modernization, renewables integration and aging-grid upgrades. As the largest contractor "turning grid blueprints into reality," Quanta is one of the core, labor-intensive, high-visibility beneficiaries of AI power and the energy transition.
whyItMatters: 北美最大电力与基建工程建设商,「干活」的那家
架设输电线/建变电站/扩配电网,AI 用电最终落地
庞大在手订单,数据中心接入+电网现代化多重需求
「把电网蓝图变现实」最大承包商,能见度高

nvent.name: nVent
nvent.oneLiner: 电气连接与液冷方案商。
nvent.oneLinerEn: A maker of electrical connection and liquid-cooling solutions.
nvent.industry: 数据中心基建 / 电气
nvent.business: 电气外壳、连接与数据中心液冷解决方案，散热与供电双受益。
nvent.businessEn: Electrical enclosures, connections and data-center liquid-cooling solutions — benefiting on both cooling and power.
nvent.description: nVent 是电气连接与防护方案的专业厂商,做电气外壳/机柜、线缆连接与固定、防雷接地等「让电气系统连得牢、护得好」的产品。在 AI 数据中心里,它踩中了两条主线:一是供电——高功率机柜需要大量可靠的电气连接与配电组件;二是散热——nVent 大力布局数据中心液冷(冷板、机柜级液冷分配、冷量输送等),直接承接 AI 机柜从风冷转液冷的需求。作为「供电 + 散热」双线受益的电气方案商,nVent 在这轮 AI 基建里业绩增长强劲,是数据中心电气与热管理供应链的重要一员。
nvent.descriptionEn: nVent is a specialist in electrical connection and protection solutions, making electrical enclosures/cabinets, cable connection and fastening, and lightning/grounding — products that "keep electrical systems securely connected and well protected." In AI data centers it hits two main lines: power — high-power racks need many reliable electrical connections and distribution components; and cooling — nVent has invested heavily in data-center liquid cooling (cold plates, rack-level coolant distribution, coolant delivery), directly capturing the air-to-liquid transition of AI racks. As an electrical-solutions provider benefiting on both power and cooling, nVent has grown strongly in this AI-infrastructure cycle — an important member of the data-center electrical and thermal-management supply chain.
whyItMatters: 电气连接与防护方案商,外壳/连接/接地
供电:高功率机柜需可靠电气连接与配电组件
散热:大力布局数据中心液冷,承接风转液
「供电+散热」双线受益,业绩增长强劲

shinetsu.name: 信越化学
shinetsu.oneLiner: 全球最大硅片与光刻胶材料厂。
shinetsu.oneLinerEn: The world's largest maker of silicon wafers and photoresist materials.
shinetsu.business: 半导体硅片、光刻胶、PVC 与有机硅，多项材料全球份额第一。
shinetsu.businessEn: Semiconductor silicon wafers, photoresist, PVC and silicones — No.1 in the world in several materials.
shinetsu.description: 信越化学(Shin-Etsu)是全球最大的半导体材料公司,多项关键材料份额全球第一。芯片从一片「硅晶圆」开始造,信越是全球最大的硅片供应商;同时它也是光刻胶(把电路图案「印」到晶圆上的感光材料)的主要厂商之一。此外还有 PVC、有机硅、稀土磁材等业务。作为极上游的材料巨头,信越不造芯片却「卡着」芯片制造的原料环节——晶圆和光刻胶质量直接决定良率,AI 芯片扩产越猛,对高纯度硅片与先进光刻胶的需求就越大,信越因此是最稳的半导体材料受益者之一。
shinetsu.descriptionEn: Shin-Etsu Chemical is the world's largest semiconductor-materials company, ranking No.1 globally in several key materials. Chips start from a "silicon wafer," and Shin-Etsu is the world's largest wafer supplier; it is also a major maker of photoresist (the light-sensitive material that "prints" circuit patterns onto wafers). It also has PVC, silicones and rare-earth magnet businesses. As an extreme-upstream materials giant, Shin-Etsu doesn't make chips but controls the raw-material stage of chip manufacturing — wafer and photoresist quality directly determine yield. The harder AI chips ramp, the greater the demand for high-purity wafers and advanced photoresist, making Shin-Etsu one of the most stable semiconductor-materials beneficiaries.
whyItMatters: 全球最大半导体材料公司,多项份额第一
全球最大硅片供应商 + 主要光刻胶厂商
晶圆/光刻胶质量直接决定芯片良率
AI 扩产,高纯硅片与先进光刻胶需求大增

sumco.name: SUMCO
sumco.oneLiner: 全球第二大半导体硅片厂。
sumco.business: 300mm 半导体硅片，与信越合计主导全球硅片供应。

gwafers.name: 环球晶圆
gwafers.oneLiner: 台湾硅片龙头，全球第三。
gwafers.business: 半导体硅片制造，收购世创后跻身全球前三。

jsr.name: JSR
jsr.oneLiner: 全球光刻胶龙头之一（已被日本 JIC 收购）。
jsr.business: 半导体光刻胶(含 EUV 光刻胶)与显示材料，先进制程关键材料。

tok.name: 东京应化
tok.business: 光刻胶与高纯化学品，EUV 光刻胶市占领先。

linde.name: 林德
linde.oneLiner: 全球最大工业与电子特气公司。
linde.business: 工业气体与半导体电子特气，AI 芯片扩产直接受益。

airliquide.name: 液化空气
airliquide.oneLiner: 法国工业气体巨头，电子特气主力。
airliquide.business: 工业与电子特种气体、先进材料，服务全球晶圆厂。

ibiden.name: 揖斐电
ibiden.oneLiner: 高端 ABF 封装载板龙头。
ibiden.oneLinerEn: The leader in high-end ABF packaging substrates.
ibiden.tagline: 以载板连接芯片与世界
ibiden.taglineEn: Substrates that connect chips to the world
ibiden.business: IC 封装载板(ABF 基板)，英伟达/英特尔高端芯片的关键载板供应商。
ibiden.businessEn: IC packaging substrates (ABF substrates), a key supplier for high-end NVIDIA/Intel chips.
ibiden.description: 揖斐电(Ibiden)是全球高端 ABF 封装载板的龙头。封装载板是芯片与主板之间的「桥」——高端 GPU/CPU 的裸晶要先贴到一块布满极精细线路的 ABF 载板上,才能连出上万个引脚、装到系统里。这种载板层数多、线路细、良率难,能做顶级产品的厂商极少,揖斐电是其中技术最强的一家,长期供货英伟达、英特尔等的旗舰芯片。AI GPU 越来越大、引脚越来越多,对高端 ABF 载板的面积与层数需求激增,揖斐电因此成为 AI 算力链上一个隐形却关键的瓶颈供应商。
ibiden.descriptionEn: Ibiden is the world leader in high-end ABF packaging substrates. A packaging substrate is the "bridge" between chip and motherboard — a high-end GPU/CPU die must first be mounted on an ABF substrate covered in extremely fine wiring to route out tens of thousands of pins and integrate into a system. These substrates have many layers, ultra-fine traces and difficult yields, and only a handful of makers can produce top-tier products; Ibiden is the most technically capable, long supplying flagship chips for NVIDIA, Intel and others. As AI GPUs grow larger with more pins, demand for the area and layer count of high-end ABF substrates surges, making Ibiden an invisible but critical bottleneck supplier in the AI compute chain.
whyItMatters: 全球高端 ABF 封装载板龙头
载板是高端 GPU/CPU 连出上万引脚的「桥」
多层细线高良率,能做顶级的厂商极少
AI GPU 变大变多,ABF 载板成关键瓶颈

unimicron.name: 欣兴电子
unimicron.oneLiner: 台湾封装载板与 PCB 龙头。
unimicron.business: IC 载板与高阶 PCB，AI 芯片封装载板需求受益者。

entegris.name: 恩特格里斯
entegris.oneLiner: 半导体材料与纯净管控龙头。
entegris.oneLinerEn: A leader in semiconductor materials and contamination control.
entegris.subcategory: CMP / 过滤 / 纯净管控
entegris.business: CMP 抛光液/垫、过滤与流体输送、先进材料，覆盖芯片制造耗材。
entegris.businessEn: CMP slurries/pads, filtration and fluid handling, and advanced materials — chip-manufacturing consumables.
entegris.description: 恩特格里斯(Entegris)是半导体「纯净管控」与材料耗材的龙头。先进芯片对污染极其敏感——一粒纳米级尘埃就可能毁掉一颗芯片,因此从化学品、气体到晶圆传送的每一环都要极致过滤与纯净。Entegris 提供 CMP 抛光液/抛光垫(把晶圆磨平)、各种过滤与流体输送、以及先进沉积/清洗材料,是芯片厂每天都要消耗的「耗材+纯净」供应商。制程越先进、层数越多,每片晶圆消耗的这类材料就越多,Entegris 因此是随芯片产量与制程升级持续增长的材料标的。
entegris.descriptionEn: Entegris is a leader in semiconductor "contamination control" and materials consumables. Advanced chips are extremely sensitive to contamination — a single nanometer-scale particle can ruin a chip — so every step from chemicals and gases to wafer transport requires extreme filtration and purity. Entegris supplies CMP slurries/pads (to planarize wafers), filtration and fluid handling, and advanced deposition/cleaning materials — the "consumables + purity" supplier that fabs use every day. The more advanced the node and the more layers, the more of these materials each wafer consumes, making Entegris a materials play that grows with chip volume and process upgrades.
whyItMatters: 半导体「纯净管控」与材料耗材龙头
CMP 抛光液/垫 + 过滤 + 流体输送 + 先进材料
先进芯片对污染极敏感,纯净决定良率
制程越先进,每片晶圆耗材越多,持续增长

cabot.name: Cabot 微电子
cabot.oneLiner: CMP 抛光材料龙头（并入 Entegris）。
cabot.business: CMP 抛光液与抛光垫，芯片平坦化关键耗材。

mp.name: MP Materials
mp.oneLiner: 美国唯一稀土矿商，永磁国产化关键。
mp.oneLinerEn: The only U.S. rare-earth miner — key to domestic magnet independence.
mp.tagline: 重建美国稀土磁材供应链
mp.taglineEn: Restoring America's rare-earth magnet supply chain
mp.business: 稀土开采(芒廷帕斯矿)与钕铁硼永磁制造，美国国防部入股，机器人/电动车受益。
mp.businessEn: Rare-earth mining (Mountain Pass) and NdFeB permanent-magnet manufacturing; the U.S. DoD took a stake; a beneficiary of robotics/EV demand.
mp.description: MP Materials 运营着美国唯一的稀土矿——加州芒廷帕斯(Mountain Pass),是美国唯一「从采矿到磁材」全链条整合的稀土公司。稀土永磁(钕铁硼)是电机的心脏,广泛用于电动车、机器人、无人机、风机与国防装备,而全球供应长期被中国主导。为保供安全,2025 年 7 月美国国防部以约 4 亿美元可转优先股入股、成为其最大股东(约 15%),还为 NdPr 氧化物设了 110 美元/公斤保底价、包销其新磁厂十年产量;苹果也签下 5 亿美元采购美产磁材的协议。政策与巨头双重加持让 MP 从矿商变成「稀土自主」的国家级标的,股价大涨。
mp.descriptionEn: MP Materials operates the only U.S. rare-earth mine — Mountain Pass in California — and is the only U.S. company integrated across the full "mine to magnet" chain. Rare-earth permanent magnets (NdFeB) are the heart of electric motors, widely used in EVs, robots, drones, wind turbines and defense equipment, and global supply has long been China-dominated. For supply security, in July 2025 the U.S. Department of Defense invested about $400 million in convertible preferred stock to become its largest shareholder (~15%), set a $110/kg floor price for NdPr oxide and committed to buy a decade of output from its new magnet plant; Apple also signed a $500 million deal to buy U.S.-made magnets. Backed by both policy and a tech giant, MP has turned from a miner into a national "rare-earth independence" name, with its stock surging.
whyItMatters: 美国唯一「采矿到磁材」全链条稀土公司
稀土永磁是电机心脏,机器人/EV/国防刚需
2025 国防部约 4 亿美元入股成最大股东
苹果 5 亿美元采购美产磁材,政策+巨头加持

lynas.name: Lynas
lynas.oneLiner: 中国以外最大稀土生产商。
lynas.oneLinerEn: The largest rare-earth producer outside China.
lynas.tagline: 为世界提供可靠的稀土
lynas.taglineEn: A reliable rare-earth supply for the world
lynas.business: 稀土开采与分离(澳洲+马来西亚)，西方稀土供应链的核心。
lynas.businessEn: Rare-earth mining and separation (Australia + Malaysia) — a cornerstone of the Western rare-earth supply chain.
lynas.description: Lynas Rare Earths(澳大利亚)是中国以外全球最大的稀土生产商。稀土难点不在「挖矿」而在「分离提纯」——把十几种性质相近的稀土元素分开、提纯成可用氧化物,这套工艺长期被中国主导。Lynas 在澳洲采矿(Mount Weld,品位高)、在马来西亚与美国(在建)做分离加工,是西方少数能规模化提供轻/重稀土的公司。在各国追求「去中国化」稀土供应链、并有政府支持(如美国国防部资助其在美建重稀土分离厂)的背景下,Lynas 是西方稀土自主的核心一环。
lynas.descriptionEn: Lynas Rare Earths (Australia) is the largest rare-earth producer outside China. The hard part of rare earths isn't mining but "separation and purification" — separating a dozen chemically similar rare-earth elements and purifying them into usable oxides, a process long dominated by China. Lynas mines in Australia (Mount Weld, high grade) and does separation processing in Malaysia and the U.S. (under construction), one of the few Western companies able to supply light/heavy rare earths at scale. As countries pursue "de-China" rare-earth supply chains with government support (e.g. U.S. DoD funding for its heavy-rare-earth separation plant in the U.S.), Lynas is a cornerstone of Western rare-earth independence.
whyItMatters: 中国以外全球最大稀土生产商
难点在分离提纯,Lynas 是西方少数能规模化的
澳洲采矿 + 马来/美国分离加工
各国去中国化稀土供应链,政府支持

jlmag.name: 金力永磁
jlmag.oneLiner: 中国高性能钕铁硼永磁龙头。
jlmag.business: 高性能钕铁硼永磁材料，供货新能源车、风电、机器人伺服电机。

fcx.name: 自由港
fcx.oneLiner: 全球最大上市铜矿商之一。
fcx.business: 铜、金与钼开采，AI/电气化推升铜需求的核心受益者。

scco.name: 南方铜业
scco.oneLiner: 储量最大的铜矿公司之一。
scco.business: 铜矿开采与冶炼，拥有全球最大铜储量之一。

anduril.name: Anduril
anduril.oneLiner: AI 国防新贵，自主武器与战场操作系统。
anduril.oneLinerEn: A defense-tech upstart building autonomous weapons and a battlefield operating system.
anduril.subcategory: 自主系统 / 战场 OS
anduril.business: Lattice AI 指挥平台、自主无人机/潜航器与反无人机系统，硅谷式颠覆传统军工。
anduril.businessEn: The Lattice AI command platform, autonomous drones/submersibles and counter-drone systems — disrupting traditional defense the Silicon Valley way.
anduril.description: Anduril 由 Oculus 创始人 Palmer Luckey 于 2017 年创立,是「硅谷颠覆军工」的代表。它不靠成本加成拿政府合同,而是像科技公司一样自研自产、卖成品:核心是 Lattice AI 战场操作系统(把各种传感器/无人平台的数据融合成实时战场态势并自动指挥),配上自研的自主无人机、潜航器、反无人机与巡飞弹等硬件。凭借快速迭代与实战交付,Anduril 增长极快——2025 年营收翻倍至约 22 亿美元;2026 年 5 月完成 50 亿美元 H 轮,估值翻倍至约 610 亿美元,由 Thrive 与 a16z 领投,是国防科技融资热潮的旗手。
anduril.descriptionEn: Anduril was founded in 2017 by Oculus creator Palmer Luckey and is the face of "Silicon Valley disrupting defense." Rather than win contracts on cost-plus terms, it builds and sells finished products like a tech company: at its core is the Lattice AI battlefield operating system (fusing data from many sensors/unmanned platforms into real-time situational awareness and automated command), paired with in-house autonomous drones, submersibles, counter-drone systems and loitering munitions. With fast iteration and battlefield delivery, Anduril has grown rapidly — 2025 revenue doubled to about $2.2 billion; in May 2026 it closed a $5 billion Series H, doubling its valuation to about $61 billion, led by Thrive and a16z, making it the standard-bearer of the defense-tech funding boom.
whyItMatters: Lattice 战场 OS 融合传感器/无人平台,自动指挥
自研自产自主无人机/潜航器/反无人机
硅谷式颠覆传统军工的采购与研发模式
2025 营收翻倍至约 22 亿,2026 估值约 610 亿美元

helsing.name: Helsing
helsing.oneLiner: 欧洲最大 AI 国防独角兽。
helsing.tagline: 以 AI 守护民主国家
helsing.business: AI 战场感知与电子战软件、自主飞行器，欧洲防务 AI 领跑者。
helsing.businessEn: AI battlefield-perception and electronic-warfare software plus autonomous aircraft — Europe's defense-AI leader.
helsing.description: Helsing 成立于 2021 年(德国慕尼黑),是欧洲最大的 AI 国防独角兽。它以「软件优先」切入防务:用 AI 实时融合雷达、红外、电子信号等海量战场数据,提升感知与决策,并做电子战与自主飞行器(与萨博等合作把 AI 装进战机、无人机)。俄乌冲突让欧洲各国重整军备、追求技术自主,Helsing 恰好承接这波「欧洲主权防务 AI」需求,融资与估值快速攀升,被视为欧洲版 Anduril。
helsing.descriptionEn: Founded in 2021 in Munich, Helsing is Europe's largest AI defense unicorn. It enters defense "software-first": using AI to fuse vast battlefield data (radar, infrared, electronic signals) in real time to improve perception and decision-making, plus electronic warfare and autonomous aircraft (partnering with the likes of Saab to put AI into fighters and drones). The Russia-Ukraine conflict has driven European nations to rearm and pursue technological sovereignty, and Helsing has captured this wave of "European sovereign defense AI," with funding and valuation climbing fast — seen as Europe's answer to Anduril.
whyItMatters: 欧洲最大 AI 国防独角兽,「欧洲版 Anduril」
AI 融合战场数据,提升感知与决策
电子战 + 自主飞行器,与萨博等合作
承接欧洲重整军备与主权防务 AI 需求

shield_ai.name: Shield AI
shield_ai.oneLiner: 自主无人机 AI 飞行员 Hivemind。
shield_ai.oneLinerEn: Hivemind, the AI pilot for autonomous aircraft.
shield_ai.tagline: 打造世界最好的 AI 飞行员
shield_ai.taglineEn: Building the world's best AI pilot
shield_ai.business: Hivemind 自主飞行 AI，让无人机在无 GPS/通信下自主作战。
shield_ai.businessEn: Hivemind autonomous-flight AI that lets aircraft operate without GPS or communications.
shield_ai.description: Shield AI 成立于 2015 年,核心产品是 Hivemind——一个「AI 飞行员」软件,让无人机/战机在没有 GPS、没有通信链路(会被敌方干扰)的环境下,也能自主感知、规划并完成作战任务。它把这套自主性装进自研的 V-BAT 垂直起降无人机,也向 F-16 等有人/无人平台输出。在现代战争「电子战使 GPS/通信不可靠」的背景下,「不依赖链路的自主飞行」成为刚需,Shield AI 因此成为自主军用航空的头部玩家之一。
shield_ai.descriptionEn: Founded in 2015, Shield AI's core product is Hivemind — an "AI pilot" that lets drones and aircraft autonomously sense, plan and complete missions even without GPS or communication links (which adversaries can jam). It builds this autonomy into its own V-BAT vertical-takeoff drone and also brings it to platforms like the F-16. As modern warfare makes GPS/comms unreliable through electronic warfare, "link-independent autonomous flight" has become essential, making Shield AI a leader in autonomous military aviation.
whyItMatters: Hivemind AI 飞行员,无 GPS/通信也能自主作战
装进自研 V-BAT 无人机,也输出给 F-16 等
电子战使链路不可靠,自主飞行成刚需
自主军用航空头部玩家之一

neuralink.name: Neuralink
neuralink.oneLiner: 马斯克的脑机接口公司，已植入人体。
neuralink.oneLinerEn: Elon Musk's brain-computer-interface company, already implanted in humans.
neuralink.tagline: 在大脑与机器之间架起桥梁
neuralink.business: 高带宽植入式脑机接口(N1 芯片 + 手术机器人)，让瘫痪者用意念操控设备。
neuralink.businessEn: A high-bandwidth implantable brain-computer interface (N1 chip + surgical robot) that lets paralyzed people control devices with thought.
neuralink.description: Neuralink 是 Elon Musk 创立的脑机接口(BCI)公司,也是这一领域最受关注的玩家。它把一枚硬币大小的 N1 芯片,通过自研手术机器人,将上千根比头发还细的电极植入大脑皮层,直接读取神经信号——让因脊髓损伤或渐冻症(ALS)而瘫痪的患者,仅凭「意念」就能操控电脑光标、打字、玩游戏乃至机械臂。2024 年初首位患者植入,到 2026 年中已有约 26 位受试者,并把试验扩展到英国、加拿大、阿联酋等地,还开展了从「意念」解码语言的 VOICE 试验。Musk 计划 2026 年走向高通量生产与几乎全自动的植入手术。Neuralink 代表了 BCI 里「高带宽、深植入」最激进的路线,长期愿景直指「人机融合」。
neuralink.descriptionEn: Neuralink is the brain-computer interface (BCI) company founded by Elon Musk and the most-watched player in the field. Using its own surgical robot, it implants a coin-sized N1 chip with thousands of electrodes thinner than a hair into the cerebral cortex to read neural signals directly — letting people paralyzed by spinal-cord injury or ALS control a computer cursor, type, play games and even a robotic arm purely by "thought." After its first patient in early 2024, it had about 26 participants by mid-2026, expanded trials to the UK, Canada and the UAE, and launched a VOICE trial to decode speech from thought. Musk plans to move toward high-volume production and almost fully automated implant surgery in 2026. Neuralink represents the most aggressive "high-bandwidth, deep-implant" path in BCI, with a long-term vision pointing to human-machine fusion.
whyItMatters: N1 芯片 + 手术机器人,上千电极植入大脑皮层
让瘫痪者用意念操控电脑/机械臂,2024 首例植入
2026 中约 26 位受试者,扩展至英/加/阿联酋,VOICE 解码语言
BCI 最激进「高带宽深植入」路线,愿景指向人机融合

synchron.name: Synchron
synchron.oneLiner: 微创脑机接口，经血管植入。
synchron.oneLinerEn: A minimally invasive brain-computer interface, implanted through a blood vessel.
synchron.taglineEn: A brain interface without open-brain surgery
synchron.business: Stentrode 经血管支架电极，无需开颅，获贝索斯与盖茨投资。
synchron.businessEn: The Stentrode endovascular electrode requires no open-skull surgery; backed by Bezos and Gates.
synchron.description: Synchron 走的是与 Neuralink 完全不同的「微创」路线。它的 Stentrode 是一个带电极的支架,像做心脏支架手术一样,顺着血管一路送到大脑运动皮层附近的血管里张开,从血管内壁读取神经信号——完全不用开颅。这大大降低了手术风险与门槛,是其最大卖点。患者可用「意念」操控电脑、发消息等。Synchron 获贝索斯、盖茨等重磅投资,2025 年 11 月完成 2 亿美元 D 轮,正筹备 2026 年的关键性临床试验(pivotal trial),目标成为首个获 FDA 上市批准(PMA)的植入式脑机接口。它代表了 BCI 里「安全、可及、先商业化」的务实路线。
synchron.descriptionEn: Synchron takes a "minimally invasive" path entirely different from Neuralink. Its Stentrode is a stent with electrodes that, like a cardiac stent procedure, is threaded up through a blood vessel to a vessel near the brain's motor cortex and expanded, reading neural signals from inside the vessel wall — with no open-skull surgery at all. This greatly lowers surgical risk and barrier, its biggest selling point. Patients can use "thought" to control a computer, send messages and more. Backed by Jeff Bezos, Bill Gates and others, Synchron closed a $200 million Series D in November 2025 and is preparing a pivotal clinical trial for 2026, aiming to be the first implantable BCI to win FDA premarket approval (PMA). It represents the pragmatic "safe, accessible, commercialize-first" path in BCI.
whyItMatters: Stentrode 经血管植入,像做心脏支架,无需开颅
大幅降低手术风险与门槛,最大卖点
贝索斯/盖茨投资,2025 D 轮 2 亿美元
筹备 2026 关键试验,冲首个 FDA 批准植入式 BCI

precision_neuro.name: Precision Neuroscience
precision_neuro.oneLiner: 薄膜电极脑机接口新锐。
precision_neuro.tagline: 更安全、可逆的脑机接口
precision_neuro.business: 超薄柔性皮层电极阵列，可微创放置与移除，Neuralink 联创出走创立。
precision_neuro.businessEn: An ultra-thin, flexible cortical electrode array that can be placed and removed minimally invasively; founded by a Neuralink co-founder.
precision_neuro.description: Precision Neuroscience 由 Neuralink 联合创始人之一 Ben Rapoport(神经外科医生)出走创立,主张一条更「温和可逆」的脑机接口路线。它的电极是一片超薄、柔性的薄膜阵列(Layer 7),像贴纸一样通过一道极小的切口贴在大脑皮层表面,不刺入脑组织,因此更安全、创伤更小、还能取出或更换。它在「电极通道数(带宽)」与「安全微创」之间寻求更好的平衡,已在临床上采集高分辨率的脑信号。作为「介于 Neuralink 深植入与 Synchron 血管路线之间」的第三条路,Precision 是脑机接口赛道进展领先、最受关注的玩家之一。
precision_neuro.descriptionEn: Precision Neuroscience was founded by Neuralink co-founder Ben Rapoport (a neurosurgeon) who left to pursue a gentler, reversible BCI path. Its electrode is an ultra-thin, flexible film array (Layer 7) placed like a sticker on the surface of the cerebral cortex through a tiny incision, without penetrating brain tissue — making it safer, less traumatic and removable or replaceable. It seeks a better balance between "electrode channel count (bandwidth)" and "safe, minimally invasive," and has already captured high-resolution brain signals clinically. As a "third path between Neuralink's deep implant and Synchron's vascular route," Precision is one of the most advanced and watched players in BCI.
whyItMatters: Neuralink 联创神经外科医生 Ben Rapoport 创立
超薄柔性薄膜电极贴在皮层表面,不刺入脑组织
更安全、创伤小、可取出更换
介于深植入与血管路线的第三条路,进展领先

ionet.name: io.net
ionet.oneLiner: 去中心化 GPU 算力网络。
ionet.tagline: 把闲置 GPU 变成 AI 算力网络
ionet.taglineEn: Turning idle GPUs into an AI compute network
ionet.business: 用区块链聚合全球分散 GPU 成算力市场，为 AI/ML 提供低价按需算力。
ionet.businessEn: Uses blockchain to aggregate scattered GPUs worldwide into a compute marketplace, offering cheap on-demand compute for AI/ML.
ionet.description: io.net 是「去中心化物理基础设施(DePIN)」在 AI 算力上的代表:它用区块链(基于 Solana)把散落在数据中心、矿场、个人手里的闲置 GPU 聚合成一个统一的算力市场,让 AI/ML 开发者能以比传统云更低的价格按需租用算力,GPU 提供方则赚取代币激励。它试图绕开「大厂云 + 英伟达」的算力垄断,用众包的方式提供更便宜的推理/训练资源。作为加密 + AI 的交叉产物,io.net 增长快、话题度高,但也伴随代币波动、算力质量参差与商业模式尚待验证等争议。
ionet.descriptionEn: io.net is a leading example of "decentralized physical infrastructure (DePIN)" applied to AI compute: using blockchain (built on Solana) to aggregate idle GPUs scattered across data centers, mining farms and individuals into a unified compute marketplace, so AI/ML developers can rent compute on demand at prices below traditional clouds while GPU providers earn token incentives. It aims to bypass the "big-cloud + NVIDIA" compute oligopoly by crowdsourcing cheaper inference/training resources. As a crypto-meets-AI product, io.net grows fast with high buzz, but comes with token volatility, uneven compute quality and an as-yet-unproven business model.
whyItMatters: DePIN 代表,区块链聚合闲置 GPU 成算力市场
比传统云更低价的按需 AI 算力,提供方赚代币
试图绕开「大厂云 + 英伟达」算力垄断
加密+AI 交叉,增长快但商业模式待验证

render.name: Render Network
render.oneLiner: 去中心化 GPU 渲染 / 算力网络。
render.oneLinerEn: A decentralized GPU rendering / compute network.
render.tagline: 为创作者众包 GPU 算力
render.business: 把闲置 GPU 聚合用于 3D 渲染与 AI 计算，代币激励的去中心化算力。
render.businessEn: Aggregates idle GPUs for 3D rendering and AI compute — token-incentivized decentralized compute.
render.description: Render Network 源自 3D 渲染软件公司 OTOY,最初解决的是「影视/特效渲染太慢太贵」的问题:把全球闲置的 GPU 用区块链众包起来,让创作者能便宜、快速地渲染 3D 场景,GPU 提供方赚 RENDER 代币。近年它顺势把网络从「渲染」拓展到「AI 计算」,加入去中心化算力的浪潮。作为最早、最知名的 DePIN 算力项目之一(后迁移到 Solana),Render 在数字艺术、影视与元宇宙圈有真实用户基础,但和其他 DePIN 一样,面临代币波动与「去中心算力能否规模化服务前沿 AI」的疑问。
render.descriptionEn: Render Network originated from 3D-rendering software company OTOY and first solved the problem that "film/VFX rendering is too slow and expensive": crowdsourcing idle GPUs worldwide via blockchain so creators can render 3D scenes cheaply and quickly while GPU providers earn RENDER tokens. More recently it has extended the network from "rendering" into "AI compute," joining the decentralized-compute wave. As one of the earliest and best-known DePIN compute projects (later migrated to Solana), Render has a real user base in digital art, film and the metaverse, but like other DePIN faces token volatility and the question of whether decentralized compute can serve frontier AI at scale.
whyItMatters: 源自 OTOY,最早解决 3D 渲染太慢太贵
区块链众包闲置 GPU,提供方赚 RENDER 代币
从渲染拓展到 AI 计算,加入去中心算力浪潮
数字艺术/影视有真实用户,但规模化存疑

akash.name: Akash
akash.oneLiner: 去中心化云算力市场（「云的 Airbnb」）。
akash.oneLinerEn: A decentralized cloud-compute marketplace (the "Airbnb of cloud").
akash.business: 开源去中心化云，用竞价市场撮合 GPU/CPU 算力，主打低价 AI 部署。
akash.businessEn: An open-source decentralized cloud that matches GPU/CPU compute via a reverse-auction marketplace, focused on cheap AI deployment.
akash.description: Akash Network 号称「云的 Airbnb」:它是一个开源的去中心化云市场(基于 Cosmos),有闲置算力的人(数据中心、个人)把 GPU/CPU 挂上来,需要算力的开发者通过「反向竞价」拍下最便宜的资源来部署应用与 AI 工作负载,用 AKT 代币结算。它的卖点是显著低于传统云的价格与开放无需许可。随着 GPU 紧缺、AI 算力昂贵,Akash 顺势主打 GPU 租赁与 AI 部署。它是 DePIN 去中心云的代表之一,理念激进,但同样要回答质量、可靠性与合规能否满足严肃 AI 生产需求的问题。
akash.descriptionEn: Akash Network bills itself as the "Airbnb of cloud": an open-source decentralized cloud marketplace (built on Cosmos) where those with spare compute (data centers, individuals) list GPUs/CPUs, and developers who need compute win the cheapest resources through a "reverse auction" to deploy apps and AI workloads, settled in AKT tokens. Its selling points are prices well below traditional clouds and open, permissionless access. Amid GPU scarcity and expensive AI compute, Akash leans into GPU rental and AI deployment. A leading DePIN decentralized-cloud name with a radical ethos, it must still answer whether quality, reliability and compliance can meet serious AI production needs.
whyItMatters: 「云的 Airbnb」,开源去中心化云市场
反向竞价拍下最便宜 GPU/CPU,AKT 结算
价格显著低于传统云、开放无需许可
DePIN 去中心云代表,质量/合规仍待验证

bittensor.name: Bittensor
bittensor.oneLiner: 去中心化机器学习网络（AI 的区块链）。
bittensor.oneLinerEn: A decentralized machine-learning network (a blockchain for AI).
bittensor.tagline: 为智能定价的开放网络
bittensor.taglineEn: An open market that prices intelligence
bittensor.business: 用代币激励的去中心化协议，让全球节点协作训练与提供 AI 模型服务。
bittensor.businessEn: A token-incentivized decentralized protocol where nodes worldwide collaborate to train and serve AI models.
bittensor.description: Bittensor 是一个「AI 的区块链」:它用代币(TAO)激励构建一个去中心化的机器学习网络,由许多「子网(subnet)」组成,每个子网专注一类任务(如大模型推理、文生图、数据抓取、预测等)。节点(矿工)提供 AI 模型/算力/数据来竞争,由验证者按贡献质量打分,好的贡献获得 TAO 奖励。它的理念是:与其让 AI 被少数巨头垄断,不如用市场化、激励化的开放网络众包出「智能」,让任何人都能贡献并获益。作为加密 + AI 最受关注的项目之一,Bittensor 想象空间大,但也高度实验性——子网质量参差、代币投机浓、能否产出真正有竞争力的 AI 仍是最大问号。
bittensor.descriptionEn: Bittensor is a "blockchain for AI": it uses a token (TAO) to incentivize a decentralized machine-learning network made of many "subnets," each focused on a task type (LLM inference, text-to-image, data scraping, prediction, etc.). Nodes (miners) compete by providing AI models/compute/data, validators score them by contribution quality, and good contributions earn TAO. Its thesis: rather than let AI be monopolized by a few giants, crowdsource "intelligence" through a market-based, incentivized open network where anyone can contribute and benefit. As one of the most-watched crypto-meets-AI projects, Bittensor has big imaginative upside but is highly experimental — uneven subnet quality, heavy token speculation, and whether it can produce genuinely competitive AI remain the biggest questions.
whyItMatters: 「AI 的区块链」,TAO 代币激励去中心 ML 网络
由许多「子网」组成,各专注一类 AI 任务
理念:用开放激励网络众包「智能」,抗巨头垄断
想象空间大但高度实验性,质量/投机存疑

inworld.name: Inworld AI
inworld.oneLiner: 游戏与虚拟世界的 AI 角色引擎。
inworld.oneLinerEn: An AI character engine for games and virtual worlds.
inworld.tagline: 让虚拟角色真正活起来
inworld.business: 驱动游戏 NPC 的对话/行为 AI，让虚拟角色有记忆与个性。
inworld.businessEn: Dialogue/behavior AI that powers game NPCs, giving virtual characters memory and personality.
inworld.description: Inworld AI 是游戏与虚拟世界里的「AI 角色引擎」。传统游戏 NPC 只会念死板的预设台词,Inworld 让开发者给角色赋予个性、记忆、情绪和目标,使 NPC 能听懂玩家的话、即兴对话、并随剧情自然反应——像真的「活」在游戏里。它把这套能力做成引擎/SDK,接入 Unreal、Unity 等主流游戏引擎,服务游戏工作室、品牌与娱乐公司。随着生成式 AI 让「可交互的虚拟人」成为可能,Inworld 是「AI 原生游戏/虚拟世界」赛道最受关注的公司之一,获英伟达等投资。
inworld.descriptionEn: Inworld AI is an "AI character engine" for games and virtual worlds. Traditional game NPCs recite rigid scripted lines; Inworld lets developers give characters personality, memory, emotion and goals so NPCs can understand what players say, improvise dialogue and react naturally to the story — as if truly "alive" in the game. It packages this as an engine/SDK integrated with mainstream engines like Unreal and Unity, serving game studios, brands and entertainment companies. As generative AI makes "interactive virtual humans" possible, Inworld is one of the most-watched companies in "AI-native games/virtual worlds," backed by NVIDIA and others.
whyItMatters: 让 NPC 有个性/记忆/情绪,能即兴对话
引擎/SDK 接入 Unreal/Unity,服务游戏工作室
生成式 AI 让「可交互虚拟人」成为可能
AI 原生游戏/虚拟世界代表,英伟达等投资

scenario.name: Scenario
scenario.oneLiner: 游戏美术 AI 生成平台。
scenario.oneLinerEn: An AI art-generation platform for games.
scenario.tagline: 为游戏而生的可控生成
scenario.business: 为游戏工作室按风格生成一致的 2D/3D 美术素材。
scenario.businessEn: Generates style-consistent 2D/3D art assets for game studios.
scenario.description: Scenario 是面向游戏工作室的美术 AI 生成平台。做游戏要海量美术素材(道具、角色、场景、UI 等),而通用文生图很难保证「风格统一、可复用、可控」。Scenario 让工作室用自己的素材训练专属风格模型,再按这套风格批量生成一致的 2D/3D 资产,并提供构图、参考图、局部重绘等精细控制,真正贴合游戏美术生产管线。它主打「可控 + 一致 + IP 安全(用你自己的数据)」,帮中小工作室大幅提效,是「生成式 AI 进游戏美术流程」的代表之一。
scenario.descriptionEn: Scenario is an AI art-generation platform for game studios. Making games requires vast art assets (props, characters, scenes, UI), and general text-to-image struggles to guarantee "consistent style, reusable, controllable." Scenario lets studios train custom style models on their own assets and then batch-generate consistent 2D/3D assets in that style, with fine control over composition, reference images and inpainting — genuinely fitting the game-art production pipeline. Emphasizing "controllable + consistent + IP-safe (using your own data)," it greatly boosts efficiency for small and mid-size studios — a representative of "generative AI entering the game-art workflow."
whyItMatters: 让工作室用自有素材训专属风格模型
按风格批量生成一致的 2D/3D 资产
构图/参考/局部重绘等精细控制,贴合美术管线
可控+一致+IP 安全,游戏美术提效代表

tii.name: TII（Falcon）
tii.oneLiner: 阿联酋研究院，Falcon 开源大模型。
tii.oneLinerEn: The UAE research institute behind the open-source Falcon models.
tii.tagline: 以开放模型推动中东 AI
tii.taglineEn: Advancing Middle East AI through open models
tii.business: 技术创新研究院(TII)推出 Falcon 系列开源大模型，中东 AI 代表。
tii.businessEn: The Technology Innovation Institute (TII) develops the open-source Falcon model series — a flagship of Middle East AI.
tii.description: TII(技术创新研究院)是阿联酋阿布扎比政府支持的研究机构,以开源大模型 Falcon 系列闻名。Falcon 是最早一批高质量、开放许可的大模型之一,一度登顶开源榜单,让阿联酋在全球 AI 版图上占得一席之地,也是海湾国家用「石油财富转科技投入」布局 AI 的标志性成果。TII 持续迭代 Falcon(含多模态与更大规模版本),把它开源给全球研究者与企业使用。作为「主权 AI」在中东的代表,TII 与阿联酋整体(G42、MGX 等)的 AI/算力雄心一脉相承。
tii.descriptionEn: TII (Technology Innovation Institute) is a research institute backed by the government of Abu Dhabi, UAE, known for the open-source Falcon model series. Falcon was among the first batch of high-quality, openly licensed large models, once topping open-source leaderboards and giving the UAE a place on the global AI map — a landmark result of Gulf states turning "oil wealth into tech investment" for AI. TII keeps iterating Falcon (including multimodal and larger versions) and open-sources it for researchers and enterprises worldwide. As a Middle East flagship of "sovereign AI," TII is aligned with the UAE's broader AI/compute ambitions (G42, MGX and others).
whyItMatters: 阿布扎比政府支持,Falcon 开源大模型闻名
Falcon 是最早一批高质量开放许可大模型
让阿联酋在全球 AI 版图占得一席之地
「石油财富转科技」的主权 AI 中东代表

quora.name: Quora（Poe）
quora.oneLiner: 问答社区 Quora，旗下 Poe 聚合各家大模型。
quora.oneLinerEn: The Q&A community Quora, whose Poe aggregates many AI models.
quora.tagline: 分享和增长世界的知识
quora.taglineEn: To share and grow the world's knowledge
quora.subcategory: 问答社区 / 模型聚合
quora.business: Poe 平台聚合 GPT/Claude/Gemini 等多家模型，一站式对话。
quora.businessEn: The Poe platform aggregates models like GPT, Claude and Gemini for one-stop chat.
quora.description: Quora 是老牌的问答社区(由前 Facebook CTO Adam D'Angelo 创立),而它在 AI 时代的第二增长曲线是 Poe。Poe 是一个「大模型聚合平台」:用户订一个会员,就能在一个界面里同时用 GPT、Claude、Gemini 等多家顶级模型,以及社区创建的各种自定义机器人(bot),还能自己搭 bot。对不想分别订阅、想「哪个好用用哪个」的普通用户,Poe 提供了便捷入口;对开发者,Poe 提供分发与变现渠道。作为「模型中立聚合器」,Poe 让 Quora 在生成式 AI 浪潮里找到新的定位。
quora.descriptionEn: Quora is a veteran Q&A community (founded by former Facebook CTO Adam D'Angelo), and its second growth curve in the AI era is Poe. Poe is a "model aggregation platform": with a single subscription, users can use multiple top models — GPT, Claude, Gemini and more — in one interface, plus a wide range of community-created custom bots, and build their own bots. For ordinary users who don't want separate subscriptions and prefer "use whichever works best," Poe offers a convenient entry point; for developers, Poe offers distribution and monetization. As a "model-neutral aggregator," Poe has given Quora a new place in the generative-AI wave.
whyItMatters: Poe 一个会员聚合 GPT/Claude/Gemini 等多家模型
支持社区自定义 bot,用户可自己搭
为普通用户提供「哪个好用用哪个」便捷入口
模型中立聚合器,Quora 的 AI 第二曲线

kuaishou.name: 快手
kuaishou.oneLiner: 短视频平台，可灵(Kling)视频生成出圈。
kuaishou.oneLinerEn: A short-video platform whose Kling video generator broke out.
kuaishou.industry: 短视频 / 生成式媒体
kuaishou.business: 短视频与直播平台，自研可灵(Kling)AI 视频生成，效果对标 Sora。
kuaishou.businessEn: A short-video and livestreaming platform whose in-house Kling AI video generator rivals Sora.
kuaishou.description: 快手(Kuaishou)是中国头部短视频与直播平台之一(港股上市),在下沉市场与直播电商上尤其强。它在生成式 AI 上最出圈的成果是可灵(Kling)——一个效果对标 OpenAI Sora 的 AI 视频生成模型。在 Sora 迟迟未大规模开放时,可灵率先向公众开放并快速迭代,生成的视频在时长、运动一致性与画质上表现亮眼,一度成为全球最受关注的可用文生视频产品之一,并对外提供 API。可灵既能反哺快手自身的内容生态(创作者用 AI 做视频),也是一条独立的商业化路线,让快手成为「大厂自研视频大模型」的代表之一。
kuaishou.descriptionEn: Kuaishou is one of China's leading short-video and livestreaming platforms (listed in Hong Kong), especially strong in lower-tier markets and livestream e-commerce. Its biggest generative-AI breakout is Kling — an AI video-generation model that rivals OpenAI's Sora. While Sora was slow to open broadly, Kling was among the first opened to the public and iterated fast, with generated video impressing on duration, motion consistency and image quality, briefly one of the world's most-watched usable text-to-video products, and offered via API. Kling both feeds back into Kuaishou's own content ecosystem (creators making videos with AI) and is a standalone commercialization path, making Kuaishou a representative of "big-tech in-house video models."
whyItMatters: 中国头部短视频/直播平台,下沉与直播电商强
可灵(Kling)对标 Sora,率先向公众开放并快速迭代
视频时长/运动一致性/画质亮眼,并提供 API
反哺内容生态 + 独立商业化,大厂自研视频大模型代表

cartesia.name: Cartesia
cartesia.oneLiner: 超低延迟实时语音模型。
cartesia.tagline: 为实时而生的语音智能
cartesia.taglineEn: Voice intelligence built for real time
cartesia.business: 基于状态空间模型的实时语音生成，主打低延迟语音智能体。
cartesia.businessEn: Real-time voice generation based on state-space models, focused on low-latency voice agents.
cartesia.description: Cartesia 由状态空间模型(SSM/Mamba 一脉)的核心研究者创立,专攻「实时语音」。语音智能体要像人一样自然对话,最难的是延迟——它必须在几十毫秒内边听边想边说。Cartesia 用 SSM 这种线性、流式友好的架构做语音生成(Sonic 等模型),把延迟压到极低,让 AI 打电话、做客服、做陪伴时几乎没有「卡顿感」。它把这套超低延迟语音能力做成 API,供大量语音智能体创业公司调用,是「实时语音基础设施」赛道里技术底子很硬的一家,与 ElevenLabs 等在不同侧重上竞争。
cartesia.descriptionEn: Cartesia was founded by core researchers behind state-space models (the SSM/Mamba lineage) and specializes in "real-time voice." For a voice agent to converse as naturally as a human, the hardest part is latency — it must listen, think and speak within tens of milliseconds. Cartesia uses SSMs — a linear, streaming-friendly architecture — for voice generation (models like Sonic), pushing latency extremely low so AI phone calls, support and companionship feel almost lag-free. It packages this ultra-low-latency voice capability as an API used by many voice-agent startups, a technically strong player in "real-time voice infrastructure," competing with ElevenLabs on different emphases.
whyItMatters: 创始团队是状态空间模型(SSM/Mamba)核心研究者
用 SSM 做流式语音,把实时延迟压到极低
让 AI 打电话/客服几乎无「卡顿感」
超低延迟语音 API,实时语音基础设施硬玩家

robotera.name: 星动纪元
robotera.oneLiner: 清华系人形机器人公司。
robotera.tagline: 让机器人拥有智能的身体
robotera.subcategory: 人形机器人 + 具身大模型
robotera.business: 小星等人形机器人与具身智能大模型，清华交叉信息院孵化。
robotera.businessEn: Humanoids like Xiaoxing (XBot) plus embodied foundation models, incubated by Tsinghua's IIIS.
robotera.description: 星动纪元(Robot Era)由清华大学交叉信息研究院(姚班所在的 IIIS)孵化,是「学术派」人形机器人的代表。它强调「本体 + 具身大脑」一体化自研:既做全尺寸人形与灵巧手等硬件(如小星系列),也自研端到端的具身智能大模型,让机器人从感知到动作由统一的神经网络驱动。依托清华的科研积淀和人才,星动纪元在灵巧操作、全身运动控制上进展亮眼,是中国具身智能第一梯队中偏「前沿研究驱动」的一家。
robotera.descriptionEn: Robot Era was incubated by Tsinghua University's Institute for Interdisciplinary Information Sciences (IIIS, home of the Yao Class) and is a representative of the "academic" school of humanoid robotics. It emphasizes integrated in-house development of "body + embodied brain": building full-size humanoids and dexterous hands (like the Xiaoxing/XBot series) while also developing end-to-end embodied foundation models, so the robot is driven from perception to action by a unified neural network. Backed by Tsinghua's research depth and talent, Robot Era has made notable progress in dexterous manipulation and whole-body motion control — a research-driven front-runner in Chinese embodied intelligence.
whyItMatters: 清华交叉信息院(IIIS)孵化,学术血统硬
「本体 + 具身大脑」一体化自研
灵巧操作与全身运动控制进展亮眼
中国具身智能「前沿研究驱动」代表

engineai.name: 众擎机器人
engineai.oneLiner: 深圳人形机器人新锐，主打运动能力。
engineai.oneLinerEn: A Shenzhen humanoid-robot upstart known for athletic motion.
engineai.business: SE/PM 系列人形机器人，以自然步态与高动态运动著称。
engineai.businessEn: The SE/PM humanoid series, known for natural gait and high-dynamic motion.
engineai.description: 众擎机器人(EngineAI)成立于 2023 年(深圳),是主打「运动能力」的人形机器人新锐。它的差异化在于让机器人走得更像人、动得更灵活——SE、PM 等系列以自然的直膝步态、高动态运动(如前空翻、跑步)在社媒上多次出圈,展示了扎实的运动控制与本体设计功力。依托深圳完善的机器人供应链,众擎走「高性价比 + 强运动」路线,并对开发者开放,是中国人形机器人「运动派」的代表之一。
engineai.descriptionEn: EngineAI was founded in 2023 in Shenzhen and is a humanoid-robot upstart centered on "athletic motion." Its differentiation is making robots walk more like humans and move more nimbly — its SE and PM series have gone viral on social media with natural straight-knee gaits and high-dynamic moves (front flips, running), showcasing solid motion control and hardware design. Leveraging Shenzhen's mature robotics supply chain, EngineAI pursues a "cost-performance + strong motion" strategy and is open to developers — a representative of the "motion school" of Chinese humanoids.
whyItMatters: 主打运动能力,自然直膝步态、高动态动作
前空翻/跑步等演示多次社媒出圈
依托深圳供应链,高性价比 + 强运动
对开发者开放,中国人形「运动派」代表

momenta.name: Momenta
momenta.oneLiner: 中国头部智能驾驶方案商，2026 港股上市。
momenta.oneLinerEn: A top Chinese autonomous-driving supplier; listed in Hong Kong in 2026.
momenta.taglineEn: Building the brain for autonomous driving
momenta.business: 量产高阶智能驾驶(城市 NOA)与 L4 双飞轮，供货多家车企。
momenta.businessEn: A "two-flywheel" strategy pairing mass-production advanced driving (urban NOA) with L4, supplying many automakers.
momenta.description: Momenta(魔门塔)是中国头部智能驾驶方案商,走「两条腿走路(双飞轮)」路线:一边把高阶辅助驾驶(城市 NOA、高速领航)做成能量产上车的软件、供货给多家中外车企(通用等为其股东/客户),用真实路况数据不断喂养算法;一边研发面向未来的 L4 Robotaxi。这种「量产赚钱 + 数据反哺 + 冲击 L4」的闭环是其核心逻辑。2026 年 7 月 8 日,Momenta 在港交所上市(06880),募资约 7.52 亿美元、估值约 90 亿美元,GIC、富达、贝莱德、奔驰等为基石投资者,是中国智驾赴港上市的代表之一。
momenta.descriptionEn: Momenta is a top Chinese autonomous-driving supplier pursuing a "two-flywheel" strategy: on one side it turns advanced assisted driving (urban NOA, highway pilot) into production-ready software supplied to many Chinese and foreign automakers (GM is a shareholder/customer), using real-world data to continuously feed its algorithms; on the other it develops future L4 robotaxi. This loop of "mass-production revenue + data feedback + pushing toward L4" is its core logic. On July 8, 2026, Momenta listed in Hong Kong (06880), raising about $752 million at roughly a $9 billion valuation, with cornerstone investors including GIC, Fidelity, BlackRock and Mercedes-Benz — a flagship of Chinese autonomous-driving IPOs in Hong Kong.
whyItMatters: 「双飞轮」:量产高阶智驾 + 研发 L4
量产软件供货多家中外车企,通用为股东/客户
真实路况数据反哺算法,闭环飞轮
2026.7 港股上市,募资约 7.52 亿、估值约 90 亿美元

augment.name: Augment Code
augment.oneLiner: 面向大型代码库的 AI 编程助手。
augment.oneLinerEn: An AI coding assistant for large codebases.
augment.tagline: 为专业工程团队而生的 AI
augment.business: 深度理解企业级大型代码库的 AI 编程与智能体。
augment.businessEn: AI coding and agents that deeply understand large enterprise codebases.
augment.description: Augment Code 专注「大型、真实的企业代码库」这一硬场景。个人项目谁都能补全,但大公司的代码库动辄上千万行、跨几百个仓库、充满内部约定与历史包袱,通用工具往往「看不懂全局」。Augment 用强大的代码库上下文引擎(索引整个组织的代码、依赖与规范),让 AI 的补全、问答、重构与智能体能真正贴合这套复杂上下文,面向专业工程团队而非爱好者。它主打企业级的安全、准确与团队协作,是与 Cursor/GitHub Copilot 差异化竞争、专攻「大团队大代码库」的 AI 编程玩家。
augment.descriptionEn: Augment Code focuses on the hard case of "large, real enterprise codebases." Anyone can autocomplete a personal project, but a big company's codebase often spans tens of millions of lines across hundreds of repos, full of internal conventions and legacy — where general tools "can't see the whole picture." Augment uses a powerful codebase-context engine (indexing an entire organization's code, dependencies and conventions) so AI completion, Q&A, refactoring and agents genuinely fit that complex context, aimed at professional engineering teams rather than hobbyists. Emphasizing enterprise-grade security, accuracy and team collaboration, it competes differently from Cursor/GitHub Copilot by specializing in "big teams, big codebases."
whyItMatters: 专攻大型企业代码库(千万行、多仓、重历史)
强代码库上下文引擎,索引全组织代码与规范
面向专业工程团队,强调安全/准确/协作
与 Cursor/Copilot 差异化,主攻「大团队大代码库」
