astera.name: Astera Labs
astera.oneLiner: AI 服务器连接芯片新贵（PCIe/CXL 重定时器）。
astera.tagline: 为 AI 打通数据高速路
astera.business: 重定时器、CXL 内存控制器与连接方案，解决 GPU 集群内高速互联瓶颈。
astera.businessEn: Retimers, CXL memory controllers and connectivity solutions that solve high-speed interconnect bottlenecks inside GPU clusters.
astera.description: Astera Labs 是专为 AI 数据中心做「连接芯片」的新贵。GPU、CPU、内存之间要以极高速率传数据,但信号跑长了会衰减失真——Astera 的重定时器(retimer)芯片就像「信号中继站」,把 PCIe/以太网等高速信号放大整形、跑得更远更稳。它还做 CXL 内存控制器(让 CPU/GPU 灵活共享和扩展内存)与整套连接方案。随着 AI 服务器越堆越大、里面的高速连接越来越多、越来越难,Astera 的产品成了刚需,英伟达等是其大客户。2024 年上市后备受追捧,是「AI 连接」这一细分里最纯的高增长标的之一。
astera.descriptionEn: Astera Labs is a star maker of "connectivity chips" purpose-built for AI data centers. GPUs, CPUs and memory must move data at very high rates, but signals degrade over distance — Astera's retimer chips act like "signal relay stations," amplifying and reshaping high-speed PCIe/Ethernet signals to run farther and more reliably. It also makes CXL memory controllers (letting CPUs/GPUs flexibly share and expand memory) and full connectivity solutions. As AI servers grow larger with more, harder high-speed connections, Astera's products have become essential, with NVIDIA and others as major customers. Highly sought after since its 2024 IPO, it is one of the purest high-growth names in "AI connectivity."
whyItMatters: 重定时器像「信号中继站」,让高速信号跑更远更稳
CXL 内存控制器让 CPU/GPU 灵活共享扩展内存
AI 服务器越大,高速连接越多越难,产品成刚需
英伟达等为大客户,「AI 连接」最纯高增长标的之一

credo.name: Credo
credo.oneLiner: 有源电缆(AEC)与 SerDes 连接方案。
credo.oneLinerEn: Active electrical cables (AEC) and SerDes connectivity solutions.
credo.tagline: 为 AI 数据中心提供高速连接
credo.taglineEn: High-speed connectivity for AI data centers
credo.business: 有源电缆(AEC)、光/电 SerDes 与连接芯片，AI 机柜高速互联受益者。
credo.businessEn: Active electrical cables (AEC), optical/electrical SerDes and connectivity chips — a beneficiary of AI-rack high-speed interconnect.
credo.description: Credo 与 Astera 同处「AI 高速连接」赛道,但拳头产品是有源电缆(AEC)。机柜里 GPU/交换机之间要用高速线缆连接,普通铜缆在高速率下跑不远,光模块又贵又费电;AEC 是「在铜缆两端塞进 Credo 的芯片」,让铜缆也能跑得又快又远,兼顾成本、功耗与可靠性,成为机柜内互联的高性价比方案。Credo 还做各种 SerDes(高速串行收发)与光 DSP 连接芯片。随着 AI 机柜内连接密度暴增、又要省电省钱,Credo 的 AEC 需求快速放量,业绩与股价大涨,是「机柜内高速互联」的核心受益者之一。
credo.descriptionEn: Credo competes with Astera in "AI high-speed connectivity," but its flagship product is active electrical cables (AEC). Inside a rack, GPUs and switches connect via high-speed cables; ordinary copper can't run far at high rates, and optical modules are expensive and power-hungry; an AEC "tucks Credo's chips into both ends of a copper cable" so copper can also run fast and far, balancing cost, power and reliability — a cost-effective solution for in-rack interconnect. Credo also makes various SerDes (high-speed serializer/deserializer) and optical-DSP connectivity chips. As in-rack connection density surges and everyone wants to save power and money, demand for Credo's AECs has ramped fast, driving strong results and stock — one of the core beneficiaries of "in-rack high-speed interconnect."
whyItMatters: 拳头产品有源电缆(AEC),让铜缆跑得又快又远
兼顾成本/功耗/可靠,机柜内互联高性价比方案
还做 SerDes 与光 DSP 连接芯片
AI 机柜连接密度暴增,AEC 需求快速放量

sourcegraph.name: Sourcegraph
sourcegraph.oneLiner: 代码搜索起家的 AI 编程，擅长超大代码库。
sourcegraph.oneLinerEn: AI coding rooted in code search, strong on very large codebases.
sourcegraph.business: 以「跨全公司代码库的代码搜索」起家，积累了对大型/多仓代码的深度索引能力；在此之上推出 AI 编程助手(Cody 及智能体 Amp)，能在庞大而复杂的企业代码库里精准理解、补全与重构，主攻大型工程团队。
sourcegraph.businessEn: Started with company-wide code search, building deep indexing of large, multi-repo codebases; on top of that it offers AI coding assistants (Cody and the Amp agent) that understand, complete and refactor precisely inside huge, complex enterprise codebases, aimed at large engineering teams.
sourcegraph.description: Sourcegraph 成立于 2013 年，最早做的是「企业级代码搜索」——让工程师能在成百上千个仓库、上亿行代码里秒级找到定义、引用与用法，因此在大公司里积累了对大规模代码库的深度理解能力。生成式 AI 兴起后，它把这份「全库上下文」优势用到 AI 编程助手上(Cody 及后来的智能体产品 Amp)，主打在**超大、复杂的企业代码库**里也能精准工作，是面向大型工程组织的 AI 编程代表。
sourcegraph.descriptionEn: Founded in 2013, Sourcegraph began with enterprise code search — letting engineers find definitions, references and usages in seconds across hundreds of repos and hundreds of millions of lines — building deep understanding of large codebases inside big companies. As generative AI rose, it applied this "whole-repo context" advantage to AI coding assistants (Cody and later the Amp agent), focused on working accurately even inside **very large, complex enterprise codebases** — a leading AI-coding option for large engineering organizations.
whyItMatters: 代码搜索起家，超大代码库的上下文理解是护城河
主攻大型工程团队，企业级落地扎实
从搜索到 AI 助手/智能体的自然延展

products.name: Cody / Amp
products.description: 面向大型代码库的 AI 助手与智能体。

products.name: 代码搜索
products.description: 跨全公司多仓的代码搜索与导航。

worldlabs.name: World Labs
worldlabs.oneLiner: 李飞飞创立的空间智能 / 世界模型公司。
worldlabs.business: 构建能理解与生成 3D 世界的「大世界模型」，让 AI 具备空间智能。

sakana.name: Sakana AI
sakana.oneLiner: 日本 AI 研究独角兽，主打进化式方法。
sakana.business: 用进化与群体智能思路做高效模型(如 AI Scientist)，团队来自谷歌。

aleph.name: Aleph Alpha
aleph.oneLiner: 德国主权大模型公司，主打可解释与合规。
aleph.business: 面向欧洲政企的主权 AI 大模型与平台，强调可追溯与数据主权。

moveworks.name: Moveworks
moveworks.oneLiner: 企业内部 IT/HR 支持的 AI 智能体，被 ServiceNow 收购。
moveworks.oneLinerEn: An AI agent for internal IT/HR support, acquired by ServiceNow.
moveworks.tagline: 让员工的每个请求都被即时解决
moveworks.business: 面向员工的 AI 助手，自动解决 IT/HR/财务等内部工单与请求(改密码、查政策、报销、开权限)，接入企业各系统。2025 年被 ServiceNow 以约 28.5 亿美元收购。
moveworks.businessEn: An employee-facing AI assistant that auto-resolves internal IT/HR/finance tickets and requests (password resets, policy lookups, expenses, access grants) by connecting to enterprise systems. It was acquired by ServiceNow for about $2.85 billion in 2025.
moveworks.description: Moveworks 成立于 2016 年，是最早把大模型/NLP 用于「企业内部支持」的公司之一：员工在 Slack/Teams 里一句话，AI 就能自动完成改密码、查 HR 政策、报销、申请权限等原本要开工单等人处理的事，跨接企业的 ITSM、HR、身份等系统。它显著降低企业内部支持成本，2025 年被 ServiceNow 收购(约 28.5 亿美元)，并入其企业 AI 版图。
moveworks.descriptionEn: Founded in 2016, Moveworks was one of the first to apply large models/NLP to "internal enterprise support": an employee types a sentence in Slack/Teams and AI automatically handles password resets, HR-policy lookups, expenses and access requests that used to require a ticket and a human, connecting across the company's ITSM, HR and identity systems. It markedly cuts internal-support costs, and in 2025 it was acquired by ServiceNow (about $2.85 billion) and folded into its enterprise-AI portfolio.
whyItMatters: 把「企业内部工单」自动化，降本增效明显
深度接入企业 IT/HR 系统，落地扎实
被 ServiceNow 高价收购，验证赛道价值

products.name: Moveworks
products.description: 自动化 IT/HR 内部支持的 AI 助手。

recraft.name: Recraft
recraft.oneLiner: 面向设计师的可控图像生成，曾登模型评测榜首。
recraft.oneLinerEn: Controllable image generation for designers that once topped the model leaderboards.
recraft.business: 主打品牌一致性与专业可控——能生成矢量(SVG)、图标集、统一风格的品牌素材，并支持精细的构图/风格控制，曾在图像模型盲测榜(如 Artificial Analysis)登顶，深受设计师青睐。
recraft.businessEn: Focused on brand consistency and professional control — it can generate vectors (SVG), icon sets and on-brand assets in a unified style, with fine composition/style control, and once topped blind image-model leaderboards (e.g. Artificial Analysis), a favorite of designers.
recraft.description: Recraft 成立于 2022 年，把文生图做成「设计师的专业工具」而非玩具：它能输出可缩放的矢量图与图标、按品牌风格批量生成一致素材，并提供精细的构图与风格控制。凭借专业可控性，它一度在权威图像模型盲测榜上超过 Midjourney 等登顶，是「生产向、品牌向」图像生成的代表。
recraft.descriptionEn: Founded in 2022, Recraft makes text-to-image a "professional designer's tool" rather than a toy: it outputs scalable vectors and icons, generates consistent assets in a brand style at scale, and offers fine composition and style control. Thanks to that professional control, it once topped authoritative blind image-model leaderboards ahead of the likes of Midjourney — a standard-bearer for production- and brand-oriented image generation.
whyItMatters: 能出矢量与品牌一致素材，专业设计刚需
曾登图像模型盲测榜首，质量获认可
生产向图像生成的代表，B 端价值高

products.name: Recraft
products.description: 矢量/品牌一致的可控图像。

leonardo.name: Leonardo.Ai
leonardo.oneLiner: 面向游戏/创意的图像生成平台，已被 Canva 收购。
leonardo.oneLinerEn: An image-generation platform for games/creative work, acquired by Canva.
leonardo.business: 面向游戏美术与创意工作流的图像生成平台，支持训练自定义风格模型、生成一致角色/素材、3D 纹理等；2024 年被 Canva 收购，成为其 AI 能力的一部分。
leonardo.businessEn: An image-generation platform for game art and creative workflows, supporting custom style-model training, consistent character/asset generation, 3D textures and more; it was acquired by Canva in 2024 and became part of its AI capabilities.
leonardo.description: Leonardo.Ai 成立于 2022 年(澳大利亚)，最初瞄准游戏美术，让工作室能训练符合自己风格的模型、批量产出概念图、角色与场景素材，因此在游戏与创意行业积累了大量用户。它把「可控、可复用、风格一致」做得比通用文生图更贴合生产流程。2024 年被同为澳洲的设计巨头 Canva 收购，为 Canva 的 Magic Studio 补强底层图像生成。
leonardo.descriptionEn: Founded in Australia in 2022, Leonardo.Ai initially targeted game art, letting studios train models in their own style and mass-produce concept art, characters and scene assets, building a large user base in gaming and creative industries. It made "controllable, reusable, style-consistent" generation fit production workflows better than generic text-to-image. In 2024 it was acquired by fellow-Australian design giant Canva, strengthening the underlying image generation for Canva's Magic Studio.
whyItMatters: 为游戏/创意工作流定制，风格一致、可复用
被 Canva 收购，注入数亿用户的设计平台
生产向图像生成的代表之一

products.name: Leonardo.Ai
products.description: 游戏/创意图像与自定义风格模型。

krea.name: Krea
krea.oneLiner: 实时生成的创意工作台，聚合多家顶尖模型。
krea.oneLinerEn: A real-time creative workbench that aggregates many top models.
krea.business: 把实时生成与增强做成流畅的创意工作台——边画边出图(Realtime)、图像放大/重绘、视频生成，并聚合 FLUX、Ideogram、Runway 等多家模型，让创作者在一个界面里用「最合适的模型」。
krea.businessEn: Turns real-time generation and enhancement into a smooth creative workbench — draw-and-see (Realtime), image upscale/repaint, video generation — and aggregates many models like FLUX, Ideogram and Runway so creators use the "best model for the job" in one interface.
krea.description: Krea 成立于 2022 年，主打「实时 + 聚合」的创意体验：Realtime 模式下你随手涂几笔它就即时出图，所见即所得；同时它不绑定单一模型，而是聚合 FLUX、Ideogram、Runway、可灵等多家顶尖图像/视频模型，让创作者在同一画布里挑最合适的引擎。这种「创意操作系统」定位让它在设计师与艺术家中口碑很好。
krea.descriptionEn: Founded in 2022, Krea centers on a "real-time + aggregation" creative experience: in Realtime mode a few strokes instantly produce an image, what-you-see-is-what-you-get; and rather than locking to one model, it aggregates top image/video models like FLUX, Ideogram, Runway and Kling so creators can pick the best engine on the same canvas. This "operating system for creativity" positioning has earned it a strong reputation among designers and artists.
whyItMatters: 实时生成体验流畅，所见即所得
聚合多家顶尖模型，不绑定单一引擎
「创意操作系统」定位，设计师口碑好

products.name: Krea
products.description: 实时生成 + 多模型聚合。

genmo.name: Genmo
genmo.oneLiner: 开源文生视频模型 Mochi 的开发商。
genmo.oneLinerEn: Maker of the open-source text-to-video model Mochi.
genmo.business: 开源文生视频模型 Mochi 与在线创作平台。以「开放权重」路线切入视频生成，让研究者与开发者可自由微调与本地部署，是开源视频模型的代表之一。
genmo.businessEn: The open-source text-to-video model Mochi and an online creation platform. It enters video generation via the "open weights" path, letting researchers and developers freely fine-tune and self-host — a leading example of open-source video models.
genmo.description: Genmo 成立于 2023 年，走开源路线做视频生成，推出的 Mochi 是当时最受关注的开源文生视频模型之一，开放权重让社区可以自由微调、二次开发与本地部署。相对于闭源的 Runway/可灵，Genmo 为「开源视频生态」提供了底座，吸引研究者与工具开发者围绕它构建应用。
genmo.descriptionEn: Founded in 2023, Genmo takes an open-source path to video generation, and its Mochi was one of the most notable open text-to-video models of its time, with open weights that let the community freely fine-tune, extend and self-host. Compared with closed models like Runway/Kling, Genmo provides a foundation for the "open-source video ecosystem," attracting researchers and tool builders to build applications around it.
whyItMatters: 开源文生视频代表，开放权重可自由微调/自部署
为开源视频生态提供底座
让视频生成研究更透明可及

products.name: Mochi
products.description: 开源文生视频模型。

higgsfield.name: Higgsfield
higgsfield.oneLiner: 移动端 AI 视频生成新锐，主打运镜与特效。
higgsfield.oneLinerEn: A rising mobile AI video generator built around camera moves and effects.
higgsfield.business: 面向社媒创作者的移动端 AI 视频生成，主打电影级运镜(推拉摇移、甩镜)与特效模板，让手机用户几秒做出有大片质感的短视频，社媒传播力强。
higgsfield.businessEn: Mobile AI video generation for social-media creators, built around cinematic camera moves (dolly, pan, whip-pan) and effect templates, so phone users make cinematic-looking short videos in seconds — with strong social-media reach.
higgsfield.description: Higgsfield 成立于 2023 年，切入「社媒短视频 + AI 视频」，把重点放在**运镜与特效**——预置一堆电影级镜头运动(甩镜、推拉、环绕)与特效模板，创作者选一选、上传一张图，就能生成有导演感的动态短视频。它专为 TikTok/Reels 这类竖屏社媒优化，是移动端消费向 AI 视频的代表之一。
higgsfield.descriptionEn: Founded in 2023, Higgsfield targets "social short-form + AI video," focusing on **camera moves and effects** — a library of cinematic camera motions (whip-pan, dolly, orbit) and effect templates so a creator picks one, uploads an image, and generates a director-quality moving clip. Optimized for vertical social platforms like TikTok/Reels, it is a leading example of mobile, consumer-facing AI video.
whyItMatters: 主打电影级运镜，让手机用户出「大片感」短视频
为社媒竖屏场景优化，传播力强
移动端消费向 AI 视频代表

products.name: Higgsfield
products.description: 运镜/特效驱动的社媒短视频生成。

playht.name: PlayAI
playht.oneLiner: 语音克隆与语音智能体平台。
playht.tagline: 给应用一副自然的嗓音
playht.taglineEn: Give your app a natural voice
playht.business: 高质量文本转语音、语音克隆与实时语音智能体接口，面向开发者与内容创作者，用于配音、有声内容与电话/客服语音 AI。
playht.businessEn: High-quality text-to-speech, voice cloning and a real-time voice-agent API for developers and content creators, used for voiceover, audio content and phone/customer-service voice AI.
playht.description: PlayAI(原 PlayHT)成立于 2021 年，做文本转语音与语音克隆起家，音色自然、语言覆盖广，后扩展到实时语音智能体接口，让开发者能给自己的应用/电话客服接上自然的 AI 嗓音。它与 ElevenLabs、Cartesia 同处语音 AI 赛道，主打开发者友好与实时对话。
playht.descriptionEn: PlayAI (formerly PlayHT) was founded in 2021, starting with text-to-speech and voice cloning known for natural timbre and broad language coverage, later expanding to a real-time voice-agent API so developers can give their apps or phone support a natural AI voice. It competes in voice AI alongside ElevenLabs and Cartesia, emphasizing developer-friendliness and real-time conversation.
whyItMatters: TTS + 语音克隆 + 实时语音智能体一体
开发者友好，语音应用的底层供应之一
语音 AI 赛道的活跃玩家

products.name: PlayAI 语音
products.description: TTS、语音克隆与实时语音智能体。

lindy.name: Lindy
lindy.oneLiner: 让人人搭建自动化 AI 智能体。
lindy.oneLinerEn: Lets anyone build automation AI agents.
lindy.tagline: 为你打造 AI 员工
lindy.business: 无代码 AI 智能体平台，自动处理邮件、日程与工作流。
lindy.businessEn: A no-code AI agent platform that automates email, scheduling and workflows.
lindy.description: Lindy 是一个「无代码」AI 智能体搭建平台,目标是让不会写代码的普通人,也能像招个数字员工一样搭出自己的 AI 助手。用户用自然语言描述规则(比如「每当收到客户邮件,就总结要点、查日历、拟一份回复草稿」),Lindy 就把它变成一个能连接邮箱、日历、CRM 等上百种工具、自动跑起来的智能体(bot)。它主打把重复的办公/业务流程自动化——邮件处理、销售跟进、日程安排、客服等。作为「让人人拥有 AI 员工」的代表,Lindy 是无代码智能体这一大众化方向里颇受关注的玩家。
lindy.descriptionEn: Lindy is a "no-code" AI agent-building platform aimed at letting ordinary non-coders build their own AI assistants — like hiring a digital employee. Users describe rules in natural language (e.g., "whenever a customer email arrives, summarize the key points, check the calendar and draft a reply"), and Lindy turns it into an agent (bot) that connects to hundreds of tools like email, calendar and CRM and runs automatically. It focuses on automating repetitive office/business workflows — email handling, sales follow-up, scheduling, support. As a champion of "AI employees for everyone," Lindy is a notable player in the mass-market no-code-agent direction.
whyItMatters: 无代码搭建 AI 智能体,像招数字员工
自然语言描述规则即变成自动跑的 bot
连接邮箱/日历/CRM 等上百种工具
自动化邮件/销售/日程/客服,「人人有 AI 员工」

multion.name: MultiOn
multion.oneLiner: 能自主操作网页的 AI 智能体。
multion.oneLinerEn: An AI agent that autonomously operates the web.
multion.tagline: 让 AI 替你上网办事
multion.taglineEn: AI that acts on the web for you
multion.business: 让 AI 智能体自主浏览与操作网站完成任务。
multion.businessEn: Lets AI agents autonomously browse and operate websites to complete tasks.
multion.description: MultiOn 做的是「能自主上网办事」的 AI 智能体。它让 AI 像人一样打开浏览器、看网页、点按钮、填表单,自主完成跨网站的任务——比如订机票、下单购物、填申请、抓取信息等,把「你本来要一步步手点」的网上操作交给 AI 代劳。它把这套「网页操作」能力做成面向开发者的 API,让别人能给自己的产品接入「会用网页的 Agent」。作为「网页自主操作(web agent)」这一方向的早期玩家,MultiOn 与后来 OpenAI Operator、Manus 等同台,押注「AI 智能体直接替人操作数字世界」的未来。
multion.descriptionEn: MultiOn builds AI agents that "autonomously get things done on the web." It lets AI, like a human, open a browser, read pages, click buttons and fill forms to autonomously complete cross-site tasks — booking flights, placing orders, filling applications, scraping information — handing off the web operations "you would otherwise click through step by step" to AI. It packages this "web operation" capability as a developer API so others can add a "web-capable agent" to their products. As an early player in "web agents," MultiOn competes with later entrants like OpenAI's Operator and Manus, betting on the future of "AI agents directly operating the digital world for people."
whyItMatters: 让 AI 像人一样开浏览器、点按钮、填表单办事
自主完成订票/购物/填表等跨网站任务
把网页操作能力做成开发者 API
web agent 早期玩家,与 Operator/Manus 同台

skild.name: Skild AI
skild.oneLiner: 机器人通用「大脑」基础模型。
skild.tagline: 打造机器人的通用大脑
skild.taglineEn: Building a general brain for robots
skild.business: 训练可迁移到各种机器人的通用具身智能基础模型。
skild.businessEn: Training a general embodied-AI foundation model that transfers across many kinds of robots.
skild.description: Skild AI 由卡内基梅隆大学(CMU)的两位机器人学教授于 2023 年创立,目标是打造机器人的「通用大脑」——一个可迁移到不同本体(机械臂、四足、人形等)的具身智能基础模型「Skild Brain」。它不做单一机器,而是用海量多源数据训练一个通用模型,让同一套「大脑」驱动各种硬件完成抓取、行走、操作等任务,与 Physical Intelligence 同属「机器人基础模型」赛道。凭借顶尖学术背景,Skild 获软银、英伟达、贝索斯等重磅投资,估值达数十亿美元级别(据报道约 45 亿美元),是最受关注的具身智能大脑公司之一。
skild.descriptionEn: Skild AI was founded in 2023 by two robotics professors from Carnegie Mellon University (CMU) to build a "general brain" for robots — the Skild Brain, an embodied-AI foundation model that transfers across different bodies (arms, quadrupeds, humanoids). Rather than building a single machine, it trains one general model on massive, diverse data so the same "brain" can drive various hardware to grasp, walk and manipulate — in the same "robot foundation model" camp as Physical Intelligence. With top academic pedigree, Skild has drawn major investment from SoftBank, NVIDIA and Jeff Bezos at a multibillion-dollar valuation (reportedly around $4.5 billion), one of the most-watched embodied-brain companies.
whyItMatters: CMU 机器人学教授创立,学术血统硬
Skild Brain 可迁移到机械臂/四足/人形
一套通用大脑驱动各种硬件
软银/英伟达/贝索斯投资,估值约 45 亿美元

dexterity.name: Dexterity
dexterity.oneLinerEn: Robotics AI for logistics and warehousing.
dexterity.tagline: 让机器人胜任真实的体力活
dexterity.taglineEn: Robots that do real physical work
dexterity.business: 面向仓储/物流的机器人搬运与拣选智能，主打全栈自研。
dexterity.businessEn: Robotic material-handling and picking intelligence for warehousing/logistics, built full-stack in-house.
dexterity.description: Dexterity 成立于 2017 年,专注仓储与物流的机器人自动化。它走「全栈自研」路线:自己做机械臂系统、抓取/放置的 AI、力控与视觉,把机器人做成能在真实仓库里搬箱、码垛、拆零、装车的「体力工」。相比通用人形,Dexterity 聚焦「货物搬运」这一高价值、可规模化的细分,已在物流、快递、零售等场景商用部署,并推进更通用的「物理 AI」能力。它是仓储物流机器人赛道商业化较扎实的公司之一,估值进入独角兽行列。
dexterity.descriptionEn: Founded in 2017, Dexterity focuses on robotic automation for warehousing and logistics. It takes a full-stack approach: building its own robotic-arm systems, pick-and-place AI, force control and vision to make robots that do real warehouse labor — moving boxes, palletizing, decanting and loading trucks. Rather than general humanoids, Dexterity concentrates on the high-value, scalable niche of "goods handling," already deployed commercially in logistics, parcel and retail settings while advancing more general "physical AI." It is one of the more commercially grounded companies in warehouse robotics, now a unicorn by valuation.
whyItMatters: 全栈自研:机械臂+抓取AI+力控+视觉
聚焦货物搬运/码垛/装车,可规模化
物流/快递/零售等场景商用部署
仓储物流机器人商业化较扎实,已成独角兽

cobot.name: Collaborative Robotics
cobot.tagline: 让机器人自然地与人协作
cobot.taglineEn: Robots that naturally work alongside people
cobot.business: 面向真实场景的协作型移动机器人，创始人来自亚马逊/Amazon Robotics。
cobot.businessEn: Collaborative mobile robots for real-world settings; its founder comes from Amazon Robotics.
cobot.description: Collaborative Robotics(Cobot)由前亚马逊机器人副总裁 Brad Porter 于 2022 年创立。它有意避开「造炫酷人形」的路线,认为在今天的技术条件下,一种能在人类环境里安全、可靠地搬运物品、与人自然协作的「移动机器人」更实用、更快落地。其产品是轮式移动协作机器人,主攻仓储、制造、零售、医院等场景的物料转运。凭借创始人在 Amazon Robotics 大规模部署机器人的经验与务实定位,Cobot 获红杉等投资、估值进入独角兽行列,是「实用主义」具身智能的代表之一。
cobot.descriptionEn: Collaborative Robotics (Cobot) was founded in 2022 by Brad Porter, a former VP of Amazon Robotics. It deliberately avoids the "build a flashy humanoid" route, arguing that given today's technology, a mobile robot that can safely and reliably move items in human environments and collaborate naturally with people is more practical and faster to deploy. Its product is a wheeled mobile collaborative robot targeting material movement in warehousing, manufacturing, retail and hospitals. With its founder's experience deploying robots at scale at Amazon Robotics and a pragmatic focus, Cobot has raised from Sequoia and others at a unicorn valuation — a representative of "pragmatist" embodied AI.
whyItMatters: 创始人 Brad Porter 是前 Amazon Robotics 副总裁
务实路线:实用移动协作机器人,不追人形
主攻仓储/制造/零售/医院物料转运
红杉等投资,已成独角兽,实用主义代表

waabi.name: Waabi
waabi.oneLiner: 以仿真优先的自动驾驶卡车。
waabi.tagline: 用 AI 更聪明地实现自动驾驶
waabi.business: 用生成式 AI + 仿真做端到端自动驾驶卡车，主打数据高效。
waabi.businessEn: End-to-end autonomous trucks built with generative AI + simulation, emphasizing data efficiency.
waabi.description: Waabi 由自动驾驶与 AI 学界名家 Raquel Urtasun(前 Uber ATG 首席科学家)于 2021 年创立,主打「仿真优先、AI 优先」的自动驾驶路线。别人靠海量真实路测里程堆数据,Waabi 则用它的高保真神经仿真器 Waabi World 生成近乎真实的场景来大规模训练和验证自动驾驶「大脑」,宣称能以远更少的真实路测、更高的数据效率达到安全部署,并强调可解释性。它聚焦自动驾驶卡车货运,是「用生成式 AI 重做自动驾驶」这一思路里最受关注的公司之一。
waabi.descriptionEn: Waabi was founded in 2021 by AI and autonomous-driving luminary Raquel Urtasun (former chief scientist at Uber ATG) around a "simulation-first, AI-first" approach. Where others pile up data from massive real-world test miles, Waabi uses its high-fidelity neural simulator Waabi World to generate near-realistic scenarios to train and validate the driving "brain" at scale, claiming it can reach safe deployment with far fewer real test miles and much higher data efficiency, while emphasizing interpretability. Focused on autonomous trucking, it is one of the most-watched companies in the "reinventing autonomy with generative AI" camp.
whyItMatters: 创始人 Raquel Urtasun 是自动驾驶/AI 学界名家
Waabi World 神经仿真器,仿真优先训练验证
更少真实路测、更高数据效率,强调可解释
聚焦自动驾驶卡车,生成式 AI 重做自动驾驶

appliedintuition.name: Applied Intuition
appliedintuition.oneLiner: 自动驾驶仿真与工具链龙头。
appliedintuition.business: 为车企提供自动驾驶仿真、验证与开发工具链，估值居行业前列。

qdrant.name: Qdrant
qdrant.oneLiner: 高性能开源向量数据库。
qdrant.business: 面向大规模向量检索的开源向量数据库与云服务。

zilliz.name: Zilliz
zilliz.oneLiner: 开源向量数据库 Milvus 的商业公司。
zilliz.business: 开源向量库 Milvus 与托管云，面向大规模 AI 检索。

mercor.name: Mercor
mercor.oneLiner: 为前沿实验室供专家数据的 AI 招聘/数据平台。
mercor.oneLinerEn: An AI recruiting/data platform supplying expert data to frontier labs.
mercor.tagline: 用 AI 匹配人才与工作
mercor.taglineEn: Matching talent to work with AI
mercor.subcategory: 专家数据 / AI 招聘
mercor.business: 用 AI 匹配专家为大模型提供高质量标注与评测数据。
mercor.businessEn: Uses AI to match domain experts who provide high-quality labeling and evaluation data for large models.
mercor.description: Mercor 由三位年轻创始人创办,踩中了前沿大模型对「高质量专家数据」的爆发式需求。随着模型进入需要博士、医生、律师、资深工程师等专业人士来标注、评测、给反馈(如强化学习偏好数据)的阶段,Mercor 用 AI 面试与匹配,把全球的领域专家高效地对接给 OpenAI、Anthropic 等前沿实验室做数据工作,按项目付费。它既是「AI 招聘平台」也是「专家数据供应商」,与 Scale AI、Surge 等在「数据燃料」赛道竞争。因增速惊人,Mercor 估值在短时间内飙升到数十亿至上百亿美元级,是这轮「专家数据」淘金潮中最耀眼的新星之一。
mercor.descriptionEn: Mercor was founded by three young founders and caught the explosive demand of frontier models for "high-quality expert data." As models reach a stage needing PhDs, doctors, lawyers and senior engineers to label, evaluate and give feedback (such as reinforcement-learning preference data), Mercor uses AI interviewing and matching to efficiently connect domain experts worldwide to frontier labs like OpenAI and Anthropic for data work, paid per project. It is both an "AI recruiting platform" and an "expert-data supplier," competing with Scale AI and Surge in the "data fuel" arena. On astonishing growth, Mercor's valuation surged in a short time into the multibillion-to-tens-of-billions range — one of the brightest stars of this "expert data" gold rush.
whyItMatters: 踩中前沿模型对「高质量专家数据」的爆发需求
用 AI 面试匹配全球博士/医生/工程师做数据
服务 OpenAI/Anthropic 等前沿实验室,按项目付费
增速惊人,估值短期飙升,专家数据淘金潮新星

turing.name: Turing
turing.oneLiner: AI 训练数据与工程人才平台。
turing.oneLinerEn: An AI training-data and engineering-talent platform.
turing.subcategory: 训练数据 / 工程人才
turing.business: 为大模型提供代码/推理训练数据与远程工程能力。
turing.businessEn: Provides code/reasoning training data and remote engineering capacity for large models.
turing.description: Turing 最初做的是「远程工程人才匹配」——用 AI 帮企业从全球找到、评测并对接软件工程师。生成式 AI 兴起后,它把这套「全球专业人才 + 评测」的能力转向了大模型公司最需要的东西:高质量的代码与推理训练/评测数据。前沿实验室要提升模型的编程与推理能力,就需要大量资深工程师来编写、审查、标注高难度的代码与解题数据,Turing 正好能规模化组织这类专家供给。如今它同时服务企业(帮它们落地 AI 与工程)和大模型公司(供数据),是「AI 数据 + 工程人才」双向平台的代表之一。
turing.descriptionEn: Turing originally did "remote engineering-talent matching" — using AI to help companies find, vet and connect software engineers globally. As generative AI rose, it turned this "global professional talent + vetting" capability toward what large-model companies need most: high-quality code and reasoning training/evaluation data. To improve models' coding and reasoning, frontier labs need many senior engineers to write, review and label difficult code and problem-solving data, and Turing can organize such expert supply at scale. Today it serves both enterprises (helping them deploy AI and engineering) and large-model companies (supplying data) — a leader among two-sided "AI data + engineering talent" platforms.
whyItMatters: 从远程工程人才匹配,转向大模型训练数据
组织资深工程师产出高质量代码/推理数据
帮前沿实验室提升模型编程与推理能力
同时服务企业落地 AI 与大模型公司供数据

paradromics.name: Paradromics
paradromics.oneLiner: 高带宽植入式脑机接口。
paradromics.taglineEn: The highest-bandwidth link to the brain
paradromics.business: 高通道数皮层植入脑机接口，瞄准语言/运动功能恢复。
paradromics.businessEn: A high-channel-count cortical implant BCI targeting speech and motor-function restoration.
paradromics.description: Paradromics 是脑机接口领域主打「高带宽(高数据通量)」的公司。它的 Connexus 植入体用密集的微电极穿刺进大脑皮层,追求极高的神经信号采集通道数——带宽越高,理论上就越能精细、快速地解码复杂的神经活动(比如流畅地把「想说的话」变成文字)。它把目标锁定在帮助严重瘫痪、失语的患者恢复沟通与运动能力,并已推进到人体研究阶段。相比更强调微创的 Synchron/Precision,Paradromics 更接近 Neuralink 的「高带宽深植入」路线,是这条路上进展较快、最受关注的玩家之一。
paradromics.descriptionEn: Paradromics is a BCI company focused on "high bandwidth (high data throughput)." Its Connexus implant uses dense microelectrodes penetrating the cerebral cortex to pursue a very high channel count for neural-signal capture — the higher the bandwidth, the more finely and quickly it can in principle decode complex neural activity (such as fluently turning "intended speech" into text). It targets helping severely paralyzed, speech-impaired patients restore communication and motor function, and has advanced into human studies. Compared with the more minimally invasive Synchron/Precision, Paradromics is closer to Neuralink's "high-bandwidth deep-implant" path — one of the more advanced and watched players on that route.
whyItMatters: 主打高带宽(高数据通量),Connexus 密集微电极
带宽越高越能精细快速解码复杂神经活动
瞄准帮严重瘫痪/失语者恢复沟通与运动
接近 Neuralink 高带宽深植入路线,进展较快

saronic.name: Saronic
saronic.oneLiner: 自主无人水面舰艇的国防新锐。
saronic.business: AI 驱动的自主无人水面舰艇，主打海军无人化。

ssi.name: Safe Superintelligence
ssi.oneLiner: Ilya Sutskever 创立，只做安全超级智能。
ssi.oneLinerEn: Founded by Ilya Sutskever to build only safe superintelligence.
ssi.tagline: 唯一的目标：安全的超级智能
ssi.taglineEn: One goal, one product: safe superintelligence
ssi.subcategory: 超级智能 / AI 安全
ssi.business: OpenAI 联创 Ilya 创立，专注一件事——安全的超级智能，暂不推商用产品，估值极高。
ssi.businessEn: Founded by OpenAI co-founder Ilya, focused on one thing — safe superintelligence — with no commercial product yet, at a very high valuation.
ssi.description: Safe Superintelligence(SSI)由 OpenAI 联合创始人、前首席科学家 Ilya Sutskever 于 2024 年创立,是全球最不寻常的 AI 公司之一。它的使命极端纯粹:「第一个产品就是安全的超级智能,在此之前不做任何别的东西」——不发聊天机器人、不追商业化、不被短期市场干扰,只闷头研究如何造出既超越人类又安全可控的智能。Ilya 押注「单纯堆规模(scaling)已近天花板」,要探索新路径。公司极其精简(全球约 20 人)、极其保密,却已累计融资约 60 亿美元、估值高达 320 亿美元——成为史上「没有产品、估值最高」的 AI 实验室,完全靠 Ilya 的声望与愿景。它代表了「安全优先、直奔超级智能」这条最激进也最理想主义的路线。
ssi.descriptionEn: Safe Superintelligence (SSI) was founded in 2024 by OpenAI co-founder and former chief scientist Ilya Sutskever, and is one of the world's most unusual AI companies. Its mission is extremely pure: "the first product will be safe superintelligence, and it will do nothing else until then" — no chatbots, no chasing commercialization, no distraction by short-term markets, just heads-down research on how to build intelligence that both surpasses humans and remains safe and controllable. Ilya bets that "pure scaling has nearly hit a ceiling" and wants to explore new paths. Extremely lean (about 20 people globally) and extremely secretive, it has nonetheless raised about $6 billion at a $32 billion valuation — the highest-valued "no-product" AI lab in history, riding entirely on Ilya's reputation and vision. It represents the most radical and idealistic path: "safety-first, straight to superintelligence."
whyItMatters: OpenAI 前首席科学家 Ilya 创立,声望极高
使命极端纯粹:只做安全超级智能,不出商用产品
押注「单纯堆规模已近天花板」,探索新路径
约 20 人、无产品却估值 320 亿美元,史上罕见

thinkingmachines.name: Thinking Machines Lab
thinkingmachines.oneLiner: 前 OpenAI CTO Mira Murati 创立的 AI 实验室。
thinkingmachines.oneLinerEn: An AI lab founded by former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati.
thinkingmachines.tagline: 让 AI 更可理解、可定制、可协作
thinkingmachines.taglineEn: AI that is understandable, customizable and collaborative
thinkingmachines.business: Mira Murati 领衔的明星实验室，聚焦多模态与可定制 AI，创下巨额种子融资。
thinkingmachines.businessEn: A star lab led by Mira Murati focused on multimodal and customizable AI, which set a record for the largest seed round.
thinkingmachines.description: Thinking Machines Lab 由前 OpenAI 首席技术官(CTO)Mira Murati 于 2025 年创立,并聚集了一批 OpenAI 前核心研究者。它 2025 年 7 月完成 20 亿美元种子轮、估值 120 亿美元——创下 AI 史上最大种子融资纪录(之后一度洽谈 500 亿估值但未成)。理念上,它强调让 AI 更「可理解、可定制、可协作」,提出「交互模型(interaction models)」——为与人持续实时对话(目标延迟约 200 毫秒,接近人眨眼的速度)而设计,而非只回答一次性提问。其首个产品 Tinker 是一个用于微调开源模型的 API。尽管有明星光环与英伟达/谷歌的算力承诺,公司也经历了一些人才流动。它是「OpenAI 出走系」里最受瞩目的新实验室之一。
thinkingmachines.descriptionEn: Thinking Machines Lab was founded in 2025 by former OpenAI chief technology officer (CTO) Mira Murati, gathering a group of former OpenAI core researchers. In July 2025 it closed a $2 billion seed round at a $12 billion valuation — a record for the largest seed in AI history (it later discussed a $50 billion valuation that didn't materialize). Philosophically, it emphasizes making AI more "understandable, customizable and collaborative," proposing "interaction models" — designed for continuous, real-time dialogue with humans (targeting ~200ms latency, roughly the speed of a blink) rather than one-off prompts. Its first product, Tinker, is an API for fine-tuning open-source models. Despite its star aura and compute commitments from NVIDIA/Google, the company has also seen some talent turnover. It is one of the most-watched new labs among the "OpenAI diaspora."
whyItMatters: 前 OpenAI CTO Mira Murati 创立,聚集前核心研究者
AI 史上最大种子轮:20 亿美元、估值 120 亿
主张「交互模型」:为与人实时持续对话而设计
首个产品 Tinker(微调开源模型 API),OpenAI 出走系明星

deepgram.name: Deepgram
deepgram.oneLiner: 企业语音 AI 平台，语音识别(STT)精度与低延迟领先。
deepgram.oneLinerEn: An enterprise voice-AI platform leading on speech-recognition (STT) accuracy and low latency.
deepgram.taglineEn: Built to help machines understand speech
deepgram.subcategory: 语音识别 / 语音智能体
deepgram.business: 端到端语音 AI 平台：语音转文字(STT)、文本转语音(TTS)与语音智能体 API。旗舰模型 Nova-3(高精度)与 Flux(为实时对话优化的低延迟)；打包语音智能体 API 约 $4.5/小时。2026 年 C 轮融资 $130M、估值 $13 亿，并与 IBM watsonx 合作、收购餐饮语音公司 OfOne。
deepgram.businessEn: An end-to-end voice-AI platform: speech-to-text (STT), text-to-speech (TTS) and a voice-agent API. Its flagship models are Nova-3 (high accuracy) and Flux (low-latency, tuned for real-time conversation); its packaged voice-agent API is about $4.5/hour. In 2026 it raised a $130M Series C at a $1.3B valuation, partnered with IBM watsonx and acquired the restaurant-voice company OfOne.
deepgram.description: Deepgram 成立于 2015 年，是企业级语音 AI 的头部：其语音识别在嘈杂环境下的词错率显著低于同行，并提供 STT、TTS 与实时语音智能体一整套 API。最新的 Nova-3 主打通用高精度、Flux 专为实时对话式 AI 做低延迟优化，还有面向医疗等垂直的模型。它是众多语音应用/呼叫中心的底层引擎，2026 年初完成 $130M C 轮(估值约 $13 亿)，与 IBM 把语音能力接进 watsonx Orchestrate，并收购快餐得来速语音公司 OfOne，是「语音基础设施」的关键供应商。
deepgram.descriptionEn: Founded in 2015, Deepgram is a leader in enterprise voice AI: its speech recognition has a markedly lower word-error rate in noisy environments than peers, and it offers a full API set of STT, TTS and real-time voice agents. Its latest Nova-3 targets general high accuracy, Flux is optimized for low-latency conversational AI, and it has vertical models for healthcare and more. It is the underlying engine for many voice apps and call centers; in early 2026 it closed a $130M Series C (about a $1.3B valuation), partnered with IBM to bring voice into watsonx Orchestrate, and acquired the drive-thru voice company OfOne — a key supplier of "voice infrastructure."
whyItMatters: 嘈杂环境词错率显著低于同行，识别精度领先
STT+TTS+实时语音智能体一体，语音应用底座
与 IBM watsonx 合作，企业渗透深；估值 $13 亿

products.name: Nova-3
products.description: 通用高精度 STT 模型。

products.name: Flux
products.description: 为实时对话优化的低延迟模型。

products.name: Voice Agent API
products.description: 打包语音智能体，约 $4.5/小时。

cresta.name: Cresta
cresta.oneLiner: 联络中心实时 AI：给坐席「耳语」建议或直接接管对话。
cresta.oneLinerEn: Real-time contact-center AI that "whispers" advice to agents or takes over the conversation.
cresta.tagline: 让每一次客户对话都更好
cresta.business: 坐落在每一通电话/聊天/邮件上的联络中心 AI：实时理解客户意图，在 200 毫秒内给人工坐席「耳语」建议(话术、下一步)，或作为虚拟坐席直接接管对话。累计融资超 $2.7 亿、估值约 $16 亿。斯坦福 AI 背景创立。
cresta.businessEn: Contact-center AI that sits on every call/chat/email: it understands customer intent in real time and "whispers" suggestions (what to say, the next step) to human agents within 200 milliseconds, or takes over directly as a virtual agent. It has raised over $270M at a roughly $1.6B valuation and was founded by a Stanford AI team.
cresta.description: Cresta 成立于 2017 年(斯坦福 AI 背景)，专注联络中心：它实时听懂每一通客服电话/聊天/邮件里的客户意图，用大模型在毫秒级给人工坐席「耳语」提示(该说什么、下一步做什么)，从而提升成交与满意度；也能作为完全自主的虚拟坐席直接对话。相比纯自动化，Cresta 强调「人机协同」——先增强人，再逐步接管。它累计融资超 $2.7 亿、估值约 $16 亿，是联络中心 AI 与 Sierra/Decagon 同台竞争的头部之一。
cresta.descriptionEn: Founded in 2017 by a Stanford AI team, Cresta focuses on the contact center: it understands customer intent in real time across every service call/chat/email, using large models to "whisper" prompts to human agents in milliseconds (what to say, what to do next) to lift conversion and satisfaction, and can also converse directly as a fully autonomous virtual agent. Unlike pure automation, Cresta emphasizes "human-AI collaboration" — augment the human first, then gradually take over. It has raised over $270M at about a $1.6B valuation and is a leader in contact-center AI competing with Sierra/Decagon.
whyItMatters: 毫秒级实时「耳语」增强人工坐席，即时提效
人机协同路线，先增强人、再逐步接管
联络中心 AI 头部，累计融资超 $2.7 亿

products.name: Cresta 坐席辅助
products.description: 实时给人工坐席耳语话术与建议。

products.name: Cresta 虚拟坐席
products.description: 自主接管客户对话。

assemblyai.name: AssemblyAI
assemblyai.oneLiner: 语音识别与语音理解 API。
assemblyai.tagline: 让开发者听懂每一段音频
assemblyai.subcategory: 语音识别 / 音频理解
assemblyai.business: 语音转写、说话人分离与音频理解模型 API，面向开发者。
assemblyai.businessEn: APIs for transcription, speaker diarization and audio-understanding models, aimed at developers.
assemblyai.description: AssemblyAI 是面向开发者的语音 AI API 公司。它把语音识别(把音频转成文字)做到高精度,并在其上叠加一整套「音频理解」能力:说话人分离(谁在说)、摘要、情感、话题检测、内容审核,以及基于大模型的音频问答等,让开发者用简单的 API 就能给自己的产品加上「听懂音频」的功能。它服务大量做会议记录、客服分析、播客/媒体、合规质检的公司。和 Deepgram 类似,AssemblyAI 是「语音理解基础设施」赛道的主要玩家之一,主打模型质量与开发者体验。
assemblyai.descriptionEn: AssemblyAI is a developer-focused speech-AI API company. It delivers high-accuracy speech recognition (audio to text) and layers a full suite of "audio understanding" on top: speaker diarization (who spoke), summarization, sentiment, topic detection, content moderation and LLM-based audio Q&A — letting developers add "understanding audio" to their products via a simple API. It serves many companies building meeting notes, call-center analytics, podcasts/media and compliance QA. Like Deepgram, AssemblyAI is a leading player in "speech-understanding infrastructure," emphasizing model quality and developer experience.
whyItMatters: 高精度语音识别 + 一整套音频理解能力
说话人分离/摘要/情感/审核/音频问答
简单 API 让产品「听懂音频」,开发者友好
语音理解基础设施主要玩家之一

dmatrix.name: d-Matrix
dmatrix.oneLiner: 存算一体推理芯片新锐。
dmatrix.tagline: 为生成式推理重构芯片
dmatrix.business: 数字存内计算(DIMC)架构，专攻大模型推理的能效与成本。
dmatrix.businessEn: Digital in-memory-compute (DIMC) architecture, focused on the energy efficiency and cost of large-model inference.
dmatrix.description: d-Matrix 用「数字存内计算(DIMC)」架构专攻大模型推理。传统芯片里,数据要在内存和计算单元之间来回搬运,既慢又费电(所谓「内存墙」);d-Matrix 把计算直接放到存储旁边做,大幅减少数据搬运,从而在推理上做到更高的能效与更低的每 token 成本。它的旗舰 Corsair 面向数据中心的生成式 AI 推理,主打「同样的推理、更省电更省钱」。在「训练靠英伟达、推理更看性价比」的行业分化中,d-Matrix 是推理专用芯片里最受关注的挑战者之一,获微软风投等支持。
dmatrix.descriptionEn: d-Matrix uses a "digital in-memory-compute (DIMC)" architecture focused on large-model inference. In traditional chips, data shuttles back and forth between memory and compute units — slow and power-hungry (the "memory wall"); d-Matrix places compute right next to storage, greatly reducing data movement to achieve higher energy efficiency and lower cost-per-token on inference. Its flagship Corsair targets generative-AI inference in the data center, emphasizing "same inference, less power and money." As the industry splits into "training on NVIDIA, inference on cost-performance," d-Matrix is one of the most-watched challengers in inference-specialized chips, backed by Microsoft's venture arm and others.
whyItMatters: 数字存内计算(DIMC),把计算放到存储旁
大幅减少数据搬运,攻「内存墙」
旗舰 Corsair 主打推理更省电更省钱
推理专用芯片受关注挑战者,微软风投等支持

positron.name: Positron
positron.oneLiner: 专攻 Transformer 推理的能效芯片。
positron.oneLinerEn: An efficiency chip specialized for Transformer inference.
positron.tagline: 以更低成本跑大模型推理
positron.business: 为大模型推理定制的高能效芯片与整机，主打性价比替代 GPU。
positron.businessEn: High-efficiency chips and systems custom-built for large-model inference, aiming to replace GPUs on cost-performance.
positron.description: Positron AI 专做「Transformer 推理」的高能效芯片与整机。它不追求通用,而是针对当下主流的 Transformer 大模型推理做专门优化,主打「用更低的功耗和成本、更容易部署地跑推理」,并强调即插即用、兼容现有软件栈,让企业能相对无痛地用它替代部分英伟达 GPU 来做推理、省电省钱。在英伟达 GPU 又贵又缺、而推理需求爆炸的当下,Positron 代表了一批「专用推理芯片抢英伟达推理份额」的新势力,主打交付快、性价比高。
positron.descriptionEn: Positron AI builds high-efficiency chips and systems specifically for "Transformer inference." Rather than being general-purpose, it optimizes for today's mainstream Transformer large-model inference, emphasizing "running inference at lower power and cost and easier to deploy," with plug-and-play compatibility with existing software stacks so enterprises can relatively painlessly replace some NVIDIA GPUs for inference to save power and money. With NVIDIA GPUs expensive and scarce and inference demand exploding, Positron represents a wave of "specialized inference chips taking NVIDIA inference share," emphasizing fast delivery and strong cost-performance.
whyItMatters: 针对 Transformer 推理专门优化的高能效芯片
主打更低功耗/成本、即插即用、兼容现有软件栈
让企业相对无痛替代部分英伟达 GPU 做推理
抢英伟达推理份额的新势力,交付快性价比高

rainai.name: Rain AI
rainai.oneLiner: 类脑(神经形态)AI 芯片新锐。
rainai.business: 受大脑启发的神经形态计算芯片，Altman 早期押注，主打超低功耗端侧 AI。
rainai.businessEn: Brain-inspired neuromorphic computing chips; an early Sam Altman bet, focused on ultra-low-power on-device AI.
rainai.description: Rain AI 做「神经形态(neuromorphic)」计算芯片——试图在硬件层面更像大脑一样工作:把计算与存储融合、用模拟/事件驱动的方式做神经网络运算,目标是以极低的功耗跑 AI,特别适合手机、可穿戴、边缘设备等对电量敏感的端侧场景。它的野心是让 AI 训练与推理的能效提升几个数量级。Rain 因 Sam Altman 早期个人押注而受关注(也一度因涉及外资审查而调整投资)。作为最前沿也最具风险的芯片路线之一,神经形态计算离大规模商用还早,但 Rain 是这条路上最受瞩目的探索者之一。
rainai.descriptionEn: Rain AI builds "neuromorphic" computing chips — trying to work more like the brain at the hardware level: fusing compute and memory and doing neural-network operations in an analog/event-driven way, aiming to run AI at extremely low power, especially suited to power-sensitive on-device settings like phones, wearables and edge devices. Its ambition is to improve the energy efficiency of AI training and inference by orders of magnitude. Rain drew attention from Sam Altman's early personal bet (and once adjusted investment amid foreign-investment review). As one of the most frontier and highest-risk chip paths, neuromorphic computing is far from large-scale commercialization, but Rain is one of its most-watched explorers.
whyItMatters: 神经形态计算,硬件层面更像大脑工作
计算存储融合,目标极低功耗跑 AI
适合手机/可穿戴/边缘等端侧场景
Sam Altman 早期押注,最前沿也最具风险的路线

robin_ai.name: Robin AI
robin_ai.taglineEn: Making legal work faster and fairer
robin_ai.business: AI 合同起草、审查与谈判助手，服务企业法务与律所。
robin_ai.businessEn: An AI assistant for drafting, reviewing and negotiating contracts, serving corporate legal teams and law firms.
robin_ai.description: Robin AI 专注「合同」这一法律里最高频、最标准化的场景。企业每天要起草、审查、谈判大量合同,又慢又贵。Robin 用 AI 帮法务和律师快速读懂合同、标出风险条款、给出修改建议、对照公司标准模板做合规检查,甚至辅助谈判,大幅缩短合同处理时间。它结合大模型与专门的法律训练,强调准确与可控,服务大量企业客户与律所。作为合同审查垂直 AI 的代表(与更综合的 Harvey 有所区隔),Robin 是「AI 把法律里最耗时的合同活自动化」的典型玩家。
robin_ai.descriptionEn: Robin AI focuses on "contracts," the most frequent and standardized scenario in law. Enterprises draft, review and negotiate huge volumes of contracts daily — slow and expensive. Robin uses AI to help legal teams and lawyers quickly understand contracts, flag risky clauses, suggest edits, run compliance checks against company standard templates, and even assist negotiation, greatly shortening contract turnaround. Combining large models with dedicated legal training and emphasizing accuracy and control, it serves many corporate customers and law firms. As a leader in vertical contract-review AI (distinct from the broader Harvey), Robin is a classic player in "AI automating the most time-consuming contract work in law."
whyItMatters: 专注合同——法律里最高频最标准化的场景
标风险条款/给修改建议/对模板做合规检查
结合大模型与专门法律训练,强调准确可控
合同审查垂直 AI 代表,服务大量企业与律所

nabla.name: Nabla
nabla.oneLiner: 医生用的 AI 环境问诊记录。
nabla.oneLinerEn: AI ambient clinical documentation for doctors.
nabla.taglineEn: Giving time back to patients and clinicians
nabla.business: 实时把医患对话转成结构化病历的 AI 助手，欧美医院广泛采用。
nabla.businessEn: An AI assistant that turns doctor-patient conversations into structured notes in real time, widely used in Europe and the U.S.
nabla.description: Nabla 是欧洲(法国)的医疗 AI 公司,与 Abridge、Suki 同做「环境临床文书」——在问诊时实时倾听医患对话,自动生成结构化病历草稿,让医生从繁重的敲字记录中解放出来,把注意力还给病人。它强调多语言、贴合临床工作流、以及与电子病历(EHR)系统的对接,并对隐私与合规(欧洲 GDPR 等)做专门设计。凭借扎实的产品与合规能力,Nabla 在欧美大量医院/医生中快速普及,是「AI 减轻医生文书负担」这一刚需在欧洲的代表玩家。
nabla.descriptionEn: Nabla is a European (French) medical-AI company that, like Abridge and Suki, does "ambient clinical documentation" — listening to the doctor-patient conversation in real time during a visit and automatically generating structured draft notes, freeing clinicians from heavy typing to give attention back to patients. It emphasizes multilingual support, fit with clinical workflows and integration with electronic health record (EHR) systems, with dedicated design for privacy and compliance (European GDPR, etc.). With a solid product and compliance capability, Nabla has spread quickly among hospitals/doctors in Europe and the U.S. — a European leader in the pressing need of "AI easing clinicians' documentation burden."
whyItMatters: 欧洲医疗 AI,做环境临床文书(实时转病历)
让医生从敲字记录解放,注意力还给病人
多语言 + 贴合临床工作流 + 对接 EHR
隐私合规(GDPR)专门设计,欧美医院快速普及

suki.name: Suki
suki.oneLiner: 面向临床医生的 AI 语音助手。
suki.oneLinerEn: An AI voice assistant for clinicians.
suki.business: 语音驱动的临床记录与医嘱助手，减轻医生文书负担。
suki.businessEn: A voice-driven clinical documentation and orders assistant that reduces clinicians' paperwork burden.
suki.description: Suki 是面向临床医生的「AI 语音助手」。医生可以像跟助手说话一样,用语音让 Suki 记录问诊、生成病历、下医嘱、查资料、编码计费等,把大量原本要手工敲进电子病历(EHR)的文书活自动化。它既支持环境式记录(听医患对话自动成文),也支持语音指令操作,深度对接主流 EHR(如 Epic、Cerner)。凭借「语音优先 + 深度 EHR 集成」的定位,Suki 在美国医疗系统中被广泛采用,与 Abridge、Nabla 同为「减轻医生文书负担」赛道的头部玩家之一。
suki.descriptionEn: Suki is an "AI voice assistant" for clinicians. Doctors can speak to Suki as if to an assistant to document visits, generate notes, place orders, look things up and handle coding/billing — automating much of the paperwork that would otherwise be typed into the electronic health record (EHR). It supports both ambient documentation (auto-generating notes from the conversation) and voice-command operation, with deep integration into major EHRs (Epic, Cerner). With a "voice-first + deep EHR integration" positioning, Suki is widely adopted across U.S. health systems and, alongside Abridge and Nabla, is a leader in "easing clinicians' documentation burden."
whyItMatters: 医生用语音让 AI 记病历/下医嘱/查资料/编码
支持环境记录 + 语音指令操作
深度对接 Epic/Cerner 等主流 EHR
语音优先+深度集成,美国医疗系统广泛采用

alchip.name: 世芯电子
alchip.oneLiner: 高端 AI ASIC 设计服务龙头。
alchip.oneLinerEn: A leader in high-end AI ASIC design services.
alchip.tagline: 把客户的 AI 芯片变成现实
alchip.taglineEn: Turning customers' AI chips into silicon
alchip.business: 为云厂/大客户做先进制程 AI ASIC 的设计与量产落地，深度绑定台积电 CoWoS。
alchip.businessEn: Designs and brings to volume advanced-node AI ASICs for cloud/large customers, deeply tied to TSMC CoWoS.
alchip.description: 世芯电子(Alchip)是高端 AI 定制芯片(ASIC)设计服务的龙头。云厂或大客户想做自研 AI 加速器,但没有能力把设计做到最先进制程并量产——世芯就是那个「把你的芯片设计,用台积电最先进制程 + CoWoS 先进封装,真正流片、量产、交付」的关键伙伴。它擅长大芯片、高速接口与先进封装,深度绑定台积电产能,承接了亚马逊等超大客户的定制 AI 芯片项目。随着「云厂自研芯片」成为大趋势(为省成本、摆脱英伟达),世芯的设计服务需求与业绩高速增长,是这条产业链上台股最纯的 AI 定制芯片受益标的之一。
alchip.descriptionEn: Alchip is a leader in high-end custom AI-chip (ASIC) design services. Clouds or large customers want their own AI accelerators but lack the ability to take the design to the most advanced node and mass-produce it — Alchip is the key partner that "turns your chip design into real, taped-out, mass-produced silicon using TSMC's leading node + CoWoS advanced packaging." Skilled in large chips, high-speed interfaces and advanced packaging, and deeply tied to TSMC capacity, it has taken on custom AI-chip projects for hyperscale customers like Amazon. As "clouds building their own chips" becomes a major trend (to cut cost and reduce NVIDIA reliance), Alchip's design-service demand and results are growing fast — one of the purest Taiwan-listed beneficiaries of custom AI silicon.
whyItMatters: 高端 AI 定制芯片(ASIC)设计服务龙头
把客户设计用台积电先进制程+CoWoS 量产落地
承接亚马逊等超大客户定制 AI 芯片项目
云厂自研芯片大趋势,台股最纯 AI 定制受益之一

guc.name: 创意电子
guc.oneLiner: 台积电体系的 ASIC 设计服务商。
guc.tagline: 台积电的定制芯片伙伴
guc.business: 台积电转投资的 ASIC 设计服务，主打先进制程与 2.5D/3D 封装 AI 芯片。
guc.businessEn: A TSMC-invested ASIC design-service firm, focused on advanced nodes and 2.5D/3D-packaged AI chips.
guc.description: 创意电子(GUC)是台积电转投资、并被其定位为「设计服务联盟」核心的 ASIC 设计公司,与世芯是台系定制芯片双雄。它把台积电最先进的制程与 2.5D/3D 先进封装能力,以「设计服务」的形式对外输出——帮客户把 AI/HPC/网络芯片设计出来并在台积电量产。作为台积电体系的「亲儿子」,GUC 在拿先进产能、协同封装上有独特优势,深度参与云厂与大厂的定制大芯片项目。随着 AI 定制芯片浪潮,GUC 的业绩与订单能见度显著提升,是台股 ASIC 设计服务的核心标的之一。
guc.descriptionEn: GUC (Global Unichip) is a TSMC-invested ASIC design company that TSMC positions as the core of its "design-service alliance," and together with Alchip forms Taiwan's custom-silicon duo. It externalizes TSMC's most advanced nodes and 2.5D/3D advanced-packaging capabilities as "design services" — helping customers design AI/HPC/networking chips and mass-produce them at TSMC. As TSMC's "in-house" partner, GUC has distinctive advantages in securing advanced capacity and coordinating packaging, and is deeply involved in cloud/large-customer custom big-chip projects. Riding the custom-AI-chip wave, GUC's results and order visibility have improved markedly — one of the core Taiwan-listed ASIC design-service names.
whyItMatters: 台积电转投资,「设计服务联盟」核心
输出台积电先进制程与 2.5D/3D 封装能力
拿先进产能、协同封装有独特优势
深度参与云厂定制大芯片,台股 ASIC 核心之一

faraday.name: 智原科技
faraday.oneLiner: 老牌 ASIC 设计服务与 IP 供应商。
faraday.oneLinerEn: A veteran ASIC design-service and IP provider.
faraday.tagline: 从 IP 到芯片的一站式服务
faraday.taglineEn: From IP to silicon, end to end
faraday.business: 联电体系的 ASIC 设计服务与 IP 授权，覆盖 AIoT 与数据中心。
faraday.businessEn: A UMC-affiliated ASIC design-service and IP-licensing firm, spanning AIoT and data centers.
faraday.description: 智原科技(Faraday)是台系老牌的 ASIC 设计服务与 IP 供应商,背靠晶圆代工厂联电(UMC)。它既做「设计服务」——帮客户把芯片设计出来并落地代工,也做「IP 授权」——把各种可复用的电路模块(接口、处理器、混合信号等)授权给别人用在自己的芯片里。相比世芯/创意主攻最尖端制程的大芯片,智原覆盖面更广、更偏成熟制程与 AIoT、网络、数据中心周边芯片,是「设计服务+IP」双轮的中坚厂商。AI 带动的定制芯片与周边需求也让智原受益。
faraday.descriptionEn: Faraday Technology is a veteran Taiwan ASIC design-service and IP provider, backed by foundry UMC. It does both "design services" — helping customers design chips and get them fabricated — and "IP licensing" — licensing reusable circuit blocks (interfaces, processors, mixed-signal) for others to use in their own chips. Compared with Alchip/GUC, which focus on leading-node big chips, Faraday is broader and leans toward mature nodes and AIoT, networking and data-center peripheral chips — a solid "design service + IP" two-engine player. AI-driven custom-chip and peripheral demand also benefits Faraday.
whyItMatters: 台系老牌 ASIC 设计服务与 IP 供应商,背靠联电
设计服务 + IP 授权双轮驱动
覆盖成熟制程与 AIoT/网络/数据中心周边
AI 定制芯片与周边需求受益

andes.name: 晶心科技
andes.oneLiner: 全球领先的 RISC-V 处理器 IP 供应商。
andes.oneLinerEn: A leading global supplier of RISC-V processor IP.
andes.tagline: 为世界提供开放的处理器内核
andes.taglineEn: Open processor cores for the world
andes.business: RISC-V CPU 核心 IP，广泛用于 AI 加速器与 SoC，开放架构受益者。
andes.businessEn: RISC-V CPU core IP, widely used in AI accelerators and SoCs — a beneficiary of open architecture.
andes.description: 晶心科技(Andes)是全球领先的 RISC-V 处理器 IP 供应商。RISC-V 是一套开放、免授权费的指令集,正成为挑战 Arm 的重要力量——谁都能基于它设计芯片,不用被单一厂商锁定。Andes 把基于 RISC-V 的 CPU 内核做成可授权的 IP,卖给做 AI 加速器、SoC、存储、IoT 的芯片公司当「控制核心」;很多 AI 芯片里都需要这样一颗小 CPU 来做调度与控制。作为 RISC-V 阵营里商业化最成熟、客户最多的 IP 厂商之一,Andes 是「开放架构崛起」这一趋势的直接受益者,尽管体量相对 Arm 仍小。
andes.descriptionEn: Andes Technology is a leading global supplier of RISC-V processor IP. RISC-V is an open, royalty-free instruction set becoming a major challenger to Arm — anyone can design chips on it without being locked into a single vendor. Andes turns RISC-V-based CPU cores into licensable IP, selling them as "control cores" to companies building AI accelerators, SoCs, storage and IoT; many AI chips need such a small CPU for scheduling and control. As one of the most commercially mature, widely adopted IP vendors in the RISC-V camp, Andes is a direct beneficiary of the "rise of open architecture," though still small relative to Arm.
whyItMatters: 全球领先 RISC-V 处理器 IP 供应商
RISC-V 开放免授权费,挑战 Arm 的重要力量
CPU 内核 IP 做 AI 芯片的调度控制核心
「开放架构崛起」直接受益者

ememory.name: 力旺电子
ememory.oneLiner: 嵌入式非挥发存储 IP 龙头。
ememory.oneLinerEn: A leader in embedded non-volatile memory IP.
ememory.tagline: 藏在每颗芯片里的存储 IP
ememory.taglineEn: The memory IP inside every chip
ememory.subcategory: 嵌入式 NVM / 安全 IP
ememory.business: 嵌入式 NVM(OTP/MTP)与安全 IP，几乎所有先进芯片都要用到，隐形高毛利。
ememory.businessEn: Embedded NVM (OTP/MTP) and security IP used by nearly every advanced chip — a high-margin hidden champion.
ememory.description: 力旺电子(eMemory)是嵌入式非挥发存储(NVM)IP 的全球龙头。芯片里常常需要一小块「断电也不丢」的存储,用来存密钥、校准参数、身份信息等——这就是嵌入式 NVM(如 OTP/MTP)。力旺不造芯片,而是把这套 NVM 与相关安全技术做成 IP,授权给几乎所有芯片设计公司,再由台积电等代工厂在生产时植入。这是一门「隐形但无处不在」的生意:采用它的芯片越多、制程越先进,它按芯片收的授权与权利金就越多,毛利极高。AI 芯片、汽车、安全芯片放量都在拉动力旺,是半导体 IP 里典型的隐形冠军。
ememory.descriptionEn: eMemory is the global leader in embedded non-volatile memory (NVM) IP. Chips often need a small block of storage that "survives power-off" — to store keys, calibration parameters, identity — which is embedded NVM (OTP/MTP). eMemory doesn't make chips; it turns this NVM and related security technology into IP, licenses it to nearly every chip-design company, and has foundries like TSMC embed it during production. It is an "invisible but everywhere" business: the more chips adopt it and the more advanced the node, the more per-chip licensing and royalties it earns, at very high margins. AI chips, automotive and security chips ramping all drive eMemory — a classic hidden champion of semiconductor IP.
whyItMatters: 嵌入式非挥发存储(NVM)IP 全球龙头
几乎所有芯片都要一小块 NVM 存密钥/参数
按芯片收授权+权利金,「隐形但无处不在」高毛利
AI/汽车/安全芯片放量拉动,半导体 IP 隐形冠军

umc.name: 联电
umc.oneLiner: 全球第三大晶圆代工厂。
umc.tagline: 以特殊制程服务全球客户
umc.subcategory: 成熟 / 特殊制程代工
umc.business: 成熟与特殊制程晶圆代工，供应大量 AI 周边芯片(电源/驱动/连接)。
umc.businessEn: Mature- and specialty-node foundry services, supplying many AI peripheral chips (power, driver, connectivity).
umc.description: 联电(UMC)是全球第三大晶圆代工厂(仅次于台积电、三星)。它不去和台积电拼最尖端的几纳米制程,而是主攻「成熟制程与特殊制程」——电源管理、显示驱动、射频、图像传感、MCU 等芯片,这些虽然不是最先进,却在每台设备里大量存在、也是 AI 系统里不可或缺的周边。AI 服务器、数据中心与终端放量,同样需要海量这类「配套芯片」,联电因此稳定受益。它以扎实的成熟制程产能、良率与成本控制著称,是半导体制造里「稳」的那一极,与追求尖端的台积电形成互补。
umc.descriptionEn: UMC is the world's third-largest foundry (after TSMC and Samsung). Rather than chasing TSMC on the most cutting-edge few-nanometer nodes, it focuses on "mature and specialty processes" — power management, display drivers, RF, image sensors, MCUs — chips that, while not leading-edge, exist in huge quantities in every device and are indispensable peripherals in AI systems. As AI servers, data centers and devices ramp, they also need vast "supporting chips," so UMC benefits steadily. Known for solid mature-node capacity, yield and cost control, it is the "steady" pole of semiconductor manufacturing, complementing the cutting-edge TSMC.
whyItMatters: 全球第三大晶圆代工厂,主攻成熟与特殊制程
电源/驱动/射频/传感等 AI 系统不可或缺的周边
AI 放量同样需要海量配套芯片,稳定受益
扎实产能/良率/成本,与台积电互补

wistron.name: 纬创
wistron.oneLiner: AI 服务器代工主力（纬颖母公司）。
wistron.business: AI 服务器与云设备代工，英伟达 GB200 供应链核心之一。

inventec.name: 英业达
inventec.oneLiner: AI 服务器与笔电代工大厂。
inventec.business: AI 服务器、笔电与智能设备代工，英伟达服务器供应链一员。

gigabyte.name: 技嘉
gigabyte.oneLiner: AI 服务器与 GPU 主板品牌厂。
gigabyte.business: GPU 服务器、主板与显卡，AI 服务器整机出货增长快。

pegatron.name: 和硕
pegatron.oneLiner: 电子代工大厂，切入 AI 服务器。
pegatron.business: 消费电子与服务器代工，扩大 AI 服务器与网通产品布局。

accton.name: 智邦科技
accton.oneLiner: 白牌数据中心交换机代工龙头。
accton.business: 为云厂代工白牌高速交换机(含 800G)，AI 集群组网核心供应链。

avc.name: 奇鋐科技
avc.oneLiner: AI 服务器散热(风扇/液冷)龙头。
avc.oneLinerEn: A leader in AI-server cooling (fans and liquid cooling).
avc.business: 散热模组、风扇与液冷(含歧管/冷板)，GB200 液冷供应链核心。
avc.businessEn: Thermal modules, fans and liquid cooling (manifolds/cold plates) — a core of the GB200 liquid-cooling supply chain.
avc.description: 奇鋐科技(AVC)是 AI 服务器散热的龙头之一。GPU 机柜功率暴增,散热成了 AI 服务器最紧的瓶颈之一——风冷不够,必须上液冷。AVC 同时做风扇、均热板/热管等风冷模组,以及液冷的冷板(直接贴在芯片上带走热量)、歧管(分配冷却液)等关键部件,是英伟达 GB200/GB300 等高功率机柜液冷供应链的核心厂商。随着 AI 服务器全面转向液冷,AVC 的散热价值量(单机柜散热用料金额)大幅提升,业绩与股价高速增长,是台股「AI 散热」最核心的标的之一。
avc.descriptionEn: Asia Vital Components (AVC) is a leader in AI-server cooling. As GPU-rack power surges, thermal management has become one of the tightest bottlenecks for AI servers — air cooling isn't enough, so liquid cooling is required. AVC makes both air-cooling modules (fans, vapor chambers/heat pipes) and key liquid-cooling parts — cold plates (mounted directly on chips to carry away heat) and manifolds (distributing coolant) — a core vendor in the liquid-cooling supply chain for high-power NVIDIA GB200/GB300 racks. As AI servers shift wholesale to liquid cooling, AVC's cooling content per rack rises sharply, driving strong results and stock — one of the most central Taiwan-listed "AI cooling" names.
whyItMatters: AI 服务器散热龙头,风冷+液冷全做
冷板/歧管等液冷关键部件,GB200 供应链核心
AI 全面转液冷,单机柜散热价值量大幅提升
台股「AI 散热」最核心标的之一

auras.name: 双鸿科技
auras.tagline: 以液冷承接 AI 算力散热
auras.business: 散热模组与液冷冷板/歧管，受益 AI 服务器高功率散热需求。
auras.businessEn: Thermal modules and liquid-cooling cold plates/manifolds, benefiting from AI servers' high-power cooling needs.
auras.description: 双鸿科技(Auras)是台湾主要的服务器散热厂之一,与奇鋐同处 AI 散热赛道。它做散热模组(热管、均热板、散热片)起家,近年重点转向 AI 服务器的液冷——冷板、歧管、快接头等,直接贴合 GPU 高功率芯片带走热量。随着 AI 机柜功率不断攀升、液冷渗透率快速提高,双鸿承接大量 AI 服务器散热订单,业绩弹性很大。作为「AI 散热」第二梯队的代表,双鸿深度受益于这轮从风冷到液冷的技术切换,是台股散热供应链的重要一员。
auras.descriptionEn: Auras Technology is a major Taiwan server-cooling maker, alongside AVC in AI cooling. It began with thermal modules (heat pipes, vapor chambers, heat sinks) and has recently pivoted toward AI-server liquid cooling — cold plates, manifolds, quick-connects — mounted directly on high-power GPU chips to carry away heat. As AI-rack power keeps climbing and liquid-cooling penetration rises fast, Auras has taken on many AI-server cooling orders with high earnings leverage. As a representative of the "second tier" of AI cooling, Auras benefits deeply from this air-to-liquid transition — an important member of Taiwan's cooling supply chain.
whyItMatters: 台湾主要服务器散热厂,重点转向 AI 液冷
冷板/歧管/快接头,直接贴合 GPU 带走热量
液冷渗透率快速提高,承接大量 AI 散热订单
深度受益风冷到液冷切换,业绩弹性大

zhending.name: 臻鼎科技
zhending.oneLiner: 全球最大 PCB 厂（鸿海集团）。
zhending.business: 软板/硬板与高阶 PCB，AI 服务器与高速载板需求受益。

liteon.name: 光宝科技
liteon.oneLiner: 服务器电源与光电元件大厂。
liteon.oneLinerEn: A major maker of server power supplies and optoelectronic components.
liteon.tagline: 为数字世界提供电力与光
liteon.taglineEn: Powering and connecting the digital world
liteon.business: 服务器电源、云端电源与光电元件，AI 服务器供电受益者。
liteon.businessEn: Server power supplies, cloud power and optoelectronic components — a beneficiary of AI-server power demand.
liteon.description: 光宝科技(Lite-On)是台湾电源与光电元件大厂。AI 服务器不仅要散热,更要「喂电」——一个 GPU 机柜的功率是传统服务器的十几倍,对电源的功率密度、效率与可靠性要求极高。光宝做服务器电源、电源供应器(PSU)、以及数据中心的高压直流供电等,直接受益于 AI 算力对电力的暴增需求;它同时有 LED、光电元件等业务。随着 AI 机柜功率一路飙升、供电架构升级,光宝的高功率电源价值量与订单显著增长,是台股「AI 供电」链条上的重要一员,与台达电等竞争。
liteon.descriptionEn: Lite-On Technology is a major Taiwan maker of power and optoelectronic components. AI servers need not only cooling but "feeding power" — a GPU rack draws over ten times the power of a traditional server, demanding very high power density, efficiency and reliability from power supplies. Lite-On makes server power supplies (PSUs) and data-center high-voltage DC power, directly benefiting from AI compute's surging power demand; it also has LED and optoelectronic businesses. As AI-rack power keeps soaring and power-delivery architectures upgrade, Lite-On's high-power-supply content and orders have grown markedly — an important member of Taiwan's "AI power" chain, competing with Delta and others.
whyItMatters: 台湾电源与光电元件大厂,做服务器电源/PSU
AI 机柜功率是传统十几倍,对电源要求极高
受益 AI 算力对电力暴增需求,供电架构升级
高功率电源价值量与订单显著增长,与台达竞争

nanya.name: 南亚科技
nanya.business: DRAM 内存设计与制造，受益 AI 带动的存储需求回升。
nanya.businessEn: DRAM design and manufacturing, benefiting from AI-driven recovery in memory demand.
nanya.description: 南亚科技(Nanya)是台塑集团旗下的 DRAM 内存厂,也是三星、SK 海力士、美光三巨头之外为数不多的 DRAM 专业厂之一。它主要做标准 DRAM 与利基型内存(消费、工业、网通等场景),规模比三大厂小、制程也更保守,因此更像 DRAM 周期的「弹性标的」——存储景气好转时业绩弹性大。AI 带动的服务器内存需求把先进 DRAM 产能吸走,进而拉动整个 DRAM 价格上行,南亚科作为纯内存厂顺势受益。它是观察内存周期与台系存储供应的重要窗口之一。
nanya.descriptionEn: Nanya Technology is a DRAM maker under the Formosa Plastics Group and one of the few dedicated DRAM specialists outside the big three (Samsung, SK Hynix, Micron). It mainly makes standard and niche DRAM (consumer, industrial, networking), smaller in scale and more conservative on process than the big three, making it more of an "elastic play" on the DRAM cycle — with high earnings leverage when memory conditions improve. AI-driven server-memory demand pulls away advanced DRAM capacity, lifting overall DRAM prices, and Nanya benefits as a pure-play memory maker. It is an important window into the memory cycle and Taiwanese memory supply.
whyItMatters: 台塑集团旗下 DRAM 厂,三大厂外少数专业厂
做标准与利基型 DRAM,DRAM 周期弹性标的
AI 拉动服务器内存,DRAM 价格上行受益
观察内存周期与台系存储供应的窗口

asus.name: 华硕
asus.oneLiner: PC 与 AI 服务器品牌厂。
asus.business: 笔电、主板显卡与 AI 服务器(含 GB200 整机柜)，自建 AI 云。

wolfspeed.name: Wolfspeed
wolfspeed.oneLiner: 碳化硅(SiC)功率半导体龙头。
wolfspeed.oneLinerEn: A leader in silicon-carbide (SiC) power semiconductors.
wolfspeed.tagline: 以碳化硅驱动高效电力
wolfspeed.business: SiC 衬底与功率器件，用于电动车与数据中心高效供电。
wolfspeed.businessEn: SiC substrates and power devices used for efficient power delivery in EVs and data centers.
wolfspeed.description: Wolfspeed 是碳化硅(SiC)功率半导体的先驱与龙头。SiC 相比传统硅,能在更高电压、更高温度下更高效地转换电力,损耗更小,是电动车、快充、光伏逆变以及 AI 数据中心高压供电的关键材料。Wolfspeed 从 SiC 单晶衬底到功率器件全链条自研,技术领先。但它此前激进扩产、背上巨额债务,加上电动车需求放缓,2025 年 6 月申请预打包破产(Chapter 11),并于 9 月完成重组、砍掉约 46 亿美元债务(减债约七成)后继续经营。它是「技术领先但财务踩坑」的典型,重组后轻装再战 SiC 长期需求。
wolfspeed.descriptionEn: Wolfspeed is a pioneer and leader in silicon-carbide (SiC) power semiconductors. Compared with traditional silicon, SiC converts power more efficiently at higher voltages and temperatures with lower losses, making it a key material for EVs, fast charging, solar inverters and high-voltage power delivery in AI data centers. Wolfspeed develops the full chain from SiC single-crystal substrates to power devices, with leading technology. But after aggressive capacity expansion left it with heavy debt, compounded by slowing EV demand, it filed a prepackaged Chapter 11 in June 2025 and completed its restructuring in September, cutting about $4.6 billion of debt (roughly 70%) before continuing to operate. It is a textbook case of "technology leader, financial misstep," re-entering the long-term SiC race leaner after restructuring.
whyItMatters: 碳化硅(SiC)功率半导体先驱与龙头
SiC 高压高温高效,EV/快充/数据中心供电关键
衬底到器件全链条自研,技术领先
2025 破产重组砍债约七成,轻装再战

ifx.name: 英飞凌
ifx.business: 功率半导体、SiC/GaN 器件与微控制器，数据中心供电与汽车电子核心。

apple.name: 苹果
apple.oneLiner: 把 AI 装进十亿台设备的端侧 AI 巨头。
apple.oneLinerEn: The on-device AI giant putting AI into a billion devices.
apple.industry: 消费电子 / 端侧 AI
apple.business: iPhone/Mac 与自研芯片(A/M 系列，含神经网络引擎)，Apple Intelligence 把生成式 AI 装进系统，部分接入 ChatGPT。
apple.businessEn: iPhone/Mac and in-house chips (A/M series with a Neural Engine); Apple Intelligence builds generative AI into the OS, with some ChatGPT integration.
apple.description: 苹果是全球市值最高的公司之一,也是「端侧 AI」最重要的玩家——它掌握着数十亿台在用设备这一无与伦比的分发入口。苹果的差异化在于「设备 + 自研芯片 + 隐私」:A/M 系列芯片内置强大的神经网络引擎(NPU),让很多 AI 能力在手机/电脑本地运行,配合「私有云计算」在需要时安全地调用云端算力。其 Apple Intelligence 把生成式 AI 装进 iOS/macOS(写作、图像、通知摘要、更聪明的 Siri),并在部分场景接入 ChatGPT、据报道也在洽谈用谷歌 Gemini 增强 Siri。苹果的策略不是造最强的大模型,而是把 AI 无缝、私密地融进每个人日常用的设备里。
apple.descriptionEn: Apple is one of the world's most valuable companies and the most important player in "on-device AI" — it commands an unmatched distribution channel of billions of devices in active use. Its differentiation is "device + in-house silicon + privacy": A/M-series chips embed a powerful Neural Engine (NPU) so many AI capabilities run locally on the phone/computer, complemented by "Private Cloud Compute" to securely tap cloud power when needed. Its Apple Intelligence builds generative AI into iOS/macOS (writing, images, notification summaries, a smarter Siri), integrates ChatGPT in some cases, and is reportedly in talks to use Google's Gemini to power Siri. Apple's strategy isn't to build the strongest model but to weave AI seamlessly and privately into the devices everyone uses every day.
whyItMatters: 数十亿台在用设备,无与伦比的 AI 分发入口
自研 A/M 芯片 NPU,大量 AI 端侧本地运行
「私有云计算」在隐私前提下调用云端算力
Apple Intelligence 融入系统,接 ChatGPT/洽谈 Gemini

qualcomm.name: 高通
qualcomm.oneLiner: 手机与 AI PC 端侧芯片龙头。
qualcomm.oneLinerEn: The leader in on-device chips for phones and AI PCs.
qualcomm.business: 骁龙(Snapdragon)移动/PC 芯片与基带，主打端侧 AI 算力(NPU)，Copilot+ PC 主力芯片。
qualcomm.businessEn: Snapdragon mobile/PC chips and modems, focused on on-device AI compute (NPU); the main chip for Copilot+ PCs.
qualcomm.description: 高通是移动与端侧芯片的龙头,骁龙(Snapdragon)平台驱动着全球大量安卓手机。近年它把重心放在「端侧 AI」:骁龙芯片里的 NPU 算力持续飙升,让手机/PC 能在本地跑生成式 AI(图像生成、语音助手、离线大模型)。它自研的 Oryon CPU 让骁龙 X 系列成为微软 Copilot+ PC 的主力芯片,正面挑战 x86。高通还在把业务从手机拓展到汽车、XR、IoT 与 PC 以对冲对苹果基带订单的依赖。在「AI 从云走向端」的趋势里,高通是端侧算力最直接的受益者之一。
qualcomm.descriptionEn: Qualcomm is the leader in mobile and on-device chips, with its Snapdragon platform powering a large share of the world's Android phones. In recent years it has centered on "on-device AI": the NPU in Snapdragon chips has surged in performance, letting phones/PCs run generative AI locally (image generation, voice assistants, offline models). Its in-house Oryon CPU made the Snapdragon X series the main chip for Microsoft's Copilot+ PCs, taking on x86 directly. Qualcomm is also expanding from phones into automotive, XR, IoT and PCs to hedge its reliance on Apple modem orders. In the shift of "AI from cloud to edge," Qualcomm is one of the most direct beneficiaries of on-device compute.
whyItMatters: 骁龙驱动全球大量安卓手机,移动芯片龙头
NPU 算力飙升,手机/PC 本地跑生成式 AI
Oryon CPU 让骁龙 X 成 Copilot+ PC 主力,挑战 x86
拓展汽车/XR/IoT/PC,端侧算力直接受益者

mediatek.name: 联发科
mediatek.oneLiner: 全球出货最大的手机芯片厂，天玑端侧 AI。
mediatek.oneLinerEn: The world's top shipper of smartphone chips, with Dimensity on-device AI.
mediatek.business: 天玑(Dimensity)手机 SoC 与各类芯片，端侧 AI 算力持续升级，并与英伟达合作。
mediatek.businessEn: Dimensity smartphone SoCs and a broad chip lineup, with steadily upgraded on-device AI, and a partnership with NVIDIA.
mediatek.description: 联发科(MediaTek)是全球出货量最大的手机芯片厂,以高性价比的天玑(Dimensity)系列 SoC 占据大量中高端安卓市场,还做智能电视、WiFi、电源管理等各类芯片。它的天玑芯片内置强大的 AI 处理单元(APU),把端侧生成式 AI(本地大模型、影像处理)带到主流价位的手机上。近年联发科与英伟达深度合作:一起做面向 PC 的 Arm 芯片,并为英伟达的个人 AI 超算(如 DGX Spark/GB10)提供 CPU,把触角从手机伸向 AI PC 与汽车。作为 Arm 阵营的量产主力之一,联发科是端侧 AI 普及的重要推手。
mediatek.descriptionEn: MediaTek is the world's top shipper of smartphone chips, capturing much of the mid-to-high-end Android market with its cost-effective Dimensity SoCs, and also making TV, WiFi and power-management chips. Its Dimensity chips embed a powerful AI processing unit (APU), bringing on-device generative AI (local models, imaging) to mainstream-priced phones. Recently MediaTek has partnered deeply with NVIDIA: co-developing Arm-based PC chips and supplying the CPU for NVIDIA's personal AI supercomputers (such as DGX Spark/GB10), extending from phones into AI PCs and automotive. As one of the Arm camp's mass-production mainstays, MediaTek is a major force in the spread of on-device AI.
whyItMatters: 全球出货量最大手机芯片厂,天玑占大量安卓
天玑内置 APU,把端侧生成式 AI 带到主流价位
与英伟达合作做 PC 芯片、供 DGX Spark CPU
Arm 阵营量产主力,端侧 AI 普及推手

ibm.name: IBM
ibm.oneLiner: 百年科技巨头，企业 AI(watsonx)与量子计算领跑者。
ibm.oneLinerEn: A century-old tech giant leading in enterprise AI (watsonx) and quantum computing.
ibm.subcategory: 混合云 / 企业 AI / 量子
ibm.business: 混合云与咨询、watsonx 企业 AI 平台，以及领先的超导量子计算机与路线图。
ibm.businessEn: Hybrid cloud and consulting, the watsonx enterprise-AI platform, and leading superconducting quantum computers and roadmap.
ibm.description: IBM 是百年科技巨头,如今聚焦企业市场,由三块支撑:混合云(以收购的 Red Hat 为核心)、咨询,以及 AI 与量子。在生成式 AI 上,它主打 watsonx——一个强调「治理、可控、可私有部署」的企业 AI 平台,并开源了 Granite 模型,帮受监管的大企业把 AI 安全地用在自己的数据上(与 Anthropic 等也有合作)。在量子计算上,IBM 是超导路线的领跑者,长期发布量子处理器与清晰的路线图,目标在本世纪二十年代末做出容错量子计算机。IBM 的打法是「不追消费爆款,做企业信得过的 AI 与前沿计算」。
ibm.descriptionEn: IBM is a century-old tech giant now focused on enterprises, resting on three pillars: hybrid cloud (centered on its acquired Red Hat), consulting, and AI and quantum. In generative AI it emphasizes watsonx — an enterprise-AI platform stressing "governance, control and private deployment" — and has open-sourced its Granite models, helping regulated large enterprises use AI safely on their own data (with partnerships including Anthropic). In quantum computing, IBM is a leader on the superconducting path, regularly releasing quantum processors and a clear roadmap, targeting a fault-tolerant quantum computer by the late 2020s. IBM's playbook is "not chasing consumer hits, but AI and frontier computing that enterprises can trust."
whyItMatters: 混合云(Red Hat)+ 咨询 + AI/量子三支柱
watsonx 强调治理/可控/可私有部署,开源 Granite
超导量子领跑者,路线图指向容错量子
打法:做企业信得过的 AI 与前沿计算

oracle.name: 甲骨文
oracle.oneLiner: 数据库巨头转型 AI 云，OCI 大接 AI 算力订单。
oracle.oneLinerEn: The database giant reborn as an AI cloud — OCI is winning the industry's largest compute contracts.
oracle.tagline: 把企业数据与 AI 算力搬上 OCI 云
oracle.taglineEn: Bringing enterprise data and AI compute onto the OCI cloud
oracle.subcategory: 数据库 / OCI 云基础设施
oracle.role: AI 算力云 · 企业软件
oracle.business: 数据库与企业软件，OCI 云凭借高性价比 GPU 集群拿下 OpenAI 等超大算力订单(星际之门)。
oracle.businessEn: Databases and enterprise software, plus Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI), whose cost-efficient GPU superclusters have won mega compute contracts such as OpenAI's Stargate.
oracle.description: 甲骨文由 Larry Ellison 于 1977 年创立，长期是全球企业级数据库的绝对霸主，也是 ERP/HCM 等企业软件巨头。近年公司把战略重心押注到 OCI(Oracle Cloud Infrastructure)——凭借高性价比的 GPU 集群与 RDMA 网络，OCI 从「云市场追赶者」跃升为 AI 算力的关键供给方。2025 年 7 月，甲骨文与 OpenAI 签下五年、总额超 3000 亿美元的算力大单(星际之门 Stargate 的一部分，规划新增最高 4.5GW 容量，2027 年起生效)，直接把公司的剩余履约义务(RPO)推高到数千亿美元级别、同比暴增数倍，其中约一半与 OpenAI 绑定。这笔「世纪大单」让甲骨文一度成为 AI 基建叙事的核心标的，Larry Ellison 的身家也一度冲上全球首富。2025 年 9 月，公司迎来管理层交棒：OCI 出身的 Clay Magouyrk 与 Mike Sicilia 出任联席 CEO，Safra Catz 转任董事会执行副主席，Ellison 仍任董事长兼 CTO。甲骨文还推行「多云」策略，把 Oracle 数据库嵌入 Azure、Google Cloud、AWS，形成独特卡位。
oracle.descriptionEn: Founded by Larry Ellison in 1977, Oracle has long been the dominant force in enterprise databases and a giant in ERP/HCM enterprise software. In recent years it has bet its strategy on OCI (Oracle Cloud Infrastructure): with cost-efficient GPU superclusters and RDMA networking, OCI has vaulted from cloud-market laggard to a critical supplier of AI compute. In July 2025 Oracle signed a five-year contract with OpenAI worth over $300 billion (part of the Stargate build-out, planning up to 4.5 GW of additional capacity from 2027), pushing its remaining performance obligations (RPO) into the hundreds of billions — up several-fold year over year, with roughly half tied to OpenAI. This "deal of the century" briefly made Oracle a centerpiece of the AI-infrastructure story and, for a moment, made Larry Ellison the world's richest person. In September 2025 the company handed over leadership: OCI veteran Clay Magouyrk and Mike Sicilia became co-CEOs, Safra Catz moved to Executive Vice Chair of the board, and Ellison remained Chairman and CTO. Oracle also runs a distinctive "multicloud" strategy, embedding its database inside Azure, Google Cloud and AWS.
whyItMatters: 3000 亿美元 OpenAI 大单，是 AI 基建需求的最强信号之一
RPO(在手订单)冲上数千亿美元，锁定未来数年营收
OCI 以高性价比 GPU 集群成为超大模型训练的关键第三方算力
多云策略把 Oracle 数据库嵌入三大云，卡位企业数据

leadership.name: Larry Ellison
leadership.title: 创始人 / 董事长 / CTO

applovin.name: AppLovin
applovin.oneLiner: AI 广告引擎 AXON 驱动的营销科技黑马。
applovin.oneLinerEn: An ad-tech breakout driven by its AXON AI engine.
applovin.tagline: 用 AI 连接内容与用户
applovin.taglineEn: Connecting content and users with AI
applovin.business: 移动广告平台，AXON AI 推荐引擎大幅提升投放效率，业绩与股价暴涨。
applovin.businessEn: A mobile ad platform whose AXON AI engine sharply improves targeting efficiency, driving surging results and stock.
applovin.description: AppLovin 是近年最惊人的「AI 广告」黑马。它做移动广告的撮合与投放,核心武器是自研的 AXON AI 推荐引擎——用机器学习把「哪个广告投给哪个用户效果最好」预测得极准,大幅提升广告主的投放回报(ROAS),从而在广告主与流量之间抽取更高价值。凭借 AXON 的效果碾压,AppLovin 业绩与股价在 2024–2025 年暴涨,一度成为标普 500 里表现最猛的股票之一。它还剥离了自家游戏业务,彻底聚焦「AI 驱动的广告平台」,是「AI 让广告效率革命」最直接的商业化案例。
applovin.descriptionEn: AppLovin is one of the most stunning "AI advertising" breakouts of recent years. It runs mobile ad matching and delivery, with its self-built AXON AI recommendation engine as its core weapon — using machine learning to predict extremely accurately "which ad performs best for which user," sharply improving advertisers' return on ad spend (ROAS) and thus extracting more value between advertisers and inventory. On AXON's outperformance, AppLovin's results and stock soared in 2024–2025, briefly among the best performers in the S&P 500. It also divested its own games business to focus entirely on the "AI-driven ad platform" — the most direct commercialization of "AI revolutionizing ad efficiency."
whyItMatters: AXON AI 引擎精准预测「广告投给谁最有效」
大幅提升广告主投放回报(ROAS)
2024–2025 业绩股价暴涨,标普表现最猛之一
剥离游戏业务,彻底聚焦 AI 广告平台

ttd.name: The Trade Desk
ttd.oneLiner: 最大的独立程序化广告平台。
ttd.tagline: 为开放互联网赋能广告
ttd.business: 需求方广告平台，Kokai 用 AI 优化跨渠道程序化投放。
ttd.businessEn: A demand-side platform whose Kokai uses AI to optimize cross-channel programmatic buying.
ttd.description: The Trade Desk(TTD)是全球最大的「独立」需求方广告平台(DSP)——广告主和代理商通过它,在开放互联网(联网电视 CTV、音频、网页等,而非谷歌/Meta 的封闭花园)上程序化地竞价买广告。它的中立性是卖点:不像谷歌既当裁判又当选手,TTD 只站在买方一边,帮广告主把钱花得更有效。其 Kokai 平台用 AI 优化每一次竞价、定向与跨渠道分配,并主推 UID2 等隐私友好的身份方案应对 Cookie 消亡。TTD 是「开放互联网广告」的旗手,尤其重仓增长最快的联网电视(CTV),但也面临谷歌/亚马逊与自身增长波动的竞争压力。
ttd.descriptionEn: The Trade Desk (TTD) is the world's largest "independent" demand-side platform (DSP) — advertisers and agencies use it to programmatically bid for ads on the open internet (connected TV, audio, web, rather than Google/Meta's walled gardens). Its neutrality is a selling point: unlike Google, which is both referee and player, TTD sits only on the buy side, helping advertisers spend more effectively. Its Kokai platform uses AI to optimize each bid, targeting and cross-channel allocation, and it champions privacy-friendly identity solutions like UID2 to address the demise of cookies. TTD is the standard-bearer of "open-internet advertising," especially heavy in fast-growing connected TV (CTV), though it faces competition from Google/Amazon and its own growth volatility.
whyItMatters: 全球最大独立需求方广告平台(DSP)
中立、只站买方,助广告主更有效花钱
Kokai 用 AI 优化竞价/定向/跨渠道分配
重仓联网电视(CTV),主推 UID2 应对 Cookie 消亡

ionq.name: IonQ
ionq.oneLiner: 离子阱量子计算领跑上市公司。
ionq.oneLinerEn: The leading publicly traded trapped-ion quantum-computing company.
ionq.taglineEn: Bringing quantum computing to the world
ionq.business: 囚禁离子量子计算机与量子云服务，量子计算纯玩标杆股。
ionq.businessEn: Trapped-ion quantum computers and quantum cloud services — the bellwether pure-play quantum stock.
ionq.description: IonQ 是市值最高的纯量子计算上市公司,走「离子阱(trapped-ion)」技术路线——用电磁场把单个离子悬在真空中当量子比特,天然一致性高、相干时间长。作为最早上市(SPAC)的量子公司,它是资本市场的量子标杆股,并通过云平台(AWS/Azure/GCP)对外提供量子算力。近年 IonQ 大举收购(如 Oxford Ionics 等)扩充技术与人才,并押注量子网络。需要提醒的是:量子计算仍处早期,IonQ 营收很小(季度约数千万美元)、估值高企(市盈率/市销率极高),股价波动剧烈,更多是「押注未来十年」的高风险高预期标的。
ionq.descriptionEn: IonQ is the most valuable pure-play quantum-computing public company, pursuing the "trapped-ion" approach — suspending single ions in a vacuum with electromagnetic fields as qubits, with naturally high uniformity and long coherence times. As the first quantum company to go public (via SPAC), it is the market's quantum bellwether and offers quantum compute through cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP). It has recently made major acquisitions (such as Oxford Ionics) to expand technology and talent and is betting on quantum networking. A caveat: quantum computing is still early, IonQ's revenue is small (tens of millions per quarter) and its valuation is very high (extreme P/E and P/S), with a highly volatile stock — more a high-risk, high-expectation "bet on the next decade."
whyItMatters: 市值最高的纯量子计算上市公司,量子标杆股
离子阱路线,一致性高、相干时间长
云平台提供量子算力,收购扩充技术人才
仍处早期:营收很小、估值高企、波动剧烈

rigetti.name: Rigetti
rigetti.oneLiner: 超导量子计算上市新锐。
rigetti.oneLinerEn: A publicly traded superconducting quantum-computing upstart.
rigetti.business: 超导量子处理器与全栈量子云平台。
rigetti.businessEn: Superconducting quantum processors and a full-stack quantum cloud platform.
rigetti.description: Rigetti Computing 走「超导」量子路线——和谷歌、IBM 同一技术流派,用超导电路做量子比特,芯片可借鉴半导体工艺制造。它自建晶圆厂(Fab-1)并做「全栈」:从芯片、控制系统到云平台一体化,主打模块化多芯片扩展来提升量子比特数与保真度。作为上市的超导量子纯玩标的,Rigetti 在量子行情里弹性很大,但商业化仍处极早期——季度营收仅数百万美元、估值却达数十亿,市销率极高,是典型的高波动、押注长期的量子概念股。
rigetti.descriptionEn: Rigetti Computing pursues the "superconducting" approach — the same school as Google and IBM — using superconducting circuits as qubits, with chips that can borrow from semiconductor fabrication. It runs its own fab (Fab-1) and is "full-stack": integrating chips, control systems and a cloud platform, emphasizing modular multi-chip scaling to raise qubit counts and fidelity. As a publicly traded pure-play superconducting-quantum name, Rigetti is highly sensitive to quantum-sector moves, but commercialization is still very early — quarterly revenue of only a few million dollars against a multibillion-dollar valuation (extreme P/S) — a classic high-volatility, bet-on-the-long-term quantum stock.
whyItMatters: 超导路线,与谷歌/IBM 同一技术流派
自建晶圆厂 Fab-1,芯片-控制-云全栈
模块化多芯片扩展提升量子比特数
商业化极早期:营收数百万、市销率极高

dwave.name: D-Wave
dwave.oneLiner: 量子退火路线的上市公司。
dwave.oneLinerEn: A publicly traded company pursuing quantum annealing.
dwave.tagline: 让量子计算解决现实问题
dwave.business: 量子退火与门模型量子计算，主攻优化问题的商业应用。
dwave.businessEn: Quantum annealing plus gate-model quantum computing, targeting commercial optimization problems.
dwave.description: D-Wave 是量子计算的老兵(1999 年创立),以「量子退火(quantum annealing)」路线独树一帜:它不追求通用量子计算,而是专门解决「优化」类问题(排班、物流、组合优化等),更接近能今天就用的商业场景。相比同行,D-Wave 的差异化在于有相对真实的商业订单——2026 年拿下如佛罗里达大西洋大学 2000 万美元系统采购、以及与财富 100 强的千万美元量子云(QCaaS)协议。它也在拓展门模型(通用)量子。作为营收相对「实」的量子标的,D-Wave 讲的是「量子已经能干活」的故事,但整体规模仍小、估值高。
dwave.descriptionEn: D-Wave is a quantum veteran (founded 1999) distinguished by its "quantum annealing" approach: rather than pursue universal quantum computing, it specializes in "optimization" problems (scheduling, logistics, combinatorial optimization), closer to commercial use cases available today. Its differentiation versus peers is relatively real commercial orders — in 2026 it landed a $20 million system sale to Florida Atlantic University and a multimillion-dollar quantum-cloud (QCaaS) agreement with a Fortune 100 buyer. It is also expanding into gate-model (universal) quantum. As the quantum name with relatively "real" revenue, D-Wave tells a "quantum already does useful work" story, though its overall scale is still small and its valuation high.
whyItMatters: 量子退火路线,专攻优化类现实问题
有相对真实的商业订单(FAU 2000 万等)
也在拓展门模型(通用)量子
「量子已能干活」故事,但规模仍小、估值高

psiquantum.name: PsiQuantum
psiquantum.oneLiner: 光子量子计算独角兽，主攻百万量子比特。
psiquantum.oneLinerEn: A photonic quantum-computing unicorn aiming for a million qubits.
psiquantum.tagline: 打造有实际用途的量子计算机
psiquantum.business: 用硅光子做容错量子计算，目标建百万量子比特机器。
psiquantum.businessEn: Fault-tolerant quantum computing using silicon photonics, aiming to build a million-qubit machine.
psiquantum.description: PsiQuantum 走「光子(photonic)」量子路线——用光子而非离子/超导电路做量子比特,最大好处是可以借用成熟的半导体光刻工艺、在标准晶圆厂里大规模制造芯片。它跳过「先做几十上百个量子比特的中间机」,直接押注「一步到位造出容错的百万量子比特机器」,认为只有到那个规模量子计算才真正有用。公司在澳大利亚布里斯班和美国芝加哥建设大型量子计算设施,目标 2027 年前后上线。2025 年 E 轮后估值约 70 亿美元,是光子量子路线最受关注、也最「重资产豪赌」的玩家。
psiquantum.descriptionEn: PsiQuantum pursues the "photonic" approach — using photons rather than ions/superconducting circuits as qubits, whose biggest advantage is leveraging mature semiconductor lithography to manufacture chips at scale in standard fabs. It skips the "intermediate machines with tens or hundreds of qubits" and bets directly on "building a fault-tolerant million-qubit machine in one leap," arguing quantum computing is only truly useful at that scale. It is building large quantum facilities in Brisbane, Australia and Chicago, targeting operation around 2027. After its 2025 Series E, it was valued at about $7 billion — the most-watched and most capital-intensive bet in photonic quantum.
whyItMatters: 光子路线,可用半导体光刻在标准晶圆厂造芯片
直接押注容错「百万量子比特」一步到位
在布里斯班/芝加哥建大型量子设施,目标约 2027
2025 E 轮估值约 70 亿美元,重资产豪赌

quantinuum.name: Quantinuum
quantinuum.oneLiner: 霍尼韦尔系离子阱量子计算龙头，2026 上市。
quantinuum.oneLinerEn: The Honeywell-backed trapped-ion quantum leader; listed in 2026.
quantinuum.tagline: 加速量子计算的实际应用
quantinuum.business: 离子阱量子硬件与量子软件，被视为综合实力最强的量子公司之一。
quantinuum.businessEn: Trapped-ion quantum hardware plus quantum software — seen as one of the strongest all-around quantum companies.
quantinuum.description: Quantinuum 由霍尼韦尔的量子部门与剑桥量子(Cambridge Quantum)合并而成,由霍尼韦尔控股,被广泛视为综合实力最强的量子公司之一。它同样走离子阱路线,其 H 系列量子计算机长期在「量子体积」等硬件指标上领先,并在纠错、逻辑量子比特上取得重要进展;同时它有很强的量子软件栈(如 TKET 编译器)与面向药物、材料、金融的应用。2026 年 6 月,Quantinuum 登陆纳斯达克(QNT),募资约 16.8 亿美元、估值约 150 亿美元,成为仅次于 IonQ 的第二大上市量子公司,是量子从「实验室」走向「资本市场」的又一里程碑。
quantinuum.descriptionEn: Quantinuum was formed by merging Honeywell's quantum division with Cambridge Quantum, is majority-owned by Honeywell, and is widely seen as one of the strongest all-around quantum companies. It also uses the trapped-ion approach; its H-series computers have long led on hardware metrics like "quantum volume," with important progress on error correction and logical qubits, and it has a strong quantum software stack (such as the TKET compiler) plus applications in drugs, materials and finance. In June 2026 Quantinuum listed on Nasdaq (QNT), raising about $1.68 billion at roughly a $15 billion valuation, becoming the second-largest publicly traded quantum company behind IonQ — another milestone in quantum's move from "the lab" to "the capital markets."
whyItMatters: 霍尼韦尔控股,综合实力最强的量子公司之一
离子阱 H 系列长期领先「量子体积」等指标
强量子软件栈(TKET)+ 纠错/逻辑量子比特进展
2026.6 纳斯达克上市,募资约 16.8 亿、估值约 150 亿

hesai.name: 禾赛科技
hesai.oneLiner: 全球车载激光雷达出货龙头。
hesai.oneLinerEn: The world's top shipper of automotive lidar.
hesai.taglineEn: Giving robots the gift of sight
hesai.business: 车载与机器人激光雷达，全球出货量领先，供货多家车企与 Robotaxi。
hesai.businessEn: Automotive and robotics lidar, leading global shipments, supplying many automakers and robotaxi operators.
