hesai.description: 禾赛科技(Hesai)是全球车载激光雷达出货量龙头,纳斯达克上市(HSAI)。激光雷达用激光扫描给车/机器人建立精确的三维环境感知,是很多高阶智能驾驶与 Robotaxi 的关键传感器。禾赛靠自研芯片化架构把成本和体积不断压低、良率与产能拉高,拿下大量中外车企与 Robotaxi(含谷歌 Waymo)订单,并把市场从汽车扩展到机器人。2025 年营收约 30 亿元人民币、实现盈利,2026 年出货量有望翻倍到 300–350 万台,是「激光雷达从贵到普及」这一趋势的最大赢家之一。
hesai.descriptionEn: Hesai is the world's top shipper of automotive lidar, listed on Nasdaq (HSAI). Lidar uses laser scanning to give vehicles/robots precise 3D environmental perception and is a key sensor for many advanced driving systems and robotaxis. By developing a chip-based architecture, Hesai keeps cutting cost and size while raising yield and capacity, winning large orders from Chinese and foreign automakers and robotaxi operators (including Google's Waymo), and expanding from cars into robotics. Its 2025 revenue was about RMB 3 billion and it turned profitable; 2026 shipments are expected to roughly double to 3–3.5 million units — one of the biggest winners of the "lidar from expensive to mainstream" trend.
whyItMatters: 全球车载激光雷达出货量第一
芯片化架构压成本、提良率产能
供货中外车企与 Robotaxi(含 Waymo)
2025 盈利,2026 出货有望翻倍到 300-350 万台

luminar.name: Luminar
luminar.oneLiner: 美国车载激光雷达代表。
luminar.business: 高性能车载激光雷达与感知软件，绑定沃尔沃等车企量产。
luminar.businessEn: High-performance automotive lidar and perception software, with production deals at automakers like Volvo.
luminar.description: Luminar 由 Austin Russell 于 2012 年创立(17 岁辍学创业),是美国车载激光雷达的代表,主打长距、高分辨率的 1550nm 激光雷达,并配套感知软件,早年与沃尔沃等达成量产合作,一度是行业明星。但激光雷达商业化比预期艰难:成本高、量产爬坡慢、车企采用节奏不及预期,Luminar 持续亏损、股价大幅回落,2025 年创始人 Russell 卸任 CEO、公司裁员重组。它是「激光雷达叙事很好但落地艰难」的典型案例,与实现盈利的禾赛形成对照。
luminar.descriptionEn: Luminar was founded in 2012 by Austin Russell (who dropped out of college at 17) and is a leading U.S. automotive-lidar company, known for long-range, high-resolution 1550nm lidar plus perception software, with early production deals at Volvo and others, once an industry star. But lidar commercialization proved harder than expected: high costs, slow production ramps and slower-than-hoped automaker adoption left Luminar persistently loss-making with a sharply lower stock; in 2025 founder Russell stepped down as CEO and the company restructured with layoffs. It is a textbook case of "great lidar narrative, hard execution," contrasting with the now-profitable Hesai.
whyItMatters: 美国车载激光雷达代表,1550nm 长距高分辨
早年与沃尔沃等达成量产合作,曾是明星
成本高、量产慢,持续亏损、股价大幅回落
2025 创始人卸任、裁员重组,落地艰难

ouster.name: Ouster
ouster.tagline: 以数字激光雷达感知世界
ouster.taglineEn: Sensing the world with digital lidar
ouster.business: 数字激光雷达，覆盖汽车、机器人、工业与智慧城市。
ouster.businessEn: Digital lidar spanning automotive, robotics, industrial and smart-city applications.
ouster.description: Ouster 成立于 2015 年,主打「数字激光雷达」——用类似 CMOS 相机的数字化架构(SPAD + 芯片)替代传统机械/模拟方案,以求更低成本、更高可靠与可规模化。2023 年它与老牌激光雷达公司 Velodyne 合并,整合了专利与客户。与专注汽车前装的对手不同,Ouster 走「多市场」路线:除汽车外,还大量用于机器人、工业自动化、智慧城市与安防等,以更分散的场景消化产能。它是激光雷达行业整合期活下来的主要玩家之一。
ouster.descriptionEn: Founded in 2015, Ouster focuses on "digital lidar" — using a digitized architecture similar to a CMOS camera (SPAD + chip) to replace traditional mechanical/analog designs for lower cost, higher reliability and scalability. In 2023 it merged with veteran lidar company Velodyne, consolidating patents and customers. Unlike rivals focused on automotive OEM design-ins, Ouster takes a "multi-market" approach: beyond cars, it is widely used in robotics, industrial automation, smart cities and security, absorbing capacity across more diversified use cases. It is one of the main survivors of the lidar industry's consolidation.
whyItMatters: 数字激光雷达(SPAD+芯片),低成本可规模化
2023 合并 Velodyne,整合专利与客户
多市场:汽车+机器人+工业+智慧城市
激光雷达整合期活下来的主要玩家之一

horizon.name: 地平线
horizon.oneLiner: 中国车规 AI 芯片龙头。
horizon.oneLinerEn: China's leader in automotive-grade AI chips.
horizon.tagline: 让每辆车都成为智能体
horizon.business: 征程系列车规智能驾驶芯片与软硬一体方案，中国智驾芯片主力。
horizon.businessEn: The Journey series of automotive-grade driving chips and integrated hardware-software solutions — China's mainstay in smart-driving silicon.
horizon.description: 地平线(Horizon Robotics)由前百度深度学习研究院负责人余凯于 2015 年创立,是中国车规智能驾驶芯片的龙头。其「征程(Journey)」系列芯片专为车载辅助/自动驾驶设计,配套软硬一体的 Horizon Mono/Pilot/SuperDrive 方案,被大量中外车企采用装车,是国产智驾芯片替代英伟达/Mobileye 的主力之一。2024 年 10 月,地平线在港交所上市(9660),募资约 6.7 亿美元、是当年香港最大 IPO 之一。随着中国车企智能化竞赛白热化、以及本土供应链需求,地平线的芯片出货与业绩快速增长。
horizon.descriptionEn: Horizon Robotics was founded in 2015 by Kai Yu, former head of Baidu's deep-learning institute, and is China's leader in automotive-grade smart-driving chips. Its Journey-series chips are purpose-built for in-vehicle assisted/autonomous driving, paired with integrated Horizon Mono/Pilot/SuperDrive hardware-software solutions adopted by many Chinese and foreign automakers — a mainstay of domestic smart-driving silicon competing with NVIDIA/Mobileye. In October 2024 Horizon listed in Hong Kong (9660), raising about $670 million in one of the city's largest IPOs of the year. As China's automaker intelligence race intensifies and demand for a local supply chain grows, Horizon's chip shipments and earnings have grown rapidly.
whyItMatters: 中国车规智驾芯片龙头,创始人余凯出身百度
征程系列 + 软硬一体方案,大量车企装车
国产替代英伟达/Mobileye 主力之一
2024.10 港股上市,当年香港最大 IPO 之一

eqix.name: Equinix
eqix.oneLiner: 全球最大数据中心互联 REIT。
eqix.oneLinerEn: The world's largest data-center interconnection REIT.
eqix.taglineEn: Where the world's digital leaders connect
eqix.business: 全球互联数据中心(IBX)与云交换，AI 算力落地的核心地产平台。
eqix.businessEn: Global interconnected data centers (IBX) and cloud exchange — a core real-estate platform where AI compute lands.
eqix.description: Equinix 是全球最大的「互联型」数据中心 REIT。它的核心价值不只是「机房面积」,而是「互联」——全球几百个 IBX 数据中心里汇聚了海量网络、云厂与企业,大家在 Equinix 里直接对接、低延迟交换数据,形成强大的网络效应(越多人接入越有价值)。AI 时代,企业既要连公有云、又要就近部署推理、还要多云互联,Equinix 的「互联枢纽」定位正好卡位。它以稳定的租金现金流和高壁垒著称,是 AI 算力落地不可或缺的「数字地产」龙头之一。
eqix.descriptionEn: Equinix is the world's largest "interconnection" data-center REIT. Its core value is not just floor space but interconnection — its hundreds of global IBX data centers aggregate vast networks, clouds and enterprises that connect directly and exchange data with low latency, creating powerful network effects (the more participants, the more valuable). In the AI era, enterprises need to connect to public clouds, deploy inference nearby and interconnect multiple clouds, and Equinix's "interconnection hub" positioning fits perfectly. Known for stable rental cash flow and high barriers, it is one of the indispensable "digital real estate" leaders where AI compute lands.
whyItMatters: 全球最大互联型数据中心 REIT,强网络效应
几百个 IBX 汇聚网络/云/企业,直接低延迟对接
AI 需多云互联+就近推理,「互联枢纽」卡位
稳定租金现金流+高壁垒,数字地产龙头

dlr.name: Digital Realty
dlr.oneLiner: 全球最大数据中心 REIT 之一。
dlr.oneLinerEn: One of the world's largest data-center REITs.
dlr.subcategory: 超大规模数据中心 REIT
dlr.business: 大规模数据中心地产与托管，承接云厂与 AI 算力扩张。
dlr.businessEn: Large-scale data-center real estate and colocation, absorbing cloud and AI compute expansion.
dlr.description: Digital Realty 是全球最大的数据中心 REIT 之一,主打「超大规模」的批发型数据中心——把大块的机房容量整租给云厂、大企业与 AI 公司,让它们在里面部署自己的服务器与 GPU 集群。相比 Equinix 更偏「互联+零售」,Digital Realty 更偏「大容量批发+建设」,是超大规模云厂 AI 扩张时的重要地产供应方。AI 数据中心对电力、土地、建设速度的需求暴增,Digital Realty 手握全球土地、电力资源与建设能力,是 AI 算力「盖楼供电」环节的核心受益者之一。
dlr.descriptionEn: Digital Realty is one of the world's largest data-center REITs, focused on "hyperscale" wholesale data centers — leasing large blocks of capacity to clouds, big enterprises and AI companies to deploy their own servers and GPU clusters. Compared with the more "interconnection + retail" Equinix, Digital Realty leans toward "large-capacity wholesale + construction," a key real-estate supplier for hyperscalers' AI expansion. As AI data centers drive surging demand for power, land and build speed, Digital Realty — holding global land, power resources and construction capability — is a core beneficiary of the "build and power" stage of AI compute.
whyItMatters: 全球最大数据中心 REIT 之一,超大规模批发型
整租大块容量给云厂/大企业/AI 公司
手握全球土地、电力与建设能力
AI 数据中心「盖楼供电」核心受益者

gds.name: 万国数据
gds.oneLiner: 中国头部第三方数据中心运营商。
gds.oneLinerEn: A leading Chinese third-party data-center operator.
gds.tagline: 为数字中国提供算力底座
gds.business: 高性能数据中心开发与运营，中国与东南亚 AI 算力基础设施主力。
gds.businessEn: Develops and operates high-performance data centers — a mainstay of AI compute infrastructure in China and Southeast Asia.
gds.description: 万国数据(GDS)是中国头部的第三方(中立)数据中心运营商,为阿里、腾讯、字节等云厂与大企业开发、建设并运营高性能数据中心。它自己不做云,而是做「中立的算力地产」,因此能同时服务各家客户。近年 GDS 把海外业务(东南亚,尤其新加坡、马来西亚、印尼)拆分为 DayOne 独立发展,踩中中国企业出海与国际 AI 算力需求。作为中美两地上市、深耕一线城市稀缺机房资源的龙头,GDS 是中国及东南亚 AI 算力落地的重要基础设施方,但也受电力配额、行业周期与资本开支影响较大。
gds.descriptionEn: GDS Holdings is a leading Chinese third-party (neutral) data-center operator, developing, building and running high-performance data centers for clouds and large enterprises like Alibaba, Tencent and ByteDance. It doesn't run its own cloud but provides "neutral compute real estate," so it can serve all customers at once. Recently GDS spun off its overseas business (Southeast Asia, especially Singapore, Malaysia and Indonesia) as DayOne to grow independently, riding Chinese companies' globalization and international AI-compute demand. Listed in both the U.S. and Hong Kong and deeply invested in scarce top-tier-city facility resources, GDS is key AI-compute infrastructure in China and Southeast Asia, though sensitive to power quotas, industry cycles and capex.
whyItMatters: 中国头部中立第三方数据中心,服务阿里/腾讯/字节
不做云、做中立算力地产,同时服务各家
海外(东南亚)拆分 DayOne,踩中出海算力需求
深耕一线城市稀缺机房,中/东南亚算力基础设施

irm.name: Iron Mountain
irm.oneLiner: 信息管理巨头，转型数据中心。
irm.oneLinerEn: An information-management giant pivoting into data centers.
irm.tagline: 守护与激活你的信息资产
irm.industry: 信息管理 / 数据中心
irm.subcategory: 档案存储 / 数据中心
irm.role: 信息资产 · 算力地产
irm.business: 从档案存储转向数据中心与资产管理，受益 AI 数据存储需求。
irm.businessEn: Pivoting from records storage into data centers and asset management, benefiting from AI data-storage demand.
irm.description: Iron Mountain(铁山)原本是「实体档案存储」巨头——为全球企业与政府保管纸质档案、磁带、重要文件,这门古老生意有极强的客户黏性与稳定现金流。近年它把这份「信任 + 稀缺地产 + 数据托管」的资产,顺势延伸到数字时代:大举建设数据中心、做数据资产全生命周期管理与 IT 资产处置。AI 让「数据」成为核心资产,既要海量存储、也要合规管理,Iron Mountain 借势从「存纸箱」转型为「存数据 + 建机房」,是传统信息管理公司搭上 AI/数据中心浪潮的代表。
irm.descriptionEn: Iron Mountain was originally a "physical records storage" giant — safeguarding paper archives, tapes and important documents for enterprises and governments worldwide, an old business with very high customer stickiness and stable cash flow. In recent years it has extended this asset of "trust + scarce real estate + data custody" into the digital age: building data centers at scale and doing full-lifecycle data-asset management and IT asset disposition. As AI makes "data" a core asset requiring massive storage and compliant management, Iron Mountain has pivoted from "storing boxes" to "storing data + building data centers" — a representative of traditional information-management firms riding the AI/data-center wave.
whyItMatters: 实体档案存储巨头,客户黏性与现金流稳定
把「信任+地产+托管」延伸到数据中心
做数据资产全生命周期与 IT 资产处置
从「存纸箱」转型「存数据+建机房」

bloomberg.name: 彭博
bloomberg.oneLiner: 金融数据终端巨头，自研 BloombergGPT。
bloomberg.oneLinerEn: The financial-data terminal giant, maker of BloombergGPT.
bloomberg.industry: 金融数据 / 企业 AI
bloomberg.subcategory: 金融终端 / 专用大模型
bloomberg.business: 彭博终端与金融数据，BloombergGPT 面向金融领域的专用大模型。
bloomberg.businessEn: The Bloomberg Terminal and financial data, plus BloombergGPT, a finance-specialized large model.
bloomberg.description: 彭博(Bloomberg)由 Michael Bloomberg 创立,靠「彭博终端」——那台金融从业者桌上无处不在、年费数万美元的数据+资讯+交易工具——建立起金融信息帝国,是华尔街的基础设施。它掌握着海量、高质量、结构化的金融数据与新闻,这正是训练金融 AI 的绝佳燃料。彭博自研了 BloombergGPT——一个专门在金融语料上训练的大模型,并把生成式 AI 嵌进终端(新闻摘要、财报问答、数据查询等),用「独家数据 + 场景 + 分发」的护城河做金融专用 AI。作为未上市的私有巨头,彭博是「垂直行业专用 AI」最有底气的玩家之一。
bloomberg.descriptionEn: Bloomberg, founded by Michael Bloomberg, built a financial-information empire on the Bloomberg Terminal — the data + news + trading tool ubiquitous on finance professionals' desks at tens of thousands of dollars a year — the infrastructure of Wall Street. It commands vast, high-quality, structured financial data and news, ideal fuel for training financial AI. Bloomberg built BloombergGPT, a large model trained specifically on financial corpora, and embeds generative AI into the Terminal (news summaries, earnings Q&A, data queries), leveraging a moat of "exclusive data + use case + distribution" for finance-specialized AI. As a private giant, Bloomberg is one of the best-positioned players in "vertical, industry-specific AI."
whyItMatters: 彭博终端是华尔街基础设施,金融信息帝国
掌握海量高质量结构化金融数据与新闻
自研 BloombergGPT,把生成式 AI 嵌进终端
「独家数据+场景+分发」护城河,金融专用 AI

blackrock.name: 贝莱德
blackrock.oneLiner: 全球最大资管，Aladdin 风控平台接入 AI。
blackrock.oneLinerEn: The world's largest asset manager, with AI in its Aladdin risk platform.
blackrock.tagline: 帮更多人实现财务健康
blackrock.taglineEn: Helping more people build financial well-being
blackrock.industry: 资产管理 / 金融科技
blackrock.subcategory: 资管 / Aladdin / AI 基建投资
blackrock.business: 资产管理与 Aladdin 风控/投研平台，把生成式 AI 引入投资流程，并大手笔投资 AI 基建。
blackrock.businessEn: Asset management plus the Aladdin risk/analytics platform, bringing generative AI into investing and making large AI-infrastructure investments.
blackrock.description: 贝莱德(BlackRock)是全球最大的资产管理公司,管理着十几万亿美元资产。它有两副面孔:一是庞大的资管业务(含 iShares ETF),二是 Aladdin——一个几乎成为行业标准的风险管理与投研操作系统,被大量机构用来管理和分析自己的资产,是贝莱德的「金融界安卓」。在 AI 上,贝莱德一方面把生成式 AI 引入投研、风控与客户服务;另一方面更引人注目的是「用资本押注 AI 基建」——它牵头设立大规模 AI 基础设施投资基金(与微软、MGX、英伟达等合作),并收购数据中心、电力等资产,直接为 AI 时代的算力与能源提供长期资本。贝莱德是「金融如何为 AI 供血」的核心玩家。
blackrock.descriptionEn: BlackRock is the world's largest asset manager, overseeing well over ten trillion dollars. It has two faces: a huge asset-management business (including iShares ETFs), and Aladdin — a risk-management and analytics operating system that has become almost an industry standard, used by many institutions to manage and analyze their assets, BlackRock's "Android of finance." On AI, it brings generative AI into research, risk and client service; more strikingly, it "bets capital on AI infrastructure" — leading large AI-infrastructure investment funds (partnering with Microsoft, MGX, NVIDIA and others) and acquiring data-center and power assets, directly providing long-term capital for the compute and energy of the AI era. BlackRock is a core player in "how finance funds AI."
whyItMatters: 全球最大资管,管理十几万亿美元
Aladdin 近乎行业标准的风控/投研操作系统
牵头大规模 AI 基建基金(联手微软/MGX/英伟达)
收购数据中心/电力资产,为 AI 算力供长期资本

duolingo.name: 多邻国
duolingo.oneLiner: 最大语言学习 App，AI 私教先行者。
duolingo.business: 游戏化语言学习，Duolingo Max 用 GPT 提供 AI 对话与讲解私教。

speak.name: Speak
speak.oneLiner: AI 口语陪练 App，OpenAI 参投，增长迅速。
speak.oneLinerEn: An AI speaking-practice app, backed by OpenAI and growing fast.
speak.business: 用语音 AI 做外语口语陪练——没有真人也能大量开口练习，AI 实时纠音、给反馈、模拟真实对话。在韩国、日本等市场增长强劲，OpenAI 创业基金参投。
speak.businessEn: Uses voice AI for foreign-language speaking practice — practice out loud extensively with no human partner, as the AI corrects pronunciation in real time, gives feedback and simulates real conversations. It is growing strongly in markets like Korea and Japan, with backing from the OpenAI Startup Fund.
speak.description: Speak 成立于 2016 年，主打「用 AI 练口语」：传统语言 App 偏做题，Speak 让你对着 AI 大量开口说，实时纠正发音、语法与表达，并模拟点餐、面试等真实场景对话，解决「学了不敢说」的痛点。它在东亚(韩国、日本)增长尤其迅猛，是 OpenAI 创业基金投资的明星教育应用，估值进入独角兽行列。
speak.descriptionEn: Founded in 2016, Speak focuses on "practicing speaking with AI": where traditional language apps lean on drills, Speak has you speak out loud extensively to an AI that corrects pronunciation, grammar and phrasing in real time and simulates real scenarios like ordering food or interviews, solving the "learned it but afraid to speak" problem. It has grown especially fast in East Asia (Korea, Japan) and is a star education app backed by the OpenAI Startup Fund, now a unicorn by valuation.
whyItMatters: 用 AI 补上「口语练习」这一语言学习最难环节
东亚市场增长强劲，付费意愿高
OpenAI 参投的明星教育独角兽

products.name: Speak
products.description: AI 口语陪练，实时纠音与情景对话。

khanacademy.name: 可汗学院
khanacademy.oneLiner: 非营利在线教育，Khanmigo AI 私教。
khanacademy.oneLinerEn: A non-profit online-education platform with the Khanmigo AI tutor.
khanacademy.tagline: 为任何人、在任何地方提供免费世界级教育
khanacademy.taglineEn: A free, world-class education for anyone, anywhere
khanacademy.business: 全球最大免费在线教育平台，Khanmigo(基于 GPT)提供一对一 AI 辅导——不直接给答案，而是像老师一样引导学生思考；同时给教师减负(备课、出题、批改)。与 OpenAI 深度合作。
khanacademy.businessEn: The world's largest free online-education platform; Khanmigo (built on GPT) provides one-on-one AI tutoring — it doesn't just give answers but guides students to think like a teacher would — while easing teachers' workload (lesson prep, question generation, grading). It works closely with OpenAI.
khanacademy.description: 可汗学院(Khan Academy)是 Salman Khan 创立的非营利教育机构，长期提供免费世界级课程。生成式 AI 兴起后，它率先与 OpenAI 合作推出 Khanmigo——一个「苏格拉底式」AI 私教：不直接给答案，而是通过提问引导学生自己想明白，避免作弊、真正促学；同时为教师提供备课、出题、批改等减负工具。作为「AI + 教育」最被认可的实践之一，Khanmigo 是 AI 辅导如何「负责任地用」的标杆。
khanacademy.descriptionEn: Khan Academy is a non-profit founded by Salman Khan that has long offered free, world-class courses. As generative AI emerged, it was among the first to partner with OpenAI to launch Khanmigo — a "Socratic" AI tutor that doesn't hand over answers but guides students to reason it out themselves, discouraging cheating and genuinely aiding learning, while giving teachers tools for lesson prep, question generation and grading. One of the most respected "AI + education" implementations, Khanmigo is a benchmark for how to use AI tutoring responsibly.
whyItMatters: Khanmigo 用「引导而非给答案」定义负责任的 AI 辅导
非营利 + 免费，AI 教育普惠的标杆
与 OpenAI 深度合作，示范教育落地

products.name: Khanmigo
products.description: 苏格拉底式 AI 私教 + 教师工具。

inflection.name: Inflection AI
inflection.oneLiner: 曾做情感陪伴助手 Pi，后转向企业 AI。
inflection.oneLinerEn: Once made the empathetic companion Pi, then pivoted to enterprise AI.
inflection.taglineEn: A personal AI with emotional intelligence
inflection.industry: 前沿大模型 / 企业 AI
inflection.business: 曾推出主打情商与情感陪伴的个人助手 Pi 与自研大模型。2024 年创始人 Mustafa Suleyman(DeepMind 联创)与核心团队加入微软(领衔 Microsoft AI)，公司转向面向企业的 AI。
inflection.businessEn: It once released Pi, a personal assistant focused on emotional intelligence and companionship, along with its own large models. In 2024 founder Mustafa Suleyman (a DeepMind co-founder) and the core team joined Microsoft (leading Microsoft AI), and the company pivoted toward enterprise AI.
inflection.description: Inflection AI 由 DeepMind 联合创始人 Mustafa Suleyman、LinkedIn 联创 Reid Hoffman 等于 2022 年创立，早期以「高情商个人 AI」Pi 出名——对话温和、擅长倾听与陪伴，并自研了有竞争力的大模型。2024 年，微软以「反向收购」方式请走 Suleyman 与大部分核心团队，成立并由其领衔 Microsoft AI 部门；Inflection 公司则保留下来转向企业 AI。它是「AI 人才与技术回流巨头」的又一典型案例。
inflection.descriptionEn: Inflection AI was founded in 2022 by DeepMind co-founder Mustafa Suleyman, LinkedIn co-founder Reid Hoffman and others, and became known early on for Pi, a "high-EQ personal AI" — gentle in conversation, good at listening and companionship — along with a competitive in-house model. In 2024 Microsoft, via a "reverse acquihire," brought over Suleyman and most of the core team to found and lead its Microsoft AI division; the Inflection company remained and pivoted to enterprise AI. It is another classic case of "AI talent and technology flowing back to the giants."
whyItMatters: Pi 定义了「高情商陪伴助手」的产品方向
创始团队被微软请走领衔 Microsoft AI，行业标志性事件
从消费陪伴转向企业 AI 的样本

products.name: Pi
products.description: 主打情感陪伴的个人 AI 助手。

retell.name: Retell AI
retell.oneLiner: 让开发者快速搭语音智能体的平台。
retell.oneLinerEn: A platform for quickly building voice agents.
retell.tagline: 几行代码,搭起会打电话的 AI
retell.taglineEn: Voice agents in a few lines of code
retell.business: 语音智能体开发平台，几行代码接入实时电话 AI。
retell.businessEn: A voice-agent development platform to add real-time phone AI in a few lines of code.
retell.description: Retell AI 做的是「语音智能体的搭建平台」:它把打电话所需的一整套底层能力——实时语音识别、大模型对话、语音合成、打断处理、电话线路对接、以及调用外部系统办事——封装成一个易用的平台,让开发者用很少的代码就能搭出一个能自然打电话、真正把事办完的语音 AI(如预约、外呼、客服、催收)。它主打「快、稳、可规模化」,按通话时长/量计费,被大量企业用来自动化电话客服与外呼。Retell 与 Vapi 同处「语音智能体基础设施」赛道,是这波语音 Agent 创业潮的底层卖水人之一。
retell.descriptionEn: Retell AI builds a "platform for constructing voice agents": it packages the full stack needed to make phone calls — real-time speech recognition, LLM conversation, speech synthesis, interruption handling, telephony connectivity, and calling external systems to get things done — into an easy platform, so developers can build a voice AI that naturally makes calls and actually completes tasks (appointments, outbound calls, support, collections) with little code. Emphasizing "fast, reliable, scalable" and billing by call duration/volume, it is used by many companies to automate phone support and outbound calling. Alongside Vapi in "voice-agent infrastructure," Retell is one of the picks-and-shovels vendors of this voice-agent startup wave.
whyItMatters: 把语音识别/对话/合成/电话线路封装成易用平台
少量代码搭出能自然打电话、办完事的语音 AI
预约/外呼/客服/催收等场景自动化
语音智能体基础设施赛道底层卖水人之一

vapi.name: Vapi
vapi.oneLiner: 语音 AI 智能体开发平台。
vapi.tagline: 语音智能体的开发者平台
vapi.taglineEn: The developer platform for voice agents
vapi.business: 面向开发者的语音智能体基础设施，快速构建电话 AI。
vapi.businessEn: Developer-facing voice-agent infrastructure to build phone AI quickly.
vapi.description: Vapi 是面向开发者的「语音智能体基础设施」,理念和 Retell 类似:把构建实时电话 AI 所需的语音识别、大模型、语音合成、通话编排、工具调用等能力做成可组合的开发者平台与 API,让团队用很短时间就能搭出并上线自己的语音智能体。Vapi 更强调「可编排、可扩展、模型/供应商可自由组合」——开发者能自选用哪家的 STT/LLM/TTS 并灵活编排对话流,适合要深度定制的团队。凭借活跃的开发者社区与快速增长,Vapi 成为语音 Agent 浪潮里最受欢迎的开发平台之一。
vapi.descriptionEn: Vapi is developer-facing "voice-agent infrastructure" with a philosophy similar to Retell: packaging the speech recognition, LLM, speech synthesis, call orchestration and tool-calling needed to build real-time phone AI into a composable developer platform and API, so teams can build and ship their own voice agents fast. Vapi emphasizes "orchestratable, extensible, mix-and-match models/vendors" — developers can choose which STT/LLM/TTS to use and flexibly design the conversation flow, suiting teams that want deep customization. With an active developer community and fast growth, Vapi is one of the most popular development platforms in the voice-agent wave.
whyItMatters: 面向开发者的语音智能体基础设施与 API
语音识别/大模型/合成/编排可组合
强调模型/供应商可自由组合、深度可定制
活跃开发者社区,语音 Agent 热门开发平台

crowdstrike.name: CrowdStrike
crowdstrike.oneLiner: 端点安全龙头，Charlotte AI 智能体。
crowdstrike.oneLinerEn: The endpoint-security leader, with the Charlotte AI agent.
crowdstrike.business: 云原生端点检测与响应(EDR)，Charlotte AI 用大模型自动化威胁狩猎与响应。
crowdstrike.businessEn: Cloud-native endpoint detection and response (EDR); Charlotte AI uses large models to automate threat hunting and response.
crowdstrike.description: CrowdStrike 是端点安全龙头,其 Falcon 平台以「一个轻量探针 + 云端大数据分析」的架构成为业界标杆,靠海量终端遥测训练出很强的威胁检测能力。生成式 AI 时代,它推出 Charlotte AI 并在 2026 年 3 月升级为可自主行动的「智能体」——自动做威胁狩猎、分析告警、执行响应,应对「AI 加持的攻击已快到人类跟不上」的新现实。矛盾的是,AI 既让攻击更凶,也让防守方(CrowdStrike)需求更旺:2026 年二季度公司创下史上最佳业绩、股价大涨,是「AI 安全」最直接的受益龙头之一。
crowdstrike.descriptionEn: CrowdStrike is the endpoint-security leader; its Falcon platform, built on "one lightweight agent + cloud-scale analytics," became the industry benchmark, using massive endpoint telemetry to train strong threat detection. In the generative-AI era it launched Charlotte AI, upgraded in March 2026 into an autonomous "agent" that hunts threats, triages alerts and executes response on its own — addressing the reality that AI-powered attacks now move faster than humans can. The paradox: AI makes attacks fiercer but also boosts demand for defenders like CrowdStrike — in Q2 2026 the company posted its best-ever results and its stock rallied sharply, one of the most direct beneficiaries of "AI security."
whyItMatters: 端点安全龙头,Falcon 轻探针+云端分析标杆
Charlotte AI 升级为自主安全智能体
AI 攻击快过人类,自动响应成刚需
2026 史上最佳业绩,AI 安全直接受益龙头

paloalto.name: Palo Alto Networks
paloalto.oneLiner: 网络安全龙头，全面 AI 化。
paloalto.oneLinerEn: The network-security leader, going all-in on AI.
paloalto.tagline: 守护我们的数字生活方式
paloalto.taglineEn: Protecting our digital way of life
paloalto.subcategory: 网络 / 云 / 安全运营
paloalto.business: 网络、云与安全运营平台(Cortex/Prisma)，用 AI 做检测与自动响应。
paloalto.businessEn: Network, cloud and security-operations platforms (Cortex/Prisma), using AI for detection and automated response.
paloalto.description: Palo Alto Networks 是网络安全行业市值龙头,从下一代防火墙起家,通过持续并购整合成横跨网络(NGFW)、云安全(Prisma)与安全运营(Cortex)的综合平台。它力推「平台化」战略——让客户把多种安全能力统一到它的平台上,以数据和 AI 提升整体防护。2026 年 3 月它推出 XSIAM 自主响应,把安全运营中心(SOC)的检测—分析—处置尽量自动化,应对 AI 时代的攻击。凭借平台化与 AI 化,PANW 在 2026 年录得史上最佳季度、股价大涨,与 CrowdStrike 并列 AI 安全两强。
paloalto.descriptionEn: Palo Alto Networks is the most valuable company in cybersecurity, starting from next-generation firewalls and consolidating through acquisitions into an integrated platform spanning network (NGFW), cloud security (Prisma) and security operations (Cortex). It pushes a "platformization" strategy — getting customers to unify many security capabilities on its platform, improving overall protection with data and AI. In March 2026 it launched XSIAM Autonomous Response, automating as much of the SOC's detect-analyze-remediate loop as possible to counter AI-era attacks. On the back of platformization and AI, PANW posted its best-ever quarter in 2026 with a sharp stock rally, standing alongside CrowdStrike as one of the two AI-security leaders.
whyItMatters: 网络安全市值龙头,平台化战略
网络(NGFW)+云(Prisma)+运营(Cortex)一体
XSIAM 自主响应,自动化安全运营中心
2026 史上最佳季度,AI 安全两强之一

sentinelone.name: SentinelOne
sentinelone.oneLiner: AI 驱动的自主端点安全。
sentinelone.tagline: 让安全以机器速度运转
sentinelone.business: 以 AI 为核心的端点/云安全平台，主打自主检测与响应。
sentinelone.businessEn: An AI-centric endpoint/cloud security platform focused on autonomous detection and response.
sentinelone.description: SentinelOne 成立于 2013 年,是 CrowdStrike 在端点安全上的主要挑战者,从一开始就把「AI 自主防护」作为卖点:其 Singularity 平台用机器学习在终端本地实时识别并处置威胁,强调「以机器速度自动响应」而非依赖人工。它还推出 Purple AI 安全分析助手,让分析师用自然语言查询和调查威胁。相比龙头 CrowdStrike,SentinelOne 体量较小、增长与盈利承压,但以 AI 原生架构在中端市场与特定场景保持竞争力。
sentinelone.descriptionEn: Founded in 2013, SentinelOne is CrowdStrike's main challenger in endpoint security and has pitched "AI autonomous protection" from the start: its Singularity platform uses machine learning to detect and remediate threats locally on the endpoint in real time, emphasizing "automated response at machine speed" rather than relying on humans. It also offers the Purple AI security-analysis assistant, letting analysts query and investigate threats in natural language. Smaller than leader CrowdStrike and under growth/profitability pressure, SentinelOne stays competitive in the mid-market and specific use cases with its AI-native architecture.
whyItMatters: CrowdStrike 的主要端点安全挑战者
Singularity 端侧 ML 实时检测处置
Purple AI 让分析师自然语言查威胁
AI 原生架构,中端市场保持竞争力

zscaler.name: Zscaler
zscaler.business: 零信任网络访问(SASE)云平台，用 AI 分析海量流量做威胁防护。
zscaler.businessEn: A zero-trust network-access (SASE) cloud platform that uses AI to analyze massive traffic for threat protection.
zscaler.description: Zscaler 是「零信任」云安全的龙头。传统安全靠在公司网络周围筑「城墙」,但云和远程办公让城墙失效;Zscaler 的思路是「从不信任、始终验证」——所有访问都先经过它的云安全平台代理、逐次校验身份与风险,再放行。它每天处理数千亿次交易,用 AI 分析这些海量流量识别威胁、防数据外泄。随着企业上云与 AI 应用普及,「零信任 + SASE」成为新的安全范式,Zscaler 是这一趋势的核心受益者之一。
zscaler.descriptionEn: Zscaler is the leader in "zero-trust" cloud security. Traditional security builds a "wall" around the corporate network, but cloud and remote work render the wall obsolete; Zscaler's approach is "never trust, always verify" — all access first passes through its cloud security platform, which checks identity and risk on every request before allowing it. It processes hundreds of billions of transactions daily and uses AI to analyze this massive traffic to detect threats and prevent data loss. As enterprises move to the cloud and adopt AI apps, "zero trust + SASE" has become the new security paradigm, and Zscaler is a core beneficiary.
whyItMatters: 零信任云安全龙头,「从不信任、始终验证」
所有访问经其云平台逐次校验
日处理数千亿次交易,AI 分析海量流量
上云+AI 普及,零信任/SASE 成新范式

wiz.name: Wiz
wiz.oneLiner: 云安全新星，被谷歌 320 亿美元收购。
wiz.oneLinerEn: The cloud-security star acquired by Google for $32 billion.
wiz.taglineEn: Making cloud security simple for everyone
wiz.business: 云原生安全平台(CNAPP)，增长最快的安全公司之一，2026 年被谷歌以约 320 亿美元收购。
wiz.businessEn: A cloud-native application protection platform (CNAPP), one of the fastest-growing security companies; acquired by Google for about $32 billion in 2026.
wiz.description: Wiz 由几位以色列 8200 部队背景的创始人于 2020 年创立,是史上增长最快的软件公司之一。它做云原生安全(CNAPP):把企业在 AWS/Azure/GCP 上散落的配置、漏洞、权限、暴露面统一扫描成「一张攻击路径图」,让安全团队一眼看清「攻击者最可能怎么打进来」并优先修复,体验远好于传统工具。它在几年内做到超 10 亿美元 ARR。2024 年谷歌宣布以约 320 亿美元收购(谷歌史上最大并购),交易于 2026 年 3 月 11 日完成,Wiz 并入谷歌云,成为其安全版图的核心。
wiz.descriptionEn: Wiz was founded in 2020 by Israeli founders with Unit 8200 backgrounds and is one of the fastest-growing software companies ever. It does cloud-native security (CNAPP): scanning a company's scattered configurations, vulnerabilities, permissions and exposure across AWS/Azure/GCP into a single "attack-path graph," so security teams instantly see how an attacker is most likely to break in and fix that first — a far better experience than legacy tools. It reached over $1 billion in ARR within a few years. In 2024 Google announced a ~$32 billion acquisition (Google's largest ever), which closed on March 11, 2026, folding Wiz into Google Cloud as the core of its security portfolio.
whyItMatters: 史上增长最快软件之一,几年做到超 10 亿 ARR
CNAPP 把云暴露面画成「攻击路径图」
谷歌约 320 亿美元收购,史上最大并购
2026 年 3 月完成,并入谷歌云安全核心

planet.name: Planet Labs
planet.oneLiner: 每日全球拍照的对地观测卫星公司。
planet.oneLinerEn: An Earth-observation company that photographs the whole planet daily.
planet.taglineEn: Making change visible, accessible and actionable
planet.subcategory: 卫星影像 / 地理情报
planet.business: 运营最大规模对地观测卫星群，用 AI 解译影像做地理情报与分析。
planet.businessEn: Operates the largest Earth-observation satellite fleet, using AI to interpret imagery for geospatial intelligence and analytics.
planet.description: Planet Labs 运营着全球最大规模的对地观测卫星群——几百颗小卫星每天把整个地球拍一遍,形成一份「每日更新的地球影像档案」。它真正的价值是「AI + 时间序列影像」:用机器学习自动从海量卫星图里识别变化(农田长势、船只、建筑、森林砍伐、军事动向等),把「照片」变成可分析、可决策的地理情报,服务农业、政府/国防、保险、能源等客户。在 AI 越来越能「看懂」卫星影像的当下,Planet 从「拍照片的公司」升级为「地球数据 + AI 分析」平台,是对地观测数据商业化的代表之一。
planet.descriptionEn: Planet Labs operates the world's largest Earth-observation satellite fleet — hundreds of small satellites that photograph the entire planet every day, creating a "daily-updated image archive of Earth." Its real value is "AI + time-series imagery": using machine learning to automatically detect change from vast satellite images (crop health, ships, buildings, deforestation, military movements) and turn "photos" into analyzable, decision-ready geospatial intelligence for agriculture, government/defense, insurance and energy customers. As AI increasingly "understands" satellite imagery, Planet has evolved from "a company that takes photos" into an "Earth data + AI analytics" platform — a representative of commercializing Earth-observation data.
whyItMatters: 全球最大对地观测卫星群,每天拍完整个地球
AI + 时间序列影像,自动识别变化
把「照片」变成可分析可决策的地理情报
服务农业/国防/保险/能源,对地观测数据商业化代表

blacksky.name: BlackSky
blacksky.oneLiner: 实时卫星影像与地理情报。
blacksky.oneLinerEn: Real-time satellite imagery and geospatial intelligence.
blacksky.tagline: 让世界的动态一目了然
blacksky.taglineEn: Seeing what matters, in real time
blacksky.subcategory: 高频成像 / 地理情报
blacksky.business: 高频成像卫星与 AI 分析平台，提供近实时地理情报。
blacksky.businessEn: High-revisit imaging satellites and an AI analytics platform delivering near-real-time geospatial intelligence.
blacksky.description: BlackSky 与 Planet 类似做对地观测,但更强调「时效」——它的卫星星座主打「高重访率」,即对同一地点一天能拍好几次,配合自研的 AI 分析平台(Spectra),能在很短时间内把「刚发生的变化」告诉客户。相比 Planet 的「每天全球普查」,BlackSky 更像「对关键地点的实时盯梢」,尤其契合国防、情报、危机监测等对时效极敏感的场景,美国政府/军方是其重要客户。作为高时效地理情报的代表,BlackSky 押注「近实时 + AI 自动分析」这一差异化,是商业太空情报领域的主要玩家之一。
blacksky.descriptionEn: BlackSky does Earth observation like Planet but emphasizes "timeliness" — its constellation focuses on "high revisit," imaging the same location several times a day, and its in-house AI analytics platform (Spectra) can tell customers about "changes that just happened" within a short time. Compared with Planet's "daily global census," BlackSky is more like "real-time monitoring of key locations," especially fitting defense, intelligence and crisis-monitoring where timeliness is critical, with the U.S. government/military as key customers. As a leader in high-timeliness geospatial intelligence, BlackSky bets on the differentiation of "near-real-time + AI auto-analysis," one of the main players in commercial space intelligence.
whyItMatters: 高重访率卫星,同一地点一天拍多次,主打时效
自研 Spectra AI 平台,近实时报告变化
「对关键地点实时盯梢」,契合国防/情报/危机监测
美国政府/军方为重要客户,商业太空情报主要玩家

smci.name: 超微电脑
smci.oneLiner: AI 服务器整机与液冷机柜龙头。
smci.oneLinerEn: A leader in AI servers and liquid-cooled racks.
smci.tagline: 为 AI 打造绿色计算
smci.taglineEn: Green computing for the age of AI
smci.subcategory: GPU 服务器 / 液冷机柜
smci.business: 英伟达 GPU 服务器与整机柜(含液冷)组装，AI 服务器出货最激进的厂商之一。
smci.businessEn: Assembles NVIDIA GPU servers and full racks (including liquid cooling) — one of the most aggressive AI-server shippers.
smci.description: 超微电脑(Supermicro/SMCI)是 AI 服务器整机与液冷机柜的头部厂商,与英伟达绑定极深。它以「积木式」模块化设计和极快的上新速度著称——新一代 GPU 一出,它往往能最快把服务器和整柜(含直接液冷)推向市场,因此在这轮 AI 算力狂潮里出货最激进、增速惊人。但它也一波三折:2024 年因会计问题、审计机构辞任、财报延迟而股价暴跌、险些退市,2025 年恢复合规;2026 年靠 AI 需求业绩回暖,却又因 70 亿美元融资引发稀释担忧,股价波动剧烈。SMCI 是「AI 服务器最纯、也最刺激」的标的之一。
smci.descriptionEn: Supermicro (SMCI) is a leading maker of AI servers and liquid-cooled racks, deeply tied to NVIDIA. Known for a "building-block" modular design and very fast time-to-market — when a new GPU ships, it often gets servers and full racks (with direct liquid cooling) out first — it has been the most aggressive AI-server shipper in this compute boom, with striking growth. But it has been turbulent: in 2024 an accounting issue, auditor resignation and delayed filings sent the stock crashing and nearly delisted it, before regaining compliance in 2025; in 2026 AI demand revived its results, yet a $7 billion capital raise sparked dilution fears and sharp volatility. SMCI is one of the "purest but most turbulent" AI-server names.
whyItMatters: AI 服务器整机与液冷机柜头部,与英伟达深度绑定
模块化+极快上新,新 GPU 出即最快推整柜
2024 会计风波险退市,2025 恢复合规
2026 业绩回暖但融资稀释,股价波动剧烈

dell.name: 戴尔
dell.oneLiner: PC 与 AI 服务器巨头。
dell.industry: AI 服务器 / 企业 IT
dell.business: PC、企业存储与 AI 服务器(PowerEdge)，为 xAI 等提供大规模 AI 集群整机。
dell.businessEn: PCs, enterprise storage and AI servers (PowerEdge), supplying large AI clusters to the likes of xAI.
dell.description: 戴尔(Dell)是全球 PC 与企业 IT 巨头,如今 AI 服务器成了它最亮眼的增长引擎。凭借强大的供应链、全球服务能力与企业客户关系,戴尔的 PowerEdge AI 服务器承接了大量超大规模订单——例如为马斯克 xAI 的 Colossus 超算供应大规模 GPU 集群整机。它的优势在于「能把英伟达最新的 GPU 快速、可靠、成规模地交付到客户机房」,并配套存储、网络、部署与售后。AI 服务器订单(在手订单/backlog)大幅增长,让传统 PC 巨头戴尔重新成为 AI 基建行情的重要一员。
dell.descriptionEn: Dell is a global PC and enterprise-IT giant, and AI servers have become its standout growth engine. With a powerful supply chain, global service capability and enterprise relationships, Dell's PowerEdge AI servers have absorbed large hyperscale orders — for example supplying large GPU clusters for Elon Musk's xAI Colossus supercomputer. Its edge is "delivering NVIDIA's latest GPUs quickly, reliably and at scale into customer data centers," bundled with storage, networking, deployment and support. Sharp growth in its AI-server backlog has made the traditional PC giant an important player in the AI-infrastructure trade again.
whyItMatters: PowerEdge AI 服务器承接大量超大规模订单
为 xAI Colossus 等供应大规模 GPU 集群整机
供应链/全球服务/企业客户关系强,交付可靠
AI 服务器在手订单大增,重回 AI 基建核心

hpe.name: 慧与
hpe.oneLiner: 企业服务器与超算厂商。
hpe.oneLinerEn: An enterprise server and supercomputing company.
hpe.taglineEn: Advancing the way people live and work
hpe.industry: AI 服务器 / 企业 IT
hpe.subcategory: 服务器 / 超算 / 网络
hpe.business: 服务器、超算(Cray)与网络(收购 Juniper)，AI 整机与私有云方案。
hpe.businessEn: Servers, supercomputing (Cray) and networking (via the Juniper acquisition), plus AI systems and private-cloud solutions.
hpe.description: 慧与(HPE,惠普企业)是企业服务器与高性能计算(HPC)巨头。它收购了超算龙头 Cray,拥有做世界顶级超级计算机(如百亿亿次 Exascale 系统)的能力,把这套「大规模互联、液冷、系统工程」的经验用到 AI 训练集群上;并通过约 140 亿美元收购 Juniper Networks 补强 AI 数据中心网络。相比走「快速铺量」的 Supermicro,HPE 更主打「工程化、企业级、私有 AI」——帮大企业与政府在自己的机房里稳妥地建 AI 与私有云。它是 AI 基建里偏「系统与超算」的一极。
hpe.descriptionEn: HPE (Hewlett Packard Enterprise) is a giant in enterprise servers and high-performance computing (HPC). It acquired supercomputing leader Cray, giving it the ability to build the world's top supercomputers (including exascale systems), and applies that experience in large-scale interconnect, liquid cooling and systems engineering to AI training clusters; it also strengthened AI-data-center networking via its ~$14 billion acquisition of Juniper Networks. Compared with the "ship fast in volume" Supermicro, HPE emphasizes "engineered, enterprise-grade, private AI" — helping large enterprises and governments build AI and private cloud reliably in their own data centers. It is the "systems and supercomputing" pole of AI infrastructure.
whyItMatters: 收购 Cray,有做顶级超算的系统工程能力
把大规模互联/液冷经验用到 AI 训练集群
约 140 亿美元收购 Juniper 补强 AI 网络
主打工程化、企业级、私有 AI

fii.name: 工业富联
fii.oneLiner: 全球最大 AI 服务器代工厂。
fii.oneLinerEn: The world's largest AI-server contract manufacturer.
fii.tagline: 以智能制造赋能数字经济
fii.taglineEn: Powering the digital economy with smart manufacturing
fii.subcategory: 服务器 / 云设备代工
fii.business: 富士康旗下，AI 服务器与云设备代工，英伟达 GB200 机柜主力组装方。
fii.businessEn: A Foxconn subsidiary; contract-manufactures AI servers and cloud gear, a primary assembler of NVIDIA GB200 racks.
fii.description: 工业富联(FII)是富士康(鸿海)旗下、在上海上市的核心科技子公司,也是全球最大的 AI 服务器代工厂。它承接英伟达最新一代 GB200/GB300 等 AI 机柜的整柜组装与云设备制造,是把英伟达设计变成实物、成规模交付给云厂与 OEM 的最关键的一双手之一。母公司鸿海在全球 AI 服务器机柜组装的份额约 40%、居首,2026 年 AI 服务器出货有望翻倍,云与网络产品收入首次超过消费电子。作为「英伟达机柜量产总装」的核心,工业富联是 AI 算力从图纸到机房落地环节最直接的受益者之一。
fii.descriptionEn: Foxconn Industrial Internet (FII) is the core Shanghai-listed tech subsidiary of Foxconn (Hon Hai) and the world's largest AI-server contract manufacturer. It handles full-rack assembly of NVIDIA's latest AI racks (GB200/GB300) and cloud-gear manufacturing — one of the most critical pairs of hands turning NVIDIA's designs into physical, at-scale deliveries to cloud providers and OEMs. Parent Hon Hai holds roughly 40% of global AI-server rack assembly (No.1), expects AI-server shipments to double in 2026, and saw cloud and networking revenue surpass consumer electronics for the first time. As the core of "volume assembly of NVIDIA racks," FII is one of the most direct beneficiaries of AI compute moving from blueprint to data center.
whyItMatters: 全球最大 AI 服务器代工厂,富士康旗下
英伟达 GB200/GB300 整柜组装主力
母公司鸿海全球 AI 机柜组装份额约 40% 居首
2026 AI 服务器出货有望翻倍,直接受益

quantacomputer.name: 广达
quantacomputer.oneLiner: 全球最大笔电代工，AI 服务器主力。
quantacomputer.oneLinerEn: The world's largest laptop ODM and a major AI-server maker.
quantacomputer.tagline: 以制造实力承接 AI 浪潮
quantacomputer.taglineEn: Manufacturing muscle for the AI wave
quantacomputer.subcategory: 笔电 / AI 服务器代工
quantacomputer.business: 笔电与 AI 服务器代工，英伟达 AI 服务器核心组装厂之一。
quantacomputer.businessEn: Contract-manufactures laptops and AI servers; one of the core assemblers of NVIDIA AI servers.
quantacomputer.description: 广达(Quanta)是全球最大的笔记本电脑代工厂,更是英伟达 AI 服务器最核心的组装厂之一。它多年为全球品牌代工笔电,积累了强大的规模制造与供应链能力,如今把重心转向利润与增速更高的 AI 服务器——大量英伟达 DGX/HGX 与云厂定制 AI 服务器由广达组装。作为台湾「AI 服务器代工三雄」之一(与鸿海、纬创系并列),广达深度受益于这轮 AI 算力资本开支,云端业务收入与占比快速上升,是台股 AI 供应链的核心权重股。
quantacomputer.descriptionEn: Quanta is the world's largest laptop ODM and one of the core assemblers of NVIDIA AI servers. After years of manufacturing laptops for global brands — building formidable scale-manufacturing and supply-chain capability — it has shifted focus to higher-margin, faster-growing AI servers, assembling large volumes of NVIDIA DGX/HGX and cloud-custom AI servers. As one of Taiwan's "big three AI-server makers" (alongside Hon Hai and the Wistron camp), Quanta benefits deeply from this AI capex cycle, with cloud revenue and mix rising fast — a core weighting in the Taiwan AI supply chain.
whyItMatters: 全球最大笔电代工,英伟达 AI 服务器核心组装厂
强大规模制造与供应链能力,转向 AI 服务器
组装大量英伟达 DGX/HGX 与云厂定制服务器
台湾「AI 服务器代工三雄」之一

wiwynn.name: 纬颖
wiwynn.oneLiner: 云服务器 ODM，绑定大型云厂。
wiwynn.oneLinerEn: A cloud-server ODM tightly tied to hyperscalers.
wiwynn.tagline: 为超大规模云定制服务器
wiwynn.business: 为超大规模云厂定制 AI/云服务器与机柜，纬创集团旗下。
wiwynn.businessEn: Designs and builds custom AI/cloud servers and racks for hyperscalers; part of the Wistron group.
wiwynn.description: 纬颖(Wiwynn)是纬创集团旗下、专注「超大规模云」的服务器 ODM。与做品牌整机的厂商不同,纬颖直接为微软、Meta、AWS 等云巨头按其自定规格设计并制造服务器与整机柜(白牌),是这些云厂 AI 数据中心背后的隐形制造商之一。它深度参与开放计算(OCP)生态与液冷方案,随着云厂 AI 资本开支狂飙,纬颖承接了大量 AI 服务器/机柜订单,业绩高速增长。作为「云厂定制 AI 整机」的核心 ODM,纬颖是台股 AI 供应链里最贴近超大规模需求的一家。
wiwynn.descriptionEn: Wiwynn is a cloud-focused server ODM within the Wistron group. Unlike branded-server makers, Wiwynn designs and builds servers and full racks (white-box) to the custom specs of cloud giants like Microsoft, Meta and AWS — one of the invisible manufacturers behind their AI data centers. It is deeply involved in the Open Compute (OCP) ecosystem and liquid cooling, and as cloud AI capex surges, Wiwynn has taken on large AI-server/rack orders with rapid growth. As the core ODM for "cloud-custom AI systems," Wiwynn is the Taiwan AI-supply-chain name closest to hyperscale demand.
whyItMatters: 专注超大规模云的服务器 ODM,纬创旗下
为微软/Meta/AWS 按自定规格造白牌服务器
深度参与 OCP 与液冷,云厂 AI 数据中心隐形制造商
云厂 AI 资本开支狂飙,订单与业绩高速增长

amphenol.name: 安费诺
amphenol.oneLiner: 高速连接器与铜缆龙头，AI 机柜受益。
amphenol.oneLinerEn: A leader in high-speed connectors and copper cabling, benefiting from AI racks.
amphenol.business: 连接器、高速铜缆与互连方案，GB200 机柜内铜缆互联的最大受益者之一。
amphenol.businessEn: Connectors, high-speed copper cabling and interconnect solutions — one of the biggest beneficiaries of in-rack copper interconnect in GB200 systems.
amphenol.description: 安费诺(Amphenol)是全球连接器与互连方案的巨头。连接器是电子系统里「把线插起来」的基础元件,看似不起眼却无处不在、种类繁多。AI 机柜里,GB200 等把大量 GPU 用高速铜缆密集互连(NVLink 铜背板等),对高速、高密度连接器与铜缆的需求暴增,安费诺是这块的最大受益者之一。它以数百次并购整合出极其分散、抗周期的产品线(横跨数据中心、汽车、国防、通信、工业),既有 AI 的高增长弹性,又有多元化的稳健。作为「AI 机柜里铜连接」环节的核心,安费诺是这轮 AI 硬件行情里被低估但确定性很高的一员。
amphenol.descriptionEn: Amphenol is a global giant in connectors and interconnect solutions. Connectors are the basic components that "plug wires together" in electronic systems — unglamorous but ubiquitous and hugely varied. In AI racks, GB200 systems densely interconnect many GPUs with high-speed copper cabling (NVLink copper backplanes), driving surging demand for high-speed, high-density connectors and copper, of which Amphenol is one of the biggest beneficiaries. Through hundreds of acquisitions it has built an extremely diversified, cycle-resistant product line (data center, automotive, defense, comms, industrial), combining AI-driven upside with diversified stability. As a core of "copper connections in the AI rack," Amphenol is an underrated but high-certainty member of this AI-hardware cycle.
whyItMatters: 全球连接器与互连方案巨头,无处不在
GB200 用高速铜缆密集互连,连接器需求暴增
数百次并购,产品线分散抗周期
「AI 机柜铜连接」核心,确定性高的受益者

te.name: 泰科电子
te.oneLiner: 全球连接器与传感器巨头。
te.oneLinerEn: A global connector and sensor giant.
te.tagline: 连接与传感,构建更安全的世界
te.taglineEn: Connectivity and sensors for a safer, more connected world
te.business: 连接器、传感器与互连，覆盖数据中心、汽车与工业。
te.businessEn: Connectors, sensors and interconnect spanning data centers, automotive and industrial.
te.description: 泰科电子(TE Connectivity)是全球连接器与传感器巨头,与安费诺并列连接器双雄。它的产品覆盖汽车(最大下游)、工业、数据中心、通信、能源等,把「连接」与「传感」两类基础元件做到全球领先。在 AI 上,TE 提供数据中心内的高速连接器、铜缆与电源连接等,受益于 AI 机柜互联密度与功率的提升;同时它在汽车电动化、智能化上也有大量传感与连接需求。相比更纯 AI 弹性的安费诺,TE 下游更偏汽车与工业、更稳健。作为连接器双雄之一,TE 是 AI 硬件与广义电气化的双重受益者。
te.descriptionEn: TE Connectivity is a global connector and sensor giant, one of the connector duo alongside Amphenol. Its products span automotive (its largest end market), industrial, data center, communications and energy, making it a global leader in the two basic component classes of "connectivity" and "sensing." On AI, TE supplies data-center high-speed connectors, copper cabling and power connectors, benefiting from rising AI-rack interconnect density and power; it also has large sensing/connectivity demand in automotive electrification and intelligence. Compared with the purer AI-elasticity of Amphenol, TE's end markets lean more automotive and industrial and are steadier. As one of the connector duo, TE is a dual beneficiary of AI hardware and broad electrification.
whyItMatters: 全球连接器与传感器巨头,与安费诺双雄
覆盖汽车/工业/数据中心/通信/能源
提供数据中心高速连接器/铜缆/电源连接
AI 硬件 + 广义电气化双重受益,更稳健

wus.name: 沪电股份
wus.oneLiner: AI 服务器高多层 PCB 龙头。
wus.business: 企业通信与 AI 服务器高多层/高频 PCB，英伟达产业链核心 PCB 供应商。

victory.name: 胜宏科技
victory.oneLiner: AI 服务器/显卡 PCB 高增长厂。
victory.business: 高多层 PCB 与 HDI，深度绑定英伟达 GPU 板卡与 AI 服务器。

ttm.name: TTM
ttm.oneLiner: 北美最大 PCB 制造商。
ttm.business: 高端 PCB 与射频组件，服务数据中心、航空与国防。

delta.name: 台达电子
delta.oneLiner: 全球电源龙头，AI 服务器供电主力。
delta.oneLinerEn: A global power leader and a mainstay of AI-server power.
delta.tagline: 环保 节能 爱地球
delta.business: 开关电源、电源管理与散热，AI 服务器高功率电源与液冷的核心供应商。
delta.businessEn: Switching power supplies, power management and cooling — a core supplier of AI-server high-power delivery and liquid cooling.
delta.description: 台达电子(Delta)是全球电源管理龙头,在开关电源、电源供应器上有极高的市场份额与效率技术。AI 服务器最大的两个物理约束是「供电」和「散热」,而台达两头都做:它提供服务器电源、电源系统、以及数据中心从市电到芯片的整套供配电,还布局液冷散热。GPU 机柜功率暴增,对高功率密度、高效率电源的需求猛增,台达是这块最核心的供应商之一,英伟达等是其客户。它把「电源效率」这门看似传统的生意,做成了 AI 时代的关键卡位——每一瓦省下来的电与散掉的热,都是数据中心的钱。台达是台股「AI 供电+散热」市值最大的核心标的之一。
delta.descriptionEn: Delta Electronics is a global leader in power management, with very high market share and efficiency technology in switching power supplies and PSUs. An AI server's two biggest physical constraints are "power delivery" and "cooling," and Delta does both: it provides server power supplies, power systems and the full power distribution from grid to chip in the data center, and is building out liquid cooling. As GPU-rack power surges, demand for high-power-density, high-efficiency power supplies jumps, and Delta is one of the most core suppliers, with NVIDIA among its customers. It has turned the seemingly traditional business of "power efficiency" into a key position for the AI era — every watt saved and every joule of heat removed is money in the data center. Delta is one of the largest-cap core Taiwan-listed names in "AI power + cooling."
whyItMatters: 全球电源管理龙头,份额与效率技术领先
供电+散热两头都做,从市电到芯片整套供配电
GPU 机柜功率暴增,高功率密度电源需求猛增
台股「AI 供电+散热」市值最大核心标的之一

mpwr.name: 芯源系统
mpwr.oneLiner: 电源管理芯片高增长厂，绑定英伟达。
mpwr.business: 电源管理集成电路(PMIC)与电源模块，为 GPU 供电的关键芯片供应商。

vicor.name: Vicor
vicor.business: 高密度直流电源转换模块，靠近 GPU 的末端供电方案。

manus.name: Manus
manus.oneLiner: 现象级通用 AI 智能体，Meta 收购被叫停的焦点。
manus.oneLinerEn: The breakout general AI agent at the center of a blocked Meta acquisition.
manus.tagline: 把想法交给它，替你做完
manus.taglineEn: Hand it your idea, and it gets it done
manus.hq: 新加坡（母公司蝴蝶效应源自北京）
manus.business: 通用自主智能体：给一个目标，它能自己规划、调用工具、操作浏览器/电脑，跑完整条复杂任务(做调研报告、建网站、订行程等)并交付成果。由肖弘的蝴蝶效应(Butterfly Effect)打造，前身是聚合多家大模型的浏览器助手 Monica，2025 年初以「首个通用 Agent」现象级出圈。2026 年营收约 1.25 亿美元。
manus.businessEn: A general autonomous agent: give it a goal and it plans, calls tools, and operates a browser/computer to complete an entire complex task (research reports, building sites, booking trips) and deliver the result. Built by Red Xiao Hong's Butterfly Effect, it evolved from Monica, a browser assistant that aggregated multiple models, and broke out in early 2025 as the "first general agent." Its 2026 revenue was about $125 million.
manus.description: Manus 由肖弘(Red Xiao Hong)创立的蝴蝶效应(Butterfly Effect)打造，团队源自北京、公司设在新加坡。它最早做的是聚合 GPT/Claude 等多家模型的浏览器助手 Monica，2025 年 3 月推出通用自主智能体 Manus——你给一个目标，它就自己拆解、调工具、操作电脑，端到端把任务办完并交付可用成果，被誉为「第一个真正好用的通用 Agent」，一号难求、现象级刷屏。资本层面同样戏剧性：Benchmark、红杉中国(HongShan)、真格、腾讯等入股；2025 年底 Meta 曾计划以 20–30 亿美元收购，但 2026 年 4 月被中国发改委叫停，Meta 于 6 月正式终止交易。2026 年营收约 1.25 亿美元。
manus.descriptionEn: Manus is built by Butterfly Effect, founded by Red Xiao Hong, with a team rooted in Beijing and the company based in Singapore. It began as Monica, a browser assistant aggregating models like GPT and Claude, then in March 2025 launched the general autonomous agent Manus — give it a goal and it decomposes the task, calls tools, operates a computer, and delivers a usable result end to end, hailed as "the first genuinely useful general agent," with invites in scarce demand amid a viral frenzy. The capital story was equally dramatic: Benchmark, HongShan (Sequoia China), ZhenFund and Tencent invested; in late 2025 Meta planned to acquire it for $2–3 billion, but China's NDRC blocked the deal in April 2026 and Meta formally terminated it in June. Its 2026 revenue was about $125 million.
whyItMatters: 被誉为「第一个真正好用的通用 Agent」，现象级出圈
端到端替人跑完复杂任务，定义通用智能体产品形态
Meta 20–30 亿美元收购遭中方叫停，地缘与并购焦点
营收快速增长(2026 约 1.25 亿美元)

products.name: Manus
products.description: 自主规划+操作电脑，端到端完成任务。

products.name: Monica
products.description: 聚合多家大模型的浏览器 AI 助手。

genspark.name: Genspark
genspark.oneLiner: Super Agent 通用智能体，ARR 一年冲到 $250M。
genspark.oneLinerEn: The Super Agent general agent whose ARR hit $250M within a year.
genspark.tagline: 把一句话变成完整交付物
genspark.taglineEn: Turn one sentence into a finished deliverable
genspark.business: Super Agent 智能工作台：把自然语言需求变成完整交付物(报告/网站/PPT/表格)，可调用 80+ 工具(网页抓取、文件转换、打电话、生图等)；并推出 AgentBase，用自有数据搭 AI 原生数据库/看板替代传统 SaaS。2026 年将 B 轮扩到 $485M、估值 $26 亿，ARR 已达 $250M。
genspark.businessEn: The Super Agent workbench turns natural-language requests into finished deliverables (reports, sites, slides, spreadsheets) and can call 80+ tools (web scraping, file conversion, phone calls, image generation); it also offers AgentBase, building AI-native databases/boards from your own data to replace traditional SaaS. In 2026 it expanded its Series B to $485M at a $2.6B valuation, with ARR reaching $250M.
genspark.description: Genspark 成立于 2024 年，切入「通用 Super Agent」：你提一个目标，它自主调用 80 多种工具(搜索、抓取、转换、生图、甚至打电话)把整件事办完并交付可用成果，还推出 AgentBase 让用户用自有数据搭建 AI 原生的数据库与内部系统，直接替代一批传统 SaaS。增长极为凶猛——2025 年 4 月上线后不到一年 ARR 冲到约 $250M，2026 年把 B 轮扩到 $485M、投后估值约 $26 亿，是与 Manus 齐名的通用智能体新星。
genspark.descriptionEn: Founded in 2024, Genspark targets the "general Super Agent": give it a goal and it autonomously calls 80-plus tools (search, scraping, conversion, image generation, even phone calls) to complete the whole task and deliver a usable result, and it offers AgentBase so users can build AI-native databases and internal systems from their own data, directly replacing a swath of traditional SaaS. Growth has been ferocious — within a year of its April 2025 launch, ARR reached about $250M, and in 2026 it expanded its Series B to $485M at a roughly $2.6B post-money valuation, a general-agent star on par with Manus.
whyItMatters: Super Agent 调 80+ 工具，端到端产出完整交付物
AgentBase 用自有数据替代传统 SaaS，想象空间大
上线一年 ARR ~$250M，增长凶猛、估值 $26 亿

products.name: Super Agent
products.description: 调 80+ 工具，把需求变成完整交付物。

products.name: AgentBase
products.description: 用自有数据搭数据库/看板/内部系统。

adept.name: Adept
adept.oneLiner: 操作软件的 AI 智能体先驱（团队多入亚马逊）。
adept.oneLinerEn: A pioneer of software-operating AI agents (most of its team joined Amazon).
adept.tagline: 让 AI 学会使用软件
adept.business: 训练能操作企业软件界面的 Agent 模型，核心团队 2024 年加入亚马逊。
adept.businessEn: Trained agent models that operate enterprise software interfaces; its core team joined Amazon in 2024.
adept.description: Adept 是「会用软件的 AI 智能体」这一方向的先驱之一,由 Transformer 论文的几位合著者(如 Ashish Vaswani、Niki Parmar 等)于 2022 年创立,起点很高。它训练的模型不只是聊天,而是能看懂屏幕、操作真实软件界面(点菜单、填表、跨应用完成业务流程),要做「数字世界里的通用行动者」,代表作是 ACT-1 等。然而这条路技术极难、商业化慢,2024 年 Adept 的多位创始人与核心团队被亚马逊招揽(以许可+人才的方式),公司元气受损、转向。Adept 是「AI 操作软件(computer use)」这一如今大热方向的早期探路者,也是「明星团队被巨头吸走」的又一案例。
adept.descriptionEn: Adept is one of the pioneers of "AI agents that use software," founded in 2022 by several co-authors of the Transformer paper (such as Ashish Vaswani and Niki Parmar) — a high-pedigree start. Its models don't just chat but can read the screen and operate real software interfaces (clicking menus, filling forms, completing business processes across apps), aiming to be a "general actor in the digital world," with ACT-1 among its work. But this path is technically very hard and slow to commercialize, and in 2024 several of Adept's founders and core team were recruited by Amazon (via a licensing + talent arrangement), sapping the company and shifting its direction. Adept is an early trailblazer of the now-hot "AI operating software (computer use)" direction and another case of "a star team absorbed by a giant."
whyItMatters: 「会用软件的 AI 智能体」先驱,Transformer 作者创立
模型能看屏幕、操作真实软件界面(ACT-1)
技术极难、商业化慢,2024 核心团队被亚马逊招揽
computer use 早期探路者,「明星团队被巨头吸走」案例

sanhua.name: 三花智控
sanhua.oneLiner: 热管理龙头，切入机器人执行器。
sanhua.oneLinerEn: A thermal-management leader moving into robot actuators.
sanhua.taglineEn: From thermal management to mechatronic actuation
sanhua.subcategory: 热管理 / 机电执行器
sanhua.business: 制冷/汽车热管理龙头，切入人形机器人机电执行器(丝杠/关节)，特斯拉产业链。
sanhua.businessEn: A leader in refrigeration/automotive thermal management, moving into humanoid-robot mechatronic actuators (screws/joints); in the Tesla supply chain.
sanhua.description: 三花智控是全球制冷与汽车热管理的龙头(空调阀件、电动车热管理系统等份额领先),本就是特斯拉的重要供应商。它凭借精密制造与机电一体化的深厚积累,顺势切入人形机器人最贵、最难的零部件之一——机电执行器(把电机、减速、丝杠、传感集成成一个「电动关节/直线执行器」,相当于机器人的「肌肉」)。作为特斯拉 Optimus 产业链的核心候选供应商,三花被视为「A 股人形机器人执行器」最受关注的标的之一:一头连着现有的热管理主业提供现金流,一头押注机器人量产带来的巨大增量。
sanhua.descriptionEn: Sanhua is a global leader in refrigeration and automotive thermal management (leading share in AC valves, EV thermal-management systems), and already an important Tesla supplier. Leveraging deep expertise in precision manufacturing and mechatronic integration, it has moved into one of the most expensive, hardest humanoid-robot parts — mechatronic actuators (integrating motor, reduction, screw and sensors into an "electric joint/linear actuator," essentially a robot's "muscle"). As a core candidate supplier in the Tesla Optimus supply chain, Sanhua is one of the most-watched "A-share humanoid actuator" names: one foot in its existing thermal-management business for cash flow, the other betting on the huge upside of robot mass production.
whyItMatters: 全球制冷/汽车热管理龙头,特斯拉重要供应商
凭精密制造切入人形机器人机电执行器
执行器是机器人「肌肉」,最贵最难零部件之一
Optimus 产业链核心候选,A 股执行器焦点

topu.name: 拓普集团
topu.oneLiner: 汽车零部件龙头，布局机器人执行器。
topu.oneLinerEn: An auto-parts leader building into robot actuators.
topu.tagline: 从汽车部件到机器人执行
topu.taglineEn: From auto parts to robot actuation
topu.business: 汽车 NVH/底盘部件，布局人形机器人直线执行器与关节，绑定特斯拉。
topu.businessEn: Automotive NVH/chassis parts, building into humanoid linear actuators and joints; tied to Tesla.
topu.description: 拓普集团是中国汽车零部件龙头,做减震、内饰、底盘、热管理等,是特斯拉在中国的核心供应商之一,以「平台化+大客户绑定」的模式高速成长。踩中人形机器人浪潮,拓普把汽车级的规模制造与成本控制能力,复用到机器人的直线执行器与关节总成上——目标是像供汽车零件一样,给特斯拉 Optimus 等大规模供应「电动关节」。它是「汽车零部件厂转型机器人执行器」这一逻辑的代表,凭借与特斯拉的深度关系与量产能力,成为 A 股机器人产业链的重要标的之一。
topu.descriptionEn: Tuopu Group is a Chinese auto-parts leader making NVH, interiors, chassis and thermal-management components, one of Tesla's core suppliers in China, growing fast on a "platformization + key-account" model. Riding the humanoid wave, Tuopu reuses its automotive-grade scale manufacturing and cost control for humanoid linear actuators and joint assemblies — aiming to supply "electric joints" at scale to Tesla Optimus much as it supplies auto parts. It is a representative of the "auto-parts maker pivoting to robot actuators" thesis, and with its deep Tesla relationship and mass-production capability, one of the important A-share robotics-chain names.
whyItMatters: 中国汽车零部件龙头,特斯拉核心供应商之一
把汽车级规模制造复用到机器人执行器/关节
目标像供汽车件一样给 Optimus 供「电动关节」
汽车厂转型机器人执行器代表,A 股机器人链标的

inovance.name: 汇川技术
inovance.oneLiner: 中国工业自动化与伺服电机龙头。
inovance.oneLinerEn: China's leader in industrial automation and servo motors.
inovance.tagline: 以自动化驱动智能制造
inovance.subcategory: 伺服 / 电机 / 运动控制
inovance.business: 变频器、伺服系统与电机，工业自动化龙头，机器人无框电机/关节核心供应。
inovance.businessEn: Inverters, servo systems and motors; China's industrial-automation leader and a core supplier of robot frameless motors/joints.
inovance.description: 汇川技术是中国工业自动化的龙头,做变频器、伺服系统、电机与控制器——这些正是「让机器精准动起来」的核心部件,广泛用于工厂产线、机床、电梯、新能源车等。它在伺服与运动控制上的深厚积累,直接迁移到人形机器人:机器人的关节需要高性能的无框力矩电机、伺服驱动与精密控制,汇川是国产供应中最有实力的玩家之一。相比只做单一零件的公司,汇川能提供「电机 + 驱动 + 控制」较完整的一套,是「工业自动化龙头切入机器人」的代表,也被视为中国机器人核心零部件国产化的中坚力量。
inovance.descriptionEn: Inovance is China's leader in industrial automation, making inverters, servo systems, motors and controllers — the core parts that "make machines move precisely," widely used in factory lines, machine tools, elevators and EVs. Its deep expertise in servo and motion control transfers directly to humanoid robots: robot joints need high-performance frameless torque motors, servo drives and precise control, and Inovance is one of the strongest domestic suppliers. Unlike single-part companies, Inovance can provide a fairly complete "motor + drive + control" set — a representative of "industrial-automation leader entering robotics" and seen as a backbone of localizing China's core robot components.
whyItMatters: 中国工业自动化龙头,伺服/电机/运动控制积累深
机器人关节需高性能无框力矩电机与伺服驱动
能提供「电机+驱动+控制」较完整一套
机器人核心零部件国产化中坚力量

leaderdrive.name: 绿的谐波
leaderdrive.tagline: 国产精密谐波传动的突破者
leaderdrive.taglineEn: Breaking through in domestic precision harmonic drives
leaderdrive.business: 谐波减速器国产替代龙头，人形机器人关节核心零部件。
leaderdrive.businessEn: China's leader in harmonic-reducer import substitution — a core part of humanoid-robot joints.
leaderdrive.description: 绿的谐波是中国谐波减速器的龙头,是这一长期被日本哈默纳科垄断的高精度零部件里,国产替代做得最好的公司。谐波减速器是机器人关节的「命门」——精度、寿命、一致性要求极高,做出来很难。绿的谐波实现了规模化量产,打入工业机器人与协作机器人供应链,并深度卡位人形机器人:每台人形要用几十个谐波减速器,而供应又是瓶颈,绿的谐波作为国产主力(据传进入特斯拉 Optimus 等供应链评估)被寄予厚望。它是「人形机器人量产 + 核心零部件国产化」双重逻辑下 A 股最纯的谐波减速器标的。
leaderdrive.descriptionEn: Leaderdrive is China's leading harmonic-reducer maker and the best domestic-substitution player in this high-precision component long dominated by Japan's Harmonic Drive. The harmonic reducer is the "crux" of a robot joint — demanding extreme precision, lifespan and consistency, and very hard to make. Leaderdrive achieved scale production, entered industrial- and collaborative-robot supply chains, and is deeply positioned in humanoids: each humanoid uses dozens of harmonic reducers and supply is a bottleneck, so as the domestic mainstay (reportedly in evaluation for supply chains like Tesla Optimus) Leaderdrive carries high expectations. It is the purest A-share harmonic-reducer name under the dual thesis of "humanoid mass production + core-component localization."
whyItMatters: 中国谐波减速器龙头,国产替代做得最好
谐波减速器是机器人关节「命门」,门槛极高
实现规模化量产,打入机器人供应链
人形量产+核心件国产化,A 股最纯谐波标的
